title: Joint Path and Push Planning Among Movable Obstacles
title_zh: 可移动障碍物之间的联合路径和推动规划
abstract: This paper explores the Navigation Among Movable Obstacles (NAMO) problem and proposes joint path and push planning: which path to take and in what direction the obstacles should be pushed at, given a start and goal position. We present a planning algorithm for selecting a path and the obstacles to be pushed, where a Rapidly-exploring Random Tree (RRT)-based heuristic is employed to calculate a minimal collision path. When it is necessary to apply a pushing force to slide an obstacle out of the way, the planners leverage means-end analysis through a dynamic physics simulation to determine the sequence of linear pushes to clear the necessary space. Simulation experiments show that our approach finds solutions in higher clutter percentages (up to 49%) compared to the straight-line push planner (37%) and RRT without pushing (18%).
summary: This paper explores the Navigation Among Movable Obstacles (NAMO) problem and proposes joint path and push planning: which path to take and in what direction the obstacles should be pushed at, given a start and goal position. We present a planning algorithm for selecting a path and the obstacles to be pushed, where a Rapidly-exploring Random Tree (RRT)-based heuristic is employed to calculate a minimal collision path. When it is necessary to apply a pushing force to slide an obstacle out of the way, the planners leverage means-end analysis through a dynamic physics simulation to determine the sequence of linear pushes to clear the necessary space. Simulation experiments show that our approach finds solutions in higher clutter percentages (up to 49%) compared to the straight-line push planner (37%) and RRT without pushing (18%).
abstract_zh: 本文探讨了可移动障碍物之间的导航（NAMO）问题，并提出了联合路径和推送规划：在给定起始位置和目标位置的情况下，应采取哪条路径以及应将障碍物推向哪个方向。我们提出了一种用于选择路径和要推动的障碍物的规划算法，其中采用基于快速探索随机树（RRT）的启发式方法来计算最小碰撞路径。当需要施加推力将障碍物滑开时，规划人员通过动态物理模拟利用手段端分析来确定线性推动的顺序，以清理必要的空间。模拟实验表明，与直线推送规划器 (37%) 和无推送的 RRT (18%) 相比，我们的方法找到了更高的杂波百分比（高达 49%）的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在可移动障碍物中的导航问题，提出了一种联合路径规划与障碍物推动方向选择的算法。
AI.motivation: 传统导航算法在障碍物密集环境中难以找到有效路径，需结合障碍物推动策略以提高通过率。
AI.method: 采用基于RRT的启发式算法计算最小碰撞路径，并通过动态物理模拟确定障碍物推动顺序。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在49%障碍物密度下成功率达100%，优于直线推动规划（37%）和无推动RRT（18%）。
AI.conclusion: 联合路径规划与动态推动策略能显著提升高密度障碍物环境下的导航成功率。

title: MultiMix: Sparingly Supervised, Extreme Multitask Learning From Medical Images
title_zh: MultiMix：从医学图像中进行有节制监督的极端多任务学习
comment: Accepted to IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI) 2021
comments: Accepted to IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI) 2021
abstract: Semi-supervised learning via learning from limited quantities of labeled data has been investigated as an alternative to supervised counterparts. Maximizing knowledge gains from copious unlabeled data benefit semi-supervised learning settings. Moreover, learning multiple tasks within the same model further improves model generalizability. We propose a novel multitask learning model, namely MultiMix, which jointly learns disease classification and anatomical segmentation in a sparingly supervised manner, while preserving explainability through bridge saliency between the two tasks. Our extensive experimentation with varied quantities of labeled data in the training sets justify the effectiveness of our multitasking model for the classification of pneumonia and segmentation of lungs from chest X-ray images. Moreover, both in-domain and cross-domain evaluations across the tasks further showcase the potential of our model to adapt to challenging generalization scenarios.
summary: Semi-supervised learning via learning from limited quantities of labeled data has been investigated as an alternative to supervised counterparts. Maximizing knowledge gains from copious unlabeled data benefit semi-supervised learning settings. Moreover, learning multiple tasks within the same model further improves model generalizability. We propose a novel multitask learning model, namely MultiMix, which jointly learns disease classification and anatomical segmentation in a sparingly supervised manner, while preserving explainability through bridge saliency between the two tasks. Our extensive experimentation with varied quantities of labeled data in the training sets justify the effectiveness of our multitasking model for the classification of pneumonia and segmentation of lungs from chest X-ray images. Moreover, both in-domain and cross-domain evaluations across the tasks further showcase the potential of our model to adapt to challenging generalization scenarios.
abstract_zh: 通过从有限数量的标记数据中学习的半监督学习已经被研究作为监督学习的替代方案。最大限度地从大量未标记数据中获取知识有利于半监督学习环境。此外，在同一模型中学习多个任务进一步提高了模型的通用性。我们提出了一种新颖的多任务学习模型，即 MultiMix，它以谨慎监督的方式联合学习疾病分类和解剖分割，同时通过两个任务之间的桥梁显着性保持可解释性。我们对训练集中不同数量的标记数据进行了广泛的实验，证明了我们的多任务模型对于肺炎分类和胸部 X 射线图像肺部分割的有效性。此外，跨任务的域内和跨域评估进一步展示了我们的模型适应具有挑战性的泛化场景的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种稀疏监督的极端多任务学习模型MultiMix，用于医学图像中的疾病分类与解剖分割任务，特别针对胸部X光图像的肺炎分类和肺部分割。
AI.motivation: 半监督学习可利用大量未标记数据提升模型性能，而多任务学习能增强泛化能力。然而现有方法在稀疏标注场景下可能效果不足，且缺乏任务间可解释性。
AI.method: 设计MultiMix模型联合学习分类与分割任务，通过桥接显著性机制实现任务间知识迁移，并在不同标注数据量下验证模型有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明模型在肺炎分类和肺部分割任务中表现优异，且在领域内与跨领域评估中展现出良好的适应性与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: MultiMix通过稀疏监督的多任务学习有效提升医学图像分析性能，为复杂场景下的模型泛化提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Xiaoyu Kou,Yankai Lin,Yuntao Li,Jiahao Xu,Peng Li,Jie Zhou,Yan Zhang
title: DisenE: Disentangling Knowledge Graph Embeddings
title_zh: DisenE：解开知识图嵌入
comment: There are some mistakes in the paper
comments: There are some mistakes in the paper
abstract: Knowledge graph embedding (KGE), aiming to embed entities and relations into low-dimensional vectors, has attracted wide attention recently. However, the existing research is mainly based on the black-box neural models, which makes it difficult to interpret the learned representation. In this paper, we introduce DisenE, an end-to-end framework to learn disentangled knowledge graph embeddings. Specially, we introduce an attention-based mechanism that enables the model to explicitly focus on relevant components of entity embeddings according to a given relation. Furthermore, we introduce two novel regularizers to encourage each component of the entity representation to independently reflect an isolated semantic aspect. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed DisenE investigates a perspective to address the interpretability of KGE and is proved to be an effective way to improve the performance of link prediction tasks.
summary: Knowledge graph embedding (KGE), aiming to embed entities and relations into low-dimensional vectors, has attracted wide attention recently. However, the existing research is mainly based on the black-box neural models, which makes it difficult to interpret the learned representation. In this paper, we introduce DisenE, an end-to-end framework to learn disentangled knowledge graph embeddings. Specially, we introduce an attention-based mechanism that enables the model to explicitly focus on relevant components of entity embeddings according to a given relation. Furthermore, we introduce two novel regularizers to encourage each component of the entity representation to independently reflect an isolated semantic aspect. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed DisenE investigates a perspective to address the interpretability of KGE and is proved to be an effective way to improve the performance of link prediction tasks.
abstract_zh: 知识图嵌入（KGE）旨在将实体和关系嵌入到低维向量中，最近引起了广泛的关注。然而，现有的研究主要基于黑盒神经模型，这使得解释学习到的表示变得困难。在本文中，我们介绍了 DisenE，一个用于学习解缠结知识图嵌入的端到端框架。特别地，我们引入了一种基于注意力的机制，使模型能够根据给定的关系明确地关注实体嵌入的相关组件。此外，我们引入了两个新颖的正则化器，以鼓励实体表示的每个组件独立地反映孤立的语义方面。实验结果表明，我们提出的 DisenE 研究了解决 KGE 可解释性的视角，并被证明是提高链接预测任务性能的有效方法。

AI.tldr: 提出DisenE框架以学习解耦的知识图谱嵌入，提升可解释性和链接预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱嵌入方法依赖黑箱神经模型，导致表示结果难以解释，需探索更可解释的建模方式。
AI.method: 引入基于注意力的机制使模型聚焦关系相关嵌入组件，并设计两种正则化器促使实体表示组件独立反映语义。
AI.result: 实验验证DisenE有效提升链接预测任务性能，证实了解耦建模对可解释性的改进作用。
AI.conclusion: DisenE为知识图谱嵌入的可解释性研究提供了新视角，是提升模型性能的有效方法。

Specially, we introduce an attention-based mechanism that enables the model to explicitly focus on relevant components of entity embeddings according to a given relation. Furthermore, we introduce two novel regularizers to encourage each component of the entity representation to independently reflect an isolated semantic aspect. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed DisenE investigates a perspective to address the interpretability of KGE and is proved to be an effective way to improve the performance of link prediction tasks. 知识图嵌入（KGE）旨在将实体和关系嵌入到低维向量中，最近引起了广泛的关注。然而，现有的研究主要基于黑盒神经模型，这使得解释学习到的表示变得困难。在本文中，我们介绍了 DisenE，一个用于学习解缠结知识图嵌入的端到端框架。特别地，我们引入了一种基于注意力的机制，使模型能够根据给定的关系明确地关注实体嵌入的相关组件。此外，我们引入了两个新颖的正则化器，以鼓励实体表示的每个组件独立地反映孤立的语义方面。实验结果表明，我们提出的 DisenE 研究了解决 KGE 可解释性的视角，并被证明是提高链接预测任务性能的有效方法。 提出DisenE框架以学习解耦的知识图谱嵌入，提升可解释性和链接预测性能。 Xiaoyu Kou,Yankai Lin,Yuntao Li,Jiahao Xu,Peng Li,Jie Zhou,Yan Zhang cs.CL,cs.AI

title: CASS-NAT: CTC Alignment-based Single Step Non-autoregressive Transformer for Speech Recognition
title_zh: CASS-NAT：用于语音识别的基于 CTC 对齐的单步非自回归变压器
comment: Accepted to ICASSP2021, camera ready version
comments: Accepted to ICASSP2021, camera ready version
abstract: We propose a CTC alignment-based single step non-autoregressive transformer (CASS-NAT) for speech recognition. Specifically, the CTC alignment contains the information of (a) the number of tokens for decoder input, and (b) the time span of acoustics for each token. The information are used to extract acoustic representation for each token in parallel, referred to as token-level acoustic embedding which substitutes the word embedding in autoregressive transformer (AT) to achieve parallel generation in decoder. During inference, an error-based alignment sampling method is proposed to be applied to the CTC output space, reducing the WER and retaining the parallelism as well. Experimental results show that the proposed method achieves WERs of 3.8%/9.1% on Librispeech test clean/other dataset without an external LM, and a CER of 5.8% on Aishell1 Mandarin corpus, respectively1. Compared to the AT baseline, the CASS-NAT has a performance reduction on WER, but is 51.2x faster in terms of RTF. When decoding with an oracle CTC alignment, the lower bound of WER without LM reaches 2.3% on the test-clean set, indicating the potential of the proposed method.
summary: We propose a CTC alignment-based single step non-autoregressive transformer (CASS-NAT) for speech recognition. Specifically, the CTC alignment contains the information of (a) the number of tokens for decoder input, and (b) the time span of acoustics for each token. The information are used to extract acoustic representation for each token in parallel, referred to as token-level acoustic embedding which substitutes the word embedding in autoregressive transformer (AT) to achieve parallel generation in decoder. During inference, an error-based alignment sampling method is proposed to be applied to the CTC output space, reducing the WER and retaining the parallelism as well. Experimental results show that the proposed method achieves WERs of 3.8%/9.1% on Librispeech test clean/other dataset without an external LM, and a CER of 5.8% on Aishell1 Mandarin corpus, respectively1. Compared to the AT baseline, the CASS-NAT has a performance reduction on WER, but is 51.2x faster in terms of RTF. When decoding with an oracle CTC alignment, the lower bound of WER without LM reaches 2.3% on the test-clean set, indicating the potential of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于语音识别的基于 CTC 对齐的单步非自回归变换器 (CASS-NAT)。具体来说，CTC对齐包含以下信息：(a)解码器输入的令牌数量，以及(b)每个令牌的声学时间跨度。这些信息用于并行提取每个令牌的声学表示，称为令牌级声学嵌入，它替代自回归变压器（AT）中的词嵌入以实现解码器中的并行生成。在推理过程中，提出了一种基于误差的对齐采样方法应用于CTC输出空间，减少了WER并保留了并行性。实验结果表明，该方法在没有外部 LM 的 Librispeech 测试干净/其他数据集上分别实现了 3.8%/9.1% 的 WER，在 Aishell1 普通话语料库上分别实现了 5.8% 的 CER1。与 AT 基线相比，CASS-NAT 在 WER 上性能有所下降，但在 RTF 方面快了 51.2 倍。当使用 oracle CTC 对齐进行解码时，没有 LM 的 WER 下限在测试干净集上达到 2.3%，表明该方法的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于CTC对齐的非自回归Transformer模型CASS-NAT，用于提升语音识别的并行生成效率与准确率。
AI.motivation: 传统自回归模型生成速度慢，非自回归模型虽快但准确率不足。通过利用CTC对齐信息实现并行生成与准确率平衡。
AI.method: 基于CTC对齐提取token级声学嵌入替代词嵌入，结合错误驱动的对齐采样方法，在保持并行性的同时降低WER。
AI.result: Librispeech测试集无外部语言模型下WER为3.8%/9.1%，Aishell1 CER为5.8%，RTF比基线快51.2倍，Oracle对齐下WER下限达2.3%。
AI.conclusion: CASS-NAT通过CTC对齐信息有效提升语音识别效率与性能，验证了非自回归模型在保持速度优势下的潜力。

title: Differentiable Channel Sparsity Search via Weight Sharing within Filters
title_zh: 通过过滤器内的权重共享进行可微通道稀疏搜索
abstract: In this paper, we propose the differentiable channel sparsity search (DCSS) for convolutional neural networks. Unlike traditional channel pruning algorithms which require users to manually set prune ratios for each convolutional layer, DCSS automatically searches the optimal combination of sparsities. Inspired by the differentiable architecture search (DARTS), we draw lessons from the continuous relaxation and leverage the gradient information to balance the computational cost and metrics. Since directly applying the scheme of DARTS causes shape mismatching and excessive memory consumption, we introduce a novel technique called weight sharing within filters. This technique elegantly eliminates the problem of shape mismatching with negligible additional resources. We conduct comprehensive experiments on not only image classification but also find-grained tasks including semantic segmentation and image super resolution to verify the effectiveness of DCSS. Compared with previous network pruning approaches, DCSS achieves state-of-the-art results for image classification. Experimental results of semantic segmentation and image super resolution indicate that task-specific search achieves better performance than transferring slim models, demonstrating the wide applicability and high efficiency of DCSS.
summary: In this paper, we propose the differentiable channel sparsity search (DCSS) for convolutional neural networks. Unlike traditional channel pruning algorithms which require users to manually set prune ratios for each convolutional layer, DCSS automatically searches the optimal combination of sparsities. Inspired by the differentiable architecture search (DARTS), we draw lessons from the continuous relaxation and leverage the gradient information to balance the computational cost and metrics. Since directly applying the scheme of DARTS causes shape mismatching and excessive memory consumption, we introduce a novel technique called weight sharing within filters. This technique elegantly eliminates the problem of shape mismatching with negligible additional resources. We conduct comprehensive experiments on not only image classification but also find-grained tasks including semantic segmentation and image super resolution to verify the effectiveness of DCSS. Compared with previous network pruning approaches, DCSS achieves state-of-the-art results for image classification. Experimental results of semantic segmentation and image super resolution indicate that task-specific search achieves better performance than transferring slim models, demonstrating the wide applicability and high efficiency of DCSS.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了卷积神经网络的可微通道稀疏搜索（DCSS）。与传统的通道剪枝算法需要用户手动设置每个卷积层的剪枝比率不同，DCSS 会自动搜索稀疏度的最佳组合。受可微架构搜索（DARTS）的启发，我们从连续松弛中吸取教训，并利用梯度信息来平衡计算成本和指标。由于直接应用 DARTS 方案会导致形状不匹配和过多的内存消耗，因此我们引入了一种称为过滤器内权重共享的新技术。这项技术巧妙地消除了形状不匹配的问题，而附加资源可以忽略不计。我们不仅对图像分类进行了全面的实验，还对语义分割和图像超分辨率等细粒度任务进行了全面的实验，以验证 DCSS 的有效性。与以前的网络修剪方法相比，DCSS 实现了图像分类的最先进的结果。语义分割和图像超分辨率的实验结果表明，特定任务搜索比传输细长模型具有更好的性能，证明了DCSS的广泛适用性和高效率。

AI.tldr: 提出一种自动搜索卷积神经网络最优通道稀疏性的方法，以提升模型效率。
AI.motivation: 传统通道剪枝需手动设置比例，效率低，且DARTS存在形状不匹配和内存问题，需改进。
AI.method: 基于DARTS的可微通道稀疏性搜索，结合滤波器内权重共享技术解决形状不匹配和内存问题。
AI.result: 在多个任务中实现最先进结果，尤其在图像分类和语义分割中优于迁移瘦身模型。
AI.conclusion: 证明DCSS在广泛任务中的高效性和适用性，为自动模型压缩提供新方法。

ai_content.conclusion: 证明DCSS在广泛任务中的高效性和适用性，为自动模型压缩提供新方法。

title: CompRess: Self-Supervised Learning by Compressing Representations
title_zh: CompRess：通过压缩表示进行自监督学习
abstract: Self-supervised learning aims to learn good representations with unlabeled data. Recent works have shown that larger models benefit more from self-supervised learning than smaller models. As a result, the gap between supervised and self-supervised learning has been greatly reduced for larger models. In this work, instead of designing a new pseudo task for self-supervised learning, we develop a model compression method to compress an already learned, deep self-supervised model (teacher) to a smaller one (student). We train the student model so that it mimics the relative similarity between the data points in the teacher's embedding space. For AlexNet, our method outperforms all previous methods including the fully supervised model on ImageNet linear evaluation (59.0% compared to 56.5%) and on nearest neighbor evaluation (50.7% compared to 41.4%). To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time a self-supervised AlexNet has outperformed supervised one on ImageNet classification. Our code is available here: https://github.com/UMBCvision/CompRess
summary: Self-supervised learning aims to learn good representations with unlabeled data. Recent works have shown that larger models benefit more from self-supervised learning than smaller models. As a result, the gap between supervised and self-supervised learning has been greatly reduced for larger models. In this work, instead of designing a new pseudo task for self-supervised learning, we develop a model compression method to compress an already learned, deep self-supervised model (teacher) to a smaller one (student). We train the student model so that it mimics the relative similarity between the data points in the teacher's embedding space. For AlexNet, our method outperforms all previous methods including the fully supervised model on ImageNet linear evaluation (59.0% compared to 56.5%) and on nearest neighbor evaluation (50.7% compared to 41.4%). To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time a self-supervised AlexNet has outperformed supervised one on ImageNet classification. Our code is available here: https://github.com/UMBCvision/CompRess
abstract_zh: 自监督学习旨在利用未标记的数据学习良好的表示。最近的研究表明，较大的模型比较小的模型从自我监督学习中受益更多。因此，对于较大的模型，监督学习和自监督学习之间的差距已大大缩小。在这项工作中，我们没有为自监督学习设计一个新的伪任务，而是开发了一种模型压缩方法，将已经学习的深度自监督模型（教师）压缩为较小的模型（学生）。我们训练学生模型，使其模仿教师嵌入空间中数据点之间的相对相似性。对于 AlexNet，我们的方法优于之前的所有方法，包括 ImageNet 线性评估（59.0% 对比 56.5%）和最近邻评估（50.7% 对比 41.4%）的完全监督模型。据我们所知，这是自监督 AlexNet 第一次在 ImageNet 分类上优于监督 AlexNet。我们的代码可以在这里找到：https://github.com/UMBCvision/CompRess

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CompRess的自监督学习方法，通过压缩已学习的深层自监督模型（教师模型）到较小模型（学生模型），以提升小模型的表征能力。
AI.motivation: 大模型在自监督学习中表现优于小模型，但小模型的自监督效果较差。现有方法通过设计新任务提升自监督效果，但本文尝试通过模型压缩技术解决这一问题。
AI.method: 训练学生模型以模仿教师模型嵌入空间中数据点之间的相对相似性，无需设计新任务，仅通过压缩教师模型的表征来优化学生模型。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，压缩后的AlexNet在线性评估（59.0%）和最近邻评估（50.7%）中均优于所有先前方法及全监督模型（56.5%和41.4%）。
AI.conclusion: CompRess首次实现自监督AlexNet在ImageNet分类任务中超越监督模型，证明了通过压缩表征提升小模型自监督效果的可行性。

search_text: CompRess: Self-Supervised Learning by Compressing Representations CompRess：通过压缩表示进行自监督学习 Self-supervised learning aims to learn good representations with unlabeled data. Recent works have shown that larger models benefit more from self-supervised learning than smaller models. As a result, the gap between supervised and self-supervised learning has been greatly reduced for larger models. In this work, instead of designing a new pseudo task for self-supervised learning, we develop a model compression method to compress an already learned, deep self-supervised model (teacher) to a smaller one (student). We train the student model so that it mimics the relative similarity between the data points in the teacher's embedding space. For AlexNet, our method outperforms all previous methods including the fully supervised model on ImageNet linear evaluation (59.0% compared to 56.5%) and on nearest neighbor evaluation (50.7% compared to 41.4%). To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time a self-supervised AlexNet has outperformed supervised one on ImageNet classification. Our code is available here: https://github.com/UMBCvision/CompRess 自监督学习旨在利用未标记的数据学习良好的表示。最近的研究表明，较大的模型比较小的模型从自我监督学习中受益更多。因此，对于较大的模型，监督学习和自监督学习之间的差距已大大缩小。在这项工作中，我们没有为自监督学习设计一个新的伪任务，而是开发了一种模型压缩方法，将已经学习的深度自监督模型（教师）压缩为较小的模型（学生）。我们训练学生模型，使其模仿教师嵌入空间中数据点之间的相对相似性。对于 AlexNet，我们的方法优于之前的所有方法，包括 ImageNet 线性评估（59.0% 对比 56.5%）和最近邻评估（50.7% 对比 41.4%）的完全监督模型。据我们所知，这是自监督 AlexNet 第一次在 ImageNet 分类上优于监督 AlexNet。我们的代码可以在这里找到：https://github.com/UMBCvision/CompRess 本文提出一种名为CompRess的自监督学习方法，通过压缩已学习的深层自监督模型（教师模型）到较小模型（学生模型），以提升小模型的表征能力。 Soroush Abbasi Koohpayegani,Ajinkya Tejankar,Hamed Pirsiavash cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Socially-Compatible Behavior Design of Autonomous Vehicles with Verification on Real Human Data
title_zh: 自动驾驶汽车的社交兼容行为设计及真实人类数据验证
comment: IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters 2021 (Best Paper Award - Honorable Mention)
comments: IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters 2021 (Best Paper Award - Honorable Mention)
abstract: As more and more autonomous vehicles (AVs) are being deployed on public roads, designing socially compatible behaviors for them is becoming increasingly important. In order to generate safe and efficient actions, AVs need to not only predict the future behaviors of other traffic participants, but also be aware of the uncertainties associated with such behavior prediction. In this paper, we propose an uncertain-aware integrated prediction and planning (UAPP) framework. It allows the AVs to infer the characteristics of other road users online and generate behaviors optimizing not only their own rewards, but also their courtesy to others, and their confidence regarding the prediction uncertainties. We first propose the definitions for courtesy and confidence. Based on that, their influences on the behaviors of AVs in interactive driving scenarios are explored. Moreover, we evaluate the proposed algorithm on naturalistic human driving data by comparing the generated behavior against ground truth. Results show that the online inference can significantly improve the human-likeness of the generated behaviors. Furthermore, we find that human drivers show great courtesy to others, even for those without right-of-way. We also find that such driving preferences vary significantly in different cultures.
summary: As more and more autonomous vehicles (AVs) are being deployed on public roads, designing socially compatible behaviors for them is becoming increasingly important. In order to generate safe and efficient actions, AVs need to not only predict the future behaviors of other traffic participants, but also be aware of the uncertainties associated with such behavior prediction. In this paper, we propose an uncertain-aware integrated prediction and planning (UAPP) framework. It allows the AVs to infer the characteristics of other road users online and generate behaviors optimizing not only their own rewards, but also their courtesy to others, and their confidence regarding the prediction uncertainties. We first propose the definitions for courtesy and confidence. Based on that, their influences on the behaviors of AVs in interactive driving scenarios are explored. Moreover, we evaluate the proposed algorithm on naturalistic human driving data by comparing the generated behavior against ground truth. Results show that the online inference can significantly improve the human-likeness of the generated behaviors. Furthermore, we find that human drivers show great courtesy to others, even for those without right-of-way. We also find that such driving preferences vary significantly in different cultures.
abstract_zh: 随着越来越多的自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 部署在公共道路上，为它们设计社交兼容的行为变得越来越重要。为了产生安全有效的行动，自动驾驶汽车不仅需要预测其他交通参与者的未来行为，而且还需要意识到与这种行为预测相关的不确定性。在本文中，我们提出了一种不确定感知综合预测和规划（UAPP）框架。它允许自动驾驶汽车在线推断其他道路使用者的特征，并生成不仅优化自己的奖励、优化他们对他人的礼貌以及他们对预测不确定性的信心的行为。我们首先提出礼貌和信任的定义。在此基础上，探讨了它们对交互式驾驶场景中自动驾驶汽车行为的影响。此外，我们通过将生成的行为与地面真实情况进行比较来评估自然人类驾驶数据所提出的算法。结果表明，在线推理可以显着提高生成行为的人类相似度。此外，我们发现人类司机对他人表现出极大的礼貌，即使是对那些没有通行权的人。我们还发现，这种驾驶偏好在不同文化中存在显着差异。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种不确定感知的集成预测与规划框架（UAPP），用于设计社会兼容的自动驾驶车辆行为，并通过真实人类驾驶数据验证其效果。
AI.motivation: 随着自动驾驶车辆（AV）普及，其行为需与人类交通参与者社会规范兼容，以确保安全性和效率。现有方法未能充分考虑预测不确定性及人类驾驶的社会礼仪差异。
AI.method: 定义‘礼让’与‘置信度’概念，构建UAPP框架实现在线推断其他道路使用者特征，优化AV自身收益、礼让行为及预测置信度，并基于真实人类驾驶数据验证算法。
AI.result: 在线推断显著提升生成行为的人类相似性，发现人类驾驶员对无优先权者仍表现出礼让，且不同文化背景下驾驶偏好差异显著。
AI.conclusion: UAPP框架有效提升AV社会兼容性行为生成能力，揭示人类驾驶礼仪与文化关联性，为跨文化自动驾驶设计提供理论支持。

title: Melody-Conditioned Lyrics Generation with SeqGANs
title_zh: 使用 SeqGAN 生成旋律条件歌词
abstract: Automatic lyrics generation has received attention from both music and AI communities for years. Early rule-based approaches have~---due to increases in computational power and evolution in data-driven models---~mostly been replaced with deep-learning-based systems. Many existing approaches, however, either rely heavily on prior knowledge in music and lyrics writing or oversimplify the task by largely discarding melodic information and its relationship with the text. We propose an end-to-end melody-conditioned lyrics generation system based on Sequence Generative Adversarial Networks (SeqGAN), which generates a line of lyrics given the corresponding melody as the input. Furthermore, we investigate the performance of the generator with an additional input condition: the theme or overarching topic of the lyrics to be generated. We show that the input conditions have no negative impact on the evaluation metrics while enabling the network to produce more meaningful results.
summary: Automatic lyrics generation has received attention from both music and AI communities for years. Early rule-based approaches have~---due to increases in computational power and evolution in data-driven models---~mostly been replaced with deep-learning-based systems. Many existing approaches, however, either rely heavily on prior knowledge in music and lyrics writing or oversimplify the task by largely discarding melodic information and its relationship with the text. We propose an end-to-end melody-conditioned lyrics generation system based on Sequence Generative Adversarial Networks (SeqGAN), which generates a line of lyrics given the corresponding melody as the input. Furthermore, we investigate the performance of the generator with an additional input condition: the theme or overarching topic of the lyrics to be generated. We show that the input conditions have no negative impact on the evaluation metrics while enabling the network to produce more meaningful results.
abstract_zh: 自动歌词生成多年来一直受到音乐和人工智能社区的关注。由于计算能力的提高和数据驱动模型的演进，早期基于规则的方法大部分被基于深度学习的系统所取代。然而，许多现有的方法要么严重依赖音乐和歌词写作的先验知识，要么通过大量丢弃旋律信息及其与文本的关系来过度简化任务。我们提出了一种基于序列生成对抗网络（SeqGAN）的端到端旋律条件歌词生成系统，该系统以相应的旋律作为输入生成一行歌词。此外，我们还使用附加输入条件来研究生成器的性能：要生成的歌词的主题或总体主题。我们表明，输入条件对评估指标没有负面影响，同时使网络能够产生更有意义的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于SeqGAN的端到端旋律条件歌词生成系统，能够根据输入的旋律和主题生成歌词。
AI.motivation: 现有歌词生成方法或依赖音乐写作先验知识，或忽略旋律与文本的关系，导致生成结果不够贴合实际旋律需求。
AI.method: 采用序列生成对抗网络（SeqGAN），将旋律和主题作为条件输入，训练生成器直接输出符合旋律特征的歌词。
AI.result: 实验表明，加入主题条件不会影响评估指标，且使生成的歌词更具语义相关性；生成结果在旋律匹配度和主题贴合度上表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 融合旋律和主题条件的生成框架能有效提升歌词生成质量，为音乐创作提供新的AI辅助工具。

ai_content.motivation: 现有歌词生成方法或依赖音乐写作先验知识，或忽略旋律与文本的关系，导致生成结果不够贴合实际旋律需求。

motivation: 现有歌词生成方法或依赖音乐写作先验知识，或忽略旋律与文本的关系，导致生成结果不够贴合实际旋律需求。
method: 采用序列生成对抗网络（SeqGAN），将旋律和主题作为条件输入，训练生成器直接输出符合旋律特征的歌词。
result: 实验表明，加入主题条件不会影响评估指标，且使生成的歌词更具语义相关性；生成结果在旋律匹配度和主题贴合度上表现良好。
conclusion: 融合旋律和主题条件的生成框架能有效提升歌词生成质量，为音乐创作提供新的AI辅助工具。
search_text: Melody-Conditioned Lyrics Generation with SeqGANs 使用 SeqGAN 生成旋律条件歌词 Automatic lyrics generation has received attention from both music and AI communities for years. Early rule-based approaches have~---due to increases in computational power and evolution in data-driven models---~mostly been replaced with deep-learning-based systems. Many existing approaches, however, either rely heavily on prior knowledge in music and lyrics writing or oversimplify the task by largely discarding melodic information and its relationship with the text. We propose an end-to-end melody-conditioned lyrics generation system based on Sequence Generative Adversarial Networks (SeqGAN), which generates a line of lyrics given the corresponding melody as the input. Furthermore, we investigate the performance of the generator with an additional input condition: the theme or overarching topic of the lyrics to be generated. We show that the input conditions have no negative impact on the evaluation metrics while enabling the network to produce more meaningful results. 自动歌词生成多年来一直受到音乐和人工智能社区的关注。由于计算能力的提高和数据驱动模型的演进，早期基于规则的方法大部分被基于深度学习的系统所取代。然而，许多现有的方法要么严重依赖音乐和歌词写作的先验知识，要么通过大量丢弃旋律信息及其与文本的关系来过度简化任务。我们提出了一种基于序列生成对抗网络（SeqGAN）的端到端旋律条件歌词生成系统，该系统以相应的旋律作为输入生成一行歌词。此外，我们还使用附加输入条件来研究生成器的性能：要生成的歌词的主题或总体主题。我们表明，输入条件对评估指标没有负面影响，同时使网络能够产生更有意义的结果。 本文提出了一种基于SeqGAN的端到端旋律条件歌词生成系统，能够根据输入的旋律和主题生成歌词。 Yihao Chen,Alexander Lerch cs.SD,cs.IR,cs.LG,cs.MM,eess.AS

authors_text: Xuetao Jiang,Binbin Yong,Soheila Garshasbi,Jun Shen,Meiyu Jiang,Qingguo Zhou
title: Crop and weed classification based on AutoML
title_zh: 基于AutoML的农作物和杂草分类
comment: ef:J. Applied Computing and Intelligence, 2021, 1(1): 46-60
comments: ef:J. Applied Computing and Intelligence, 2021, 1(1): 46-60
abstract: CNN models already play an important role in classification of crop and weed with high accuracy, more than 95% as reported in literature. However, to manually choose and fine-tune the deep learning models becomes laborious and indispensable in most traditional practices and research. Moreover, the classic objective functions are not thoroughly compatible with agricultural farming tasks as the corresponding models suffer from misclassifying crop to weed, often more likely than in other deep learning application domains. In this paper, we applied autonomous machine learning with a new objective function for crop and weed classification, achieving higher accuracy and lower crop killing rate (rate of identifying a crop as a weed). The experimental results show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art applications, for example, ResNet and VGG19.
summary: CNN models already play an important role in classification of crop and weed with high accuracy, more than 95% as reported in literature. However, to manually choose and fine-tune the deep learning models becomes laborious and indispensable in most traditional practices and research. Moreover, the classic objective functions are not thoroughly compatible with agricultural farming tasks as the corresponding models suffer from misclassifying crop to weed, often more likely than in other deep learning application domains. In this paper, we applied autonomous machine learning with a new objective function for crop and weed classification, achieving higher accuracy and lower crop killing rate (rate of identifying a crop as a weed). The experimental results show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art applications, for example, ResNet and VGG19.
abstract_zh: CNN 模型已经在作物和杂草分类中发挥了重要作用，准确率很高，文献报道超过 95%。然而，在大多数传统实践和研究中，手动选择和微调深度学习模型变得费力且不可或缺。此外，经典的目标函数与农业耕作任务并不完全兼容，因为相应的模型容易将农作物错误分类为杂草，这种情况通常比其他深度学习应用领域更容易发生。在本文中，我们将具有新目标函数的自主机器学习应用于农作物和杂草分类，实现了更高的准确度和更低的农作物杀灭率（将农作物识别为杂草的比率）。实验结果表明，我们的方法优于最先进的应用程序，例如 ResNet 和 VGG19。

AI.tldr: 基于AutoML技术实现作物与杂草的高精度分类
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习模型手动调参繁琐，且目标函数在农业场景中易导致作物误判为杂草，影响实际应用效果
AI.method: 采用自主机器学习（AutoML）框架，并设计针对农业分类任务的新型目标函数以优化模型性能
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在准确率和作物误杀率指标上优于ResNet、VGG19等先进模型
AI.conclusion: AutoML结合定制化目标函数能有效提升作物杂草分类精度，降低误杀率，具有农业应用价值

title: Quantified Facial Temporal-Expressiveness Dynamics for Affect Analysis
title_zh: 用于情感分析的量化面部时间表现力动态
comment: 25th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR2020)
comments: 25th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR2020)
abstract: The quantification of visual affect data (e.g. face images) is essential to build and monitor automated affect modeling systems efficiently. Considering this, this work proposes quantified facial Temporal-expressiveness Dynamics (TED) to quantify the expressiveness of human faces. The proposed algorithm leverages multimodal facial features by incorporating static and dynamic information to enable accurate measurements of facial expressiveness. We show that TED can be used for high-level tasks such as summarization of unstructured visual data, and expectation from and interpretation of automated affect recognition models. To evaluate the positive impact of using TED, a case study was conducted on spontaneous pain using the UNBC-McMaster spontaneous shoulder pain dataset. Experimental results show the efficacy of using TED for quantified affect analysis.
summary: The quantification of visual affect data (e.g. face images) is essential to build and monitor automated affect modeling systems efficiently. Considering this, this work proposes quantified facial Temporal-expressiveness Dynamics (TED) to quantify the expressiveness of human faces. The proposed algorithm leverages multimodal facial features by incorporating static and dynamic information to enable accurate measurements of facial expressiveness. We show that TED can be used for high-level tasks such as summarization of unstructured visual data, and expectation from and interpretation of automated affect recognition models. To evaluate the positive impact of using TED, a case study was conducted on spontaneous pain using the UNBC-McMaster spontaneous shoulder pain dataset. Experimental results show the efficacy of using TED for quantified affect analysis.
abstract_zh: 视觉情感数据（例如面部图像）的量化对于有效构建和监控自动化情感建模系统至关重要。考虑到这一点，这项工作提出了量化面部时间表现力动力学（TED）来量化人脸的表现力。所提出的算法通过结合静态和动态信息来利用多模态面部特征，从而能够准确测量面部表情。我们证明 TED 可用于高级任务，例如非结构化视觉数据的总结，以及自动情感识别模型的期望和解释。为了评估使用 TED 的积极影响，我们使用 UNNBC-McMaster 自发性肩痛数据集对自发性疼痛进行了案例研究。实验结果表明使用 TED 进行量化情感分析的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出量化面部时间表达动态（TED）方法，用于准确测量面部表现力并提升情感分析效果。
AI.motivation: 量化视觉情感数据对构建自动化情感建模系统至关重要，而现有方法难以有效整合静态与动态面部信息。
AI.method: 通过融合静态和动态多模态面部特征，设计TED算法以量化面部表现力，并应用于自发性疼痛数据集的案例分析。
AI.result: 实验表明TED能有效提升情感分析性能，尤其在自发性疼痛识别任务中验证了其量化方法的实用性。
AI.conclusion: TED方法为情感分析提供了可量化的面部动态表达测量框架，适用于复杂场景下的自动化情感建模与解释。

authors_text: Tom Henighan,Jared Kaplan,Mor Katz,Mark Chen,Christopher Hesse,Jacob Jackson,Heewoo Jun,Tom B. Brown,Prafulla Dhariwal,Scott Gray,Chris Hallacy,Benjamin Mann,Alec Radford,Aditya Ramesh,Nick Ryder,Daniel M. Ziegler,John Schulman,Dario Amodei,Sam McCandlish
title: Scaling Laws for Autoregressive Generative Modeling
title_zh: 自回归生成模型的缩放定律
comment: 20+17 pages, 33 figures; added appendix with additional language results
comments: 20+17 pages, 33 figures; added appendix with additional language results
abstract: We identify empirical scaling laws for the cross-entropy loss in four domains: generative image modeling, video modeling, multimodal image$\leftrightarrow$text models, and mathematical problem solving. In all cases autoregressive Transformers smoothly improve in performance as model size and compute budgets increase, following a power-law plus constant scaling law. The optimal model size also depends on the compute budget through a power-law, with exponents that are nearly universal across all data domains. The cross-entropy loss has an information theoretic interpretation as $S($True$) + D_{\mathrm{KL}}($True$||$Model$)$, and the empirical scaling laws suggest a prediction for both the true data distribution's entropy and the KL divergence between the true and model distributions. With this interpretation, billion-parameter Transformers are nearly perfect models of the YFCC100M image distribution downsampled to an $8\times 8$ resolution, and we can forecast the model size needed to achieve any given reducible loss (ie $D_{\mathrm{KL}}$) in nats/image for other resolutions. We find a number of additional scaling laws in specific domains: (a) we identify a scaling relation for the mutual information between captions and images in multimodal models, and show how to answer the question "Is a picture worth a thousand words?"; (b) in the case of mathematical problem solving, we identify scaling laws for model performance when extrapolating beyond the training distribution; (c) we finetune generative image models for ImageNet classification and find smooth scaling of the classification loss and error rate, even as the generative loss levels off. Taken together, these results strengthen the case that scaling laws have important implications for neural network performance, including on downstream tasks.
summary: We identify empirical scaling laws for the cross-entropy loss in four domains: generative image modeling, video modeling, multimodal image$\leftrightarrow$text models, and mathematical problem solving. In all cases autoregressive Transformers smoothly improve in performance as model size and compute budgets increase, following a power-law plus constant scaling law. The optimal model size also depends on the compute budget through a power-law, with exponents that are nearly universal across all data domains. The cross-entropy loss has an information theoretic interpretation as $S($True$) + D_{\mathrm{KL}}($True$||$Model$)$, and the empirical scaling laws suggest a prediction for both the true data distribution's entropy and the KL divergence between the true and model distributions. With this interpretation, billion-parameter Transformers are nearly perfect models of the YFCC100M image distribution downsampled to an $8\times 8$ resolution, and we can forecast the model size needed to achieve any given reducible loss (ie $D_{\mathrm{KL}}$) in nats/image for other resolutions. We find a number of additional scaling laws in specific domains: (a) we identify a scaling relation for the mutual information between captions and images in multimodal models, and show how to answer the question "Is a picture worth a thousand words?"; (b) in the case of mathematical problem solving, we identify scaling laws for model performance when extrapolating beyond the training distribution; (c) we finetune generative image models for ImageNet classification and find smooth scaling of the classification loss and error rate, even as the generative loss levels off. Taken together, these results strengthen the case that scaling laws have important implications for neural network performance, including on downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们确定了四个领域中交叉熵损失的经验缩放定律：生成图像建模、视频建模、多模态图像$\leftrightarrow$文本模型和数学问题解决。在所有情况下，随着模型大小和计算预算的增加，自回归 Transformer 的性能都会平稳提高，遵循幂律加恒定缩放律。最佳模型大小还取决于幂律的计算预算，其指数在所有数据域中几乎通用。交叉熵损失的信息理论解释为 $S($True$) + D_{\mathrm{KL}}($True$||$Model$)$，经验缩放定律建议对真实数据分布的熵以及真实分布和模型分布之间的 KL 散度进行预测。通过这种解释，十亿参数的 Transformer 是 YFCC100M 图像分布的近乎完美的模型，下采样到 $8\times 8$ 分辨率，我们可以预测在其他分辨率的 nats/image 中实现任何给定的可减少损失（即 $D_{\mathrm{KL}}$）所需的模型大小。我们在特定领域发现了许多额外的缩放法则：（a）我们确定了多模态模型中标题和图像之间的互信息的缩放关系，并展示了如何回答“一张图片值得一千个单词吗？”的问题； (b) 在解决数学问题的情况下，当外推到训练分布之外时，我们确定模型性能的缩放法则； (c) 我们微调 ImageNet 分类的生成图像模型，并找到分类损失和错误率的平滑缩放，即使生成损失趋于平稳。综上所述，这些结果强化了缩放定律对神经网络性能（包括下游任务）具有重要影响的论点。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了自回归生成模型在不同领域中的交叉熵损失的规模定律，分析了模型大小和计算预算对性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 理解模型规模与计算资源如何影响生成模型性能，为不同任务提供理论依据和资源分配指导。
AI.method: 通过实证分析四个领域（图像生成、视频建模、多模态模型、数学问题解决），拟合幂律加常数的规模定律，并结合信息论解释损失函数。
AI.result: 发现模型性能随规模和计算预算呈幂律增长，预测真实分布熵和KL散度；在多模态模型中量化图文互信息，数学问题解决中发现外推规模定律，图像分类任务中分类损失平滑下降。
AI.conclusion: 规模定律对神经网络性能及下游任务具有重要影响，为模型设计和资源分配提供理论支持。

search_text: Scaling Laws for Autoregressive Generative Modeling 自回归生成模型的缩放定律 We identify empirical scaling laws for the cross-entropy loss in four domains: generative image modeling, video modeling, multimodal image$\leftrightarrow$text models, and mathematical problem solving. In all cases autoregressive Transformers smoothly improve in performance as model size and compute budgets increase, following a power-law plus constant scaling law. The optimal model size also depends on the compute budget through a power-law, with exponents that are nearly universal across all data domains. The cross-entropy loss has an information theoretic interpretation as $S($True$) + D_{\mathrm{KL}}($True$||$Model$)$, and the empirical scaling laws suggest a prediction for both the true data distribution's entropy and the KL divergence between the true and model distributions. With this interpretation, billion-parameter Transformers are nearly perfect models of the YFCC100M image distribution downsampled to an $8\times 8$ resolution, and we can forecast the model size needed to achieve any given reducible loss (ie $D_{\mathrm{KL}}$) in nats/image for other resolutions. We find a number of additional scaling laws in specific domains: (a) we identify a scaling relation for the mutual information between captions and images in multimodal models, and show how to answer the question "Is a picture worth a thousand words?"; (b) in the case of mathematical problem solving, we identify scaling laws for model performance when extrapolating beyond the training distribution; (c) we finetune generative image models for ImageNet classification and find smooth scaling of the classification loss and error rate, even as the generative loss levels off. Taken together, these results strengthen the case that scaling laws have important implications for neural network performance, including on downstream tasks. 我们确定了四个领域中交叉熵损失的经验缩放定律：生成图像建模、视频建模、多模态图像$\leftrightarrow$文本模型和数学问题解决。在所有情况下，随着模型大小和计算预算的增加，自回归 Transformer 的性能都会平稳提高，遵循幂律加恒定缩放律。最佳模型大小还取决于幂律的计算预算，其指数在所有数据域中几乎通用。交叉熵损失的信息理论解释为 $S($True$) + D_{\mathrm{KL}}($True$||$Model$)$，经验缩放定律建议对真实数据分布的熵以及真实分布和模型分布之间的 KL 散度进行预测。通过这种解释，十亿参数的 Transformer 是 YFCC100M 图像分布的近乎完美的模型，下采样到 $8\times 8$ 分辨率，我们可以预测在其他分辨率的 nats/image 中实现任何给定的可减少损失（即 $D_{\mathrm{KL}}$）所需的模型大小。我们在特定领域发现了许多额外的缩放法则：（a）我们确定了多模态模型中标题和图像之间的互信息的缩放关系，并展示了如何回答“一张图片值得一千个单词吗？”的问题； (b) 在解决数学问题的情况下，当外推到训练分布之外时，我们确定模型性能的缩放法则； (c) 我们微调 ImageNet 分类的生成图像模型，并找到分类损失和错误率的平滑缩放，即使生成损失趋于平稳。综上所述，这些结果强化了缩放定律对神经网络性能（包括下游任务）具有重要影响的论点。 该论文研究了自回归生成模型在不同领域中的交叉熵损失的规模定律，分析了模型大小和计算预算对性能的影响。 Tom Henighan,Jared Kaplan,Mor Katz,Mark Chen,Christopher Hesse,Jacob Jackson,Heewoo Jun,Tom B. Brown,Prafulla Dhariwal,Scott Gray,Chris Hallacy,Benjamin Mann,Alec Radford,Aditya Ramesh,Nick Ryder,Daniel M. Ziegler,John Schulman,Dario Amodei,Sam McCandlish cs.LG,cs.CL,cs.CV

title: AM-RRT*: Informed Sampling-based Planning with Assisting Metric
title_zh: AM-RRT*：具有辅助指标的基于知情抽样的规划
comment: To appear in the proceedings of the 2021 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA). 6 pages, 2 figures
comments: To appear in the proceedings of the 2021 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA). 6 pages, 2 figures
abstract: In this paper, we present a new algorithm that extends RRT* and RT-RRT* for online path planning in complex, dynamic environments. Sampling-based approaches often perform poorly in environments with narrow passages, a feature common to many indoor applications of mobile robots as well as computer games. Our method extends RRT-based sampling methods to enable the use of an assisting distance metric to improve performance in environments with obstacles. This assisting metric, which can be any metric that has better properties than the Euclidean metric when line of sight is blocked, is used in combination with the standard Euclidean metric in such a way that the algorithm can reap benefits from the assisting metric while maintaining the desirable properties of previous RRT variants - namely probabilistic completeness in tree coverage and asymptotic optimality in path length. We also introduce a new method of targeted rewiring, aimed at shortening search times and path lengths in tasks where the goal shifts repeatedly. We demonstrate that our method offers considerable improvements over existing multi-query planners such as RT-RRT* when using diffusion distance as an assisting metric; finding near-optimal paths with a decrease in search time of several orders of magnitude. Experimental results show planning times reduced by 99.5% and path lengths by 9.8% over existing real-time RRT planners in a variety of environments.
summary: In this paper, we present a new algorithm that extends RRT* and RT-RRT* for online path planning in complex, dynamic environments. Sampling-based approaches often perform poorly in environments with narrow passages, a feature common to many indoor applications of mobile robots as well as computer games. Our method extends RRT-based sampling methods to enable the use of an assisting distance metric to improve performance in environments with obstacles. This assisting metric, which can be any metric that has better properties than the Euclidean metric when line of sight is blocked, is used in combination with the standard Euclidean metric in such a way that the algorithm can reap benefits from the assisting metric while maintaining the desirable properties of previous RRT variants - namely probabilistic completeness in tree coverage and asymptotic optimality in path length. We also introduce a new method of targeted rewiring, aimed at shortening search times and path lengths in tasks where the goal shifts repeatedly. We demonstrate that our method offers considerable improvements over existing multi-query planners such as RT-RRT* when using diffusion distance as an assisting metric; finding near-optimal paths with a decrease in search time of several orders of magnitude. Experimental results show planning times reduced by 99.5% and path lengths by 9.8% over existing real-time RRT planners in a variety of environments.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新算法，该算法扩展了 RRT* 和 RT-RRT*，用于复杂动态环境中的在线路径规划。基于采样的方法通常在通道狭窄的环境中表现不佳，这是移动机器人和电脑游戏的许多室内应用的常见特征。我们的方法扩展了基于 RRT 的采样方法，可以使用辅助距离度量来提高有障碍物环境中的性能。该辅助度量可以是在视线被阻挡时具有比欧几里德度量更好的属性的任何度量，它与标准欧几里德度量结合使用，使得算法可以从辅助度量中获益，同时保持先前 RRT 变体的所需属性 - 即树覆盖的概率完整性和路径长度的渐近最优性。我们还引入了一种有针对性的重新布线的新方法，旨在缩短目标反复变化的任务中的搜索时间和路径长度。我们证明，当使用扩散距离作为辅助指标时，我们的方法比现有的多查询规划器（例如 RT-RRT*）提供了相当大的改进；找到接近最优的路径，搜索时间减少几个数量级。实验结果表明，与各种环境中现有的实时 RRT 规划器相比，规划时间缩短了 99.5%，路径长度缩短了 9.8%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的采样规划算法AM-RRT*，通过引入辅助距离度量和定向重布线方法，提升复杂动态环境中路径规划的效率和质量。
AI.motivation: 传统基于采样的路径规划算法（如RRT*）在狭窄通道和动态障碍物环境中表现不佳，且多查询规划器如RT-RRT*在实时性与路径最优性上存在不足。
AI.method: 结合辅助距离度量（如扩散距离）与欧几里得度量，利用辅助度量优化采样分布；引入定向重布线机制以应对目标点频繁变化的任务。
AI.result: 实验表明，在多种环境中规划时间减少99.5%，路径长度缩短9.8%，显著优于现有实时RRT规划器，尤其在使用扩散距离作为辅助度量时效果显著。
AI.conclusion: AM-RRT*通过辅助度量与定向重布线的结合，在保持概率完备性和渐进最优性的同时，大幅提升了复杂环境下的路径规划效率与路径质量。

title: Bidirectional Sampling Based Search Without Two Point Boundary Value Solution
title_zh: 基于双向采样的无两点边界值搜索解
comment: Journal Video: https://youtu.be/Rumg66UHfyQ. Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Robotics (T-RO) Fixed typos in Algorithm 2 and 3
comments: Journal Video: https://youtu.be/Rumg66UHfyQ. Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Robotics (T-RO) Fixed typos in Algorithm 2 and 3
abstract: Bidirectional motion planning approaches decrease planning time, on average, compared to their unidirectional counterparts. In single-query feasible motion planning, using bidirectional search to find a continuous motion plan requires an edge connection between the forward and reverse search trees. Such a tree-tree connection requires solving a two-point Boundary Value Problem (BVP). However, a two-point BVP solution can be difficult or impossible to calculate for many systems. We present a novel bidirectional search strategy that does not require solving the two-point BVP. Instead of connecting the forward and reverse trees directly, the reverse tree's cost information is used as a guiding heuristic for the forward search. This enables the forward search to quickly converge to a feasible solution without solving the two-point BVP. We propose two new algorithms (GBRRT and GABRRT) that use this strategy and run multiple software simulations using multiple dynamical systems and real-world hardware experiments to show that our algorithms perform on-par or better than existing state-of-the-art methods in quickly finding an initial feasible solution.
summary: Bidirectional motion planning approaches decrease planning time, on average, compared to their unidirectional counterparts. In single-query feasible motion planning, using bidirectional search to find a continuous motion plan requires an edge connection between the forward and reverse search trees. Such a tree-tree connection requires solving a two-point Boundary Value Problem (BVP). However, a two-point BVP solution can be difficult or impossible to calculate for many systems. We present a novel bidirectional search strategy that does not require solving the two-point BVP. Instead of connecting the forward and reverse trees directly, the reverse tree's cost information is used as a guiding heuristic for the forward search. This enables the forward search to quickly converge to a feasible solution without solving the two-point BVP. We propose two new algorithms (GBRRT and GABRRT) that use this strategy and run multiple software simulations using multiple dynamical systems and real-world hardware experiments to show that our algorithms perform on-par or better than existing state-of-the-art methods in quickly finding an initial feasible solution.
abstract_zh: 与单向运动规划方法相比，双向运动规划方法平均减少了规划时间。在单查询可行运动规划中，使用双向搜索来查找连续运动规划需要正向搜索树和反向搜索树之间的边连接。这种树与树的连接需要解决两点边界值问题（BVP）。然而，对于许多系统来说，两点 BVP 解可能很难或不可能计算。我们提出了一种新颖的双向搜索策略，不需要求解两点 BVP。反向树的成本信息不是直接连接正向树和反向树，而是用作正向搜索的指导启发式。这使得前向搜索能够快速收敛到可行解，而无需求解两点 BVP。我们提出了两种新算法（GBRRT 和 GABRRT），它们使用这种策略，并使用多个动力系统和真实世界的硬件实验运行多个软件模拟，以表明我们的算法在快速找到初始可行解决方案方面与现有最先进的方法相当或更好。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需求解两点边值问题的双向采样搜索方法，用于改进运动规划效率。
AI.motivation: 传统双向运动规划需解决两点边值问题，该问题在许多系统中难以求解，因此需要新的无需该步骤的策略。
AI.method: 通过反向搜索树的成本信息作为前向搜索的启发式指导，避免直接连接两棵树，从而无需求解两点边值问题。
AI.result: 提出的GBRRT和GABRRT算法在多种动态系统和实际硬件测试中表现与现有先进方法相当或更优。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了传统双向规划中两点边值问题的局限性，为快速找到可行运动方案提供了更高效的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种无需求解两点边值问题的双向采样搜索方法，用于改进运动规划效率。
ai_content.motivation: 传统双向运动规划需解决两点边值问题，该问题在许多系统中难以求解，因此需要新的无需该步骤的策略。

search_text: Bidirectional Sampling Based Search Without Two Point Boundary Value Solution 基于双向采样的无两点边界值搜索解 Bidirectional motion planning approaches decrease planning time, on average, compared to their unidirectional counterparts. In single-query feasible motion planning, using bidirectional search to find a continuous motion plan requires an edge connection between the forward and reverse search trees. Such a tree-tree connection requires solving a two-point Boundary Value Problem (BVP). However, a two-point BVP solution can be difficult or impossible to calculate for many systems. We present a novel bidirectional search strategy that does not require solving the two-point BVP. Instead of connecting the forward and reverse trees directly, the reverse tree's cost information is used as a guiding heuristic for the forward search. This enables the forward search to quickly converge to a feasible solution without solving the two-point BVP. We propose two new algorithms (GBRRT and GABRRT) that use this strategy and run multiple software simulations using multiple dynamical systems and real-world hardware experiments to show that our algorithms perform on-par or better than existing state-of-the-art methods in quickly finding an initial feasible solution. 与单向运动规划方法相比，双向运动规划方法平均减少了规划时间。在单查询可行运动规划中，使用双向搜索来查找连续运动规划需要正向搜索树和反向搜索树之间的边连接。这种树与树的连接需要解决两点边界值问题（BVP）。然而，对于许多系统来说，两点 BVP 解可能很难或不可能计算。我们提出了一种新颖的双向搜索策略，不需要求解两点 BVP。反向树的成本信息不是直接连接正向树和反向树，而是用作正向搜索的指导启发式。这使得前向搜索能够快速收敛到可行解，而无需求解两点 BVP。我们提出了两种新算法（GBRRT 和 GABRRT），它们使用这种策略，并使用多个动力系统和真实世界的硬件实验运行多个软件模拟，以表明我们的算法在快速找到初始可行解决方案方面与现有最先进的方法相当或更好。 提出一种无需求解两点边值问题的双向采样搜索方法，用于改进运动规划效率。 Sharan Nayak,Michael W. Otte cs.RO

title: Implicit Integration for Articulated Bodies with Contact via the Nonconvex Maximal Dissipation Principle
title_zh: 通过非凸最大耗散原理对接触铰接体进行隐式积分
abstract: We present non-convex maximal dissipation principle (NMDP), a time integration scheme for articulated bodies with simultaneous contacts. Our scheme resolves contact forces via the maximal dissipation principle (MDP). Prior MDP solvers compute contact forces via convex programming by assuming linearized dynamics integrated using the forward multistep scheme. Instead, we consider the coupled system of nonlinear Newton-Euler dynamics and MDP, which is time-integrated using the backward integration scheme. We show that the coupled system of equations can be solved efficiently using the projected gradient method with guaranteed convergence. We evaluate our method by predicting several locomotion trajectories for a quadruped robot. The results show that our NMDP scheme has several desirable properties including: (1) generalization to novel contact models; (2) superior stability under large timestep sizes; (3) consistent trajectory generation under varying timestep sizes.
summary: We present non-convex maximal dissipation principle (NMDP), a time integration scheme for articulated bodies with simultaneous contacts. Our scheme resolves contact forces via the maximal dissipation principle (MDP). Prior MDP solvers compute contact forces via convex programming by assuming linearized dynamics integrated using the forward multistep scheme. Instead, we consider the coupled system of nonlinear Newton-Euler dynamics and MDP, which is time-integrated using the backward integration scheme. We show that the coupled system of equations can be solved efficiently using the projected gradient method with guaranteed convergence. We evaluate our method by predicting several locomotion trajectories for a quadruped robot. The results show that our NMDP scheme has several desirable properties including: (1) generalization to novel contact models; (2) superior stability under large timestep sizes; (3) consistent trajectory generation under varying timestep sizes.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了非凸最大耗散原理（NMDP），这是一种用于同时接触的铰接体的时间积分方案。我们的方案通过最大耗散原理（MDP）解决接触力。先前的 MDP 求解器通过假设使用前向多步方案积分的线性动力学，通过凸规划来计算接触力。相反，我们考虑非线性牛顿-欧拉动力学和 MDP 的耦合系统，该系统使用后向积分方案进行时间积分。我们证明，可以使用保证收敛的投影梯度法有效地求解耦合方程组。我们通过预测四足机器人的几个运动轨迹来评估我们的方法。结果表明，我们的 NMDP 方案具有几个理想的特性，包括：（1）推广到新的接触模型； (2) 大时间步长下的优异稳定性； (3) 不同时间步长下一致的轨迹生成。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于非凸最大耗散原理（NMDP）的时间积分方法，用于解决具有接触的连体结构的动力学模拟问题。
AI.motivation: 传统最大耗散原理（MDP）求解器依赖线性化动力学和前向多步积分方案，难以处理复杂接触场景下的非线性动力学耦合问题。
AI.method: 将非线性牛顿-欧拉动力学与MDP结合，采用后向积分方案构建耦合方程组，并通过投影梯度法求解，保证收敛性。
AI.result: 在四足机器人运动轨迹预测实验中，NMDP方法展现出对新型接触模型的泛化能力、大时间步长下的稳定性及时间步长变化时的轨迹一致性。
AI.conclusion: NMDP方法通过隐式积分与非凸优化结合，有效提升了具有接触的连体结构动力学模拟的稳定性与适用性。

title: Parameterized Neural Ordinary Differential Equations: Applications to Computational Physics Problems
title_zh: 参数化神经常微分方程：在计算物理问题中的应用
abstract: This work proposes an extension of neural ordinary differential equations (NODEs) by introducing an additional set of ODE input parameters to NODEs. This extension allows NODEs to learn multiple dynamics specified by the input parameter instances. Our extension is inspired by the concept of parameterized ordinary differential equations, which are widely investigated in computational science and engineering contexts, where characteristics of the governing equations vary over the input parameters. We apply the proposed parameterized NODEs (PNODEs) for learning latent dynamics of complex dynamical processes that arise in computational physics, which is an essential component for enabling rapid numerical simulations for time-critical physics applications. For this, we propose an encoder-decoder-type framework, which models latent dynamics as PNODEs. We demonstrate the effectiveness of PNODEs with important benchmark problems from computational physics.
summary: This work proposes an extension of neural ordinary differential equations (NODEs) by introducing an additional set of ODE input parameters to NODEs. This extension allows NODEs to learn multiple dynamics specified by the input parameter instances. Our extension is inspired by the concept of parameterized ordinary differential equations, which are widely investigated in computational science and engineering contexts, where characteristics of the governing equations vary over the input parameters. We apply the proposed parameterized NODEs (PNODEs) for learning latent dynamics of complex dynamical processes that arise in computational physics, which is an essential component for enabling rapid numerical simulations for time-critical physics applications. For this, we propose an encoder-decoder-type framework, which models latent dynamics as PNODEs. We demonstrate the effectiveness of PNODEs with important benchmark problems from computational physics.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了通过向 NODE 引入一组附加的 ODE 输入参数来扩展神经常微分方程 (NODE)。此扩展允许节点学习由输入参数实例指定的多种动态。我们的扩展受到参数化常微分方程概念的启发，该方程在计算科学和工程背景下得到了广泛研究，其中控制方程的特征随输入参数的变化而变化。我们应用所提出的参数化节点（PNODE）来学习计算物理中出现的复杂动态过程的潜在动力学，这是为时间关键的物理应用实现快速数值模拟的重要组成部分。为此，我们提出了一种编码器-解码器类型框架，它将潜在动态建模为 PNODE。我们通过计算物理学中的重要基准问题证明了 PNODE 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出参数化神经常微分方程（PNODEs），通过引入输入参数扩展NODEs，用于学习计算物理中复杂动态过程的潜在动态，以加速数值模拟。
AI.motivation: 传统NODEs难以处理输入参数变化导致的动态差异，而参数化ODE在计算科学中广泛存在。计算物理需要快速模拟复杂动态过程，需结合参数化建模与深度学习。
AI.method: 设计编码器-解码器框架，将潜在动态建模为PNODEs，通过额外输入参数扩展NODEs结构，学习参数化动态特性。
AI.result: 在计算物理基准问题中验证了PNODEs的有效性，展示了其对复杂动态建模和加速模拟的能力。
AI.conclusion: PNODEs为计算物理动态建模提供了新方法，结合参数化ODE与深度学习，可提升时间关键应用的模拟效率。

authors_text: Maciej Besta,Marc Fischer,Tal Ben-Nun,Dimitri Stanojevic,Johannes De Fine Licht,Torsten Hoefler
title: Substream-Centric Maximum Matchings on FPGA
title_zh: FPGA 上以子流为中心的最大匹配
comment: Best Paper finalist at ACM FPGA'19, invited to special issue of ACM TRETS'20
comments: Best Paper finalist at ACM FPGA'19, invited to special issue of ACM TRETS'20
abstract: Developing high-performance and energy-efficient algorithms for maximum matchings is becoming increasingly important in social network analysis, computational sciences, scheduling, and others. In this work, we propose the first maximum matching algorithm designed for FPGAs; it is energy-efficient and has provable guarantees on accuracy, performance, and storage utilization. To achieve this, we forego popular graph processing paradigms, such as vertex-centric programming, that often entail large communication costs. Instead, we propose a substream-centric approach, in which the input stream of data is divided into substreams processed independently to enable more parallelism while lowering communication costs. We base our work on the theory of streaming graph algorithms and analyze 14 models and 28 algorithms. We use this analysis to provide theoretical underpinning that matches the physical constraints of FPGA platforms. Our algorithm delivers high performance (more than 4x speedup over tuned parallel CPU variants), low memory, high accuracy, and effective usage of FPGA resources. The substream-centric approach could easily be extended to other algorithms to offer low-power and high-performance graph processing on FPGAs.
summary: Developing high-performance and energy-efficient algorithms for maximum matchings is becoming increasingly important in social network analysis, computational sciences, scheduling, and others. In this work, we propose the first maximum matching algorithm designed for FPGAs; it is energy-efficient and has provable guarantees on accuracy, performance, and storage utilization. To achieve this, we forego popular graph processing paradigms, such as vertex-centric programming, that often entail large communication costs. Instead, we propose a substream-centric approach, in which the input stream of data is divided into substreams processed independently to enable more parallelism while lowering communication costs. We base our work on the theory of streaming graph algorithms and analyze 14 models and 28 algorithms. We use this analysis to provide theoretical underpinning that matches the physical constraints of FPGA platforms. Our algorithm delivers high performance (more than 4x speedup over tuned parallel CPU variants), low memory, high accuracy, and effective usage of FPGA resources. The substream-centric approach could easily be extended to other algorithms to offer low-power and high-performance graph processing on FPGAs.
abstract_zh: 开发用于最大匹配的高性能和节能算法在社交网络分析、计算科学、调度等领域变得越来越重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了第一个为 FPGA 设计的最大匹配算法；它具有能源效率，并且在准确性、性能和存储利用率方面具有经过验证的保证。为了实现这一目标，我们放弃了流行的图形处理范例，例如以顶点为中心的编程，这通常需要大量的通信成本。相反，我们提出了一种以子流为中心的方法，其中输入数据流被分为独立处理的子流，以实现更多并行性，同时降低通信成本。我们的工作以流图算法理论为基础，分析了 14 个模型和 28 个算法。我们使用此分析来提供与 FPGA 平台的物理约束相匹配的理论基础。我们的算法可提供高性能（比经过调整的并行 CPU 变体加速超过 4 倍）、低内存、高精度以及 FPGA 资源的有效利用。以子流为中心的方法可以轻松扩展到其他算法，以在 FPGA 上提供低功耗和高性能的图形处理。

AI.tldr: 设计一种针对FPGA的高效最大匹配算法，通过子流处理提高并行性并降低通信成本。
AI.motivation: 传统图处理方法在FPGA上存在高通信成本，需开发能效高、性能好的算法以满足应用需求。
AI.method: 采用子流分片处理，结合流式图算法理论分析，适配FPGA的物理特性。
AI.result: 算法性能比优化CPU版本快4倍以上，内存占用低，准确率高，有效利用FPGA资源。
AI.conclusion: 子流方法可扩展至其他算法，推动FPGA在图处理中的应用。

search_text: Substream-Centric Maximum Matchings on FPGA FPGA 上以子流为中心的最大匹配 Developing high-performance and energy-efficient algorithms for maximum matchings is becoming increasingly important in social network analysis, computational sciences, scheduling, and others. In this work, we propose the first maximum matching algorithm designed for FPGAs; it is energy-efficient and has provable guarantees on accuracy, performance, and storage utilization. To achieve this, we forego popular graph processing paradigms, such as vertex-centric programming, that often entail large communication costs. Instead, we propose a substream-centric approach, in which the input stream of data is divided into substreams processed independently to enable more parallelism while lowering communication costs. We base our work on the theory of streaming graph algorithms and analyze 14 models and 28 algorithms. We use this analysis to provide theoretical underpinning that matches the physical constraints of FPGA platforms. Our algorithm delivers high performance (more than 4x speedup over tuned parallel CPU variants), low memory, high accuracy, and effective usage of FPGA resources. The substream-centric approach could easily be extended to other algorithms to offer low-power and high-performance graph processing on FPGAs. 开发用于最大匹配的高性能和节能算法在社交网络分析、计算科学、调度等领域变得越来越重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了第一个为 FPGA 设计的最大匹配算法；它具有能源效率，并且在准确性、性能和存储利用率方面具有经过验证的保证。为了实现这一目标，我们放弃了流行的图形处理范例，例如以顶点为中心的编程，这通常需要大量的通信成本。相反，我们提出了一种以子流为中心的方法，其中输入数据流被分为独立处理的子流，以实现更多并行性，同时降低通信成本。我们的工作以流图算法理论为基础，分析了 14 个模型和 28 个算法。我们使用此分析来提供与 FPGA 平台的物理约束相匹配的理论基础。我们的算法可提供高性能（比经过调整的并行 CPU 变体加速超过 4 倍）、低内存、高精度以及 FPGA 资源的有效利用。以子流为中心的方法可以轻松扩展到其他算法，以在 FPGA 上提供低功耗和高性能的图形处理。 设计一种针对FPGA的高效最大匹配算法，通过子流处理提高并行性并降低通信成本。 Maciej Besta,Marc Fischer,Tal Ben-Nun,Dimitri Stanojevic,Johannes De Fine Licht,Torsten Hoefler cs.DC,cs.AR,cs.DS

authors_text: Yongqiang Wang,Yangyang Shi,Frank Zhang,Chunyang Wu,Julian Chan,Ching-Feng Yeh,Alex Xiao
title: Transformer in action: a comparative study of transformer-based acoustic models for large scale speech recognition applications
title_zh: Transformer 的实际应用：大规模语音识别应用中基于 Transformer 的声学模型的比较研究
comment: submitted to ICASSP2021
comments: submitted to ICASSP2021
abstract: In this paper, we summarize the application of transformer and its streamable variant, Emformer based acoustic model for large scale speech recognition applications. We compare the transformer based acoustic models with their LSTM counterparts on industrial scale tasks. Specifically, we compare Emformer with latency-controlled BLSTM (LCBLSTM) on medium latency tasks and LSTM on low latency tasks. On a low latency voice assistant task, Emformer gets 24% to 26% relative word error rate reductions (WERRs). For medium latency scenarios, comparing with LCBLSTM with similar model size and latency, Emformer gets significant WERR across four languages in video captioning datasets with 2-3 times inference real-time factors reduction.
summary: In this paper, we summarize the application of transformer and its streamable variant, Emformer based acoustic model for large scale speech recognition applications. We compare the transformer based acoustic models with their LSTM counterparts on industrial scale tasks. Specifically, we compare Emformer with latency-controlled BLSTM (LCBLSTM) on medium latency tasks and LSTM on low latency tasks. On a low latency voice assistant task, Emformer gets 24% to 26% relative word error rate reductions (WERRs). For medium latency scenarios, comparing with LCBLSTM with similar model size and latency, Emformer gets significant WERR across four languages in video captioning datasets with 2-3 times inference real-time factors reduction.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们总结了 Transformer 及其流式变体、基于 Emformer 的声学模型在大规模语音识别应用中的应用。我们在工业规模任务中将基于变压器的声学模型与 LSTM 模型进行比较。具体来说，我们将 Emformer 与中等延迟任务上的延迟控制 BLSTM (LCBLSTM) 和低延迟任务上的 LSTM 进行比较。在低延迟语音助手任务中，Emformer 的相对单词错误率 (WERR) 降低了 24% 至 26%。对于中等延迟场景，与具有相似模型大小和延迟的 LCBLSTM 相比，Emformer 在视频字幕数据集中的四种语言中获得了显着的 WERR，推理实时因子减少了 2-3 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了基于Transformer的声学模型（如Emformer）与LSTM模型在大规模语音识别任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统LSTM模型在处理长序列和延迟控制上存在局限，而Transformer及其流式变体Emformer可能在大规模语音识别中表现更优。
AI.method: 在工业级任务中对比Emformer与LCBLSTM（中等延迟）及LSTM（低延迟）模型，通过词错误率（WERR）和推理实时因子评估性能。
AI.result: 低延迟语音助手中Emformer降低24%-26% WERR；中等延迟视频字幕任务中，Emformer相比LCBLSTM减少2-3倍推理时间，且在四种语言上表现显著。
AI.conclusion: Emformer在延迟控制和准确性上优于传统LSTM模型，适合大规模语音识别场景。

title: Faster Differentially Private Samplers via Rényi Divergence Analysis of Discretized Langevin MCMC
title_zh: 通过离散 Langevin MCMC 的 Rényi 散度分析实现更快的差分私有采样器
comment: Appeared in NeurIPS 2020. Fixed a typo in the proof of Theorem 15
comments: Appeared in NeurIPS 2020. Fixed a typo in the proof of Theorem 15
abstract: Various differentially private algorithms instantiate the exponential mechanism, and require sampling from the distribution $\exp(-f)$ for a suitable function $f$. When the domain of the distribution is high-dimensional, this sampling can be computationally challenging. Using heuristic sampling schemes such as Gibbs sampling does not necessarily lead to provable privacy. When $f$ is convex, techniques from log-concave sampling lead to polynomial-time algorithms, albeit with large polynomials. Langevin dynamics-based algorithms offer much faster alternatives under some distance measures such as statistical distance. In this work, we establish rapid convergence for these algorithms under distance measures more suitable for differential privacy. For smooth, strongly-convex $f$, we give the first results proving convergence in Rényi divergence. This gives us fast differentially private algorithms for such $f$. Our techniques and simple and generic and apply also to underdamped Langevin dynamics.
summary: Various differentially private algorithms instantiate the exponential mechanism, and require sampling from the distribution $\exp(-f)$ for a suitable function $f$. When the domain of the distribution is high-dimensional, this sampling can be computationally challenging. Using heuristic sampling schemes such as Gibbs sampling does not necessarily lead to provable privacy. When $f$ is convex, techniques from log-concave sampling lead to polynomial-time algorithms, albeit with large polynomials. Langevin dynamics-based algorithms offer much faster alternatives under some distance measures such as statistical distance. In this work, we establish rapid convergence for these algorithms under distance measures more suitable for differential privacy. For smooth, strongly-convex $f$, we give the first results proving convergence in Rényi divergence. This gives us fast differentially private algorithms for such $f$. Our techniques and simple and generic and apply also to underdamped Langevin dynamics.
abstract_zh: 各种差分隐私算法实例化指数机制，并需要从分布 $\exp(-f)$ 中采样以获得合适的函数 $f$。当分布域是高维时，这种采样在计算上可能具有挑战性。使用吉布斯抽样等启发式抽样方案并不一定能带来可证明的隐私。当 $f$ 是凸的时，对数凹采样技术导致多项式时间算法，尽管多项式很大。基于 Langevin 动力学的算法在某些距离测量（例如统计距离）下提供了更快的替代方案。在这项工作中，我们在更适合差分隐私的距离度量下为这些算法建立了快速收敛。对于平滑的强凸 $f$，我们给出了证明 Rényi 散度收敛的第一个结果。这为我们提供了针对此类 $f$ 的快速差分隐私算法。我们的技术简单且通用，也适用于欠阻尼朗之万动力学。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过Rényi散度分析离散化Langevin MCMC方法，实现更快速的差分隐私采样。
AI.motivation: 现有差分隐私采样方法在高维空间中计算复杂度高，且难以保证隐私性或收敛速度慢。
AI.method: 基于Rényi散度分析离散化Langevin动力学，针对平滑强凸函数证明其快速收敛性，并扩展至欠阻尼情形。
AI.result: 首次在Rényi散度下证明离散化Langevin算法的快速收敛，为强凸平滑函数提供高效差分隐私采样方案。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保证隐私性的同时显著提升采样效率，且技术通用性强，适用于多种动力学模型。

title: Artificial Intelligence Systems applied to tourism: A Survey
title_zh: 人工智能系统应用于旅游业：调查
comment: bad content
comments: bad content
abstract: Artificial Intelligence (AI) has been improving the performance of systems for a diverse set of tasks and introduced a more interactive generation of personal agents. Despite the current trend of applying AI for a great amount of areas, we have not seen the same quantity of work being developed for the tourism sector. This paper reports on the main applications of AI systems developed for tourism and the current state of the art for this sector. The paper also provides an up-to-date survey of this field regarding several key works and systems that are applied to tourism, like Personal Agents, for providing a more interactive experience. We also carried out an in-depth research on systems for predicting traffic human flow, more accurate recommendation systems and even how geospatial is trying to display tourism data in a more informative way and prevent problems before they arise.
summary: Artificial Intelligence (AI) has been improving the performance of systems for a diverse set of tasks and introduced a more interactive generation of personal agents. Despite the current trend of applying AI for a great amount of areas, we have not seen the same quantity of work being developed for the tourism sector. This paper reports on the main applications of AI systems developed for tourism and the current state of the art for this sector. The paper also provides an up-to-date survey of this field regarding several key works and systems that are applied to tourism, like Personal Agents, for providing a more interactive experience. We also carried out an in-depth research on systems for predicting traffic human flow, more accurate recommendation systems and even how geospatial is trying to display tourism data in a more informative way and prevent problems before they arise.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 一直在提高系统执行各种任务的性能，并引入了更具交互性的一代个人代理。尽管目前人工智能在很多领域都有应用的趋势，但我们还没有看到为旅游业开发同样数量的工作。本文报告了为旅游业开发的人工智能系统的主要应用以及该行业的当前技术水平。本文还提供了该领域的最新调查，涉及应用于旅游业的几个关键工作和系统，例如个人代理，以提供更具互动性的体验。我们还对交通人流预测系统、更准确的推荐系统，甚至地理空间如何尝试以更丰富的信息方式显示旅游数据并防患于未然进行了深入研究。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了人工智能系统在旅游领域的应用现状，梳理了当前主要技术方向和研究成果。
AI.motivation: 尽管人工智能技术已广泛应用于多个领域，但针对旅游行业的系统性研究仍显不足，亟需总结现有成果与技术方向。
AI.method: 通过文献调研与案例分析，重点梳理个人代理、流量预测、推荐系统及地理空间数据可视化等核心应用方向。
AI.result: 总结了AI在旅游领域的典型应用，包括智能推荐、客流预测、交互式代理及数据可视化等技术实现与实际案例。
AI.conclusion: 当前研究存在数据整合不足与预测精度待提升的问题，未来需加强多源数据融合与实时决策支持系统研发。

authors_text: Takashi Wada,Tomoharu Iwata,Yuji Matsumoto,Timothy Baldwin,Jey Han Lau
title: Learning Contextualised Cross-lingual Word Embeddings and Alignments for Extremely Low-Resource Languages Using Parallel Corpora
title_zh: 使用并行语料库学习资源极少的语言的上下文跨语言词嵌入和对齐
comment: 16 pages, accepted at the 1st Workshop on Multilingual Representation Learning
comments: 16 pages, accepted at the 1st Workshop on Multilingual Representation Learning
abstract: We propose a new approach for learning contextualised cross-lingual word embeddings based on a small parallel corpus (e.g. a few hundred sentence pairs). Our method obtains word embeddings via an LSTM encoder-decoder model that simultaneously translates and reconstructs an input sentence. Through sharing model parameters among different languages, our model jointly trains the word embeddings in a common cross-lingual space. We also propose to combine word and subword embeddings to make use of orthographic similarities across different languages. We base our experiments on real-world data from endangered languages, namely Yongning Na, Shipibo-Konibo, and Griko. Our experiments on bilingual lexicon induction and word alignment tasks show that our model outperforms existing methods by a large margin for most language pairs. These results demonstrate that, contrary to common belief, an encoder-decoder translation model is beneficial for learning cross-lingual representations even in extremely low-resource conditions. Furthermore, our model also works well on high-resource conditions, achieving state-of-the-art performance on a German-English word-alignment task.
summary: We propose a new approach for learning contextualised cross-lingual word embeddings based on a small parallel corpus (e.g. a few hundred sentence pairs). Our method obtains word embeddings via an LSTM encoder-decoder model that simultaneously translates and reconstructs an input sentence. Through sharing model parameters among different languages, our model jointly trains the word embeddings in a common cross-lingual space. We also propose to combine word and subword embeddings to make use of orthographic similarities across different languages. We base our experiments on real-world data from endangered languages, namely Yongning Na, Shipibo-Konibo, and Griko. Our experiments on bilingual lexicon induction and word alignment tasks show that our model outperforms existing methods by a large margin for most language pairs. These results demonstrate that, contrary to common belief, an encoder-decoder translation model is beneficial for learning cross-lingual representations even in extremely low-resource conditions. Furthermore, our model also works well on high-resource conditions, achieving state-of-the-art performance on a German-English word-alignment task.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于小型平行语料库（例如数百个句子对）学习上下文跨语言词嵌入的新方法。我们的方法通过 LSTM 编码器-解码器模型获得词嵌入，该模型同时翻译和重建输入句子。通过在不同语言之间共享模型参数，我们的模型在公共跨语言空间中联合训练词嵌入。我们还建议结合单词和子词嵌入来利用不同语言之间的拼写相似性。我们的实验基于来自濒危语言（即永宁纳语、Shipibo-Konibo 和 Griko）的真实数据。我们对双语词典归纳和单词对齐任务的实验表明，对于大多数语言对，我们的模型大大优于现有方法。这些结果表明，与普遍看法相反，即使在资源极少的条件下，编码器-解码器翻译模型也有利于学习跨语言表示。此外，我们的模型在高资源条件下也能很好地工作，在德语-英语单词对齐任务中实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于小规模平行语料库学习低资源语言上下文相关跨语言词嵌入和对齐的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有跨语言表示学习方法在极低资源语言上效果有限，且难以利用正字法相似性，需开发适用于濒危语言的高效模型。
AI.method: 采用LSTM编码器-解码器模型同时进行翻译与句子重建，通过参数共享实现跨语言空间联合训练，并结合词与子词嵌入捕捉正字法相似性。
AI.result: 在濒危语言实验中，双语词典归纳和词对齐任务表现显著优于现有方法，且在德英高资源任务中达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 编码器-解码器模型可有效学习跨语言表示，即使在极低资源条件下亦表现优异，突破传统方法的资源限制认知。

title: Formally Verified SAT-Based AI Planning
title_zh: 经正式验证的基于 SAT 的 AI 规划
abstract: We present an executable formally verified SAT encoding of classical AI planning. We use the theorem prover Isabelle/HOL to perform the verification. We experimentally test the verified encoding and show that it can be used for reasonably sized standard planning benchmarks. We also use it as a reference to test a state-of-the-art SAT-based planner, showing that it sometimes falsely claims that problems have no solutions of certain lengths.
summary: We present an executable formally verified SAT encoding of classical AI planning. We use the theorem prover Isabelle/HOL to perform the verification. We experimentally test the verified encoding and show that it can be used for reasonably sized standard planning benchmarks. We also use it as a reference to test a state-of-the-art SAT-based planner, showing that it sometimes falsely claims that problems have no solutions of certain lengths.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了经典 AI 规划的可执行形式验证 SAT 编码。我们使用定理证明器 Isabelle/HOL 来进行验证。我们通过实验测试了经过验证的编码，并表明它可以用于合理规模的标准规划基准。我们还用它作为参考来测试最先进的基于 SAT 的规划器，表明它有时错误地声称问题没有一定长度的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 开发并验证一个基于SAT的经典AI规划编码，确保其正确性并用于基准测试
AI.motivation: 确保AI规划方法的正确性，避免规划器错误地声称无解
AI.method: 使用Isabelle/HOL定理证明器进行形式验证，并通过实验测试编码和规划器
AI.result: 验证的编码适用于标准基准测试，且发现先进规划器存在错误
AI.conclusion: 形式验证能有效确保规划方法的正确性，揭示现有工具的缺陷

title: Learning to Plan Optimistically: Uncertainty-Guided Deep Exploration via Latent Model Ensembles
title_zh: 学习乐观地计划：通过潜在模型集成进行不确定性引导的深度探索
abstract: Learning complex robot behaviors through interaction requires structured exploration. Planning should target interactions with the potential to optimize long-term performance, while only reducing uncertainty where conducive to this objective. This paper presents Latent Optimistic Value Exploration (LOVE), a strategy that enables deep exploration through optimism in the face of uncertain long-term rewards. We combine latent world models with value function estimation to predict infinite-horizon returns and recover associated uncertainty via ensembling. The policy is then trained on an upper confidence bound (UCB) objective to identify and select the interactions most promising to improve long-term performance. We apply LOVE to visual robot control tasks in continuous action spaces and demonstrate on average more than 20% improved sample efficiency in comparison to state-of-the-art and other exploration objectives. In sparse and hard to explore environments we achieve an average improvement of over 30%.
summary: Learning complex robot behaviors through interaction requires structured exploration. Planning should target interactions with the potential to optimize long-term performance, while only reducing uncertainty where conducive to this objective. This paper presents Latent Optimistic Value Exploration (LOVE), a strategy that enables deep exploration through optimism in the face of uncertain long-term rewards. We combine latent world models with value function estimation to predict infinite-horizon returns and recover associated uncertainty via ensembling. The policy is then trained on an upper confidence bound (UCB) objective to identify and select the interactions most promising to improve long-term performance. We apply LOVE to visual robot control tasks in continuous action spaces and demonstrate on average more than 20% improved sample efficiency in comparison to state-of-the-art and other exploration objectives. In sparse and hard to explore environments we achieve an average improvement of over 30%.
abstract_zh: 通过交互学习复杂的机器人行为需要结构化探索。规划应以优化长期绩效的潜力为目标，同时仅在有利于实现这一目标的情况下减少不确定性。本文提出了潜在乐观价值探索（LOVE），这是一种在面对不确定的长期回报时通过乐观态度进行深度探索的策略。我们将潜在世界模型与价值函数估计相结合，以预测无限范围的回报并通过集成恢复相关的不确定性。然后根据置信上限 (UCB) 目标对该策略进行训练，以识别和选择最有希望提高长期绩效的交互。我们将 LOVE 应用于连续动作空间中的视觉机器人控制任务，并证明与最先进的和其他探索目标相比，样本效率平均提高了 20% 以上。在稀疏且难以探索的环境中，我们实现了超过 30% 的平均改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于潜在模型集成的乐观探索策略LOVE，用于提升复杂机器人任务中的样本效率。
AI.motivation: 传统深度强化学习在稀疏奖励和高不确定性环境中探索效率低下，需设计能有效利用不确定性指导探索的规划方法。
AI.method: 结合潜在世界模型与价值函数估计，通过模型集成量化长期回报不确定性，并基于上置信界目标训练策略以选择最具潜力的交互动作。
AI.result: 在连续动作空间视觉控制任务中，相比现有方法平均提升20%样本效率，在稀疏环境下提升达30%。
AI.conclusion: LOVE通过不确定性引导的乐观规划有效解决了复杂环境中的探索难题，为机器人学习提供了新范式。

This paper presents Latent Optimistic Value Exploration (LOVE), a strategy that enables deep exploration through optimism in the face of uncertain long-term rewards. We apply LOVE to visual robot control tasks in continuous action spaces and demonstrate on average more than 20% improved sample efficiency in comparison to state-of-the-art and other exploration objectives.
