authors_text: Octavio Arriaga,Matias Valdenegro-Toro,Mohandass Muthuraja,Sushma Devaramani,Frank Kirchner
title: Perception for Autonomous Systems (PAZ)
title_zh: 自主系统感知 (PAZ)
abstract: In this paper we introduce the Perception for Autonomous Systems (PAZ) software library. PAZ is a hierarchical perception library that allow users to manipulate multiple levels of abstraction in accordance to their requirements or skill level. More specifically, PAZ is divided into three hierarchical levels which we refer to as pipelines, processors, and backends. These abstractions allows users to compose functions in a hierarchical modular scheme that can be applied for preprocessing, data-augmentation, prediction and postprocessing of inputs and outputs of machine learning (ML) models. PAZ uses these abstractions to build reusable training and prediction pipelines for multiple robot perception tasks such as: 2D keypoint estimation, 2D object detection, 3D keypoint discovery, 6D pose estimation, emotion classification, face recognition, instance segmentation, and attention mechanisms.
summary: In this paper we introduce the Perception for Autonomous Systems (PAZ) software library. PAZ is a hierarchical perception library that allow users to manipulate multiple levels of abstraction in accordance to their requirements or skill level. More specifically, PAZ is divided into three hierarchical levels which we refer to as pipelines, processors, and backends. These abstractions allows users to compose functions in a hierarchical modular scheme that can be applied for preprocessing, data-augmentation, prediction and postprocessing of inputs and outputs of machine learning (ML) models. PAZ uses these abstractions to build reusable training and prediction pipelines for multiple robot perception tasks such as: 2D keypoint estimation, 2D object detection, 3D keypoint discovery, 6D pose estimation, emotion classification, face recognition, instance segmentation, and attention mechanisms.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了自主系统感知（PAZ）软件库。 PAZ 是一个分层感知库，允许用户根据自己的要求或技能水平操纵多个抽象级别。更具体地说，PAZ 分为三个层次，我们称之为管道、处理器和后端。这些抽象允许用户以分层模块化方案组合函数，这些函数可应用于机器学习 (ML) 模型的输入和输出的预处理、数据增强、预测和后处理。 PAZ 使用这些抽象为多个机器人感知任务构建可重用的训练和预测管道，例如：2D 关键点估计、2D 对象检测、3D 关键点发现、6D 姿态估计、情感分类、人脸识别、实例分割和注意机制。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了用于自主系统的感知（PAZ）软件库，该库通过分层结构支持多种机器人感知任务的模块化处理。
AI.motivation: 现有工具缺乏灵活的抽象层次，难以适应不同用户需求及复杂感知任务的开发需求。
AI.method: PAZ采用三级分层架构（pipeline/processor/backend），通过模块化组合实现预处理、数据增强、预测及后处理的全流程定制。
AI.result: 构建了支持2D/3D关键点检测、姿态估计、目标分割等八类任务的可复用感知管道。
AI.conclusion: PAZ为机器人感知系统提供了统一的分层框架，显著提升了开发效率与任务适配性。

More specifically, PAZ is divided into three hierarchical levels which we refer to as pipelines, processors, and backends. These abstractions allows users to compose functions in a hierarchical modular scheme that can be applied for preprocessing, data-augmentation, prediction and postprocessing of inputs and outputs of machine learning (ML) models. PAZ uses these abstractions to build reusable training and prediction pipelines for multiple robot perception tasks such as: 2D keypoint estimation, 2D object detection, 3D keypoint discovery, 6D pose estimation, emotion classification, face recognition, instance segmentation, and attention mechanisms. 在本文中，我们介绍了自主系统感知（PAZ）软件库。 PAZ 是一个分层感知库，允许用户根据自己的要求或技能水平操纵多个抽象级别。更具体地说，PAZ 分为三个层次，我们称之为管道、处理器和后端。这些抽象允许用户以分层模块化方案组合函数，这些函数可应用于机器学习 (ML) 模型的输入和输出的预处理、数据增强、预测和后处理。 PAZ 使用这些抽象为多个机器人感知任务构建可重用的训练和预测管道，例如：2D 关键点估计、2D 对象检测、3D 关键点发现、6D 姿态估计、情感分类、人脸识别、实例分割和注意机制。 本文介绍了用于自主系统的感知（PAZ）软件库，该库通过分层结构支持多种机器人感知任务的模块化处理。 Octavio Arriaga,Matias Valdenegro-Toro,Mohandass Muthuraja,Sushma Devaramani,Frank Kirchner cs.CV,cs.RO

title: The State of Industrial Robotics: Emerging Technologies, Challenges, and Key Research Directions
title_zh: 工业机器人的现状：新兴技术、挑战和关键研究方向
abstract: Robotics and related technologies are central to the ongoing digitization and advancement of manufacturing. In recent years, a variety of strategic initiatives around the world including "Industry 4.0", introduced in Germany in 2011 have aimed to improve and connect manufacturing technologies in order to optimize production processes. In this work, we study the changing technological landscape of robotics and "internet-of-things" (IoT)-based connective technologies over the last 7-10 years in the wake of Industry 4.0. We interviewed key players within the European robotics ecosystem, including robotics manufacturers and integrators, original equipment manufacturers (OEMs), and applied industrial research institutions and synthesize our findings in this paper. We first detail the state-of-the-art robotics and IoT technologies we observed and that the companies discussed during our interviews. We then describe the processes the companies follow when deciding whether and how to integrate new technologies, the challenges they face when integrating these technologies, and some immediate future technological avenues they are exploring in robotics and IoT. Finally, based on our findings, we highlight key research directions for the robotics community that can enable improved capabilities in the context of manufacturing.
summary: Robotics and related technologies are central to the ongoing digitization and advancement of manufacturing. In recent years, a variety of strategic initiatives around the world including "Industry 4.0", introduced in Germany in 2011 have aimed to improve and connect manufacturing technologies in order to optimize production processes. In this work, we study the changing technological landscape of robotics and "internet-of-things" (IoT)-based connective technologies over the last 7-10 years in the wake of Industry 4.0. We interviewed key players within the European robotics ecosystem, including robotics manufacturers and integrators, original equipment manufacturers (OEMs), and applied industrial research institutions and synthesize our findings in this paper. We first detail the state-of-the-art robotics and IoT technologies we observed and that the companies discussed during our interviews. We then describe the processes the companies follow when deciding whether and how to integrate new technologies, the challenges they face when integrating these technologies, and some immediate future technological avenues they are exploring in robotics and IoT. Finally, based on our findings, we highlight key research directions for the robotics community that can enable improved capabilities in the context of manufacturing.
abstract_zh: 机器人和相关技术是制造业持续数字化和进步的核心。近年来，世界各地推出了各种战略举措，包括2011年德国推出的“工业4.0”，旨在改进和连接制造技术，以优化生产流程。在这项工作中，我们研究了工业 4.0 之后过去 7-10 年间机器人技术和基于“物联网”(IoT) 的连接技术不断变化的技术格局。我们采访了欧洲机器人生态系统中的主要参与者，包括机器人制造商和集成商、原始设备制造商 (OEM) 以及应用工业研究机构，并在本文中综合了我们的研究结果。我们首先详细介绍我们观察到的以及这些公司在采访中讨论的最先进的机器人和物联网技术。然后，我们描述了公司在决定是否以及如何集成新技术时遵循的流程、集成这些技术时面临的挑战，以及他们在机器人和物联网领域探索的一些近期技术途径。最后，根据我们的发现，我们强调了机器人社区的关键研究方向，这些方向可以提高制造领域的能力。

AI.tldr: 分析工业机器人及物联网技术在Industry 4.0背景下的现状、挑战及未来研究方向
AI.motivation: 探讨Industry 4.0推动下工业机器人与物联网技术的整合挑战及未来发展方向，以优化制造流程
AI.method: 通过访谈欧洲工业机器人生态系统中的关键参与者，综合分析技术现状、整合流程及挑战
AI.result: 总结了当前工业机器人和物联网技术的应用现状，整合过程中的挑战，并提出了未来技术探索方向
AI.conclusion: 提出关键研究方向，以增强工业机器人在智能制造中的能力，应对技术整合挑战

authors_text: Rhea Sanjay Sukthanker,Zhiwu Huang,Suryansh Kumar,Erik Goron Endsjo,Yan Wu,Luc Van Gool
title: Neural Architecture Search of SPD Manifold Networks
title_zh: SPD流形网络的神经架构搜索
comment: This paper is accepted for publication at IJCAI 2021
comments: This paper is accepted for publication at IJCAI 2021
abstract: In this paper, we propose a new neural architecture search (NAS) problem of Symmetric Positive Definite (SPD) manifold networks, aiming to automate the design of SPD neural architectures. To address this problem, we first introduce a geometrically rich and diverse SPD neural architecture search space for an efficient SPD cell design. Further, we model our new NAS problem with a one-shot training process of a single supernet. Based on the supernet modeling, we exploit a differentiable NAS algorithm on our relaxed continuous search space for SPD neural architecture search. Statistical evaluation of our method on drone, action, and emotion recognition tasks mostly provides better results than the state-of-the-art SPD networks and traditional NAS algorithms. Empirical results show that our algorithm excels in discovering better performing SPD network design and provides models that are more than three times lighter than searched by the state-of-the-art NAS algorithms.
summary: In this paper, we propose a new neural architecture search (NAS) problem of Symmetric Positive Definite (SPD) manifold networks, aiming to automate the design of SPD neural architectures. To address this problem, we first introduce a geometrically rich and diverse SPD neural architecture search space for an efficient SPD cell design. Further, we model our new NAS problem with a one-shot training process of a single supernet. Based on the supernet modeling, we exploit a differentiable NAS algorithm on our relaxed continuous search space for SPD neural architecture search. Statistical evaluation of our method on drone, action, and emotion recognition tasks mostly provides better results than the state-of-the-art SPD networks and traditional NAS algorithms. Empirical results show that our algorithm excels in discovering better performing SPD network design and provides models that are more than three times lighter than searched by the state-of-the-art NAS algorithms.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新的对称正定（SPD）流形网络的神经架构搜索（NAS）问题，旨在自动化SPD神经架构的设计。为了解决这个问题，我们首先引入几何上丰富且多样化的 SPD 神经架构搜索空间，以实现高效的 SPD 单元设计。此外，我们通过单个超网的一次性训练过程对新的 NAS 问题进行建模。基于超网建模，我们在宽松的连续搜索空间上利用可微 NAS 算法进行 SPD 神经架构搜索。我们的方法在无人机、动作和情感识别任务上的统计评估大多提供了比最先进的 SPD 网络和传统 NAS 算法更好的结果。实证结果表明，我们的算法擅长发现性能更好的 SPD 网络设计，并提供比最先进的 NAS 算法搜索的模型轻三倍以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对对称正定（SPD）流形网络的神经架构搜索（NAS）方法，旨在自动化设计高效的SPD神经网络架构。
AI.motivation: 现有的SPD网络设计依赖人工经验，难以充分利用其几何特性，而传统NAS算法在SPD流形上的应用效果有限，需探索更高效的自动设计方法。
AI.method: 构建几何丰富且多样的SPD网络搜索空间，通过单次超网训练结合可微分NAS算法，在连续化搜索空间中优化SPD网络架构。
AI.result: 在无人机、动作和情绪识别任务中，所提方法优于现有SPD网络及传统NAS算法，生成的模型参数量仅为最优NAS算法的三分之一。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了SPD流形网络的自动设计问题，在保持高性能的同时显著降低了模型复杂度。

search_text: Neural Architecture Search of SPD Manifold Networks SPD流形网络的神经架构搜索 In this paper, we propose a new neural architecture search (NAS) problem of Symmetric Positive Definite (SPD) manifold networks, aiming to automate the design of SPD neural architectures. To address this problem, we first introduce a geometrically rich and diverse SPD neural architecture search space for an efficient SPD cell design. Further, we model our new NAS problem with a one-shot training process of a single supernet. Based on the supernet modeling, we exploit a differentiable NAS algorithm on our relaxed continuous search space for SPD neural architecture search. Statistical evaluation of our method on drone, action, and emotion recognition tasks mostly provides better results than the state-of-the-art SPD networks and traditional NAS algorithms. Empirical results show that our algorithm excels in discovering better performing SPD network design and provides models that are more than three times lighter than searched by the state-of-the-art NAS algorithms. 在本文中，我们提出了一种新的对称正定（SPD）流形网络的神经架构搜索（NAS）问题，旨在自动化SPD神经架构的设计。为了解决这个问题，我们首先引入几何上丰富且多样化的 SPD 神经架构搜索空间，以实现高效的 SPD 单元设计。此外，我们通过单个超网的一次性训练过程对新的 NAS 问题进行建模。基于超网建模，我们在宽松的连续搜索空间上利用可微 NAS 算法进行 SPD 神经架构搜索。我们的方法在无人机、动作和情感识别任务上的统计评估大多提供了比最先进的 SPD 网络和传统 NAS 算法更好的结果。实证结果表明，我们的算法擅长发现性能更好的 SPD 网络设计，并提供比最先进的 NAS 算法搜索的模型轻三倍以上。 本文提出了一种针对对称正定（SPD）流形网络的神经架构搜索（NAS）方法，旨在自动化设计高效的SPD神经网络架构。 Rhea Sanjay Sukthanker,Zhiwu Huang,Suryansh Kumar,Erik Goron Endsjo,Yan Wu,Luc Van Gool cs.LG,cs.CV,cs.NE

title: Section Patterns: Efficiently Solving Narrow Passage Problems in Multilevel Motion Planning
title_zh: 截面模式：有效解决多级运动规划中的狭窄通道问题
comment: 16 pages, 11 figures, Transaction on Robotics
comments: 16 pages, 11 figures, Transaction on Robotics
abstract: Sampling-based planning methods often become inefficient due to narrow passages. Narrow passages induce a higher runtime, because the chance to sample them becomes vanishingly small. In recent work, we showed that narrow passages can be approached by relaxing the problem using admissible lower-dimensional projections of the state space. Those relaxations often increase the volume of narrow passages under projection. Solving the relaxed problem is often efficient and produces an admissible heuristic we can exploit. However, given a base path, i.e. a solution to a relaxed problem, there are currently no tailored methods to efficiently exploit the base path. To efficiently exploit the base path and thereby its admissible heuristic, we develop section patterns, which are solution strategies to efficiently exploit base paths in particular around narrow passages. To coordinate section patterns, we develop the pattern dance algorithm, which efficiently coordinates section patterns to reactively traverse narrow passages. We combine the pattern dance algorithm with previously developed multilevel planning algorithms and benchmark them on challenging planning problems like the Bugtrap, the double L-shape, an egress problem and on four pregrasp scenarios for a 37 degrees of freedom shadow hand mounted on a KUKA LWR robot. Our results confirm that section patterns are useful to efficiently solve high-dimensional narrow passage motion planning problems.
summary: Sampling-based planning methods often become inefficient due to narrow passages. Narrow passages induce a higher runtime, because the chance to sample them becomes vanishingly small. In recent work, we showed that narrow passages can be approached by relaxing the problem using admissible lower-dimensional projections of the state space. Those relaxations often increase the volume of narrow passages under projection. Solving the relaxed problem is often efficient and produces an admissible heuristic we can exploit. However, given a base path, i.e. a solution to a relaxed problem, there are currently no tailored methods to efficiently exploit the base path. To efficiently exploit the base path and thereby its admissible heuristic, we develop section patterns, which are solution strategies to efficiently exploit base paths in particular around narrow passages. To coordinate section patterns, we develop the pattern dance algorithm, which efficiently coordinates section patterns to reactively traverse narrow passages. We combine the pattern dance algorithm with previously developed multilevel planning algorithms and benchmark them on challenging planning problems like the Bugtrap, the double L-shape, an egress problem and on four pregrasp scenarios for a 37 degrees of freedom shadow hand mounted on a KUKA LWR robot. Our results confirm that section patterns are useful to efficiently solve high-dimensional narrow passage motion planning problems.
abstract_zh: 由于通道狭窄，基于抽样的规划方法常常变得低效。狭窄的通道会导致更长的运行时间，因为对它们进行采样的机会变得微乎其微。在最近的工作中，我们表明可以通过使用状态空间的可接受的低维投影来放宽问题来接近狭窄的通道。这些松弛通常会增加投影下狭窄通道的体积。解决松弛问题通常是有效的，并且产生我们可以利用的可接受的启发式方法。然而，给定基本路径，即松弛问题的解决方案，目前没有定制的方法来有效地利用基本路径。为了有效地利用基本路径及其可接受的启发式，我们开发了部分模式，这是有效利用基本路径（特别是在狭窄通道周围）的解决方案策略。为了协调部分模式，我们开发了模式舞蹈算法，该算法可以有效地协调部分模式以反应性地穿越狭窄的通道。我们将模式舞蹈算法与之前开发的多级规划算法相结合，并对具有挑战性的规划问题（例如 Bugtrap、双 L 形、出口问题）以及安装在 KUKA LWR 机器人上的 37 自由度影子手的四个预抓场景进行基准测试。我们的结果证实，截面模式对于有效解决高维狭窄通道运动规划问题非常有用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于'节段模式'和'模式舞蹈算法'的方法，用于高效解决多级运动规划中的狭窄通道问题。
AI.motivation: 采样型规划方法在处理狭窄通道时效率低下，现有降维投影方法虽能生成启发式信息，但缺乏有效利用基础路径的策略。
AI.method: 开发节段模式策略以利用基础路径，并设计模式舞蹈算法协调多节段模式，结合多级规划算法解决狭窄通道问题。
AI.result: 在Bugtrap、双L形结构、出入口问题及37自由度机械手预抓取场景中验证，证实方法能有效解决高维狭窄通道规划问题。
AI.conclusion: 节段模式与模式舞蹈算法结合，为高维狭窄通道运动规划提供了高效的解决方案。

search_text: Section Patterns: Efficiently Solving Narrow Passage Problems in Multilevel Motion Planning 截面模式：有效解决多级运动规划中的狭窄通道问题 Sampling-based planning methods often become inefficient due to narrow passages. Narrow passages induce a higher runtime, because the chance to sample them becomes vanishingly small. In recent work, we showed that narrow passages can be approached by relaxing the problem using admissible lower-dimensional projections of the state space. Those relaxations often increase the volume of narrow passages under projection. Solving the relaxed problem is often efficient and produces an admissible heuristic we can exploit. However, given a base path, i.e. a solution to a relaxed problem, there are currently no tailored methods to efficiently exploit the base path. To efficiently exploit the base path and thereby its admissible heuristic, we develop section patterns, which are solution strategies to efficiently exploit base paths in particular around narrow passages. To coordinate section patterns, we develop the pattern dance algorithm, which efficiently coordinates section patterns to reactively traverse narrow passages. We combine the pattern dance algorithm with previously developed multilevel planning algorithms and benchmark them on challenging planning problems like the Bugtrap, the double L-shape, an egress problem and on four pregrasp scenarios for a 37 degrees of freedom shadow hand mounted on a KUKA LWR robot. Our results confirm that section patterns are useful to efficiently solve high-dimensional narrow passage motion planning problems. 由于通道狭窄，基于抽样的规划方法常常变得低效。狭窄的通道会导致更长的运行时间，因为对它们进行采样的机会变得微乎其微。在最近的工作中，我们表明可以通过使用状态空间的可接受的低维投影来放宽问题来接近狭窄的通道。这些松弛通常会增加投影下狭窄通道的体积。解决松弛问题通常是有效的，并且产生我们可以利用的可接受的启发式方法。然而，给定基本路径，即松弛问题的解决方案，目前没有定制的方法来有效地利用基本路径。为了有效地利用基本路径及其可接受的启发式，我们开发了部分模式，这是有效利用基本路径（特别是在狭窄通道周围）的解决方案策略。为了协调部分模式，我们开发了模式舞蹈算法，该算法可以有效地协调部分模式以反应性地穿越狭窄的通道。我们将模式舞蹈算法与之前开发的多级规划算法相结合，并对具有挑战性的规划问题（例如 Bugtrap、双 L 形、出口问题）以及安装在 KUKA LWR 机器人上的 37 自由度影子手的四个预抓场景进行基准测试。我们的结果证实，截面模式对于有效解决高维狭窄通道运动规划问题非常有用。 本文提出了一种基于'节段模式'和'模式舞蹈算法'的方法，用于高效解决多级运动规划中的狭窄通道问题。 Andreas Orthey,Marc Toussaint cs.RO

authors_text: Aashaka Shah,Chao-Yuan Wu,Jayashree Mohan,Vijay Chidambaram,Philipp Krähenbühl
title: Memory Optimization for Deep Networks
title_zh: 深度网络的内存优化
comment: 18 pages, ICLR'21
comments: 18 pages, ICLR'21
abstract: Deep learning is slowly, but steadily, hitting a memory bottleneck. While the tensor computation in top-of-the-line GPUs increased by 32x over the last five years, the total available memory only grew by 2.5x. This prevents researchers from exploring larger architectures, as training large networks requires more memory for storing intermediate outputs. In this paper, we present MONeT, an automatic framework that minimizes both the memory footprint and computational overhead of deep networks. MONeT jointly optimizes the checkpointing schedule and the implementation of various operators. MONeT is able to outperform all prior hand-tuned operations as well as automated checkpointing. MONeT reduces the overall memory requirement by 3x for various PyTorch models, with a 9-16% overhead in computation. For the same computation cost, MONeT requires 1.2-1.8x less memory than current state-of-the-art automated checkpointing frameworks. Our code is available at https://github.com/utsaslab/MONeT.
summary: Deep learning is slowly, but steadily, hitting a memory bottleneck. While the tensor computation in top-of-the-line GPUs increased by 32x over the last five years, the total available memory only grew by 2.5x. This prevents researchers from exploring larger architectures, as training large networks requires more memory for storing intermediate outputs. In this paper, we present MONeT, an automatic framework that minimizes both the memory footprint and computational overhead of deep networks. MONeT jointly optimizes the checkpointing schedule and the implementation of various operators. MONeT is able to outperform all prior hand-tuned operations as well as automated checkpointing. MONeT reduces the overall memory requirement by 3x for various PyTorch models, with a 9-16% overhead in computation. For the same computation cost, MONeT requires 1.2-1.8x less memory than current state-of-the-art automated checkpointing frameworks. Our code is available at https://github.com/utsaslab/MONeT.
abstract_zh: 深度学习正在缓慢但稳定地遇到内存瓶颈。虽然顶级 GPU 的张量计算量在过去五年中增加了 32 倍，但总可用内存仅增长了 2.5 倍。这阻止了研究人员探索更大的架构，因为训练大型网络需要更多的内存来存储中间输出。在本文中，我们提出了 MONeT，这是一种自动框架，可以最大限度地减少深度网络的内存占用和计算开销。 MONeT 联合优化检查点时间表和各个算子的实施。 MONeT 能够胜过所有先前的手动调整操作以及自动检查点。 MONeT 将各种 PyTorch 模型的总体内存需求减少了 3 倍，计算开销减少了 9-16%。对于相同的计算成本，MONeT 所需的内存比当前最先进的自动检查点框架少 1.2-1.8 倍。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/utsaslab/MONeT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MONeT框架，通过优化深度网络的内存占用和计算开销，解决深度学习中的内存瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 当前GPU计算能力提升显著，但内存增长缓慢，导致研究人员难以探索更大规模的深度网络架构。
AI.method: MONeT通过联合优化检查点调度策略和算子实现，自动减少内存占用并降低计算开销。
AI.result: MONeT在多种PyTorch模型上将内存需求降低3倍，计算开销增加9-16%，且在相同计算成本下内存需求比现有框架减少1.2-1.8倍。
AI.conclusion: MONeT有效缓解了深度网络的内存瓶颈问题，在保持计算效率的同时显著优化了内存使用，代码已开源。

authors_text: Avi Singh,Albert Yu,Jonathan Yang,Jesse Zhang,Aviral Kumar,Sergey Levine
title: COG: Connecting New Skills to Past Experience with Offline Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: COG：通过离线强化学习将新技能与过去的经验联系起来
comment: Accepted to CoRL 2020. Source code and videos available at https://sites.google.com/view/cog-rl
comments: Accepted to CoRL 2020. Source code and videos available at https://sites.google.com/view/cog-rl
abstract: Reinforcement learning has been applied to a wide variety of robotics problems, but most of such applications involve collecting data from scratch for each new task. Since the amount of robot data we can collect for any single task is limited by time and cost considerations, the learned behavior is typically narrow: the policy can only execute the task in a handful of scenarios that it was trained on. What if there was a way to incorporate a large amount of prior data, either from previously solved tasks or from unsupervised or undirected environment interaction, to extend and generalize learned behaviors? While most prior work on extending robotic skills using pre-collected data focuses on building explicit hierarchies or skill decompositions, we show in this paper that we can reuse prior data to extend new skills simply through dynamic programming. We show that even when the prior data does not actually succeed at solving the new task, it can still be utilized for learning a better policy, by providing the agent with a broader understanding of the mechanics of its environment. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach by chaining together several behaviors seen in prior datasets for solving a new task, with our hardest experimental setting involving composing four robotic skills in a row: picking, placing, drawer opening, and grasping, where a +1/0 sparse reward is provided only on task completion. We train our policies in an end-to-end fashion, mapping high-dimensional image observations to low-level robot control commands, and present results in both simulated and real world domains. Additional materials and source code can be found on our project website: https://sites.google.com/view/cog-rl
summary: Reinforcement learning has been applied to a wide variety of robotics problems, but most of such applications involve collecting data from scratch for each new task. Since the amount of robot data we can collect for any single task is limited by time and cost considerations, the learned behavior is typically narrow: the policy can only execute the task in a handful of scenarios that it was trained on. What if there was a way to incorporate a large amount of prior data, either from previously solved tasks or from unsupervised or undirected environment interaction, to extend and generalize learned behaviors? While most prior work on extending robotic skills using pre-collected data focuses on building explicit hierarchies or skill decompositions, we show in this paper that we can reuse prior data to extend new skills simply through dynamic programming. We show that even when the prior data does not actually succeed at solving the new task, it can still be utilized for learning a better policy, by providing the agent with a broader understanding of the mechanics of its environment. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach by chaining together several behaviors seen in prior datasets for solving a new task, with our hardest experimental setting involving composing four robotic skills in a row: picking, placing, drawer opening, and grasping, where a +1/0 sparse reward is provided only on task completion. We train our policies in an end-to-end fashion, mapping high-dimensional image observations to low-level robot control commands, and present results in both simulated and real world domains. Additional materials and source code can be found on our project website: https://sites.google.com/view/cog-rl
abstract_zh: 强化学习已应用于各种机器人问题，但大多数此类应用都涉及从头开始为每个新任务收集数据。由于我们可以为任何单个任务收集的机器人数据量受到时间和成本考虑的限制，因此学习的行为通常很狭窄：策略只能在其训练的少数场景中执行任务。如果有一种方法可以整合大量先前的数据（无论是来自先前解决的任务还是来自无监督或无指导的环境交互）来扩展和概括学习的行为呢？虽然大多数使用预先收集的数据扩展机器人技能的先前工作都侧重于构建显式层次结构或技能分解，但我们在本文中表明，我们可以简单地通过动态编程重用先前的数据来扩展新技能。我们表明，即使先前的数据实际上没有成功解决新任务，它仍然可以通过为代理提供对其环境机制的更广泛的理解来用于学习更好的策略。我们通过将先前数据集中出现的几种行为链接在一起来解决新任务，证明了我们方法的有效性，我们最难的实验设置涉及连续组合四种机器人技能：拾取、放置、抽屉打开和抓取，其中仅在任务完成时提供 +1/0 稀疏奖励。我们以端到端的方式训练我们的策略，将高维图像观察映射到低级机器人控制命令，并在模拟和现实世界领域提供结果。其他材料和源代码可以在我们的项目网站上找到：https://sites.google.com/view/cog-rl

AI.tldr: 本文提出COG方法，通过离线强化学习将新技能与过往经验结合，使机器人能在无需从头收集数据的情况下扩展技能。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习需为每个新任务从头收集数据，受限于时间和成本，导致策略泛化能力差。利用已有数据可提升学习效率和技能扩展性。
AI.method: 基于动态规划复用历史数据，无需显式构建技能分层。通过端到端训练将高维图像映射为低级控制指令，组合多技能完成新任务。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实环境中成功组合抓取、放置、开抽屉等四类技能，仅在任务完成时给予稀疏奖励，验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: COG方法通过离线数据复用显著提升机器人技能泛化能力，为无需新数据采集的持续学习提供可行方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出COG方法，通过离线强化学习将新技能与过往经验结合，使机器人能在无需从头收集数据的情况下扩展技能。
ai_content.motivation: 传统强化学习需为每个新任务从头收集数据，受限于时间和成本，导致策略泛化能力差。利用已有数据可提升学习效率和技能扩展性。
ai_content.method: 基于动态规划复用历史数据，无需显式构建技能分层。通过端到端训练将高维图像映射为低级控制指令，组合多技能完成新任务。
ai_content.result: 在模拟和真实环境中成功组合抓取、放置、开抽屉等四类技能，仅在任务完成时给予稀疏奖励，验证方法有效性。
ai_content.conclusion: COG方法通过离线数据复用显著提升机器人技能泛化能力，为无需新数据采集的持续学习提供可行方案。

search_text: COG: Connecting New Skills to Past Experience with Offline Reinforcement Learning COG：通过离线强化学习将新技能与过去的经验联系起来 Reinforcement learning has been applied to a wide variety of robotics problems, but most of such applications involve collecting data from scratch for each new task. Since the amount of robot data we can collect for any single task is limited by time and cost considerations, the learned behavior is typically narrow: the policy can only execute the task in a handful of scenarios that it was trained on. What if there was a way to incorporate a large amount of prior data, either from previously solved tasks or from unsupervised or undirected environment interaction, to extend and generalize learned behaviors? While most prior work on extending robotic skills using pre-collected data focuses on building explicit hierarchies or skill decompositions, we show in this paper that we can reuse prior data to extend new skills simply through dynamic programming. We show that even when the prior data does not actually succeed at solving the new task, it can still be utilized for learning a better policy, by providing the agent with a broader understanding of the mechanics of its environment. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach by chaining together several behaviors seen in prior datasets for solving a new task, with our hardest experimental setting involving composing four robotic skills in a row: picking, placing, drawer opening, and grasping, where a +1/0 sparse reward is provided only on task completion. We train our policies in an end-to-end fashion, mapping high-dimensional image observations to low-level robot control commands, and present results in both simulated and real world domains. Additional materials and source code can be found on our project website: https://sites.google.com/view/cog-rl 强化学习已应用于各种机器人问题，但大多数此类应用都涉及从头开始为每个新任务收集数据。由于我们可以为任何单个任务收集的机器人数据量受到时间和成本考虑的限制，因此学习的行为通常很狭窄：策略只能在其训练的少数场景中执行任务。如果有一种方法可以整合大量先前的数据（无论是来自先前解决的任务还是来自无监督或无指导的环境交互）来扩展和概括学习的行为呢？虽然大多数使用预先收集的数据扩展机器人技能的先前工作都侧重于构建显式层次结构或技能分解，但我们在本文中表明，我们可以简单地通过动态编程重用先前的数据来扩展新技能。我们表明，即使先前的数据实际上没有成功解决新任务，它仍然可以通过为代理提供对其环境机制的更广泛的理解来用于学习更好的策略。我们通过将先前数据集中出现的几种行为链接在一起来解决新任务，证明了我们方法的有效性，我们最难的实验设置涉及连续组合四种机器人技能：拾取、放置、抽屉打开和抓取，其中仅在任务完成时提供 +1/0 稀疏奖励。我们以端到端的方式训练我们的策略，将高维图像观察映射到低级机器人控制命令，并在模拟和现实世界领域提供结果。其他材料和源代码可以在我们的项目网站上找到：https://sites.google.com/view/cog-rl 本文提出COG方法，通过离线强化学习将新技能与过往经验结合，使机器人能在无需从头收集数据的情况下扩展技能。 Avi Singh,Albert Yu,Jonathan Yang,Jesse Zhang,Aviral Kumar,Sergey Levine cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Homanga Bharadhwaj,Aviral Kumar,Nicholas Rhinehart,Sergey Levine,Florian Shkurti,Animesh Garg
title: Conservative Safety Critics for Exploration
title_zh: 对勘探的保守安全批评
comment: Published as a conference paper in ICLR 2021
comments: Published as a conference paper in ICLR 2021
abstract: Safe exploration presents a major challenge in reinforcement learning (RL): when active data collection requires deploying partially trained policies, we must ensure that these policies avoid catastrophically unsafe regions, while still enabling trial and error learning. In this paper, we target the problem of safe exploration in RL by learning a conservative safety estimate of environment states through a critic, and provably upper bound the likelihood of catastrophic failures at every training iteration. We theoretically characterize the tradeoff between safety and policy improvement, show that the safety constraints are likely to be satisfied with high probability during training, derive provable convergence guarantees for our approach, which is no worse asymptotically than standard RL, and demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed approach on a suite of challenging navigation, manipulation, and locomotion tasks. Empirically, we show that the proposed approach can achieve competitive task performance while incurring significantly lower catastrophic failure rates during training than prior methods. Videos are at this url https://sites.google.com/view/conservative-safety-critics/home
summary: Safe exploration presents a major challenge in reinforcement learning (RL): when active data collection requires deploying partially trained policies, we must ensure that these policies avoid catastrophically unsafe regions, while still enabling trial and error learning. In this paper, we target the problem of safe exploration in RL by learning a conservative safety estimate of environment states through a critic, and provably upper bound the likelihood of catastrophic failures at every training iteration. We theoretically characterize the tradeoff between safety and policy improvement, show that the safety constraints are likely to be satisfied with high probability during training, derive provable convergence guarantees for our approach, which is no worse asymptotically than standard RL, and demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed approach on a suite of challenging navigation, manipulation, and locomotion tasks. Empirically, we show that the proposed approach can achieve competitive task performance while incurring significantly lower catastrophic failure rates during training than prior methods. Videos are at this url https://sites.google.com/view/conservative-safety-critics/home
abstract_zh: 安全探索对强化学习（RL）提出了重大挑战：当主动数据收集需要部署部分训练的策略时，我们必须确保这些策略避免灾难性的不安全区域，同时仍然支持试错学习。在本文中，我们通过批评家学习对环境状态的保守安全估计，并可证明每次训练迭代中灾难性失败的可能性上限，从而解决强化学习中的安全探索问题。我们从理论上描述了安全性和策略改进之间的权衡，表明在训练过程中安全约束很可能以高概率得到满足，为我们的方法得出可证明的收敛保证，这在渐近上不比标准强化学习差，并证明了所提出的方法在一系列具有挑战性的导航、操纵和运动任务上的有效性。根据经验，我们表明所提出的方法可以实现有竞争力的任务性能，同时在训练期间比以前的方法显着降低灾难性失败率。视频位于此网址 https://sites.google.com/view/conservative-safety-critics/home

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种强化学习中的安全探索方法，通过学习保守的安全估计来避免灾难性失败，同时保持策略改进。
AI.motivation: 在强化学习中，部分训练的策略可能因探索未知状态而引发灾难性失败，现有方法难以平衡安全与探索效率。
AI.method: 通过训练一个保守的安全评估器（critic），在每一步迭代中理论证明性地限制灾难性失败概率，并分析安全与策略改进的权衡关系。
AI.result: 在导航、操作和运动任务中，该方法在保持任务性能的同时显著降低训练过程中的灾难性失败率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为安全强化学习提供了理论保证和有效实现，能够在复杂任务中实现安全与探索的平衡。

title: Generative Temporal Difference Learning for Infinite-Horizon Prediction
title_zh: 用于无限视野预测的生成时间差分学习
comment: NeurIPS 2020. Project page at: https://gammamodels.github.io/
comments: NeurIPS 2020. Project page at: https://gammamodels.github.io/
abstract: We introduce the $γ$-model, a predictive model of environment dynamics with an infinite probabilistic horizon. Replacing standard single-step models with $γ$-models leads to generalizations of the procedures central to model-based control, including the model rollout and model-based value estimation. The $γ$-model, trained with a generative reinterpretation of temporal difference learning, is a natural continuous analogue of the successor representation and a hybrid between model-free and model-based mechanisms. Like a value function, it contains information about the long-term future; like a standard predictive model, it is independent of task reward. We instantiate the $γ$-model as both a generative adversarial network and normalizing flow, discuss how its training reflects an inescapable tradeoff between training-time and testing-time compounding errors, and empirically investigate its utility for prediction and control.
summary: We introduce the $γ$-model, a predictive model of environment dynamics with an infinite probabilistic horizon. Replacing standard single-step models with $γ$-models leads to generalizations of the procedures central to model-based control, including the model rollout and model-based value estimation. The $γ$-model, trained with a generative reinterpretation of temporal difference learning, is a natural continuous analogue of the successor representation and a hybrid between model-free and model-based mechanisms. Like a value function, it contains information about the long-term future; like a standard predictive model, it is independent of task reward. We instantiate the $γ$-model as both a generative adversarial network and normalizing flow, discuss how its training reflects an inescapable tradeoff between training-time and testing-time compounding errors, and empirically investigate its utility for prediction and control.
abstract_zh: 我们引入 $γ$ 模型，这是一种具有无限概率范围的环境动态预测模型。用 $γ$ 模型替换标准单步模型可以推广基于模型的控制的核心程序，包括模型推出和基于模型的价值估计。 $γ$ 模型通过时间差异学习的生成式重新解释进行训练，是后继表示的自然连续模拟，也是无模型机制和基于模型机制之间的混合体。就像价值函数一样，它包含有关长期未来的信息；与标准预测模型一样，它独立于任务奖励。我们将 $γ$ 模型实例化为生成对抗网络和标准化流程，讨论其训练如何反映训练时间和测试时间复合误差之间不可避免的权衡，并凭经验研究其预测和控制的效用。

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为γ模型的生成式时间差分学习方法，用于无限时间范围的环境动态预测，并推广到模型预测与控制任务中。
AI.motivation: 传统单步预测模型难以捕捉长期动态，需结合无模型与基于模型机制的优势以提升预测精度与控制效果。
AI.method: 通过生成式时间差分学习训练γ模型，结合生成对抗网络和归一化流实现，分析训练与测试阶段误差的权衡。
AI.result: 实证研究表明γ模型在预测任务及控制任务中均表现出有效性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: γ模型作为无模型与基于模型方法的混合体，为长期预测和控制提供了新思路，并揭示了训练与测试误差的不可回避的权衡关系，为后续研究奠定基础。

The $γ$-model, trained with a generative reinterpretation of temporal difference learning, is a natural continuous analogue of the successor representation and a hybrid between model-free and model-based mechanisms. We instantiate the $γ$-model as both a generative adversarial network and normalizing flow, discuss how its training reflects an inescapable tradeoff between training-time and testing-time compounding errors, and empirically investigate its utility for prediction and control. 我们引入 $γ$ 模型，这是一种具有无限概率范围的环境动态预测模型。用 $γ$ 模型替换标准单步模型可以推广基于模型的控制的核心程序，包括模型推出和基于模型的价值估计。 $γ$ 模型通过时间差异学习的生成式重新解释进行训练，是后继表示的自然连续模拟，也是无模型机制和基于模型机制之间的混合体。就像价值函数一样，它包含有关长期未来的信息；与标准预测模型一样，它独立于任务奖励。我们将 $γ$ 模型实例化为生成对抗网络和标准化流程，讨论其训练如何反映训练时间和测试时间复合误差之间不可避免的权衡，并凭经验研究其预测和控制的效用。 提出一种名为γ模型的生成式时间差分学习方法，用于无限时间范围的环境动态预测，并推广到模型预测与控制任务中。 Michael Janner,Igor Mordatch,Sergey Levine cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Improved Guarantees for k-means++ and k-means++ Parallel
title_zh: 改进了 k-means++ 和 k-means++ 并行的保证
comment: ef:NeurIPS 2020
comments: ef:NeurIPS 2020
abstract: In this paper, we study k-means++ and k-means++ parallel, the two most popular algorithms for the classic k-means clustering problem. We provide novel analyses and show improved approximation and bi-criteria approximation guarantees for k-means++ and k-means++ parallel. Our results give a better theoretical justification for why these algorithms perform extremely well in practice. We also propose a new variant of k-means++ parallel algorithm (Exponential Race k-means++) that has the same approximation guarantees as k-means++.
summary: In this paper, we study k-means++ and k-means++ parallel, the two most popular algorithms for the classic k-means clustering problem. We provide novel analyses and show improved approximation and bi-criteria approximation guarantees for k-means++ and k-means++ parallel. Our results give a better theoretical justification for why these algorithms perform extremely well in practice. We also propose a new variant of k-means++ parallel algorithm (Exponential Race k-means++) that has the same approximation guarantees as k-means++.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了 k-means++ 和 k-means++ 并行算法，这是经典 k-means 聚类问题的两种最流行的算法。我们提供了新颖的分析，并展示了 k-means++ 和 k-means++ 并行的改进近似和双标准近似保证。我们的结果为为什么这些算法在实践中表现得非常好提供了更好的理论依据。我们还提出了 k-means++ 并行算法的新变体（Exponential Race k-means++），它具有与 k-means++ 相同的近似保证。

AI.motivation: 现有k-means++算法在实践中表现良好，但缺乏理论分析，需改进其近似保证以增强理论支持
AI.method: 通过新颖的分析方法，改进k-means++和并行版本的近似保证，并提出新的算法变体
AI.result: 改进了k-means++的近似和双标准近似保证，并提出新算法保持相同保证
AI.conclusion: 改进的理论分析为k-means++算法的高效性提供了更坚实的理论支持

title: It's All in the Name: A Character Based Approach To Infer Religion
title_zh: 一切都在名称中：基于角色的宗教推断方法
abstract: Demographic inference from text has received a surge of attention in the field of natural language processing in the last decade. In this paper, we use personal names to infer religion in South Asia - where religion is a salient social division, and yet, disaggregated data on it remains scarce. Existing work predicts religion using dictionary based method, and therefore, can not classify unseen names. We use character based models which learn character patterns and, therefore, can classify unseen names as well with high accuracy. These models are also much faster and can easily be scaled to large data sets. We improve our classifier by combining the name of an individual with that of their parent/spouse and achieve remarkably high accuracy. Finally, we trace the classification decisions of a convolutional neural network model using layer-wise relevance propagation which can explain the predictions of complex non-linear classifiers and circumvent their purported black box nature. We show how character patterns learned by the classifier are rooted in the linguistic origins of names.
summary: Demographic inference from text has received a surge of attention in the field of natural language processing in the last decade. In this paper, we use personal names to infer religion in South Asia - where religion is a salient social division, and yet, disaggregated data on it remains scarce. Existing work predicts religion using dictionary based method, and therefore, can not classify unseen names. We use character based models which learn character patterns and, therefore, can classify unseen names as well with high accuracy. These models are also much faster and can easily be scaled to large data sets. We improve our classifier by combining the name of an individual with that of their parent/spouse and achieve remarkably high accuracy. Finally, we trace the classification decisions of a convolutional neural network model using layer-wise relevance propagation which can explain the predictions of complex non-linear classifiers and circumvent their purported black box nature. We show how character patterns learned by the classifier are rooted in the linguistic origins of names.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，从文本进行的人口统计推断在自然语言处理领域受到了极大的关注。在本文中，我们使用个人姓名来推断南亚的宗教——宗教是那里一个显着的社会分歧，然而，关于它的分类数据仍然很少。现有的工作使用基于字典的方法来预测宗教，因此无法对看不见的名字进行分类。我们使用基于字符的模型来学习字符模式，因此可以高精度地对看不见的名称进行分类。这些模型速度也快得多，并且可以轻松扩展到大型数据集。我们通过将个人姓名与其父母/配偶的姓名相结合来改进我们的分类器，并实现非常高的准确度。最后，我们使用逐层相关性传播来跟踪卷积神经网络模型的分类决策，这可以解释复杂非线性分类器的预测并规避其所谓的黑箱性质。我们展示了分类器学习的字符模式如何植根于名称的语言起源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于字符模式的模型，通过个人姓名推断南亚地区的宗教归属。
AI.motivation: 现有基于字典的宗教分类方法无法处理未见过的名字，且南亚地区宗教数据稀缺，需更高效可扩展的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用字符级卷积神经网络模型，结合个体及其父母/配偶姓名，并通过层间相关传播技术解释模型决策过程。
AI.result: 模型在未见过的名字上达到高准确率，揭示了字符模式与语言起源的关联性。
AI.conclusion: 字符模型有效解决宗教分类问题，同时通过可解释性分析增强了模型可信度。

title: Artificial intelligence based writer identification generates new evidence for the unknown scribes of the Dead Sea Scrolls exemplified by the Great Isaiah Scroll (1QIsaa)
title_zh: 基于人工智能的作者识别为死海古卷的未知抄写者生成了新的证据，以大以赛亚古卷为例 (1QIsaa)
comment: 23 pages, 15 pages of supplementary materials, submitted to PLOS ONE on 19 October 2019
comments: 23 pages, 15 pages of supplementary materials, submitted to PLOS ONE on 19 October 2019
abstract: The Dead Sea Scrolls are tangible evidence of the Bible's ancient scribal culture. Palaeography - the study of ancient handwriting - can provide access to this scribal culture. However, one of the problems of traditional palaeography is to determine writer identity when the writing style is near uniform. This is exemplified by the Great Isaiah Scroll (1QIsaa). To this end, we used pattern recognition and artificial intelligence techniques to innovate the palaeography of the scrolls regarding writer identification and to pioneer the microlevel of individual scribes to open access to the Bible's ancient scribal culture. Although many scholars believe that 1QIsaa was written by one scribe, we report new evidence for a breaking point in the series of columns in this scroll. Without prior assumption of writer identity, based on point clouds of the reduced-dimensionality feature-space, we found that columns from the first and second halves of the manuscript ended up in two distinct zones of such scatter plots, notably for a range of digital palaeography tools, each addressing very different featural aspects of the script samples. In a secondary, independent, analysis, now assuming writer difference and using yet another independent feature method and several different types of statistical testing, a switching point was found in the column series. A clear phase transition is apparent around column 27. Given the statistically significant differences between the two halves, a tertiary, post-hoc analysis was performed. Demonstrating that two main scribes were responsible for the Great Isaiah Scroll, this study sheds new light on the Bible's ancient scribal culture by providing new, tangible evidence that ancient biblical texts were not copied by a single scribe only but that multiple scribes could closely collaborate on one particular manuscript.
summary: The Dead Sea Scrolls are tangible evidence of the Bible's ancient scribal culture. Palaeography - the study of ancient handwriting - can provide access to this scribal culture. However, one of the problems of traditional palaeography is to determine writer identity when the writing style is near uniform. This is exemplified by the Great Isaiah Scroll (1QIsaa). To this end, we used pattern recognition and artificial intelligence techniques to innovate the palaeography of the scrolls regarding writer identification and to pioneer the microlevel of individual scribes to open access to the Bible's ancient scribal culture. Although many scholars believe that 1QIsaa was written by one scribe, we report new evidence for a breaking point in the series of columns in this scroll. Without prior assumption of writer identity, based on point clouds of the reduced-dimensionality feature-space, we found that columns from the first and second halves of the manuscript ended up in two distinct zones of such scatter plots, notably for a range of digital palaeography tools, each addressing very different featural aspects of the script samples. In a secondary, independent, analysis, now assuming writer difference and using yet another independent feature method and several different types of statistical testing, a switching point was found in the column series. A clear phase transition is apparent around column 27. Given the statistically significant differences between the two halves, a tertiary, post-hoc analysis was performed. Demonstrating that two main scribes were responsible for the Great Isaiah Scroll, this study sheds new light on the Bible's ancient scribal culture by providing new, tangible evidence that ancient biblical texts were not copied by a single scribe only but that multiple scribes could closely collaborate on one particular manuscript.
abstract_zh: 死海古卷是圣经古代抄写文化的具体证据。古文字学——对古代笔迹的研究——可以提供了解这种抄写文化的途径。然而，传统古文字学的问题之一是在文字风格接近统一的情况下确定作者身份。以赛亚书卷 (1QIsaa) 就是一个例子。为此，我们利用模式识别和人工智能技术，对卷轴古文字学的作者识别进行了创新，并在个体抄写员的微观层面上进行了开拓，以打开对圣经古代抄写文化的了解。尽管许多学者认为 1QIsaa 是由一位抄写员撰写的，但我们报告了该卷轴中一系列专栏的突破点的新证据。在没有事先假设作者身份的情况下，基于降维特征空间的点云，我们发现手稿前半部分和后半部分的列最终出现在此类散点图的两个不同区域中，特别是对于一系列数字古文字工具，每个工具都解决了脚本样本的非常不同的特征方面。在第二次独立分析中，现在假设作者差异并使用另一种独立特征方法和几种不同类型的统计测试，在专栏系列中发现了一个切换点。第 27 列周围有明显的相变。考虑到两半之间存在统计学上的显着差异，进行了第三次事后分析。这项研究证明了《以赛亚书》卷轴由两位主要抄写员负责，并提供了新的、切实的证据，表明古代圣经文本并非仅由一名抄写员抄写，而是多个抄写员可以密切合作抄写一份特定的手稿，从而为了解圣经的古代抄写文化提供了新的线索。

AI.tldr: 本研究利用人工智能技术对死海古卷中的《以赛亚书》大卷（1QIsaa）进行书写者识别，揭示其可能由两位抄经者共同完成。
AI.motivation: 传统古文字学难以在书写风格高度统一的情况下确定作者身份，而《以赛亚书》大卷长期被认为由单一抄经者完成，需突破传统方法局限以获取新证据。
AI.method: 通过点云降维特征空间分析、多种数字古文字工具及统计检验，结合无先验假设的模式识别与后续假设检验，定位抄写过程中的转折点。
AI.result: 发现卷轴中第27列附近存在显著的书写风格分界，统计证实前后两部分由不同抄经者完成，推翻单一作者的原有认知。
AI.conclusion: 古代圣经文本可能由多位抄经者协作完成，为研究圣经古代抄写文化提供了新的实证依据。

motivation: 传统古文字学难以在书写风格高度统一的情况下确定作者身份，而《以赛亚书》大卷长期被认为由单一抄经者完成，需突破传统方法局限以获取新证据。
method: 通过点云降维特征空间分析、多种数字古文字工具及统计检验，结合无先验假设的模式识别与后续假设检验，定位抄写过程中的转折点。
result: 发现卷轴中第27列附近存在显著的书写风格分界，统计证实前后两部分由不同抄经者完成，推翻单一作者的原有认知。
conclusion: 古代圣经文本可能由多位抄经者协作完成，为研究圣经古代抄写文化提供了新的实证依据。
search_text: Artificial intelligence based writer identification generates new evidence for the unknown scribes of the Dead Sea Scrolls exemplified by the Great Isaiah Scroll (1QIsaa) 基于人工智能的作者识别为死海古卷的未知抄写者生成了新的证据，以大以赛亚古卷为例 (1QIsaa) The Dead Sea Scrolls are tangible evidence of the Bible's ancient scribal culture. Palaeography - the study of ancient handwriting - can provide access to this scribal culture. However, one of the problems of traditional palaeography is to determine writer identity when the writing style is near uniform. This is exemplified by the Great Isaiah Scroll (1QIsaa). To this end, we used pattern recognition and artificial intelligence techniques to innovate the palaeography of the scrolls regarding writer identification and to pioneer the microlevel of individual scribes to open access to the Bible's ancient scribal culture. Although many scholars believe that 1QIsaa was written by one scribe, we report new evidence for a breaking point in the series of columns in this scroll. Without prior assumption of writer identity, based on point clouds of the reduced-dimensionality feature-space, we found that columns from the first and second halves of the manuscript ended up in two distinct zones of such scatter plots, notably for a range of digital palaeography tools, each addressing very different featural aspects of the script samples. In a secondary, independent, analysis, now assuming writer difference and using yet another independent feature method and several different types of statistical testing, a switching point was found in the column series. A clear phase transition is apparent around column 27. Given the statistically significant differences between the two halves, a tertiary, post-hoc analysis was performed. Demonstrating that two main scribes were responsible for the Great Isaiah Scroll, this study sheds new light on the Bible's ancient scribal culture by providing new, tangible evidence that ancient biblical texts were not copied by a single scribe only but that multiple scribes could closely collaborate on one particular manuscript. 死海古卷是圣经古代抄写文化的具体证据。古文字学——对古代笔迹的研究——可以提供了解这种抄写文化的途径。然而，传统古文字学的问题之一是在文字风格接近统一的情况下确定作者身份。以赛亚书卷 (1QIsaa) 就是一个例子。为此，我们利用模式识别和人工智能技术，对卷轴古文字学的作者识别进行了创新，并在个体抄写员的微观层面上进行了开拓，以打开对圣经古代抄写文化的了解。尽管许多学者认为 1QIsaa 是由一位抄写员撰写的，但我们报告了该卷轴中一系列专栏的突破点的新证据。在没有事先假设作者身份的情况下，基于降维特征空间的点云，我们发现手稿前半部分和后半部分的列最终出现在此类散点图的两个不同区域中，特别是对于一系列数字古文字工具，每个工具都解决了脚本样本的非常不同的特征方面。在第二次独立分析中，现在假设作者差异并使用另一种独立特征方法和几种不同类型的统计测试，在专栏系列中发现了一个切换点。第 27 列周围有明显的相变。考虑到两半之间存在统计学上的显着差异，进行了第三次事后分析。这项研究证明了《以赛亚书》卷轴由两位主要抄写员负责，并提供了新的、切实的证据，表明古代圣经文本并非仅由一名抄写员抄写，而是多个抄写员可以密切合作抄写一份特定的手稿，从而为了解圣经的古代抄写文化提供了新的线索。 本研究利用人工智能技术对死海古卷中的《以赛亚书》大卷（1QIsaa）进行书写者识别，揭示其可能由两位抄经者共同完成。 Mladen Popović,Maruf A. Dhali,Lambert Schomaker cs.AI,cs.CV

title: Dynamic Boundary Time Warping for Sub-sequence Matching with Few Examples
title_zh: 用于子序列匹配的动态边界时间扭曲（很少有例子）
abstract: The paper presents a novel method of finding a fragment in a long temporal sequence similar to the set of shorter sequences. We are the first to propose an algorithm for such a search that does not rely on computing the average sequence from query examples. Instead, we use query examples as is, utilizing all of them simultaneously. The introduced method based on the Dynamic Time Warping (DTW) technique is suited explicitly for few-shot query-by-example retrieval tasks. We evaluate it on two different few-shot problems from the field of Natural Language Processing. The results show it either outperforms baselines and previous approaches or achieves comparable results when a low number of examples is available.
summary: The paper presents a novel method of finding a fragment in a long temporal sequence similar to the set of shorter sequences. We are the first to propose an algorithm for such a search that does not rely on computing the average sequence from query examples. Instead, we use query examples as is, utilizing all of them simultaneously. The introduced method based on the Dynamic Time Warping (DTW) technique is suited explicitly for few-shot query-by-example retrieval tasks. We evaluate it on two different few-shot problems from the field of Natural Language Processing. The results show it either outperforms baselines and previous approaches or achieves comparable results when a low number of examples is available.
abstract_zh: 该论文提出了一种在长时间序列中查找与较短序列集相似的片段的新方法。我们是第一个提出一种用于此类搜索的算法，该算法不依赖于计算查询示例的平均序列。相反，我们按原样使用查询示例，同时利用所有这些示例。所引入的基于动态时间规整（DTW）技术的方法明确适用于小样本查询示例检索任务。我们在自然语言处理领域的两个不同的小样本问题上对其进行了评估。结果表明，它要么优于基线和以前的方法，要么在可用示例数量较少时达到可比的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于动态时间规整（DTW）的子序列匹配方法，用于在长时序数据中检索与少量示例相似的片段。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖计算查询示例的平均序列，可能导致信息丢失。本文旨在直接利用所有查询示例进行匹配，提升小样本场景下的检索效果。
AI.method: 提出动态边界时间规整算法，无需计算平均序列，而是同时利用所有查询示例进行子序列匹配，适用于小样本检索任务。
AI.result: 在NLP领域的两个小样本问题上，该方法在示例数量极少时表现优于或至少不劣于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法为小样本时序检索提供了有效解决方案，尤其适用于NLP等需要高效匹配的场景，且具有跨领域应用潜力。

title: Deep Probabilistic Imaging: Uncertainty Quantification and Multi-modal Solution Characterization for Computational Imaging
title_zh: 深度概率成像：计算成像的不确定性量化和多模态解决方案表征
comment: This paper has been accepted to AAAI 2021. Keywords: Computational Imaging, Normalizing Flow, Uncertainty Quantification, Interferometry, MRI
comments: This paper has been accepted to AAAI 2021. Keywords: Computational Imaging, Normalizing Flow, Uncertainty Quantification, Interferometry, MRI
abstract: Computational image reconstruction algorithms generally produce a single image without any measure of uncertainty or confidence. Regularized Maximum Likelihood (RML) and feed-forward deep learning approaches for inverse problems typically focus on recovering a point estimate. This is a serious limitation when working with underdetermined imaging systems, where it is conceivable that multiple image modes would be consistent with the measured data. Characterizing the space of probable images that explain the observational data is therefore crucial. In this paper, we propose a variational deep probabilistic imaging approach to quantify reconstruction uncertainty. Deep Probabilistic Imaging (DPI) employs an untrained deep generative model to estimate a posterior distribution of an unobserved image. This approach does not require any training data; instead, it optimizes the weights of a neural network to generate image samples that fit a particular measurement dataset. Once the network weights have been learned, the posterior distribution can be efficiently sampled. We demonstrate this approach in the context of interferometric radio imaging, which is used for black hole imaging with the Event Horizon Telescope, and compressed sensing Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI).
summary: Computational image reconstruction algorithms generally produce a single image without any measure of uncertainty or confidence. Regularized Maximum Likelihood (RML) and feed-forward deep learning approaches for inverse problems typically focus on recovering a point estimate. This is a serious limitation when working with underdetermined imaging systems, where it is conceivable that multiple image modes would be consistent with the measured data. Characterizing the space of probable images that explain the observational data is therefore crucial. In this paper, we propose a variational deep probabilistic imaging approach to quantify reconstruction uncertainty. Deep Probabilistic Imaging (DPI) employs an untrained deep generative model to estimate a posterior distribution of an unobserved image. This approach does not require any training data; instead, it optimizes the weights of a neural network to generate image samples that fit a particular measurement dataset. Once the network weights have been learned, the posterior distribution can be efficiently sampled. We demonstrate this approach in the context of interferometric radio imaging, which is used for black hole imaging with the Event Horizon Telescope, and compressed sensing Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI).
abstract_zh: 计算图像重建算法通常产生单个图像，而没有任何不确定性或置信度的测量。针对逆问题的正则化最大似然 (RML) 和前馈深度学习方法通​​常侧重于恢复点估计。当使用不确定的成像系统时，这是一个严重的限制，可以想象多种图像模式将与测量的数据一致。因此，表征解释观测数据的可能图像的空间至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种变分深度概率成像方法来量化重建不确定性。深度概率成像 (DPI) 采用未经训练的深度生成模型来估计未观察图像的后验分布。这种方法不需要任何训练数据；相反，它优化神经网络的权重以生成适合特定测量数据集的图像样本。一旦学习了网络权重，就可以有效地对后验分布进行采样。我们在干涉射电成像（用于事件视界望远镜黑洞成像）和压缩感知磁共振成像（MRI）的背景下演示了这种方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种深度概率成像（DPI）方法，用于量化计算成像中的重建不确定性，并表征多模态解空间。
AI.motivation: 传统计算成像算法仅输出单一图像而无不确定性度量，在欠定系统中可能遗漏多种符合观测数据的图像模式，需对可能的图像空间进行表征。
AI.method: 采用未训练的深度生成模型估计未观测图像的后验分布，通过优化神经网络权重生成符合测量数据的图像样本，无需训练数据即可高效采样后验分布。
AI.result: 在射电干涉成像（事件视界望远镜）和压缩感知磁共振成像（MRI）中验证了该方法的有效性，展示了不确定性量化与多模态解表征能力。
AI.conclusion: 深度概率成像通过无需训练数据的后验分布估计，为计算成像提供了不确定性量化和多模态解表征的新范式，优于传统点估计方法。

authors_text: Xavier Ferrer-Aran,Tom van Nuenen,Natalia Criado,Jose M. Such
title: Discovering and Interpreting Biased Concepts in Online Communities
title_zh: 发现和解释在线社区中的偏见概念
abstract: Language carries implicit human biases, functioning both as a reflection and a perpetuation of stereotypes that people carry with them. Recently, ML-based NLP methods such as word embeddings have been shown to learn such language biases with striking accuracy. This capability of word embeddings has been successfully exploited as a tool to quantify and study human biases. However, previous studies only consider a predefined set of biased concepts to attest (e.g., whether gender is more or less associated with particular jobs), or just discover biased words without helping to understand their meaning at the conceptual level. As such, these approaches can be either unable to find biased concepts that have not been defined in advance, or the biases they find are difficult to interpret and study. This could make existing approaches unsuitable to discover and interpret biases in online communities, as such communities may carry different biases than those in mainstream culture. This paper improves upon, extends, and evaluates our previous data-driven method to automatically discover and help interpret biased concepts encoded in word embeddings. We apply this approach to study the biased concepts present in the language used in online communities and experimentally show the validity and stability of our method
summary: Language carries implicit human biases, functioning both as a reflection and a perpetuation of stereotypes that people carry with them. Recently, ML-based NLP methods such as word embeddings have been shown to learn such language biases with striking accuracy. This capability of word embeddings has been successfully exploited as a tool to quantify and study human biases. However, previous studies only consider a predefined set of biased concepts to attest (e.g., whether gender is more or less associated with particular jobs), or just discover biased words without helping to understand their meaning at the conceptual level. As such, these approaches can be either unable to find biased concepts that have not been defined in advance, or the biases they find are difficult to interpret and study. This could make existing approaches unsuitable to discover and interpret biases in online communities, as such communities may carry different biases than those in mainstream culture. This paper improves upon, extends, and evaluates our previous data-driven method to automatically discover and help interpret biased concepts encoded in word embeddings. We apply this approach to study the biased concepts present in the language used in online communities and experimentally show the validity and stability of our method
abstract_zh: 语言带有隐含的人类偏见，既反映了人们的刻板印象，又使其永久化。最近，基于机器学习的 NLP 方法（例如词嵌入）已被证明能够以惊人的准确度学习此类语言偏差。词嵌入的这种能力已被成功地用作量化和研究人类偏见的工具。然而，以前的研究只考虑一组预定义的有偏见的概念来证明（例如，性别是否或多或少与特定工作相关），或者只是发现有偏见的词语，而没有帮助在概念层面理解它们的含义。因此，这些方法可能无法找到尚未事先定义的有偏见的概念，或者他们发现的偏见难以解释和研究。这可能会使现有方法不适合发现和解释在线社区中的偏见，因为此类社区可能带有与主流文化不同的偏见。本文改进、扩展和评估了我们之前的数据驱动方法，以自动发现并帮助解释词嵌入中编码的有偏见的概念。我们应用这种方法来研究在线社区使用的语言中存在的偏见概念，并通过实验证明我们方法的有效性和稳定性

AI.tldr: 提出一种改进的数据驱动方法，用于自动发现和解释在线社区语言中的偏见概念
AI.motivation: 现有方法在发现未预定义偏见或解释其概念层面含义时存在不足，难以适应在线社区中可能存在的独特偏见
AI.method: 改进并评估数据驱动方法，自动识别词嵌入中的偏见概念，并通过实验验证其有效性与稳定性
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在发现和解释在线社区语言中的偏见概念时的有效性与稳定性
AI.conclusion: 改进的方法能有效识别并解释在线社区中的偏见概念，为不同文化背景下的偏见研究提供工具

title: Can Reinforcement Learning for Continuous Control Generalize Across Physics Engines?
title_zh: 用于连续控制的强化学习可以在物理引擎中推广吗？
comment: 10 pages plus appendix
comments: 10 pages plus appendix
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms should learn as much as possible about the environment but not the properties of the physics engines that generate the environment. There are multiple algorithms that solve the task in a physics engine based environment but there is no work done so far to understand if the RL algorithms can generalize across physics engines. In this work, we compare the generalization performance of various deep reinforcement learning algorithms on a variety of control tasks. Our results show that MuJoCo is the best engine to transfer the learning to other engines. On the other hand, none of the algorithms generalize when trained on PyBullet. We also found out that various algorithms have a promising generalizability if the effect of random seeds can be minimized on their performance.
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms should learn as much as possible about the environment but not the properties of the physics engines that generate the environment. There are multiple algorithms that solve the task in a physics engine based environment but there is no work done so far to understand if the RL algorithms can generalize across physics engines. In this work, we compare the generalization performance of various deep reinforcement learning algorithms on a variety of control tasks. Our results show that MuJoCo is the best engine to transfer the learning to other engines. On the other hand, none of the algorithms generalize when trained on PyBullet. We also found out that various algorithms have a promising generalizability if the effect of random seeds can be minimized on their performance.
abstract_zh: 强化学习 (RL) 算法应该尽可能多地了解环境，而不是生成环境的物理引擎的属性。有多种算法可以在基于物理引擎的环境中解决该任务，但迄今为止还没有完成任何工作来了解 RL 算法是否可以跨物理引擎泛化。在这项工作中，我们比较了各种深度强化学习算法在各种控制任务上的泛化性能。我们的结果表明，MuJoCo 是将学习迁移到其他引擎的最佳引擎。另一方面，在 PyBullet 上训练时，所有算法都没有泛化能力。我们还发现，如果可以最大限度地减少随机种子对其性能的影响，则各种算法都具有良好的通用性。

AI.tldr: 研究深度强化学习算法在不同物理引擎间的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习算法在特定物理引擎中表现良好，但跨引擎泛化能力尚未明确，需验证其通用性。
AI.method: 比较多种深度强化学习算法在多个控制任务中于不同物理引擎的训练与迁移表现。
AI.result: MuJoCo训练的模型泛化能力最佳，PyBullet训练模型无法跨引擎迁移，算法表现受随机种子影响显著。
AI.conclusion: MuJoCo是更优的训练平台，减少随机种子影响可提升算法跨引擎泛化潜力。

authors_text: Ufuk Topcu,Nadya Bliss,Nancy Cooke,Missy Cummings,Ashley Llorens,Howard Shrobe,Lenore Zuck
title: Assured Autonomy: Path Toward Living With Autonomous Systems We Can Trust
title_zh: 有保障的自治：与我们可以信赖的自治系统一起生活的道路
comment: A Computing Community Consortium (CCC) workshop report, 28 pages
comments: A Computing Community Consortium (CCC) workshop report, 28 pages
abstract: The challenge of establishing assurance in autonomy is rapidly attracting increasing interest in the industry, government, and academia. Autonomy is a broad and expansive capability that enables systems to behave without direct control by a human operator. To that end, it is expected to be present in a wide variety of systems and applications. A vast range of industrial sectors, including (but by no means limited to) defense, mobility, health care, manufacturing, and civilian infrastructure, are embracing the opportunities in autonomy yet face the similar barriers toward establishing the necessary level of assurance sooner or later. Numerous government agencies are poised to tackle the challenges in assured autonomy. Given the already immense interest and investment in autonomy, a series of workshops on Assured Autonomy was convened to facilitate dialogs and increase awareness among the stakeholders in the academia, industry, and government. This series of three workshops aimed to help create a unified understanding of the goals for assured autonomy, the research trends and needs, and a strategy that will facilitate sustained progress in autonomy. The first workshop, held in October 2019, focused on current and anticipated challenges and problems in assuring autonomous systems within and across applications and sectors. The second workshop held in February 2020, focused on existing capabilities, current research, and research trends that could address the challenges and problems identified in workshop. The third event was dedicated to a discussion of a draft of the major findings from the previous two workshops and the recommendations.

abstract_zh: 建立自治保证的挑战正在迅速引起业界、政府和学术界越来越多的兴趣。自主性是一种广泛而广泛的功能，使系统能够在没有人类操作员直接控制的情况下运行。为此，它预计将出现在各种系统和应用程序中。包括（但绝不限于）国防、机动性、医疗保健、制造和民用基础设施在内的众多工业部门都在拥抱自治的机遇，但迟早在建立必要的保证水平方面面临着类似的障碍。许多政府机构已准备好应对确保自治方面的挑战。鉴于人们对自治已经产生了巨大的兴趣和投资，召开了一系列有关“有保障的自治”的研讨会，以促进学术界、工业界和政府利益相关者之间的对话并提高认识。这一系列的三个研讨会旨在帮助人们对确保自主权的目标、研究趋势和需求以及促进自主权持续进步的战略达成统一的理解。第一次研讨会于 2019 年 10 月举行，重点讨论了确保应用程序和行业内以及跨应用程序和行业的自主系统当前和预期的挑战和问题。第二次研讨会于 2020 年 2 月举行，重点关注现有能力、当前研究以及可以解决研讨会中发现的挑战和问题的研究趋势。第三次活动致力于讨论前两次研讨会的主要调查结果和建议草案。

AI.tldr: 本文通过系列研讨会探讨如何建立可信赖的自主系统保障机制，推动跨行业和学术界的共识与合作。
AI.motivation: 随着自主系统在国防、医疗、制造等领域的广泛应用，确保其安全性和可靠性成为迫切需求，但当前缺乏统一的保障框架和跨领域协作机制。
AI.method: 组织三次主题研讨会：首次明确自主系统保障的挑战，第二次分析现有技术与研究趋势，第三次整合成果并提出推荐方案。
AI.result: 形成跨行业共识，识别关键研究方向，提出保障自主系统的战略框架与实施路径。
AI.conclusion: 通过多方协作与系统化研究，可逐步建立可信自主系统的保障体系，需持续推动技术、标准与政策的协同发展。

A vast range of industrial sectors, including (but by no means limited to) defense, mobility, health care, manufacturing, and civilian infrastructure, are embracing the opportunities in autonomy yet face the similar barriers toward establishing the necessary level of assurance sooner or later. Numerous government agencies are poised to tackle the challenges in assured autonomy. Given the already immense interest and investment in autonomy, a series of workshops on Assured Autonomy was convened to facilitate dialogs and increase awareness among the stakeholders in the academia, industry, and government. This series of three workshops aimed to help create a unified understanding of the goals for assured autonomy, the research trends and needs, and a strategy that will facilitate sustained progress in autonomy. The first workshop, held in October 2019, focused on current and anticipated challenges and problems in assuring autonomous systems within and across applications and sectors. The second workshop held in February 2020, focused on existing capabilities, current research, and research trends that could address the challenges and problems identified in workshop. The third event was dedicated to a discussion of a draft of the major findings from the previous two workshops and the recommendations. 建立自治保证的挑战正在迅速引起业界、政府和学术界越来越多的兴趣。自主性是一种广泛而广泛的功能，使系统能够在没有人类操作员直接控制的情况下运行。为此，它预计将出现在各种系统和应用程序中。包括（但绝不限于）国防、机动性、医疗保健、制造和民用基础设施在内的众多工业部门都在拥抱自治的机遇，但迟早在建立必要的保证水平方面面临着类似的障碍。许多政府机构已准备好应对确保自治方面的挑战。鉴于人们对自治已经产生了巨大的兴趣和投资，召开了一系列有关“有保障的自治”的研讨会，以促进学术界、工业界和政府利益相关者之间的对话并提高认识。这一系列的三个研讨会旨在帮助人们对确保自主权的目标、研究趋势和需求以及促进自主权持续进步的战略达成统一的理解。第一次研讨会于 2019 年 10 月举行，重点讨论了确保应用程序和行业内以及跨应用程序和行业的自主系统当前和预期的挑战和问题。第二次研讨会于 2020 年 2 月举行，重点关注现有能力、当前研究以及可以解决研讨会中发现的挑战和问题的研究趋势。第三次活动致力于讨论前两次研讨会的主要调查结果和建议草案。 本文通过系列研讨会探讨如何建立可信赖的自主系统保障机制，推动跨行业和学术界的共识与合作。 Ufuk Topcu,Nadya Bliss,Nancy Cooke,Missy Cummings,Ashley Llorens,Howard Shrobe,Lenore Zuck cs.CY,cs.AI,cs.HC,cs.MA

authors_text: Jannis Horn,Yi Zhao,Nils Wandel,Magdalena Landl,Andrea Schnepf,Sven Behnke
title: Robust Skeletonization for Plant Root Structure Reconstruction from MRI
title_zh: MRI 重建植物根结构的稳健骨架化
comment: Accepted final version. In 25th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR2020)
comments: Accepted final version. In 25th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR2020)
abstract: Structural reconstruction of plant roots from MRI is challenging, because of low resolution and low signal-to-noise ratio of the 3D measurements which may lead to disconnectivities and wrongly connected roots. We propose a two-stage approach for this task. The first stage is based on semantic root vs. soil segmentation and finds lowest-cost paths from any root voxel to the shoot. The second stage takes the largest fully connected component generated in the first stage and uses 3D skeletonization to extract a graph structure. We evaluate our method on 22 MRI scans and compare to human expert reconstructions.
summary: Structural reconstruction of plant roots from MRI is challenging, because of low resolution and low signal-to-noise ratio of the 3D measurements which may lead to disconnectivities and wrongly connected roots. We propose a two-stage approach for this task. The first stage is based on semantic root vs. soil segmentation and finds lowest-cost paths from any root voxel to the shoot. The second stage takes the largest fully connected component generated in the first stage and uses 3D skeletonization to extract a graph structure. We evaluate our method on 22 MRI scans and compare to human expert reconstructions.
abstract_zh: 通过 MRI 对植物根部进行结构重建具有挑战性，因为 3D 测量的分辨率和信噪比较低，这可能会导致根部断开和错误连接。我们为这项任务提出了一个两阶段的方法。第一阶段基于语义根与土壤分割，并找到从任何根体素到芽的最低成本路径。第二阶段采用第一阶段生成的最大全连接分量，并使用 3D 骨架化来提取图结构。我们在 22 次 MRI 扫描上评估我们的方法，并与人类专家重建进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两阶段方法，通过MRI图像实现植物根系结构的鲁棒骨架化重建。
AI.motivation: MRI图像分辨率低且信噪比差，导致根系结构重建时出现断开或错误连接，需更可靠的方法提高重建准确性。
AI.method: 第一阶段通过语义分割寻找根部体素到茎的最低成本路径；第二阶段对最大连通组件进行三维骨架化提取图结构。
AI.result: 方法在22个MRI数据集上验证，重建结果与人类专家标注具有可比性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了MRI低质量数据下的根系重建问题，为植物根系研究提供可靠工具。

authors_text: Bill Yuchen Lin,Haitian Sun,Bhuwan Dhingra,Manzil Zaheer,Xiang Ren,William W. Cohen
title: Differentiable Open-Ended Commonsense Reasoning
title_zh: 可微的开放式常识推理
comment: Accepted to NAACL 2021. Project website: https://open-csr.github.io
comments: Accepted to NAACL 2021. Project website: https://open-csr.github.io
abstract: Current commonsense reasoning research focuses on developing models that use commonsense knowledge to answer multiple-choice questions. However, systems designed to answer multiple-choice questions may not be useful in applications that do not provide a small list of candidate answers to choose from. As a step towards making commonsense reasoning research more realistic, we propose to study open-ended commonsense reasoning (OpenCSR) -- the task of answering a commonsense question without any pre-defined choices -- using as a resource only a corpus of commonsense facts written in natural language. OpenCSR is challenging due to a large decision space, and because many questions require implicit multi-hop reasoning. As an approach to OpenCSR, we propose DrFact, an efficient Differentiable model for multi-hop Reasoning over knowledge Facts. To evaluate OpenCSR methods, we adapt several popular commonsense reasoning benchmarks, and collect multiple new answers for each test question via crowd-sourcing. Experiments show that DrFact outperforms strong baseline methods by a large margin.
summary: Current commonsense reasoning research focuses on developing models that use commonsense knowledge to answer multiple-choice questions. However, systems designed to answer multiple-choice questions may not be useful in applications that do not provide a small list of candidate answers to choose from. As a step towards making commonsense reasoning research more realistic, we propose to study open-ended commonsense reasoning (OpenCSR) -- the task of answering a commonsense question without any pre-defined choices -- using as a resource only a corpus of commonsense facts written in natural language. OpenCSR is challenging due to a large decision space, and because many questions require implicit multi-hop reasoning. As an approach to OpenCSR, we propose DrFact, an efficient Differentiable model for multi-hop Reasoning over knowledge Facts. To evaluate OpenCSR methods, we adapt several popular commonsense reasoning benchmarks, and collect multiple new answers for each test question via crowd-sourcing. Experiments show that DrFact outperforms strong baseline methods by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 当前的常识推理研究侧重于开发使用常识知识来回答多项选择问题的模型。然而，设计用于回答多项选择题的系统在不提供一小部分候选答案可供选择的应用程序中可能没有用。作为使常识推理研究更加现实的一步，我们建议研究开放式常识推理（OpenCSR）——在没有任何预定义选择的情况下回答常识问题的任务——仅使用用自然语言编写的常识事实语料库作为资源。由于决策空间很大，并且许多问题需要隐式多跳推理，OpenCSR 具有挑战性。作为 OpenCSR 的一种方法，我们提出了 DrFact，这是一种针对知识事实进行多跳推理的高效可微分模型。为了评估 OpenCSR 方法，我们采用了几种流行的常识推理基准，并通过众包为每个测试问题收集多个新答案。实验表明 DrFact 的性能大幅优于强基线方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DrFact的可微分多跳推理模型，用于解决开放式常识推理（OpenCSR）任务，即在无预定义选项的情况下基于常识事实语料库回答问题。
AI.motivation: 现有常识推理研究局限于多选题场景，难以应对实际应用中需要自由生成答案的开放式问题，因此需要更贴近现实的OpenCSR任务来推动研究进展。
AI.method: 开发DrFact模型，通过可微分方式对常识事实进行多跳推理，并利用众包数据收集多答案用于评估。
AI.result: 实验表明DrFact在多个基准测试中显著优于现有强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: DrFact验证了基于自然语言常识事实的开放式推理可行性，为更真实的常识推理研究提供了有效方向。

title: Structured Visual Search via Composition-aware Learning
title_zh: 通过组合感知学习进行结构化视觉搜索
comment: Accepted at WACV'21 (Algorithms Track)
comments: Accepted at WACV'21 (Algorithms Track)
abstract: This paper studies visual search using structured queries. The structure is in the form of a 2D composition that encodes the position and the category of the objects. The transformation of the position and the category of the objects leads to a continuous-valued relationship between visual compositions, which carries highly beneficial information, although not leveraged by previous techniques. To that end, in this work, our goal is to leverage these continuous relationships by using the notion of symmetry in equivariance. Our model output is trained to change symmetrically with respect to the input transformations, leading to a sensitive feature space. Doing so leads to a highly efficient search technique, as our approach learns from fewer data using a smaller feature space. Experiments on two large-scale benchmarks of MS-COCO and HICO-DET demonstrates that our approach leads to a considerable gain in the performance against competing techniques.
summary: This paper studies visual search using structured queries. The structure is in the form of a 2D composition that encodes the position and the category of the objects. The transformation of the position and the category of the objects leads to a continuous-valued relationship between visual compositions, which carries highly beneficial information, although not leveraged by previous techniques. To that end, in this work, our goal is to leverage these continuous relationships by using the notion of symmetry in equivariance. Our model output is trained to change symmetrically with respect to the input transformations, leading to a sensitive feature space. Doing so leads to a highly efficient search technique, as our approach learns from fewer data using a smaller feature space. Experiments on two large-scale benchmarks of MS-COCO and HICO-DET demonstrates that our approach leads to a considerable gain in the performance against competing techniques.
abstract_zh: 本文研究使用结构化查询的视觉搜索。该结构采用 2D 组合的形式，对对象的位置和类别进行编码。对象的位置和类别的变换导致了视觉构图之间的连续值关系，尽管以前的技术没有利用它，但它携带了非常有用的信息。为此，在这项工作中，我们的目标是通过使用等方差中的对称概念来利用这些连续关系。我们的模型输出经过训练，可以相对于输入变换对称变化，从而形成敏感的特征空间。这样做会产生高效的搜索技术，因为我们的方法使用较小的特征空间从较少的数据中学习。在 MS-COCO 和 HICO-DET 两个大规模基准上进行的实验表明，我们的方法相对于竞争技术在性能方面取得了相当大的进步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于组合感知学习的结构化视觉搜索方法，通过利用物体位置和类别的连续关系提升搜索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有技术未有效利用视觉组合中物体位置和类别变化带来的连续关系，而这些信息对视觉搜索具有重要价值。
AI.method: 通过等变性对称性原理，使模型输出随输入变换对称变化，构建敏感特征空间以提升搜索效率。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO和HICO-DET基准测试中，该方法相较现有技术取得显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 基于对称性约束的组合感知学习有效挖掘了视觉结构的连续关系，验证了该方法在视觉搜索任务中的有效性。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 基于对称性约束的组合感知学习有效挖掘了视觉结构的连续关系，验证了该方法在视觉搜索任务中的有效性。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于组合感知学习的结构化视觉搜索方法，通过利用物体位置和类别的连续关系提升搜索性能。
motivation: 现有技术未有效利用视觉组合中物体位置和类别变化带来的连续关系，而这些信息对视觉搜索具有重要价值。
method: 通过等变性对称性原理，使模型输出随输入变换对称变化，构建敏感特征空间以提升搜索效率。
result: 在MS-COCO和HICO-DET基准测试中，该方法相较现有技术取得显著性能提升。
conclusion: 基于对称性约束的组合感知学习有效挖掘了视觉结构的连续关系，验证了该方法在视觉搜索任务中的有效性。
search_text: Structured Visual Search via Composition-aware Learning 通过组合感知学习进行结构化视觉搜索 This paper studies visual search using structured queries. The structure is in the form of a 2D composition that encodes the position and the category of the objects. The transformation of the position and the category of the objects leads to a continuous-valued relationship between visual compositions, which carries highly beneficial information, although not leveraged by previous techniques. To that end, in this work, our goal is to leverage these continuous relationships by using the notion of symmetry in equivariance. Our model output is trained to change symmetrically with respect to the input transformations, leading to a sensitive feature space. Doing so leads to a highly efficient search technique, as our approach learns from fewer data using a smaller feature space. Experiments on two large-scale benchmarks of MS-COCO and HICO-DET demonstrates that our approach leads to a considerable gain in the performance against competing techniques. 本文研究使用结构化查询的视觉搜索。该结构采用 2D 组合的形式，对对象的位置和类别进行编码。对象的位置和类别的变换导致了视觉构图之间的连续值关系，尽管以前的技术没有利用它，但它携带了非常有用的信息。为此，在这项工作中，我们的目标是通过使用等方差中的对称概念来利用这些连续关系。我们的模型输出经过训练，可以相对于输入变换对称变化，从而形成敏感的特征空间。这样做会产生高效的搜索技术，因为我们的方法使用较小的特征空间从较少的数据中学习。在 MS-COCO 和 HICO-DET 两个大规模基准上进行的实验表明，我们的方法相对于竞争技术在性能方面取得了相当大的进步。 本文提出一种基于组合感知学习的结构化视觉搜索方法，通过利用物体位置和类别的连续关系提升搜索性能。 Mert Kilickaya,Arnold W. M. Smeulders cs.CV

title: Improving Word Recognition using Multiple Hypotheses and Deep Embeddings
title_zh: 使用多重假设和深度嵌​​入改进单词识别
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, Accepted in International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR) 2020
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures, Accepted in International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR) 2020
abstract: We propose a novel scheme for improving the word recognition accuracy using word image embeddings. We use a trained text recognizer, which can predict multiple text hypothesis for a given word image. Our fusion scheme improves the recognition process by utilizing the word image and text embeddings obtained from a trained word image embedding network. We propose EmbedNet, which is trained using a triplet loss for learning a suitable embedding space where the embedding of the word image lies closer to the embedding of the corresponding text transcription. The updated embedding space thus helps in choosing the correct prediction with higher confidence. To further improve the accuracy, we propose a plug-and-play module called Confidence based Accuracy Booster (CAB). The CAB module takes in the confidence scores obtained from the text recognizer and Euclidean distances between the embeddings to generate an updated distance vector. The updated distance vector has lower distance values for the correct words and higher distance values for the incorrect words. We rigorously evaluate our proposed method systematically on a collection of books in the Hindi language. Our method achieves an absolute improvement of around 10 percent in terms of word recognition accuracy.
summary: We propose a novel scheme for improving the word recognition accuracy using word image embeddings. We use a trained text recognizer, which can predict multiple text hypothesis for a given word image. Our fusion scheme improves the recognition process by utilizing the word image and text embeddings obtained from a trained word image embedding network. We propose EmbedNet, which is trained using a triplet loss for learning a suitable embedding space where the embedding of the word image lies closer to the embedding of the corresponding text transcription. The updated embedding space thus helps in choosing the correct prediction with higher confidence. To further improve the accuracy, we propose a plug-and-play module called Confidence based Accuracy Booster (CAB). The CAB module takes in the confidence scores obtained from the text recognizer and Euclidean distances between the embeddings to generate an updated distance vector. The updated distance vector has lower distance values for the correct words and higher distance values for the incorrect words. We rigorously evaluate our proposed method systematically on a collection of books in the Hindi language. Our method achieves an absolute improvement of around 10 percent in terms of word recognition accuracy.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种使用单词图像嵌入来提高单词识别准确性的新颖方案。我们使用经过训练的文本识别器，它可以预测给定单词图像的多个文本假设。我们的融合方案利用从经过训练的单词图像嵌入网络获得的单词图像和文本嵌入来改进识别过程。我们提出了 EmbedNet，它使用三元组损失进行训练，以学习合适的嵌入空间，其中单词图像的嵌入更接近相应文本转录的嵌入。因此，更新的嵌入空间有助于以更高的置信度选择正确的预测。为了进一步提高准确性，我们提出了一个即插即用的模块，称为基于置信度的准确性助推器（CAB）。 CAB 模块采用从文本识别器获得的置信度分数和嵌入之间的欧几里德距离来生成更新的距离向量。更新的距离向量对于正确的单词具有较低的距离值，对于不正确的单词具有较高的距离值。我们在一系列印地语书籍上系统地严格评估我们提出的方法。我们的方法在单词识别准确率方面绝对提高了 10% 左右。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合多假设和深度嵌入的方法，通过EmbedNet和CAB模块提升印地语单词识别准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有文本识别方法在复杂场景下准确率不足，需利用多假设和嵌入信息优化识别过程。
AI.method: 训练EmbedNet学习嵌入空间使图像与文本嵌入更接近，并设计CAB模块融合置信度与欧氏距离生成更新距离向量。
AI.result: 在印地语书籍数据集上实现单词识别准确率约10%的绝对提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过嵌入空间优化和置信度增强有效提升识别性能，适用于其他语言和场景。
