authors_text: Andrea Dittadi,Frederik Träuble,Francesco Locatello,Manuel Wüthrich,Vaibhav Agrawal,Ole Winther,Stefan Bauer,Bernhard Schölkopf
title: On the Transfer of Disentangled Representations in Realistic Settings
title_zh: 关于现实环境中解缠结表征的迁移
comment: Published at ICLR 2021
comments: Published at ICLR 2021
abstract: Learning meaningful representations that disentangle the underlying structure of the data generating process is considered to be of key importance in machine learning. While disentangled representations were found to be useful for diverse tasks such as abstract reasoning and fair classification, their scalability and real-world impact remain questionable. We introduce a new high-resolution dataset with 1M simulated images and over 1,800 annotated real-world images of the same setup. In contrast to previous work, this new dataset exhibits correlations, a complex underlying structure, and allows to evaluate transfer to unseen simulated and real-world settings where the encoder i) remains in distribution or ii) is out of distribution. We propose new architectures in order to scale disentangled representation learning to realistic high-resolution settings and conduct a large-scale empirical study of disentangled representations on this dataset. We observe that disentanglement is a good predictor for out-of-distribution (OOD) task performance.
summary: Learning meaningful representations that disentangle the underlying structure of the data generating process is considered to be of key importance in machine learning. While disentangled representations were found to be useful for diverse tasks such as abstract reasoning and fair classification, their scalability and real-world impact remain questionable. We introduce a new high-resolution dataset with 1M simulated images and over 1,800 annotated real-world images of the same setup. In contrast to previous work, this new dataset exhibits correlations, a complex underlying structure, and allows to evaluate transfer to unseen simulated and real-world settings where the encoder i) remains in distribution or ii) is out of distribution. We propose new architectures in order to scale disentangled representation learning to realistic high-resolution settings and conduct a large-scale empirical study of disentangled representations on this dataset. We observe that disentanglement is a good predictor for out-of-distribution (OOD) task performance.
abstract_zh: 学习能够解开数据生成过程的底层结构的有意义的表示被认为在机器学习中至关重要。虽然人们发现解开的表示对于抽象推理和公平分类等多种任务很有用，但它们的可扩展性和现实世界的影响仍然值得怀疑。我们引入了一个新的高分辨率数据集，其中包含 100 万张模拟图像和 1,800 多个相同设置的带注释的真实世界图像。与之前的工作相比，这个新数据集展示了相关性、复杂的底层结构，并允许评估向看不见的模拟和现实世界设置的传输，其中编码器 i) 保持分布或 ii) 不分布。我们提出了新的架构，以便将解缠结表示学习扩展到现实的高分辨率设置，并对该数据集上的解缠结表示进行大规模实证研究。我们观察到，解缠结是分布外（OOD）任务绩效的良好预测指标。

AI.tldr: 本文引入了一个高分辨率数据集和新架构，以在现实场景中扩展解耦表示学习，并评估其在分布内和分布外任务中的迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管解耦表示在抽象推理和公平分类等任务中表现出色，但其可扩展性和现实世界影响仍存在疑问，需通过更真实的场景验证其有效性。
AI.method: 构建包含100万张模拟图像和1800多张真实图像的数据集，设计新架构以扩展解耦表示学习，并进行大规模实证研究。
AI.result: 解耦程度是分布外任务性能的良好预测指标，且新架构在复杂场景中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 解耦表示在现实场景中具有潜力，但需通过高分辨率数据集和可扩展架构进行有效验证和优化。

authors_text: Andy Zeng,Pete Florence,Jonathan Tompson,Stefan Welker,Jonathan Chien,Maria Attarian,Travis Armstrong,Ivan Krasin,Dan Duong,Ayzaan Wahid,Vikas Sindhwani,Johnny Lee
title: Transporter Networks: Rearranging the Visual World for Robotic Manipulation
title_zh: 运输网络：重新安排机器人操作的视觉世界
comment: Project webpage: https://transporternets.github.io Summary video: https://youtu.be/8afHfReCfPo?t=12214
comments: Project webpage: https://transporternets.github.io Summary video: https://youtu.be/8afHfReCfPo?t=12214
abstract: Robotic manipulation can be formulated as inducing a sequence of spatial displacements: where the space being moved can encompass an object, part of an object, or end effector. In this work, we propose the Transporter Network, a simple model architecture that rearranges deep features to infer spatial displacements from visual input - which can parameterize robot actions. It makes no assumptions of objectness (e.g. canonical poses, models, or keypoints), it exploits spatial symmetries, and is orders of magnitude more sample efficient than our benchmarked alternatives in learning vision-based manipulation tasks: from stacking a pyramid of blocks, to assembling kits with unseen objects; from manipulating deformable ropes, to pushing piles of small objects with closed-loop feedback. Our method can represent complex multi-modal policy distributions and generalizes to multi-step sequential tasks, as well as 6DoF pick-and-place. Experiments on 10 simulated tasks show that it learns faster and generalizes better than a variety of end-to-end baselines, including policies that use ground-truth object poses. We validate our methods with hardware in the real world. Experiment videos and code are available at https://transporternets.github.io
summary: Robotic manipulation can be formulated as inducing a sequence of spatial displacements: where the space being moved can encompass an object, part of an object, or end effector. In this work, we propose the Transporter Network, a simple model architecture that rearranges deep features to infer spatial displacements from visual input - which can parameterize robot actions. It makes no assumptions of objectness (e.g. canonical poses, models, or keypoints), it exploits spatial symmetries, and is orders of magnitude more sample efficient than our benchmarked alternatives in learning vision-based manipulation tasks: from stacking a pyramid of blocks, to assembling kits with unseen objects; from manipulating deformable ropes, to pushing piles of small objects with closed-loop feedback. Our method can represent complex multi-modal policy distributions and generalizes to multi-step sequential tasks, as well as 6DoF pick-and-place. Experiments on 10 simulated tasks show that it learns faster and generalizes better than a variety of end-to-end baselines, including policies that use ground-truth object poses. We validate our methods with hardware in the real world. Experiment videos and code are available at https://transporternets.github.io
abstract_zh: 机器人操纵可以表述为引发一系列空间位移：其中被移动的空间可以包含物体、物体的一部分或末端执行器。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Transporter Network，这是一种简单的模型架构，可以重新排列深层特征以从视觉输入推断空间位移，从而可以参数化机器人动作。它不做任何客观性假设（例如规范姿势、模型或关键点），它利用空间对称性，并且在学习基于视觉的操作任务中比我们的基准替代方案样本效率高几个数量级：从堆叠块金字塔到用看不见的物体组装套件；从操纵可变形的绳索，到通过闭环反馈推动成堆的小物体。我们的方法可以表示复杂的多模式策略分布，并推广到多步骤顺序任务以及 6DoF 拾取和放置。对 10 个模拟任务进行的实验表明，它比各种端到端基线（包括使用地面真实对象姿势的策略）学习得更快并且概括得更好。我们在现实世界中使用硬件验证我们的方法。实验视频和代码可在 https://transporternets.github.io 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Transporter Network的模型架构，通过重排深度特征从视觉输入中推断空间位移，用于机器人操作任务。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人操作方法依赖于对象假设（如关键点或模型）且样本效率低，难以处理复杂或未见过的物体。
AI.method: Transporter Network无需对象假设，利用空间对称性，通过重排深度特征直接从视觉输入推断空间位移参数化机器人动作。
AI.result: 在10个模拟任务中，该方法比端到端基线（包括使用真实对象姿态的策略）学习更快、泛化性更好，并在真实世界硬件中验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: Transporter Network提供了一种高效、无需对象假设的视觉操作方法，适用于多模态策略和多步骤任务，具有实际应用潜力。

search_text: Transporter Networks: Rearranging the Visual World for Robotic Manipulation 运输网络：重新安排机器人操作的视觉世界 Robotic manipulation can be formulated as inducing a sequence of spatial displacements: where the space being moved can encompass an object, part of an object, or end effector. In this work, we propose the Transporter Network, a simple model architecture that rearranges deep features to infer spatial displacements from visual input - which can parameterize robot actions. It makes no assumptions of objectness (e.g. canonical poses, models, or keypoints), it exploits spatial symmetries, and is orders of magnitude more sample efficient than our benchmarked alternatives in learning vision-based manipulation tasks: from stacking a pyramid of blocks, to assembling kits with unseen objects; from manipulating deformable ropes, to pushing piles of small objects with closed-loop feedback. Our method can represent complex multi-modal policy distributions and generalizes to multi-step sequential tasks, as well as 6DoF pick-and-place. Experiments on 10 simulated tasks show that it learns faster and generalizes better than a variety of end-to-end baselines, including policies that use ground-truth object poses. We validate our methods with hardware in the real world. Experiment videos and code are available at https://transporternets.github.io 机器人操纵可以表述为引发一系列空间位移：其中被移动的空间可以包含物体、物体的一部分或末端执行器。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Transporter Network，这是一种简单的模型架构，可以重新排列深层特征以从视觉输入推断空间位移，从而可以参数化机器人动作。它不做任何客观性假设（例如规范姿势、模型或关键点），它利用空间对称性，并且在学习基于视觉的操作任务中比我们的基准替代方案样本效率高几个数量级：从堆叠块金字塔到用看不见的物体组装套件；从操纵可变形的绳索，到通过闭环反馈推动成堆的小物体。我们的方法可以表示复杂的多模式策略分布，并推广到多步骤顺序任务以及 6DoF 拾取和放置。对 10 个模拟任务进行的实验表明，它比各种端到端基线（包括使用地面真实对象姿势的策略）学习得更快并且概括得更好。我们在现实世界中使用硬件验证我们的方法。实验视频和代码可在 https://transporternets.github.io 获取 本文提出了一种名为Transporter Network的模型架构，通过重排深度特征从视觉输入中推断空间位移，用于机器人操作任务。 Andy Zeng,Pete Florence,Jonathan Tompson,Stefan Welker,Jonathan Chien,Maria Attarian,Travis Armstrong,Ivan Krasin,Dan Duong,Ayzaan Wahid,Vikas Sindhwani,Johnny Lee cs.RO

title: Pixel-based Facial Expression Synthesis
title_zh: 基于像素的面部表情合成
comment: ICPR 2020, 7 pages, 5 figures
comments: ICPR 2020, 7 pages, 5 figures
abstract: Facial expression synthesis has achieved remarkable advances with the advent of Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs). However, GAN-based approaches mostly generate photo-realistic results as long as the testing data distribution is close to the training data distribution. The quality of GAN results significantly degrades when testing images are from a slightly different distribution. Moreover, recent work has shown that facial expressions can be synthesized by changing localized face regions. In this work, we propose a pixel-based facial expression synthesis method in which each output pixel observes only one input pixel. The proposed method achieves good generalization capability by leveraging only a few hundred training images. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method performs comparably well against state-of-the-art GANs on in-dataset images and significantly better on out-of-dataset images. In addition, the proposed model is two orders of magnitude smaller which makes it suitable for deployment on resource-constrained devices.
summary: Facial expression synthesis has achieved remarkable advances with the advent of Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs). However, GAN-based approaches mostly generate photo-realistic results as long as the testing data distribution is close to the training data distribution. The quality of GAN results significantly degrades when testing images are from a slightly different distribution. Moreover, recent work has shown that facial expressions can be synthesized by changing localized face regions. In this work, we propose a pixel-based facial expression synthesis method in which each output pixel observes only one input pixel. The proposed method achieves good generalization capability by leveraging only a few hundred training images. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method performs comparably well against state-of-the-art GANs on in-dataset images and significantly better on out-of-dataset images. In addition, the proposed model is two orders of magnitude smaller which makes it suitable for deployment on resource-constrained devices.
abstract_zh: 随着生成对抗网络（GAN）的出现，面部表情合成取得了显着的进步。然而，只要测试数据分布接近训练数据分布，基于 GAN 的方法大多会生成逼真的结果。当测试图像的分布略有不同时，GAN 结果的质量会显着下降。此外，最近的工作表明，可以通过改变局部面部区域来合成面部表情。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于像素的面部表情合成方法，其中每个输出像素仅观察一个输入像素。所提出的方法仅利用几百个训练图像就实现了良好的泛化能力。实验结果表明，所提出的方法在数据集内图像上的性能与最先进的 GAN 相当，并且在数据集外图像上的性能明显更好。此外，所提出的模型小了两个数量级，这使得它适合部署在资源受限的设备上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于像素的面部表情合成方法，通过单像素映射实现高效泛化。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN方法在测试数据分布变化时性能下降，且依赖大量训练数据，而局部区域修改方法存在局限性。
AI.method: 设计每个输出像素仅观察对应输入像素的像素级映射网络，利用少量训练样本实现跨分布泛化。
AI.result: 在同分布数据上性能与SOTA GAN相当，在异分布数据上显著优于GAN，模型体积缩小至1/100。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持生成质量的同时显著提升泛化能力与计算效率，适合边缘设备部署。

title: Succinct and Robust Multi-Agent Communication With Temporal Message Control
title_zh: 具有时间消息控制的简洁而鲁棒的多代理通信
abstract: Recent studies have shown that introducing communication between agents can significantly improve overall performance in cooperative Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL). However, existing communication schemes often require agents to exchange an excessive number of messages at run-time under a reliable communication channel, which hinders its practicality in many real-world situations. In this paper, we present \textit{Temporal Message Control} (TMC), a simple yet effective approach for achieving succinct and robust communication in MARL. TMC applies a temporal smoothing technique to drastically reduce the amount of information exchanged between agents. Experiments show that TMC can significantly reduce inter-agent communication overhead without impacting accuracy. Furthermore, TMC demonstrates much better robustness against transmission loss than existing approaches in lossy networking environments.
summary: Recent studies have shown that introducing communication between agents can significantly improve overall performance in cooperative Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL). However, existing communication schemes often require agents to exchange an excessive number of messages at run-time under a reliable communication channel, which hinders its practicality in many real-world situations. In this paper, we present \textit{Temporal Message Control} (TMC), a simple yet effective approach for achieving succinct and robust communication in MARL. TMC applies a temporal smoothing technique to drastically reduce the amount of information exchanged between agents. Experiments show that TMC can significantly reduce inter-agent communication overhead without impacting accuracy. Furthermore, TMC demonstrates much better robustness against transmission loss than existing approaches in lossy networking environments.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，在智能体之间引入通信可以显着提高协作多智能体强化学习（MARL）的整体性能。然而，现有的通信方案通常要求代理在可靠的通信通道下运行时交换过多的消息，这阻碍了其在许多现实情况下的实用性。在本文中，我们提出了\textit{时间消息控制}（TMC），这是一种在 MARL 中实现简洁而强大的通信的简单而有效的方法。 TMC 应用时间平滑技术来大幅减少代理之间交换的信息量。实验表明，TMC 可以在不影响准确性的情况下显着减少代理间通信开销。此外，TMC 在有损网络环境中表现出比现有方法更好的抗传输损失鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为时间消息控制（TMC）的方法，旨在减少多智能体强化学习（MARL）中智能体间的通信开销并提高通信鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有通信方案在可靠信道下需频繁交换大量消息，导致实际应用中通信开销过大，且在丢包率高的网络环境中表现不佳。
AI.method: 通过引入时间平滑技术，对智能体间的信息交换进行动态控制，显著减少通信频率与数据量。
AI.result: 实验表明，TMC在保持任务精度的同时大幅降低通信开销，并在丢包网络中展现出比现有方法更高的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: TMC为MARL提供了简洁且鲁棒的通信框架，适用于实际场景中对通信效率和稳定性要求较高的应用。

TMC applies a temporal smoothing technique to drastically reduce the amount of information exchanged between agents. Experiments show that TMC can significantly reduce inter-agent communication overhead without impacting accuracy. Furthermore, TMC demonstrates much better robustness against transmission loss than existing approaches in lossy networking environments. 最近的研究表明，在智能体之间引入通信可以显着提高协作多智能体强化学习（MARL）的整体性能。然而，现有的通信方案通常要求代理在可靠的通信通道下运行时交换过多的消息，这阻碍了其在许多现实情况下的实用性。在本文中，我们提出了\textit{时间消息控制}（TMC），这是一种在 MARL 中实现简洁而强大的通信的简单而有效的方法。 TMC 应用时间平滑技术来大幅减少代理之间交换的信息量。实验表明，TMC 可以在不影响准确性的情况下显着减少代理间通信开销。此外，TMC 在有损网络环境中表现出比现有方法更好的抗传输损失鲁棒性。 本文提出了一种名为时间消息控制（TMC）的方法，旨在减少多智能体强化学习（MARL）中智能体间的通信开销并提高通信鲁棒性。 Sai Qian Zhang,Jieyu Lin,Qi Zhang cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.MA

title: It's all in the (Sub-)title? Expanding Signal Evaluation in Crowdfunding Research
title_zh: 这一切都在（副）标题中吗？扩大众筹研究中的信号评估
comment: Proceedings of the Twenty-Eighth European Conference on Information Systems (ECIS2020)
comments: Proceedings of the Twenty-Eighth European Conference on Information Systems (ECIS2020)
abstract: Research on crowdfunding success that incorporates CATA (computer-aided text analysis) is quickly advancing to the big leagues (e.g., Parhankangas and Renko, 2017; Anglin et al., 2018; Moss et al., 2018) and is often theoretically based on information asymmetry, social capital, signaling or a combination thereof. Yet, current papers that explore crowdfunding success criteria fail to take advantage of the full breadth of signals available and only very few such papers examine technology projects. In this paper, we compare and contrast the strength of the entrepreneur's textual success signals to project backers within this category. Based on a random sample of 1,049 technology projects collected from Kickstarter, we evaluate textual information not only from project titles and descriptions but also from video subtitles. We find that incorporating subtitle information increases the variance explained by the respective models and therefore their predictive capability for funding success. By expanding the information landscape, our work advances the field and paves the way for more fine-grained studies of success signals in crowdfunding and therefore for an improved understanding of investor decision-making in the crowd.
summary: Research on crowdfunding success that incorporates CATA (computer-aided text analysis) is quickly advancing to the big leagues (e.g., Parhankangas and Renko, 2017; Anglin et al., 2018; Moss et al., 2018) and is often theoretically based on information asymmetry, social capital, signaling or a combination thereof. Yet, current papers that explore crowdfunding success criteria fail to take advantage of the full breadth of signals available and only very few such papers examine technology projects. In this paper, we compare and contrast the strength of the entrepreneur's textual success signals to project backers within this category. Based on a random sample of 1,049 technology projects collected from Kickstarter, we evaluate textual information not only from project titles and descriptions but also from video subtitles. We find that incorporating subtitle information increases the variance explained by the respective models and therefore their predictive capability for funding success. By expanding the information landscape, our work advances the field and paves the way for more fine-grained studies of success signals in crowdfunding and therefore for an improved understanding of investor decision-making in the crowd.
abstract_zh: 结合 CATA（计算机辅助文本分析）的众筹成功研究正在迅速推进到大联盟（例如，Parhankangas 和 Renko，2017 年；Anglin 等人，2018 年；Moss 等人，2018 年），并且通常在理论上基于信息不对称、社会资本、信号或其组合。然而，当前探索众筹成功标准的论文未能充分利用可用信号的全部范围，而且只有极少数此类论文研究技术项目。在本文中，我们比较和对比了企业家向此类项目支持者发出的文本成功信号的强度。基于从 Kickstarter 收集的 1,049 个技术项目的随机样本，我们不仅评估项目标题和描述中的文本信息，还评估视频字幕中的文本信息。我们发现，合并字幕信息会增加各个模型解释的方差，从而增加它们对资助成功的预测能力。通过扩大信息范围，我们的工作推动了该领域的发展，并为对众筹成功信号进行更细粒度的研究铺平了道路，从而更好地了解投资者在人群中的决策。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析众筹项目中的文本信号（包括标题、描述和视频字幕），评估其对项目成功的影响，并扩展信号评估的范围。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未充分利用所有可用信号，尤其是科技项目，且极少考虑视频字幕信息，限制了预测模型的准确性。
AI.method: 从Kickstarter随机收集1049个科技项目数据，采用计算机辅助文本分析（CATA）技术，对比项目标题、描述及视频字幕文本信息对模型预测能力的影响。
AI.result: 纳入视频字幕信息后，模型解释方差显著增加，验证了扩展信息范围能提升预测效果。
AI.conclusion: 本研究拓展了众筹成功信号的分析维度，为更精细的信号研究奠定基础，深化了对投资者决策机制的理解。

authors_text: Katie Barrett-Powell,Jack Furby,Liam Hiley,Marc Roig Vilamala,Harrison Taylor,Federico Cerutti,Alun Preece,Tianwei Xing,Luis Garcia,Mani Srivastava,Dave Braines
title: An Experimentation Platform for Explainable Coalition Situational Understanding
title_zh: 可解释联盟态势理解的实验平台
comment: Presented at AAAI FSS-20: Artificial Intelligence in Government and Public Sector, Washington, DC, USA
comments: Presented at AAAI FSS-20: Artificial Intelligence in Government and Public Sector, Washington, DC, USA
abstract: We present an experimentation platform for coalition situational understanding research that highlights capabilities in explainable artificial intelligence/machine learning (AI/ML) and integration of symbolic and subsymbolic AI/ML approaches for event processing. The Situational Understanding Explorer (SUE) platform is designed to be lightweight, to easily facilitate experiments and demonstrations, and open. We discuss our requirements to support coalition multi-domain operations with emphasis on asset interoperability and ad hoc human-machine teaming in a dense urban terrain setting. We describe the interface functionality and give examples of SUE applied to coalition situational understanding tasks.
summary: We present an experimentation platform for coalition situational understanding research that highlights capabilities in explainable artificial intelligence/machine learning (AI/ML) and integration of symbolic and subsymbolic AI/ML approaches for event processing. The Situational Understanding Explorer (SUE) platform is designed to be lightweight, to easily facilitate experiments and demonstrations, and open. We discuss our requirements to support coalition multi-domain operations with emphasis on asset interoperability and ad hoc human-machine teaming in a dense urban terrain setting. We describe the interface functionality and give examples of SUE applied to coalition situational understanding tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们为联合态势理解研究提供了一个实验平台，突出了可解释的人工智能/机器学习 (AI/ML) 的能力以及事件处理的符号和子符号 AI/ML 方法的集成。 Situational Understanding Explorer (SUE) 平台设计轻量，易于实验和演示，并且开放。我们讨论了支持联盟多域作战的要求，重点是在密集的城市地形环境中的资产互操作性和临时人机协作。我们描述了界面功能并给出了 SUE 应用于联盟态势理解任务的示例。

AI.tldr: 开发一个用于联盟情景理解的实验平台，整合可解释AI和符号/次符号方法，支持多领域操作和人机协作。
AI.motivation: 为满足联盟在复杂城市环境中多领域操作的需求，提升资产互操作性和人机协作能力，同时需要可解释的AI技术增强透明度与信任。
AI.method: 设计轻量级、开放的SUE平台，集成符号与次符号AI/ML方法，支持多源数据处理及人机协同接口，适用于动态城市地形场景。
AI.result: 成功构建SUE平台并验证其在联盟情景理解任务中的有效性，展示可解释AI在复杂环境中的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: SUE平台为联盟协作提供了工具支持，通过整合可解释AI技术，提升了复杂环境下人机协同效率与决策透明度。

ai_content.tldr: 开发一个用于联盟情景理解的实验平台，整合可解释AI和符号/次符号方法，支持多领域操作和人机协作。

authors_text: Oliver Niggemann,Alexander Diedrich,Christian Kuehnert,Erik Pfannstiel,Joshua Schraven
title: The DigitalTwin from an Artificial Intelligence Perspective
title_zh: 人工智能视角下的 DigitalTwin
comment: 10 pages
comments: 10 pages
abstract: Services for Cyber-Physical Systems based on Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning require a virtual representation of the physical. To reduce modeling efforts and to synchronize results, for each system, a common and unique virtual representation used by all services during the whole system life-cycle is needed, i.e. a DigitalTwin. In this paper such a DigitalTwin, namely the AI reference model AITwin, is defined. This reference model is verified by using a running example from process industry and by analyzing the work done in recent projects.
summary: Services for Cyber-Physical Systems based on Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning require a virtual representation of the physical. To reduce modeling efforts and to synchronize results, for each system, a common and unique virtual representation used by all services during the whole system life-cycle is needed, i.e. a DigitalTwin. In this paper such a DigitalTwin, namely the AI reference model AITwin, is defined. This reference model is verified by using a running example from process industry and by analyzing the work done in recent projects.
abstract_zh: 基于人工智能和机器学习的网络物理系统服务需要物理的虚拟表示。为了减少建模工作并同步结果，对于每个系统，需要在整个系统生命周期中所有服务使用的通用且唯一的虚拟表示，即 DigitalTwin。本文定义了这样一个DigitalTwin，即人工智能参考模型AITwin。该参考模型通过使用过程工业的运行示例并分析最近项目中完成的工作进行了验证。

AI.tldr: 本文从人工智能视角定义了用于网络物理系统的数字孪生参考模型AITwin，并通过工业案例和项目分析验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有网络物理系统服务需要统一的虚拟表示以减少建模工作量并实现全生命周期同步，但缺乏标准化模型。
AI.method: 提出AI参考模型AITwin，结合过程工业案例及近期项目实践进行验证分析。
AI.result: 验证了AITwin模型在降低建模复杂度和跨服务数据同步中的可行性，展示了其在工业场景的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: AITwin模型为网络物理系统提供了标准化数字孪生框架，有效支持了AI驱动的服务协同与全生命周期管理。

ai_content.tldr: 本文从人工智能视角定义了用于网络物理系统的数字孪生参考模型AITwin，并通过工业案例和项目分析验证其有效性。

ai_content.conclusion: AITwin模型为网络物理系统提供了标准化数字孪生框架，有效支持了AI驱动的服务协同与全生命周期管理。

motivation: 现有网络物理系统服务需要统一的虚拟表示以减少建模工作量并实现全生命周期同步，但缺乏标准化模型。

search_text: The DigitalTwin from an Artificial Intelligence Perspective 人工智能视角下的 DigitalTwin Services for Cyber-Physical Systems based on Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning require a virtual representation of the physical. To reduce modeling efforts and to synchronize results, for each system, a common and unique virtual representation used by all services during the whole system life-cycle is needed, i.e. a DigitalTwin. In this paper such a DigitalTwin, namely the AI reference model AITwin, is defined. This reference model is verified by using a running example from process industry and by analyzing the work done in recent projects. 基于人工智能和机器学习的网络物理系统服务需要物理的虚拟表示。为了减少建模工作并同步结果，对于每个系统，需要在整个系统生命周期中所有服务使用的通用且唯一的虚拟表示，即 DigitalTwin。本文定义了这样一个DigitalTwin，即人工智能参考模型AITwin。该参考模型通过使用过程工业的运行示例并分析最近项目中完成的工作进行了验证。 本文从人工智能视角定义了用于网络物理系统的数字孪生参考模型AITwin，并通过工业案例和项目分析验证其有效性。 Oliver Niggemann,Alexander Diedrich,Christian Kuehnert,Erik Pfannstiel,Joshua Schraven cs.AI

title: Explainable Machine Learning for Public Policy: Use Cases, Gaps, and Research Directions
title_zh: 用于公共政策的可解释机器学习：用例、差距和研究方向
comment: In press at Data & Policy
comments: In press at Data & Policy
abstract: Explainability is highly-desired in Machine Learning (ML) systems supporting high-stakes policy decisions in areas such as health, criminal justice, education, and employment. While the field of explainable ML has expanded in recent years, much of this work has not taken real-world needs into account. A majority of proposed methods are designed with \textit{generic} explainability goals without well-defined use-cases or intended end-users and evaluated on simplified tasks, benchmark problems/datasets, or with proxy users (e.g., AMT). We argue that these simplified evaluation settings do not capture the nuances and complexities of real-world applications. As a result, the applicability and effectiveness of this large body of theoretical and methodological work in real-world applications are unclear. In this work, we take steps toward addressing this gap for the domain of public policy. First, we identify the primary use-cases of explainable ML within public policy problems. For each use case, we define the end-users of explanations and the specific goals the explanations have to fulfill. Finally, we map existing work in explainable ML to these use-cases, identify gaps in established capabilities, and propose research directions to fill those gaps to have a practical societal impact through ML. The contribution is 1) a methodology for explainable ML researchers to identify use cases and develop methods targeted at them and 2) using that methodology for the domain of public policy and giving an example for the researchers on developing explainable ML methods that result in real-world impact.

The contribution is 1) a methodology for explainable ML researchers to identify use cases and develop methods targeted at them and 2) using that methodology for the domain of public policy and giving an example for the researchers on developing explainable ML methods that result in real-world impact.
abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 系统非常需要可解释性，以支持健康、刑事司法、教育和就业等领域的高风险政策决策。尽管近年来可解释的机器学习领域不断扩大，但大部分工作并未考虑到现实世界的需求。大多数提出的方法都是根据 \textit{generic} 可解释性目标设计的，没有明确定义的用例或预期的最终用户，并根据简化的任务、基准问题/数据集或代理用户（例如 AMT）进行评估。我们认为这些简化的评估设置并没有捕捉到现实应用程序的细微差别和复杂性。因此，大量理论和方法论工作在实际应用中的适用性和有效性尚不清楚。在这项工作中，我们采取措施来解决公共政策领域的这一差距。首先，我们确定了公共政策问题中可解释机器学习的主要用例。对于每个用例，我们定义解释的最终用户以及解释必须实现的具体目标。最后，我们将可解释的机器学习方面的现有工作映射到这些用例，确定现有能力中的差距，并提出研究方向来填补这些差距，以便通过机器学习产生实际的社会影响。贡献在于：1）为可解释的机器学习研究人员提供了一种方法，用于识别用例并开发针对这些用例的方法；2）将该方法用于公共政策领域，并为研究人员提供一个开发可解释的机器学习方法以产生现实世界影响的示例。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在识别公共政策领域中可解释机器学习的主要应用场景，明确解释目标用户和需求，并提出针对现有研究空白的改进方向。
AI.motivation: 当前可解释机器学习方法多基于通用目标设计，缺乏对实际政策应用场景的针对性，导致其在真实世界中的适用性和效果存疑。
AI.method: 通过分析公共政策场景中的核心用例，定义解释需求与用户角色，将现有研究映射至具体场景，识别能力缺口并提出研究方向。
AI.result: 提出面向公共政策的可解释ML方法论框架，并以实际案例展示如何开发具有现实影响力的解释性模型。
AI.conclusion: 未来研究需紧密贴合公共政策的实际需求，开发可落地的解释性方法，以推动机器学习在社会治理中的负责任应用。

title: Simultaenous Sieves: A Deterministic Streaming Algorithm for Non-Monotone Submodular Maximization
title_zh: 同步筛选：非单调子模最大化的确定性流算法
comment: Withdrawn as essentially the same deterministic algorithm, with the same ratio, was developed in the journal version of the paper: Alaluf et al. Optimal Streaming Algorithms for Submodular Maximization with Cardinality Constraints, submitted to Mathematics of Operations Research
comments: Withdrawn as essentially the same deterministic algorithm, with the same ratio, was developed in the journal version of the paper: Alaluf et al. Optimal Streaming Algorithms for Submodular Maximization with Cardinality Constraints, submitted to Mathematics of Operations Research
abstract: In this work, we present a combinatorial, deterministic single-pass streaming algorithm for the problem of maximizing a submodular function, not necessarily monotone, with respect to a cardinality constraint (SMCC). In the case the function is monotone, our algorithm reduces to the optimal streaming algorithm of Badanidiyuru et al. (2014). In general, our algorithm achieves ratio $α/ (1 + α) - \varepsilon$, for any $\varepsilon > 0$, where $α$ is the ratio of an offline (deterministic) algorithm for SMCC used for post-processing. Thus, if exponential computation time is allowed, our algorithm deterministically achieves nearly the optimal $1/2$ ratio. These results nearly match those of a recently proposed, randomized streaming algorithm that achieves the same ratios in expectation. For a deterministic, single-pass streaming algorithm, our algorithm achieves in polynomial time an improvement of the best approximation factor from $1/9$ of previous literature to $\approx 0.2689$.
summary: In this work, we present a combinatorial, deterministic single-pass streaming algorithm for the problem of maximizing a submodular function, not necessarily monotone, with respect to a cardinality constraint (SMCC). In the case the function is monotone, our algorithm reduces to the optimal streaming algorithm of Badanidiyuru et al. (2014). In general, our algorithm achieves ratio $α/ (1 + α) - \varepsilon$, for any $\varepsilon > 0$, where $α$ is the ratio of an offline (deterministic) algorithm for SMCC used for post-processing. Thus, if exponential computation time is allowed, our algorithm deterministically achieves nearly the optimal $1/2$ ratio. These results nearly match those of a recently proposed, randomized streaming algorithm that achieves the same ratios in expectation. For a deterministic, single-pass streaming algorithm, our algorithm achieves in polynomial time an improvement of the best approximation factor from $1/9$ of previous literature to $\approx 0.2689$.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种组合的、确定性的单通道流算法，用于解决相对于基数约束（SMCC）最大化子模函数（不一定是单调）的问题。在函数单调的情况下，我们的算法简化为 Badanidiyuru 等人的最优流算法。 （2014）。一般来说，对于任何 $\varepsilon > 0$，我们的算法实现比率 $α/ (1 + α) - \varepsilon$，其中 $α$ 是用于后处理的 SMCC 离线（确定性）算法的比率。因此，如果允许指数计算时间，我们的算法确定性地实现几乎最佳的 $1/2$ 比率。这些结果几乎与最近提出的随机流算法的结果相匹配，该算法达到了相同的预期比率。对于确定性、单通道流算法，我们的算法在多项式时间内实现了最佳近似因子从先前文献的 1/9 美元提高到约 0.2689 美元。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种确定性流算法，用于解决非单调子模函数在基数约束下的最大化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有流算法在处理非单调子模函数时存在近似比低、依赖随机性等问题，需设计更高效的确定性算法。
AI.method: 提出Simultaenous Sieves算法，采用组合优化方法，在单次流处理中结合离线算法后处理以提升近似比。
AI.result: 算法在多项式时间内将近似比从1/9提升至约0.2689，且允许指数时间时可逼近最优1/2比，效果接近随机化算法。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为非单调子模最大化问题提供了更优的确定性流解决方案，显著提升了近似比与计算效率。

authors_text: Xiang Chen,Wenjun Xia,Yan Liu,Hu Chen,Jiliu Zhou,Yi Zhang
title: Fourth-Order Nonlocal Tensor Decomposition Model for Spectral Computed Tomography
title_zh: 能谱计算机断层扫描的四阶非局部张量分解模型
comment: 4 pages, 3 figure
comments: 4 pages, 3 figure
abstract: Spectral computed tomography (CT) can reconstruct spectral images from different energy bins using photon counting detectors (PCDs). However, due to the limited photons and counting rate in the corresponding spectral fraction, the reconstructed spectral images usually suffer from severe noise. In this paper, a fourth-order nonlocal tensor decomposition model for spectral CT image reconstruction (FONT-SIR) method is proposed. Similar patches are collected in both spatial and spectral dimensions simultaneously to form the basic tensor unit. Additionally, principal component analysis (PCA) is applied to extract latent features from the patches for a robust and efficient similarity measure. Then, low-rank and sparsity decomposition is performed on the produced fourth-order tensor unit, and the weighted nuclear norm and total variation (TV) norm are used to enforce the low-rank and sparsity constraints, respectively. The alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM) is adopted to optimize the objective function. The experimental results with our proposed FONT-SIR demonstrates a superior qualitative and quantitative performance for both simulated and real data sets relative to several state-of-the-art methods, in terms of noise suppression and detail preservation.

However, due to the limited photons and counting rate in the corresponding spectral fraction, the reconstructed spectral images usually suffer from severe noise. In this paper, a fourth-order nonlocal tensor decomposition model for spectral CT image reconstruction (FONT-SIR) method is proposed. Similar patches are collected in both spatial and spectral dimensions simultaneously to form the basic tensor unit. Additionally, principal component analysis (PCA) is applied to extract latent features from the patches for a robust and efficient similarity measure. Then, low-rank and sparsity decomposition is performed on the produced fourth-order tensor unit, and the weighted nuclear norm and total variation (TV) norm are used to enforce the low-rank and sparsity constraints, respectively. The alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM) is adopted to optimize the objective function. The experimental results with our proposed FONT-SIR demonstrates a superior qualitative and quantitative performance for both simulated and real data sets relative to several state-of-the-art methods, in terms of noise suppression and detail preservation.
abstract_zh: 光谱计算机断层扫描 (CT) 可以使用光子计数探测器 (PCD) 重建来自不同能量仓的光谱图像。然而，由于相应光谱部分中的光子和计数率有限，重建的光谱图像通常会受到严重的噪声影响。本文提出了一种用于能谱CT图像重建的四阶非局部张量分解模型（FONT-SIR）方法。同时在空间和光谱维度上收集相似的斑块以形成基本张量单元。此外，应用主成分分析（PCA）从补丁中提取潜在特征，以实现稳健且有效的相似性度量。然后，对生成的四阶张量单元进行低秩和稀疏分解，并分别使用加权核范数和总变分（TV）范数来强制低秩和稀疏约束。采用乘子交替方向法（ADMM）来优化目标函数。我们提出的 FONT-SIR 的实验结果表明，在噪声抑制和细节保留方面，相对于几种最先进的方法，模拟数据集和真实数据集都具有卓越的定性和定量性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种四阶非局部张量分解模型（FONT-SIR）用于光谱CT图像重建，以解决噪声问题并提升图像质量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在光子数量有限和计数率低的情况下，重建的光谱图像存在严重噪声，影响图像质量。
AI.method: 基于四阶张量分解，结合PCA提取特征，利用低秩和稀疏约束，通过ADMM优化。
AI.result: 实验表明FONT-SIR在降噪和细节保留方面优于现有方法，具有更好的定性和定量性能。
AI.conclusion: FONT-SIR有效提升了光谱CT图像的重建质量，为低剂量成像提供了新方法。

title: Upsampling artifacts in neural audio synthesis
title_zh: 神经音频合成中的上采样伪影
comment: In proceedings of ICASSP2021. Code: https://github.com/DolbyLaboratories/neural-upsampling-artifacts-audio
comments: In proceedings of ICASSP2021. Code: https://github.com/DolbyLaboratories/neural-upsampling-artifacts-audio
abstract: A number of recent advances in neural audio synthesis rely on upsampling layers, which can introduce undesired artifacts. In computer vision, upsampling artifacts have been studied and are known as checkerboard artifacts (due to their characteristic visual pattern). However, their effect has been overlooked so far in audio processing. Here, we address this gap by studying this problem from the audio signal processing perspective. We first show that the main sources of upsampling artifacts are: (i) the tonal and filtering artifacts introduced by problematic upsampling operators, and (ii) the spectral replicas that emerge while upsampling. We then compare different upsampling layers, showing that nearest neighbor upsamplers can be an alternative to the problematic (but state-of-the-art) transposed and subpixel convolutions which are prone to introduce tonal artifacts.
summary: A number of recent advances in neural audio synthesis rely on upsampling layers, which can introduce undesired artifacts. In computer vision, upsampling artifacts have been studied and are known as checkerboard artifacts (due to their characteristic visual pattern). However, their effect has been overlooked so far in audio processing. Here, we address this gap by studying this problem from the audio signal processing perspective. We first show that the main sources of upsampling artifacts are: (i) the tonal and filtering artifacts introduced by problematic upsampling operators, and (ii) the spectral replicas that emerge while upsampling. We then compare different upsampling layers, showing that nearest neighbor upsamplers can be an alternative to the problematic (but state-of-the-art) transposed and subpixel convolutions which are prone to introduce tonal artifacts.
abstract_zh: 神经音频合成的许多最新进展都依赖于上采样层，这可能会引入不需要的伪影。在计算机视觉中，上采样伪影已被研究并被称为棋盘伪影（由于其特有的视觉模式）。然而，迄今为止，它们在音频处理中的作用一直被忽视。在这里，我们通过从音频信号处理的角度研究这个问题来解决这个差距。我们首先表明，上采样伪影的主要来源是：（i）由有问题的上采样算子引入的音调和过滤伪影，以及（ii）上采样时出现的频谱副本。然后，我们比较不同的上采样层，表明最近邻上采样器可以替代有问题的（但最先进的）转置和子像素卷积，这些卷积和子像素卷积容易引入色调伪影。

AI.tldr: 研究神经音频合成中上采样伪影的来源，并提出使用最近邻上采样器作为替代方案以减少伪影。
AI.motivation: 填补音频处理中对上采样伪影研究的空白，分析其来源并寻找有效解决方案。
AI.method: 通过分析上采样伪影的来源，比较不同上采样层（如最近邻、转置卷积、子像素卷积）的性能差异。
AI.result: 发现最近邻上采样器能有效减少音调和频谱伪影，成为转置卷积和子像素卷积的可行替代方案。
AI.conclusion: 上采样伪影在音频合成中不可忽视，需选择合适上采样方法，未来研究可进一步优化相关技术。

title: Implementing efficient balanced networks with mixed-signal spike-based learning circuits
title_zh: 使用基于混合信号尖峰的学习电路实现高效的平衡网络
comment: 5 pages, 6 figures. Accepted at IEEE International Symposium on Circuits and Systems 2021
comments: 5 pages, 6 figures. Accepted at IEEE International Symposium on Circuits and Systems 2021
abstract: Efficient Balanced Networks (EBNs) are networks of spiking neurons in which excitatory and inhibitory synaptic currents are balanced on a short timescale, leading to desirable coding properties such as high encoding precision, low firing rates, and distributed information representation. It is for these benefits that it would be desirable to implement such networks in low-power neuromorphic processors. However, the degree of device mismatch in analog mixed-signal neuromorphic circuits renders the use of pre-trained EBNs challenging, if not impossible. To overcome this issue, we developed a novel local learning rule suitable for on-chip implementation that drives a randomly connected network of spiking neurons into a tightly balanced regime. Here we present the integrated circuits that implement this rule and demonstrate their expected behaviour in low-level circuit simulations. Our proposed method paves the way towards a system-level implementation of tightly balanced networks on analog mixed-signal neuromorphic hardware. Thanks to their coding properties and sparse activity, neuromorphic electronic EBNs will be ideally suited for extreme-edge computing applications that require low-latency, ultra-low power consumption and which cannot rely on cloud computing for data processing.
summary: Efficient Balanced Networks (EBNs) are networks of spiking neurons in which excitatory and inhibitory synaptic currents are balanced on a short timescale, leading to desirable coding properties such as high encoding precision, low firing rates, and distributed information representation. It is for these benefits that it would be desirable to implement such networks in low-power neuromorphic processors. However, the degree of device mismatch in analog mixed-signal neuromorphic circuits renders the use of pre-trained EBNs challenging, if not impossible. To overcome this issue, we developed a novel local learning rule suitable for on-chip implementation that drives a randomly connected network of spiking neurons into a tightly balanced regime. Here we present the integrated circuits that implement this rule and demonstrate their expected behaviour in low-level circuit simulations. Our proposed method paves the way towards a system-level implementation of tightly balanced networks on analog mixed-signal neuromorphic hardware. Thanks to their coding properties and sparse activity, neuromorphic electronic EBNs will be ideally suited for extreme-edge computing applications that require low-latency, ultra-low power consumption and which cannot rely on cloud computing for data processing.
abstract_zh: 高效平衡网络（EBN）是尖峰神经元网络，其中兴奋性和抑制性突触电流在短时间内保持平衡，从而产生理想的编码特性，例如高编码精度、低放电率和分布式信息表示。正是出于这些好处，人们希望在低功耗神经形态处理器中实现此类网络。然而，模拟混合信号神经拟态电路中设备不匹配的程度使得预训练 EBN 的使用即使不是不可能，也充满挑战。为了克服这个问题，我们开发了一种适合片上实现的新颖的本地学习规则，该规则将随机连接的尖峰神经元网络驱动到紧密平衡的状态。在这里，我们展示了实现该规则的集成电路，并在低级电路仿真中展示了它们的预期行为。我们提出的方法为在模拟混合信号神经形态硬件上实现紧密平衡网络的系统级实现铺平了道路。由于其编码特性和稀疏活动，神经形态电子 EBN 将非常适合需要低延迟、超低功耗且不能依赖云计算进行数据处理的极端边缘计算应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于混合信号脉冲学习电路的高效平衡网络实现方法。
AI.motivation: 高效平衡网络（EBN）具有高编码精度和低功耗特性，但现有模拟混合信号神经形态电路的器件失配问题阻碍了其应用。
AI.method: 开发了一种适用于芯片实现的局部学习规则，并通过低级电路仿真验证其效果。
AI.result: 成功展示了该方法在模拟混合信号神经形态硬件上实现紧平衡网络的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 基于脉冲的EBN电路适合极端边缘计算场景，具有低延迟和超低功耗优势。

To overcome this issue, we developed a novel local learning rule suitable for on-chip implementation that drives a randomly connected network of spiking neurons into a tightly balanced regime. Here we present the integrated circuits that implement this rule and demonstrate their expected behaviour in low-level circuit simulations. Our proposed method paves the way towards a system-level implementation of tightly balanced networks on analog mixed-signal neuromorphic hardware. Thanks to their coding properties and sparse activity, neuromorphic electronic EBNs will be ideally suited for extreme-edge computing applications that require low-latency, ultra-low power consumption and which cannot rely on cloud computing for data processing. 高效平衡网络（EBN）是尖峰神经元网络，其中兴奋性和抑制性突触电流在短时间内保持平衡，从而产生理想的编码特性，例如高编码精度、低放电率和分布式信息表示。正是出于这些好处，人们希望在低功耗神经形态处理器中实现此类网络。然而，模拟混合信号神经拟态电路中设备不匹配的程度使得预训练 EBN 的使用即使不是不可能，也充满挑战。为了克服这个问题，我们开发了一种适合片上实现的新颖的本地学习规则，该规则将随机连接的尖峰神经元网络驱动到紧密平衡的状态。在这里，我们展示了实现该规则的集成电路，并在低级电路仿真中展示了它们的预期行为。我们提出的方法为在模拟混合信号神经形态硬件上实现紧密平衡网络的系统级实现铺平了道路。由于其编码特性和稀疏活动，神经形态电子 EBN 将非常适合需要低延迟、超低功耗且不能依赖云计算进行数据处理的极端边缘计算应用。 本文提出了一种基于混合信号脉冲学习电路的高效平衡网络实现方法。 Julian Büchel,Jonathan Kakon,Michel Perez,Giacomo Indiveri cs.ET,cs.AI

authors_text: Wenjun Xia,Zexin Lu,Yongqiang Huang,Yan Liu,Hu Chen,Jiliu Zhou,Yi Zhang
title: CT Reconstruction with PDF: Parameter-Dependent Framework for Multiple Scanning Geometries and Dose Levels
title_zh: 使用 PDF 进行 CT 重建：用于多种扫描几何形状和剂量水平的参数相关框架
comment: 4 pages, 3 figures
comments: 4 pages, 3 figures
abstract: Current mainstream of CT reconstruction methods based on deep learning usually needs to fix the scanning geometry and dose level, which will significantly aggravate the training cost and need more training data for clinical application. In this paper, we propose a parameter-dependent framework (PDF) which trains data with multiple scanning geometries and dose levels simultaneously. In the proposed PDF, the geometry and dose level are parameterized and fed into two multi-layer perceptrons (MLPs). The MLPs are leveraged to modulate the feature maps of CT reconstruction network, which condition the network outputs on different scanning geometries and dose levels. The experiments show that our proposed method can obtain competing performance similar to the original network trained with specific geometry and dose level, which can efficiently save the extra training cost for multiple scanning geometries and dose levels.
summary: Current mainstream of CT reconstruction methods based on deep learning usually needs to fix the scanning geometry and dose level, which will significantly aggravate the training cost and need more training data for clinical application. In this paper, we propose a parameter-dependent framework (PDF) which trains data with multiple scanning geometries and dose levels simultaneously. In the proposed PDF, the geometry and dose level are parameterized and fed into two multi-layer perceptrons (MLPs). The MLPs are leveraged to modulate the feature maps of CT reconstruction network, which condition the network outputs on different scanning geometries and dose levels. The experiments show that our proposed method can obtain competing performance similar to the original network trained with specific geometry and dose level, which can efficiently save the extra training cost for multiple scanning geometries and dose levels.
abstract_zh: 目前主流的基于深度学习的CT重建方法通常需要固定扫描几何和剂量水平，这将显着加重训练成本，并且需要更多的训练数据用于临床应用。在本文中，我们提出了一个参数相关框架（PDF），它同时训练具有多个扫描几何形状和剂量水平的数据。在提出的 PDF 中，几何形状和剂量水平被参数化并输入到两个多层感知器 (MLP) 中。利用 MLP 来调制 CT 重建网络的特征图，从而根据不同的扫描几何形状和剂量水平调节网络输出。实验表明，我们提出的方法可以获得与使用特定几何形状和剂量水平训练的原始网络相似的竞争性能，这可以有效节省多个扫描几何形状和剂量水平的额外训练成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种参数依赖框架（PDF），用于同时处理多种CT扫描几何形状和剂量水平的重建任务。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习CT重建方法需固定扫描几何和剂量水平，导致训练成本高且需更多数据，难以满足临床需求。
AI.method: 将几何和剂量参数输入两个多层感知机（MLPs），通过调制特征图使网络输出适应不同扫描条件。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法性能可媲美针对特定几何和剂量训练的模型，显著降低多条件下的训练成本。
AI.conclusion: PDF框架有效解决了多几何多剂量水平CT重建的训练难题，具有临床应用潜力。

title: Learning to Infer Unseen Single-/Multi-Attribute-Object Compositions with Graph Networks
title_zh: 学习用图网络推断看不见的单/多属性对象组合
comment: Acceptted by IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (T-PAMI)
comments: Acceptted by IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (T-PAMI)
abstract: Inferring the unseen attribute-object composition is critical to make machines learn to decompose and compose complex concepts like people. Most existing methods are limited to the composition recognition of single-attribute-object, and can hardly learn relations between the attributes and objects. In this paper, we propose an attribute-object semantic association graph model to learn the complex relations and enable knowledge transfer between primitives. With nodes representing attributes and objects, the graph can be constructed flexibly, which realizes both single- and multi-attribute-object composition recognition. In order to reduce mis-classifications of similar compositions (e.g., scratched screen and broken screen), driven by the contrastive loss, the anchor image feature is pulled closer to the corresponding label feature and pushed away from other negative label features. Specifically, a novel balance loss is proposed to alleviate the domain bias, where a model prefers to predict seen compositions. In addition, we build a large-scale MultiAttribute Dataset (MAD) with 116,099 images and 8,030 label categories for inferring unseen multi-attribute-object compositions. Along with MAD, we propose two novel metrics Hard and Soft to give a comprehensive evaluation in the multi-attribute setting. Experiments on MAD and two other single-attribute-object benchmarks (MIT-States and UT-Zappos50K) demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach.
summary: Inferring the unseen attribute-object composition is critical to make machines learn to decompose and compose complex concepts like people. Most existing methods are limited to the composition recognition of single-attribute-object, and can hardly learn relations between the attributes and objects. In this paper, we propose an attribute-object semantic association graph model to learn the complex relations and enable knowledge transfer between primitives. With nodes representing attributes and objects, the graph can be constructed flexibly, which realizes both single- and multi-attribute-object composition recognition. In order to reduce mis-classifications of similar compositions (e.g., scratched screen and broken screen), driven by the contrastive loss, the anchor image feature is pulled closer to the corresponding label feature and pushed away from other negative label features. Specifically, a novel balance loss is proposed to alleviate the domain bias, where a model prefers to predict seen compositions. In addition, we build a large-scale MultiAttribute Dataset (MAD) with 116,099 images and 8,030 label categories for inferring unseen multi-attribute-object compositions. Along with MAD, we propose two novel metrics Hard and Soft to give a comprehensive evaluation in the multi-attribute setting. Experiments on MAD and two other single-attribute-object benchmarks (MIT-States and UT-Zappos50K) demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach.
abstract_zh: 推断看不见的属性-对象组合对于让机器学习像人一样分解和组合复杂的概念至关重要。现有方法大多局限于单一属性对象的组合识别，很难学习属性与对象之间的关系。在本文中，我们提出了一种属性-对象语义关联图模型来学习复杂关系并实现基元之间的知识转移。利用代表属性和对象的节点，可以灵活地构建图，实现单属性和多属性对象组合识别。为了减少由对比损失驱动的相似成分的错误分类（例如划伤的屏幕和破碎的屏幕），锚定图像特征被拉近相应的标签特征并远离其他负标签特征。具体来说，提出了一种新颖的平衡损失来减轻域偏差，其中模型更喜欢预测所看到的成分。此外，我们还构建了一个包含 116,099 张图像和 8,030 个标签类别的大规模多属性数据集 (MAD)，用于推断未见过的多属性对象组合。与 MAD 一起，我们提出了两个新颖的指标 Hard 和 Soft，以在多属性设置中进行综合评估。 MAD 和其他两个单属性对象基准（MIT-States 和 UT-Zappos50K）上的实验证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于图网络的方法，用于学习推断未见过的单属性/多属性对象组合。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅能处理单属性对象组合，难以学习属性与对象间的复杂关系，且易产生相似组合的误分类问题。
AI.method: 构建属性-对象语义关联图模型，通过节点表示属性与对象，结合对比损失和平衡损失优化，并提出多属性数据集MAD及Hard/Soft评估指标。
AI.result: 在MAD及MIT-States、UT-Zappos50K数据集上验证了方法有效性，显著提升多属性组合识别性能。
AI.conclusion: 该模型通过图结构与损失函数设计，有效解决了复杂属性-对象组合的跨域迁移与误分类问题，为多属性推理提供新思路。

authors_text: Antonios Antoniadis,Margarita Capretto,Parinya Chalermsook,Christoph Damerius,Peter Kling,Lukas Nölke,Nidia Obscura,Joachim Spoerhase
title: On Minimum Generalized Manhattan Connections
title_zh: 关于最小广义曼哈顿连接
abstract: We consider minimum-cardinality Manhattan connected sets with arbitrary demands: Given a collection of points $P$ in the plane, together with a subset of pairs of points in $P$ (which we call demands), find a minimum-cardinality superset of $P$ such that every demand pair is connected by a path whose length is the $\ell_1$-distance of the pair. This problem is a variant of three well-studied problems that have arisen in computational geometry, data structures, and network design: (i) It is a node-cost variant of the classical Manhattan network problem, (ii) it is an extension of the binary search tree problem to arbitrary demands, and (iii) it is a special case of the directed Steiner forest problem. Since the problem inherits basic structural properties from the context of binary search trees, an $O(\log n)$-approximation is trivial. We show that the problem is NP-hard and present an $O(\sqrt{\log n})$-approximation algorithm. Moreover, we provide an $O(\log\log n)$-approximation algorithm for complete bipartite demands as well as improved results for unit-disk demands and several generalizations. Our results crucially rely on a new lower bound on the optimal cost that could potentially be useful in the context of BSTs.
summary: We consider minimum-cardinality Manhattan connected sets with arbitrary demands: Given a collection of points $P$ in the plane, together with a subset of pairs of points in $P$ (which we call demands), find a minimum-cardinality superset of $P$ such that every demand pair is connected by a path whose length is the $\ell_1$-distance of the pair. This problem is a variant of three well-studied problems that have arisen in computational geometry, data structures, and network design: (i) It is a node-cost variant of the classical Manhattan network problem, (ii) it is an extension of the binary search tree problem to arbitrary demands, and (iii) it is a special case of the directed Steiner forest problem. Since the problem inherits basic structural properties from the context of binary search trees, an $O(\log n)$-approximation is trivial. We show that the problem is NP-hard and present an $O(\sqrt{\log n})$-approximation algorithm. Moreover, we provide an $O(\log\log n)$-approximation algorithm for complete bipartite demands as well as improved results for unit-disk demands and several generalizations. Our results crucially rely on a new lower bound on the optimal cost that could potentially be useful in the context of BSTs.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑具有任意需求的最小基数曼哈顿连通集：给定平面中点 $P$ 的集合，以及 $P$ 中点对的子集（我们称为需求），找到 $P$ 的最小基数超集，使得每个需求对都由长度为该对的 $\ell_1$ 距离的路径连接。该问题是计算几何、数据结构和网络设计中出现的三个经过充分研究的问题的变体：（i）它是经典曼哈顿网络问题的节点成本变体，（ii）它是二叉搜索树问题对任意需求的扩展，（iii）它是有向斯坦纳森林问题的特例。由于该问题继承了二叉搜索树的基本结构属性，因此 $O(\log n)$ 近似是微不足道的。我们证明该问题是 NP 难问题，并提出一个 $O(\sqrt{\log n})$ 近似算法。此外，我们为完整的二分需求提供了一个 $O(\log\log n)$ 近似算法，以及单位磁盘需求的改进结果和一些概括。我们的结果主要依赖于最优成本的新下限，这可能在 BST 的背景下有用。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在平面点集上构造满足特定需求对的最小曼哈顿连接集问题，要求每对需求点间存在路径且路径长度等于其ℓ₁距离。
AI.motivation: 该问题融合了曼哈顿网络、二叉搜索树及有向斯坦纳森林等经典问题的特性，旨在探索其结构特性并设计高效近似算法。
AI.method: 基于二叉搜索树问题的结构特性提出O(log n)近似，通过证明NP难性并设计新的下界，进一步开发针对完全二分图及单位圆盘需求的改进算法。
AI.result: 证明问题NP难，提出O(√log n)近似算法，完全二分图需求下达到O(log log n)，并改进单位圆盘等场景的算法表现。
AI.conclusion: 新下界可能推动二叉搜索树问题研究，不同需求场景的算法改进展示了问题的结构多样性与应用潜力。

search_text: On Minimum Generalized Manhattan Connections 关于最小广义曼哈顿连接 We consider minimum-cardinality Manhattan connected sets with arbitrary demands: Given a collection of points $P$ in the plane, together with a subset of pairs of points in $P$ (which we call demands), find a minimum-cardinality superset of $P$ such that every demand pair is connected by a path whose length is the $\ell_1$-distance of the pair. This problem is a variant of three well-studied problems that have arisen in computational geometry, data structures, and network design: (i) It is a node-cost variant of the classical Manhattan network problem, (ii) it is an extension of the binary search tree problem to arbitrary demands, and (iii) it is a special case of the directed Steiner forest problem. Since the problem inherits basic structural properties from the context of binary search trees, an $O(\log n)$-approximation is trivial. We show that the problem is NP-hard and present an $O(\sqrt{\log n})$-approximation algorithm. Moreover, we provide an $O(\log\log n)$-approximation algorithm for complete bipartite demands as well as improved results for unit-disk demands and several generalizations. Our results crucially rely on a new lower bound on the optimal cost that could potentially be useful in the context of BSTs. 我们考虑具有任意需求的最小基数曼哈顿连通集：给定平面中点 $P$ 的集合，以及 $P$ 中点对的子集（我们称为需求），找到 $P$ 的最小基数超集，使得每个需求对都由长度为该对的 $\ell_1$ 距离的路径连接。该问题是计算几何、数据结构和网络设计中出现的三个经过充分研究的问题的变体：（i）它是经典曼哈顿网络问题的节点成本变体，（ii）它是二叉搜索树问题对任意需求的扩展，（iii）它是有向斯坦纳森林问题的特例。由于该问题继承了二叉搜索树的基本结构属性，因此 $O(\log n)$ 近似是微不足道的。我们证明该问题是 NP 难问题，并提出一个 $O(\sqrt{\log n})$ 近似算法。此外，我们为完整的二分需求提供了一个 $O(\log\log n)$ 近似算法，以及单位磁盘需求的改进结果和一些概括。我们的结果主要依赖于最优成本的新下限，这可能在 BST 的背景下有用。 本文研究在平面点集上构造满足特定需求对的最小曼哈顿连接集问题，要求每对需求点间存在路径且路径长度等于其ℓ₁距离。 Antonios Antoniadis,Margarita Capretto,Parinya Chalermsook,Christoph Damerius,Peter Kling,Lukas Nölke,Nidia Obscura,Joachim Spoerhase cs.DS,cs.CC,cs.CG

title: An efficient nonconvex reformulation of stagewise convex optimization problems
title_zh: 阶段式凸优化问题的有效非凸重构
comment: First and second authors made equal contribution. To appear in Neurips 2020
comments: First and second authors made equal contribution. To appear in Neurips 2020
abstract: Convex optimization problems with staged structure appear in several contexts, including optimal control, verification of deep neural networks, and isotonic regression. Off-the-shelf solvers can solve these problems but may scale poorly. We develop a nonconvex reformulation designed to exploit this staged structure. Our reformulation has only simple bound constraints, enabling solution via projected gradient methods and their accelerated variants. The method automatically generates a sequence of primal and dual feasible solutions to the original convex problem, making optimality certification easy. We establish theoretical properties of the nonconvex formulation, showing that it is (almost) free of spurious local minima and has the same global optimum as the convex problem. We modify PGD to avoid spurious local minimizers so it always converges to the global minimizer. For neural network verification, our approach obtains small duality gaps in only a few gradient steps. Consequently, it can quickly solve large-scale verification problems faster than both off-the-shelf and specialized solvers.
summary: Convex optimization problems with staged structure appear in several contexts, including optimal control, verification of deep neural networks, and isotonic regression. Off-the-shelf solvers can solve these problems but may scale poorly. We develop a nonconvex reformulation designed to exploit this staged structure. Our reformulation has only simple bound constraints, enabling solution via projected gradient methods and their accelerated variants. The method automatically generates a sequence of primal and dual feasible solutions to the original convex problem, making optimality certification easy. We establish theoretical properties of the nonconvex formulation, showing that it is (almost) free of spurious local minima and has the same global optimum as the convex problem. We modify PGD to avoid spurious local minimizers so it always converges to the global minimizer. For neural network verification, our approach obtains small duality gaps in only a few gradient steps. Consequently, it can quickly solve large-scale verification problems faster than both off-the-shelf and specialized solvers.
abstract_zh: 具有阶段结构的凸优化问题出现在多种环境中，包括最优控制、深度神经网络的验证和等渗回归。现成的求解器可以解决这些问题，但扩展性可能较差。我们开发了一种非凸重构，旨在利用这种分阶段结构。我们的重新表述只有简单的边界约束，可以通过投影梯度方法及其加速变体来实现解决方案。该方法自动生成原始凸问题的一系列原始可行解和对偶可行解，使最优性验证变得容易。我们建立了非凸公式的理论性质，表明它（几乎）没有虚假的局部最小值，并且具有与凸问题相同的全局最优值。我们修改 PGD 以避免虚假的局部最小化器，因此它总是收敛到全局最小化器。对于神经网络验证，我们的方法只需几个梯度步骤即可获得小的对偶间隙。因此，它可以比现成的和专用的求解器更快地解决大规模验证问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的非凸重述方法，用于解决具有分阶段结构的凸优化问题，以提高求解效率。
AI.motivation: 现有求解器在处理分阶段凸优化问题时可能扩展性较差，需要更高效且能利用问题结构的算法。
AI.method: 通过非凸重述将原问题转化为仅含简单边界约束的形式，结合投影梯度法及其加速变体，并修改算法以避免局部极小值。
AI.result: 理论证明非凸形式几乎无虚假局部极小值且与原问题共享全局最优解，实验显示在神经网络验证任务中显著提升求解速度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效利用分阶段结构，为大规模凸优化问题提供了高效且可靠的求解方案。

title: What Color is this? Explaining Art Restoration Research Methods using Interactive Museum Installations
title_zh: 这是什么颜色？使用互动博物馆装置解释艺术修复研究方法
comment: Workshop on Visual Interface Design Methods, AVI 2020
comments: Workshop on Visual Interface Design Methods, AVI 2020
abstract: This case study describes an approach to designing interactive museum installations as a student project with the aim of presenting the research results of the restoration process of paintings to a wide range of visitors. During one and a half years, the Chair of Media Design created five interactive media stations in two lectures to enrich the special exhibition "Veronese: The Cuccina Cycle. The Restored Masterpiece". The project was realised in close communication with the conservators of the Dresden State Art Collections and the employees of the Science and Archaeometric Laboratory of the Dresden University of Fine Arts. The students had to learn about the foreign content and how to translate it into a media-related environment. With suitable teaching methods, we pushed the students towards a deeper understanding of the matter.
summary: This case study describes an approach to designing interactive museum installations as a student project with the aim of presenting the research results of the restoration process of paintings to a wide range of visitors. During one and a half years, the Chair of Media Design created five interactive media stations in two lectures to enrich the special exhibition "Veronese: The Cuccina Cycle. The Restored Masterpiece". The project was realised in close communication with the conservators of the Dresden State Art Collections and the employees of the Science and Archaeometric Laboratory of the Dresden University of Fine Arts. The students had to learn about the foreign content and how to translate it into a media-related environment. With suitable teaching methods, we pushed the students towards a deeper understanding of the matter.
abstract_zh: 本案例研究描述了一种将交互式博物馆装置设计为学生项目的方法，旨在向广大参观者展示绘画修复过程的研究成果。在一年半的时间里，媒体设计主席在两场讲座中创建了五个互动媒体站，以丰富特别展览“维罗内塞：库奇纳循环。修复的杰作”。该项目是在与德累斯顿国家艺术收藏馆的管理员以及德累斯顿美术大学科学与考古实验室的工作人员密切沟通下实现的。学生们必须了解外国内容以及如何将其翻译成与媒体相关的环境。通过适当的教学方法，我们促使学生对问题有更深入的了解。

AI.tldr: 本文通过设计互动博物馆装置，作为学生项目向公众展示绘画修复过程的研究成果。
AI.motivation: 通过互动装置让公众理解艺术修复过程，并培养学生将专业内容转化为媒体展示的能力。
AI.method: 通过与专业机构合作，设计互动媒体站点，学生将艺术修复知识转化为互动展示。
AI.result: 成功创建了互动装置，增强了展览体验，并提升了学生对修复研究的理解。
AI.conclusion: 跨学科合作有效促进了艺术修复知识的公众传播与教育，展示了互动技术在博物馆教育中的潜力。

search_text: What Color is this? Explaining Art Restoration Research Methods using Interactive Museum Installations 这是什么颜色？使用互动博物馆装置解释艺术修复研究方法 This case study describes an approach to designing interactive museum installations as a student project with the aim of presenting the research results of the restoration process of paintings to a wide range of visitors. During one and a half years, the Chair of Media Design created five interactive media stations in two lectures to enrich the special exhibition "Veronese: The Cuccina Cycle. The Restored Masterpiece". The project was realised in close communication with the conservators of the Dresden State Art Collections and the employees of the Science and Archaeometric Laboratory of the Dresden University of Fine Arts. The students had to learn about the foreign content and how to translate it into a media-related environment. With suitable teaching methods, we pushed the students towards a deeper understanding of the matter. 本案例研究描述了一种将交互式博物馆装置设计为学生项目的方法，旨在向广大参观者展示绘画修复过程的研究成果。在一年半的时间里，媒体设计主席在两场讲座中创建了五个互动媒体站，以丰富特别展览“维罗内塞：库奇纳循环。修复的杰作”。该项目是在与德累斯顿国家艺术收藏馆的管理员以及德累斯顿美术大学科学与考古实验室的工作人员密切沟通下实现的。学生们必须了解外国内容以及如何将其翻译成与媒体相关的环境。通过适当的教学方法，我们促使学生对问题有更深入的了解。 本文通过设计互动博物馆装置，作为学生项目向公众展示绘画修复过程的研究成果。 Franziska Hannß,Esther Lapczyna,Mathias Müller,Rainer Groh cs.HC

title: Optimization of Robot Grasping Forces and Worst Case Loading
title_zh: 机器人抓取力和最坏情况负载的优化
abstract: We consider the optimization of the vector of grasping forces that support a known generalized force acting on the grasped object---a rigid body or a mechanism. Working in the framework of finite-dimensional normed vector spaces and their dual spaces, the cost function to be minimized is assumed to be a norm on the space of grasping forces. We present an expression for the optimum which depends on the external force and the kinematics of the grasping system. Next, assuming that optimal grasping forces are applied using force control, and assuming that there is a bound on the norm of the admissible grasping forces, we characterize the largest norm of an external force that the grasping system may support, that is, the norm of the worst-case loading that may be applied and still be supported. A few simple examples are given for the sake of illustration.
summary: We consider the optimization of the vector of grasping forces that support a known generalized force acting on the grasped object---a rigid body or a mechanism. Working in the framework of finite-dimensional normed vector spaces and their dual spaces, the cost function to be minimized is assumed to be a norm on the space of grasping forces. We present an expression for the optimum which depends on the external force and the kinematics of the grasping system. Next, assuming that optimal grasping forces are applied using force control, and assuming that there is a bound on the norm of the admissible grasping forces, we characterize the largest norm of an external force that the grasping system may support, that is, the norm of the worst-case loading that may be applied and still be supported. A few simple examples are given for the sake of illustration.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑优化抓取力矢量，该矢量支持作用于抓取对象（刚体或机构）的已知广义力。在有限维赋范向量空间及其对偶空间的框架中工作，假设要最小化的成本函数是抓取力空间的范数。我们提出了一个最佳表达式，该表达式取决于外力和抓取系统的运动学。接下来，假设使用力控制来施加最佳抓取力，并且假设允许的抓取力的范数存在界限，我们描述抓取系统可以支持的外力的最大范数，即可以施加并且仍然支持的最坏情况载荷的范数。为了便于说明，给出了一些简单的例子。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在优化机器人抓取力以支撑已知外部力，并确定抓取系统在力控制下的最大可承受外部载荷。
AI.motivation: 为确保机器人在抓取过程中稳定支撑物体并应对最坏情况下的外部载荷，需优化抓取力分配并确定系统承载极限。
AI.method: 基于有限维赋范空间理论，结合外部力与抓取系统运动学，建立范数优化模型，并通过力控制约束分析最大外部载荷。
AI.result: 推导出最优抓取力表达式，确定了最大可承受外部载荷的范数计算方法，并通过实例验证。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为机器人抓取力优化及最坏情况载荷分析提供了理论框架，有助于提升抓取稳定性与安全性。

authors_text: Peiyao Wang,Weixin Luo,Yanyu Xu,Haojie Li,Shugong Xu,Jianyu Yang,Shenghua Gao
title: SIRI: Spatial Relation Induced Network For Spatial Description Resolution
title_zh: SIRI：用于空间描述解析的空间关系诱导网络
comment: Accepted at NeurIPS 2020; Peiyao Wang and Weixin Luo made equal contribution
comments: Accepted at NeurIPS 2020; Peiyao Wang and Weixin Luo made equal contribution
abstract: Spatial Description Resolution, as a language-guided localization task, is proposed for target location in a panoramic street view, given corresponding language descriptions. Explicitly characterizing an object-level relationship while distilling spatial relationships are currently absent but crucial to this task. Mimicking humans, who sequentially traverse spatial relationship words and objects with a first-person view to locate their target, we propose a novel spatial relationship induced (SIRI) network. Specifically, visual features are firstly correlated at an implicit object-level in a projected latent space; then they are distilled by each spatial relationship word, resulting in each differently activated feature representing each spatial relationship. Further, we introduce global position priors to fix the absence of positional information, which may result in global positional reasoning ambiguities. Both the linguistic and visual features are concatenated to finalize the target localization. Experimental results on the Touchdown show that our method is around 24\% better than the state-of-the-art method in terms of accuracy, measured by an 80-pixel radius. Our method also generalizes well on our proposed extended dataset collected using the same settings as Touchdown.
summary: Spatial Description Resolution, as a language-guided localization task, is proposed for target location in a panoramic street view, given corresponding language descriptions. Explicitly characterizing an object-level relationship while distilling spatial relationships are currently absent but crucial to this task. Mimicking humans, who sequentially traverse spatial relationship words and objects with a first-person view to locate their target, we propose a novel spatial relationship induced (SIRI) network. Specifically, visual features are firstly correlated at an implicit object-level in a projected latent space; then they are distilled by each spatial relationship word, resulting in each differently activated feature representing each spatial relationship. Further, we introduce global position priors to fix the absence of positional information, which may result in global positional reasoning ambiguities. Both the linguistic and visual features are concatenated to finalize the target localization. Experimental results on the Touchdown show that our method is around 24\% better than the state-of-the-art method in terms of accuracy, measured by an 80-pixel radius. Our method also generalizes well on our proposed extended dataset collected using the same settings as Touchdown.
abstract_zh: 空间描述分辨率作为一种语言引导的定位任务，在给出相应的语言描述的情况下，针对全景街景中的目标定位而提出。目前尚不存在在提取空间关系的同时明确表征对象级关系的方法，但这对于这项任务至关重要。模仿人类以第一人称视角顺序遍历空间关系词和物体来定位目标，我们提出了一种新颖的空间关系诱导（SIRI）网络。具体来说，视觉特征首先在投影潜在空间中的隐式对象级别上进行关联；然后根据每个空间关系词对它们进行蒸馏，产生代表每个空间关系的每个不同激活的特征。此外，我们引入全局位置先验来修复位置信息的缺失，这可能会导致全局位置推理模糊。将语言和视觉特征连接起来以最终确定目标定位。 Touchdown 的实验结果表明，以 80 像素半径测量，我们的方法在精度方面比最先进的方法提高了 24% 左右。我们的方法也很好地概括了我们提出的使用与 Touchdown 相同的设置收集的扩展数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SIRI的网络，用于解决空间描述解析任务，即根据语言描述在全景街景视图中定位目标。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能显式表征对象级关系并提炼空间关系，而这对基于语言引导的定位任务至关重要。
AI.method: 通过在投影的潜在空间中隐式关联视觉特征，再通过每个空间关系词进行特征提炼，并引入全局位置先验信息以解决位置信息缺失问题，最终融合语言和视觉特征完成定位。
AI.result: 在Touchdown数据集上，该方法的定位准确率（80像素半径内）比现有最佳方法提升约24%，并在扩展数据集上表现出良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: SIRI网络通过模拟人类处理空间关系的方式，有效提升了空间描述解析任务的性能，验证了其方法的有效性和适用性。

authors_text: Manu Tom,Rajanie Prabha,Tianyu Wu,Emmanuel Baltsavias,Laura Leal-Taixe,Konrad Schindler
title: Ice Monitoring in Swiss Lakes from Optical Satellites and Webcams using Machine Learning
title_zh: 使用机器学习通过光学卫星和网络摄像头对瑞士湖泊的冰进行监测
comment: Accepted for publication in MDPI Remote Sensing Journal
comments: Accepted for publication in MDPI Remote Sensing Journal
abstract: Continuous observation of climate indicators, such as trends in lake freezing, is important to understand the dynamics of the local and global climate system. Consequently, lake ice has been included among the Essential Climate Variables (ECVs) of the Global Climate Observing System (GCOS), and there is a need to set up operational monitoring capabilities. Multi-temporal satellite images and publicly available webcam streams are among the viable data sources to monitor lake ice. In this work we investigate machine learning-based image analysis as a tool to determine the spatio-temporal extent of ice on Swiss Alpine lakes as well as the ice-on and ice-off dates, from both multispectral optical satellite images (VIIRS and MODIS) and RGB webcam images. We model lake ice monitoring as a pixel-wise semantic segmentation problem, i.e., each pixel on the lake surface is classified to obtain a spatially explicit map of ice cover. We show experimentally that the proposed system produces consistently good results when tested on data from multiple winters and lakes. Our satellite-based method obtains mean Intersection-over-Union (mIoU) scores >93%, for both sensors. It also generalises well across lakes and winters with mIoU scores >78% and >80% respectively. On average, our webcam approach achieves mIoU values of 87% (approx.) and generalisation scores of 71% (approx.) and 69% (approx.) across different cameras and winters respectively. Additionally, we put forward a new benchmark dataset of webcam images (Photi-LakeIce) which includes data from two winters and three cameras.
summary: Continuous observation of climate indicators, such as trends in lake freezing, is important to understand the dynamics of the local and global climate system. Consequently, lake ice has been included among the Essential Climate Variables (ECVs) of the Global Climate Observing System (GCOS), and there is a need to set up operational monitoring capabilities. Multi-temporal satellite images and publicly available webcam streams are among the viable data sources to monitor lake ice. In this work we investigate machine learning-based image analysis as a tool to determine the spatio-temporal extent of ice on Swiss Alpine lakes as well as the ice-on and ice-off dates, from both multispectral optical satellite images (VIIRS and MODIS) and RGB webcam images. We model lake ice monitoring as a pixel-wise semantic segmentation problem, i.e., each pixel on the lake surface is classified to obtain a spatially explicit map of ice cover. We show experimentally that the proposed system produces consistently good results when tested on data from multiple winters and lakes. Our satellite-based method obtains mean Intersection-over-Union (mIoU) scores >93%, for both sensors. It also generalises well across lakes and winters with mIoU scores >78% and >80% respectively. On average, our webcam approach achieves mIoU values of 87% (approx.) and generalisation scores of 71% (approx.) and 69% (approx.) across different cameras and winters respectively. Additionally, we put forward a new benchmark dataset of webcam images (Photi-LakeIce) which includes data from two winters and three cameras.
abstract_zh: 持续观测气候指标（例如湖泊结冰趋势）对于了解当地和全球气候系统的动态非常重要。因此，湖冰已被纳入全球气候观测系统（GCOS）的基本气候变量（ECV），并且需要建立业务监测能力。多时相卫星图像和公开的网络摄像头流是监测湖冰的可行数据源。在这项工作中，我们研究了基于机器学习的图像分析作为一种工具，通过多光谱光学卫星图像（VIIRS 和 MODIS）和 RGB 网络摄像头图像来确定瑞士高山湖泊冰的时空范围以及结冰和结冰日期。我们将湖冰监测建模为逐像素语义分割问题，即对湖面上的每个像素进行分类以获得冰盖的空间明确地图。我们通过实验证明，在对来自多个冬季和湖泊的数据进行测试时，所提出的系统始终能产生良好的结果。我们基于卫星的方法获得两个传感器的平均交集 (mIoU) 分数 >93%。它在湖泊和冬季也能很好地推广，mIoU 分数分别 >78% 和 >80%。平均而言，我们的网络摄像头方法在不同相机和冬季分别实现了 87%（大约）的 mIoU 值和 71%（大约）和 69%（大约）的泛化分数。此外，我们提出了一个新的网络摄像头图像基准数据集（Photi-LakeIce），其中包括来自两个冬天和三个摄像机的数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于机器学习的图像分析方法，利用多光谱卫星影像和网络摄像头图像监测瑞士高山湖泊的冰覆盖情况。
AI.motivation: 湖泊结冰趋势是重要的气候指标，需建立操作性监测系统以支持全球气候观测系统（GCOS）的必需气候变量（ECVs）需求。
AI.method: 将湖泊冰监测建模为像素级语义分割问题，使用VIIRS/MODIS卫星影像和RGB网络摄像头图像训练机器学习模型，生成冰覆盖空间分布图。
AI.result: 卫星方法在多传感器上均取得>93%的mIoU分数，跨湖泊和冬季泛化能力达78%和80%；网络摄像头方法平均mIoU约87%，跨相机和冬季泛化能力约71%和69%。
AI.conclusion: 提出的机器学习系统能有效监测湖泊冰覆盖时空分布，且具有良好的跨场景泛化能力，同时发布了包含两个冬季三个摄像头的Photi-LakeIce基准数据集。

search_text: Ice Monitoring in Swiss Lakes from Optical Satellites and Webcams using Machine Learning 使用机器学习通过光学卫星和网络摄像头对瑞士湖泊的冰进行监测 Continuous observation of climate indicators, such as trends in lake freezing, is important to understand the dynamics of the local and global climate system. Consequently, lake ice has been included among the Essential Climate Variables (ECVs) of the Global Climate Observing System (GCOS), and there is a need to set up operational monitoring capabilities. Multi-temporal satellite images and publicly available webcam streams are among the viable data sources to monitor lake ice. In this work we investigate machine learning-based image analysis as a tool to determine the spatio-temporal extent of ice on Swiss Alpine lakes as well as the ice-on and ice-off dates, from both multispectral optical satellite images (VIIRS and MODIS) and RGB webcam images. We model lake ice monitoring as a pixel-wise semantic segmentation problem, i.e., each pixel on the lake surface is classified to obtain a spatially explicit map of ice cover. We show experimentally that the proposed system produces consistently good results when tested on data from multiple winters and lakes. Our satellite-based method obtains mean Intersection-over-Union (mIoU) scores >93%, for both sensors. It also generalises well across lakes and winters with mIoU scores >78% and >80% respectively. On average, our webcam approach achieves mIoU values of 87% (approx.) and generalisation scores of 71% (approx.) and 69% (approx.) across different cameras and winters respectively. Additionally, we put forward a new benchmark dataset of webcam images (Photi-LakeIce) which includes data from two winters and three cameras. 持续观测气候指标（例如湖泊结冰趋势）对于了解当地和全球气候系统的动态非常重要。因此，湖冰已被纳入全球气候观测系统（GCOS）的基本气候变量（ECV），并且需要建立业务监测能力。多时相卫星图像和公开的网络摄像头流是监测湖冰的可行数据源。在这项工作中，我们研究了基于机器学习的图像分析作为一种工具，通过多光谱光学卫星图像（VIIRS 和 MODIS）和 RGB 网络摄像头图像来确定瑞士高山湖泊冰的时空范围以及结冰和结冰日期。我们将湖冰监测建模为逐像素语义分割问题，即对湖面上的每个像素进行分类以获得冰盖的空间明确地图。我们通过实验证明，在对来自多个冬季和湖泊的数据进行测试时，所提出的系统始终能产生良好的结果。我们基于卫星的方法获得两个传感器的平均交集 (mIoU) 分数 >93%。它在湖泊和冬季也能很好地推广，mIoU 分数分别 >78% 和 >80%。平均而言，我们的网络摄像头方法在不同相机和冬季分别实现了 87%（大约）的 mIoU 值和 71%（大约）和 69%（大约）的泛化分数。此外，我们提出了一个新的网络摄像头图像基准数据集（Photi-LakeIce），其中包括来自两个冬天和三个摄像机的数据。 本文提出基于机器学习的图像分析方法，利用多光谱卫星影像和网络摄像头图像监测瑞士高山湖泊的冰覆盖情况。 Manu Tom,Rajanie Prabha,Tianyu Wu,Emmanuel Baltsavias,Laura Leal-Taixe,Konrad Schindler cs.CV,cs.AI

title: Fit to Measure: Reasoning about Sizes for Robust Object Recognition
title_zh: 适合测量：推理鲁棒物体识别的尺寸
abstract: Service robots can help with many of our daily tasks, especially in those cases where it is inconvenient or unsafe for us to intervene: e.g., under extreme weather conditions or when social distance needs to be maintained. However, before we can successfully delegate complex tasks to robots, we need to enhance their ability to make sense of dynamic, real world environments. In this context, the first prerequisite to improving the Visual Intelligence of a robot is building robust and reliable object recognition systems. While object recognition solutions are traditionally based on Machine Learning methods, augmenting them with knowledge based reasoners has been shown to improve their performance. In particular, based on our prior work on identifying the epistemic requirements of Visual Intelligence, we hypothesise that knowledge of the typical size of objects could significantly improve the accuracy of an object recognition system. To verify this hypothesis, in this paper we present an approach to integrating knowledge about object sizes in a ML based architecture. Our experiments in a real world robotic scenario show that this combined approach ensures a significant performance increase over state of the art Machine Learning methods.
summary: Service robots can help with many of our daily tasks, especially in those cases where it is inconvenient or unsafe for us to intervene: e.g., under extreme weather conditions or when social distance needs to be maintained. However, before we can successfully delegate complex tasks to robots, we need to enhance their ability to make sense of dynamic, real world environments. In this context, the first prerequisite to improving the Visual Intelligence of a robot is building robust and reliable object recognition systems. While object recognition solutions are traditionally based on Machine Learning methods, augmenting them with knowledge based reasoners has been shown to improve their performance. In particular, based on our prior work on identifying the epistemic requirements of Visual Intelligence, we hypothesise that knowledge of the typical size of objects could significantly improve the accuracy of an object recognition system. To verify this hypothesis, in this paper we present an approach to integrating knowledge about object sizes in a ML based architecture. Our experiments in a real world robotic scenario show that this combined approach ensures a significant performance increase over state of the art Machine Learning methods.
abstract_zh: 服务机器人可以帮助我们完成许多日常任务，特别是在我们干预不方便或不安全的情况下：例如，在极端天气条件下或需要保持社交距离时。然而，在我们成功地将复杂的任务委托给机器人之前，我们需要增强它们理解动态、现实世界环境的能力。在这种背景下，提高机器人视觉智能的首要先决条件是建立强大而可靠的物体识别系统。虽然对象识别解决方案传统上基于机器学习方法，但通过基于知识的推理器对其进行增强已被证明可以提高其性能。特别是，根据我们之前识别视觉智能认知要求的工作，我们假设了解物体的典型尺寸可以显着提高物体识别系统的准确性。为了验证这一假设，在本文中，我们提出了一种在基于机器学习的架构中集成有关对象大小的知识的方法。我们在现实世界的机器人场景中进行的实验表明，这种组合方法可确保比最先进的机器学习方法显着提高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将物体尺寸知识整合到基于机器学习的物体识别系统中的方法，以提高机器人在动态真实环境中的识别鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习方法在复杂动态环境中的物体识别存在局限性，而基于物体典型尺寸的知识推理可增强视觉智能，从而提升识别准确性。
AI.method: 在机器学习架构中引入物体尺寸知识库，结合知识推理与机器学习模型，构建混合识别系统。
AI.result: 在真实机器人场景的实验中，该方法显著优于现有机器学习方法，证明了尺寸知识对识别性能的提升效果。
AI.conclusion: 整合物体尺寸知识能够有效增强物体识别系统的鲁棒性，为机器人视觉智能的发展提供了新思路。
