title: Robust Odometry and Mapping for Multi-LiDAR Systems with Online Extrinsic Calibration
title_zh: 具有在线外部校准功能的多 LiDAR 系统的稳健里程计和测绘
comment: 20 pages, 22 figures, accepted by IEEE Transcation on Robotics
comments: 20 pages, 22 figures, accepted by IEEE Transcation on Robotics
abstract: Combining multiple LiDARs enables a robot to maximize its perceptual awareness of environments and obtain sufficient measurements, which is promising for simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM). This paper proposes a system to achieve robust and simultaneous extrinsic calibration, odometry, and mapping for multiple LiDARs. Our approach starts with measurement preprocessing to extract edge and planar features from raw measurements. After a motion and extrinsic initialization procedure, a sliding window-based multi-LiDAR odometry runs onboard to estimate poses with online calibration refinement and convergence identification. We further develop a mapping algorithm to construct a global map and optimize poses with sufficient features together with a method to model and reduce data uncertainty. We validate our approach's performance with extensive experiments on ten sequences (4.60km total length) for the calibration and SLAM and compare them against the state-of-the-art. We demonstrate that the proposed work is a complete, robust, and extensible system for various multi-LiDAR setups. The source code, datasets, and demonstrations are available at https://ram-lab.com/file/site/m-loam.
summary: Combining multiple LiDARs enables a robot to maximize its perceptual awareness of environments and obtain sufficient measurements, which is promising for simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM). This paper proposes a system to achieve robust and simultaneous extrinsic calibration, odometry, and mapping for multiple LiDARs. Our approach starts with measurement preprocessing to extract edge and planar features from raw measurements. After a motion and extrinsic initialization procedure, a sliding window-based multi-LiDAR odometry runs onboard to estimate poses with online calibration refinement and convergence identification. We further develop a mapping algorithm to construct a global map and optimize poses with sufficient features together with a method to model and reduce data uncertainty. We validate our approach's performance with extensive experiments on ten sequences (4.60km total length) for the calibration and SLAM and compare them against the state-of-the-art. We demonstrate that the proposed work is a complete, robust, and extensible system for various multi-LiDAR setups. The source code, datasets, and demonstrations are available at https://ram-lab.com/file/site/m-loam.
abstract_zh: 结合多个激光雷达使机器人能够最大限度地提高对环境的感知能力并获得足够的测量结果，这对于同步定位和建图（SLAM）来说很有希望。本文提出了一种为多个激光雷达实现鲁棒且同步的外部校准、里程计和测绘的系统。我们的方法从测量预处理开始，从原始测量中提取边缘和平面特征。经过运动和外部初始化过程后，基于滑动窗口的多 LiDAR 里程计在机上运行，​​通过在线校准细化和收敛识别来估计姿态。我们进一步开发了一种映射算法来构建全局地图并优化具有足够特征的姿势以及建模和减少数据不确定性的方法。我们通过针对校准和 SLAM 的 10 个序列（总长度 4.60 公里）进行大量实验来验证我们的方法的性能，并将它们与最先进的技术进行比较。我们证明所提出的工作是一个完整、强大且可扩展的系统，适用于各种多激光雷达设置。源代码、数据集和演示可在 https://ram-lab.com/file/site/m-loam 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于多LiDAR系统的鲁棒里程计和地图构建方法，并实现了在线外参标定。
AI.motivation: 多LiDAR系统可以提高机器人对环境的感知能力，但现有的方法在标定、里程计和地图构建方面存在不足，需要一个鲁棒且完整的系统来解决这些问题。
AI.method: 该方法首先对测量数据进行预处理，提取边缘和面特征。接着进行运动和外参初始化，然后使用滑动窗口方法进行多LiDAR里程计，并在线优化标定参数。最后开发了一种映射算法，构建全局地图并优化位姿。
AI.result: 在10个序列（总长度4.60km）上的实验验证了该方法的有效性，并与现有最先进的方法进行了比较，结果表明该方法具有鲁棒性和可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提供了一个完整的、鲁棒的、可扩展的系统，适用于各种多LiDAR配置，并提供了源代码、数据集和演示。

search_text: Robust Odometry and Mapping for Multi-LiDAR Systems with Online Extrinsic Calibration 具有在线外部校准功能的多 LiDAR 系统的稳健里程计和测绘 Combining multiple LiDARs enables a robot to maximize its perceptual awareness of environments and obtain sufficient measurements, which is promising for simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM). This paper proposes a system to achieve robust and simultaneous extrinsic calibration, odometry, and mapping for multiple LiDARs. Our approach starts with measurement preprocessing to extract edge and planar features from raw measurements. After a motion and extrinsic initialization procedure, a sliding window-based multi-LiDAR odometry runs onboard to estimate poses with online calibration refinement and convergence identification. We further develop a mapping algorithm to construct a global map and optimize poses with sufficient features together with a method to model and reduce data uncertainty. We validate our approach's performance with extensive experiments on ten sequences (4.60km total length) for the calibration and SLAM and compare them against the state-of-the-art. We demonstrate that the proposed work is a complete, robust, and extensible system for various multi-LiDAR setups. The source code, datasets, and demonstrations are available at https://ram-lab.com/file/site/m-loam. 结合多个激光雷达使机器人能够最大限度地提高对环境的感知能力并获得足够的测量结果，这对于同步定位和建图（SLAM）来说很有希望。本文提出了一种为多个激光雷达实现鲁棒且同步的外部校准、里程计和测绘的系统。我们的方法从测量预处理开始，从原始测量中提取边缘和平面特征。经过运动和外部初始化过程后，基于滑动窗口的多 LiDAR 里程计在机上运行，​​通过在线校准细化和收敛识别来估计姿态。我们进一步开发了一种映射算法来构建全局地图并优化具有足够特征的姿势以及建模和减少数据不确定性的方法。我们通过针对校准和 SLAM 的 10 个序列（总长度 4.60 公里）进行大量实验来验证我们的方法的性能，并将它们与最先进的技术进行比较。我们证明所提出的工作是一个完整、强大且可扩展的系统，适用于各种多激光雷达设置。源代码、数据集和演示可在 https://ram-lab.com/file/site/m-loam 获取。 本文提出了一种用于多LiDAR系统的鲁棒里程计和地图构建方法，并实现了在线外参标定。 Jianhao Jiao,Haoyang Ye,Yilong Zhu,Ming Liu cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Quanyu Liao,Xin Wang,Bin Kong,Siwei Lyu,Youbing Yin,Qi Song,Xi Wu
title: Fast Local Attack: Generating Local Adversarial Examples for Object Detectors
title_zh: 快速本地攻击：为目标检测器生成本地对抗示例
comment: Published in: 2020 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN)
comments: Published in: 2020 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN)
abstract: The deep neural network is vulnerable to adversarial examples. Adding imperceptible adversarial perturbations to images is enough to make them fail. Most existing research focuses on attacking image classifiers or anchor-based object detectors, but they generate globally perturbation on the whole image, which is unnecessary. In our work, we leverage higher-level semantic information to generate high aggressive local perturbations for anchor-free object detectors. As a result, it is less computationally intensive and achieves a higher black-box attack as well as transferring attack performance. The adversarial examples generated by our method are not only capable of attacking anchor-free object detectors, but also able to be transferred to attack anchor-based object detector.
summary: The deep neural network is vulnerable to adversarial examples. Adding imperceptible adversarial perturbations to images is enough to make them fail. Most existing research focuses on attacking image classifiers or anchor-based object detectors, but they generate globally perturbation on the whole image, which is unnecessary. In our work, we leverage higher-level semantic information to generate high aggressive local perturbations for anchor-free object detectors. As a result, it is less computationally intensive and achieves a higher black-box attack as well as transferring attack performance. The adversarial examples generated by our method are not only capable of attacking anchor-free object detectors, but also able to be transferred to attack anchor-based object detector.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络很容易受到对抗性例子的影响。在图像中添加难以察觉的对抗性扰动就足以使它们失败。现有的大多数研究都集中在攻击图像分类器或基于锚的目标检测器，但它们会对整个图像产生全局扰动，这是不必要的。在我们的工作中，我们利用更高级别的语义信息为无锚对象检测器生成高强度的局部扰动。因此，它的计算强度较小，并且实现了较高的黑盒攻击以及转移攻击性能。我们的方法生成的对抗性示例不仅能够攻击无锚目标检测器，而且还能够转移到攻击基于锚的目标检测器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对无锚点目标检测器的快速局部攻击方法，生成局部对抗样本以提高攻击效率和迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗样本攻击方法对图像分类器或基于锚点的检测器采用全局扰动，计算成本高且效率低，缺乏对无锚点检测器的针对性攻击方案。
AI.method: 利用高层语义信息生成局部高攻击性扰动，针对无锚点检测器的特征进行精准干扰。
AI.result: 方法计算量更小，在黑盒攻击和迁移攻击中表现优于现有方法，且能有效攻击基于锚点的检测器。
AI.conclusion: 局部扰动策略在保持攻击效果的同时显著提升效率，为对抗样本攻击提供了新的优化方向。

title: Affordance as general value function: A computational model
title_zh: 作为一般价值函数的可供性：计算模型
abstract: General value functions (GVFs) in the reinforcement learning (RL) literature are long-term predictive summaries of the outcomes of agents following specific policies in the environment. Affordances as perceived action possibilities with specific valence may be cast into predicted policy-relative goodness and modelled as GVFs. A systematic explication of this connection shows that GVFs and especially their deep learning embodiments (1) realize affordance prediction as a form of direct perception, (2) illuminate the fundamental connection between action and perception in affordance, and (3) offer a scalable way to learn affordances using RL methods. Through an extensive review of existing literature on GVF applications and representative affordance research in robotics, we demonstrate that GVFs provide the right framework for learning affordances in real-world applications. In addition, we highlight a few new avenues of research opened up by the perspective of "affordance as GVF", including using GVFs for orchestrating complex behaviors.
summary: General value functions (GVFs) in the reinforcement learning (RL) literature are long-term predictive summaries of the outcomes of agents following specific policies in the environment. Affordances as perceived action possibilities with specific valence may be cast into predicted policy-relative goodness and modelled as GVFs. A systematic explication of this connection shows that GVFs and especially their deep learning embodiments (1) realize affordance prediction as a form of direct perception, (2) illuminate the fundamental connection between action and perception in affordance, and (3) offer a scalable way to learn affordances using RL methods. Through an extensive review of existing literature on GVF applications and representative affordance research in robotics, we demonstrate that GVFs provide the right framework for learning affordances in real-world applications. In addition, we highlight a few new avenues of research opened up by the perspective of "affordance as GVF", including using GVFs for orchestrating complex behaviors.
abstract_zh: 强化学习 (RL) 文献中的通用价值函数 (GVF) 是对环境中遵循特定策略的智能体结果的长期预测总结。作为具有特定效价的感知行动可能性的可供性可以被转化为预测的政策相对良性并建模为 GVF。对这种联系的系统解释表明，GVF，尤其是它们的深度学习实施例（1）将可供性预测实现为直接感知的一种形式，（2）阐明了可供性中的行动和感知之间的基本联系，以及（3）提供了一种使用强化学习方法来学习可供性的可扩展方法。通过对 GVF 应用的现有文献和机器人领域代表性可供性研究的广泛回顾，我们证明 GVF 为在现实世界应用中学习可供性提供了正确的框架。此外，我们还重点介绍了“可供性作为 GVF”的视角开辟的一些新的研究途径，包括使用 GVF 来协调复杂的行为。

AI.tldr: 将可供性建模为一般价值函数（GVF），并探讨其在强化学习中的应用，以实现更高效的感知与动作协调。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在建模可供性时存在局限，而GVF能够提供更有效的框架来预测和学习可供性，从而提升机器人等领域的实际应用效果。
AI.method: 通过文献综述和理论分析，将可供性转化为GVF，并利用强化学习方法进行建模和验证。
AI.result: 证明GVF是学习可供性的有效框架，并指出其在复杂行为协调等新研究方向的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: GVF为可供性学习提供了理论基础和实践方法，未来可进一步探索其在复杂行为协调等领域的应用。

A systematic explication of this connection shows that GVFs and especially their deep learning embodiments (1) realize affordance prediction as a form of direct perception, (2) illuminate the fundamental connection between action and perception in affordance, and (3) offer a scalable way to learn affordances using RL methods. In addition, we highlight a few new avenues of research opened up by the perspective of "affordance as GVF", including using GVFs for orchestrating complex behaviors. 强化学习 (RL) 文献中的通用价值函数 (GVF) 是对环境中遵循特定策略的智能体结果的长期预测总结。作为具有特定效价的感知行动可能性的可供性可以被转化为预测的政策相对良性并建模为 GVF。对这种联系的系统解释表明，GVF，尤其是它们的深度学习实施例（1）将可供性预测实现为直接感知的一种形式，（2）阐明了可供性中的行动和感知之间的基本联系，以及（3）提供了一种使用强化学习方法来学习可供性的可扩展方法。通过对 GVF 应用的现有文献和机器人领域代表性可供性研究的广泛回顾，我们证明 GVF 为在现实世界应用中学习可供性提供了正确的框架。此外，我们还重点介绍了“可供性作为 GVF”的视角开辟的一些新的研究途径，包括使用 GVF 来协调复杂的行为。 将可供性建模为一般价值函数（GVF），并探讨其在强化学习中的应用，以实现更高效的感知与动作协调。 Daniel Graves,Johannes Günther,Jun Luo cs.AI

authors_text: Sundong Kim,Tung-Duong Mai,Sungwon Han,Sungwon Park,Thi Nguyen Duc Khanh,Jaechan So,Karandeep Singh,Meeyoung Cha
title: Active Learning for Human-in-the-Loop Customs Inspection
title_zh: 人在环海关检查的主动学习
comment: To Appear at IEEE TKDE
comments: To Appear at IEEE TKDE
abstract: We study the human-in-the-loop customs inspection scenario, where an AI-assisted algorithm supports customs officers by recommending a set of imported goods to be inspected. If the inspected items are fraudulent, the officers can levy extra duties. Th formed logs are then used as additional training data for successive iterations. Choosing to inspect suspicious items first leads to an immediate gain in customs revenue, yet such inspections may not bring new insights for learning dynamic traffic patterns. On the other hand, inspecting uncertain items can help acquire new knowledge, which will be used as a supplementary training resource to update the selection systems. Based on multiyear customs datasets obtained from three countries, we demonstrate that some degree of exploration is necessary to cope with domain shifts in trade data. The results show that a hybrid strategy of selecting likely fraudulent and uncertain items will eventually outperform the exploitation-only strategy.
summary: We study the human-in-the-loop customs inspection scenario, where an AI-assisted algorithm supports customs officers by recommending a set of imported goods to be inspected. If the inspected items are fraudulent, the officers can levy extra duties. Th formed logs are then used as additional training data for successive iterations. Choosing to inspect suspicious items first leads to an immediate gain in customs revenue, yet such inspections may not bring new insights for learning dynamic traffic patterns. On the other hand, inspecting uncertain items can help acquire new knowledge, which will be used as a supplementary training resource to update the selection systems. Based on multiyear customs datasets obtained from three countries, we demonstrate that some degree of exploration is necessary to cope with domain shifts in trade data. The results show that a hybrid strategy of selecting likely fraudulent and uncertain items will eventually outperform the exploitation-only strategy.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了人机循环海关检查场景，其中人工智能辅助算法通过推荐一组要检查的进口货物来为海关官员提供支持。如果检查的物品有欺诈行为，官员可以征收额外的关税。然后将形成的日志用作连续迭代的附加训练数据。选择首先检查可疑物品会立即增加海关收入，但此类检查可能不会为了解动态交通模式带来新的见解。另一方面，检查不确定的项目可以帮助获取新知识，这些新知识将用作更新选择系统的补充培训资源。根据从三个国家获得的多年海关数据集，我们证明有必要进行一定程度的探索来应对贸易数据的领域变化。结果表明，选择可能的欺诈性和不确定性项目的混合策略最终将优于仅利用策略。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在海关检查场景中结合人工智能与人工干预的主动学习方法，通过平衡对可疑物品的检查和对不确定物品的探索，优化海关收入与模型学习效果。
AI.motivation: 海关检查面临贸易数据动态变化的挑战，单纯依赖已知可疑物品的检查策略可能无法适应新出现的欺诈模式，需探索更有效的学习方法以提升检测能力。
AI.method: 提出一种混合策略，结合对高可能性欺诈物品的利用（exploitation）和对不确定物品的探索（exploration），利用多年多国海关数据验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，混合策略在应对贸易数据领域偏移时优于纯利用策略，探索不确定物品能补充新知识，提升模型适应性和检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 在海关检查中需平衡短期收益与长期学习，主动探索不确定物品有助于应对数据动态变化，提升AI辅助系统的整体效能。

authors_text: Dhruva Tirumala,Alexandre Galashov,Hyeonwoo Noh,Leonard Hasenclever,Razvan Pascanu,Jonathan Schwarz,Guillaume Desjardins,Wojciech Marian Czarnecki,Arun Ahuja,Yee Whye Teh,Nicolas Heess
title: Behavior Priors for Efficient Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 高效强化学习的行为先验
comment: Submitted to Journal of Machine Learning Research (JMLR)
comments: Submitted to Journal of Machine Learning Research (JMLR)
abstract: As we deploy reinforcement learning agents to solve increasingly challenging problems, methods that allow us to inject prior knowledge about the structure of the world and effective solution strategies becomes increasingly important. In this work we consider how information and architectural constraints can be combined with ideas from the probabilistic modeling literature to learn behavior priors that capture the common movement and interaction patterns that are shared across a set of related tasks or contexts. For example the day-to day behavior of humans comprises distinctive locomotion and manipulation patterns that recur across many different situations and goals. We discuss how such behavior patterns can be captured using probabilistic trajectory models and how these can be integrated effectively into reinforcement learning schemes, e.g.\ to facilitate multi-task and transfer learning. We then extend these ideas to latent variable models and consider a formulation to learn hierarchical priors that capture different aspects of the behavior in reusable modules. We discuss how such latent variable formulations connect to related work on hierarchical reinforcement learning (HRL) and mutual information and curiosity based objectives, thereby offering an alternative perspective on existing ideas. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework by applying it to a range of simulated continuous control domains.
summary: As we deploy reinforcement learning agents to solve increasingly challenging problems, methods that allow us to inject prior knowledge about the structure of the world and effective solution strategies becomes increasingly important. In this work we consider how information and architectural constraints can be combined with ideas from the probabilistic modeling literature to learn behavior priors that capture the common movement and interaction patterns that are shared across a set of related tasks or contexts. For example the day-to day behavior of humans comprises distinctive locomotion and manipulation patterns that recur across many different situations and goals. We discuss how such behavior patterns can be captured using probabilistic trajectory models and how these can be integrated effectively into reinforcement learning schemes, e.g.\ to facilitate multi-task and transfer learning. We then extend these ideas to latent variable models and consider a formulation to learn hierarchical priors that capture different aspects of the behavior in reusable modules. We discuss how such latent variable formulations connect to related work on hierarchical reinforcement learning (HRL) and mutual information and curiosity based objectives, thereby offering an alternative perspective on existing ideas. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework by applying it to a range of simulated continuous control domains.
abstract_zh: 当我们部署强化学习代理来解决日益具有挑战性的问题时，允许我们注入有关世界结构的先验知识和有效解决策略的方法变得越来越重要。在这项工作中，我们考虑如何将信息和架构约束与概率建模文献中的想法相结合，以学习行为先验，捕获在一组相关任务或上下文中共享的常见运动和交互模式。例如，人类的日常行为包括在许多不同的情况和目标中重复出现的独特的运动和操纵模式。我们讨论如何使用概率轨迹模型捕获此类行为模式，以及如何将它们有效地集成到强化学习方案中，例如促进多任务和迁移学习。然后，我们将这些想法扩展到潜在变量模型，并考虑一种公式来学习分层先验，以捕获可重用模块中行为的不同方面。我们讨论了这种潜在变量公式如何与分层强化学习（HRL）以及基于互信息和好奇心的目标的相关工作联系起来，从而为现有想法提供了另一种视角。我们通过将框架应用于一系列模拟连续控制域来证明其有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用行为先验知识提升强化学习效率的框架，通过捕捉跨任务的共性行为模式来优化学习过程。
AI.motivation: 随着强化学习代理面临的问题日益复杂，如何注入关于世界结构和有效策略的先验知识变得至关重要，传统方法难以高效利用跨任务的共性行为模式。
AI.method: 结合概率轨迹模型与潜在变量模型，构建分层行为先验，整合至强化学习框架中，支持多任务学习与知识迁移，并与分层强化学习及好奇心驱动目标建立联系。
AI.result: 该框架在多个模拟连续控制任务中验证有效，显著提升了学习效率与跨任务适应能力。
AI.conclusion: 行为先验为分层强化学习和好奇心驱动方法提供了新视角，通过结构化先验知识可有效提升复杂任务的学习效率。

authors_text: Junhao Liu,Linjun Shou,Jian Pei,Ming Gong,Min Yang,Daxin Jiang
title: Cross-lingual Machine Reading Comprehension with Language Branch Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 语言分支知识蒸馏的跨语言机器阅读理解
comment: Accepted as long paper in COLING 2020
comments: Accepted as long paper in COLING 2020
abstract: Cross-lingual Machine Reading Comprehension (CLMRC) remains a challenging problem due to the lack of large-scale annotated datasets in low-source languages, such as Arabic, Hindi, and Vietnamese. Many previous approaches use translation data by translating from a rich-source language, such as English, to low-source languages as auxiliary supervision. However, how to effectively leverage translation data and reduce the impact of noise introduced by translation remains onerous. In this paper, we tackle this challenge and enhance the cross-lingual transferring performance by a novel augmentation approach named Language Branch Machine Reading Comprehension (LBMRC). A language branch is a group of passages in one single language paired with questions in all target languages. We train multiple machine reading comprehension (MRC) models proficient in individual language based on LBMRC. Then, we devise a multilingual distillation approach to amalgamate knowledge from multiple language branch models to a single model for all target languages. Combining the LBMRC and multilingual distillation can be more robust to the data noises, therefore, improving the model's cross-lingual ability. Meanwhile, the produced single multilingual model is applicable to all target languages, which saves the cost of training, inference, and maintenance for multiple models. Extensive experiments on two CLMRC benchmarks clearly show the effectiveness of our proposed method.
summary: Cross-lingual Machine Reading Comprehension (CLMRC) remains a challenging problem due to the lack of large-scale annotated datasets in low-source languages, such as Arabic, Hindi, and Vietnamese. Many previous approaches use translation data by translating from a rich-source language, such as English, to low-source languages as auxiliary supervision. However, how to effectively leverage translation data and reduce the impact of noise introduced by translation remains onerous. In this paper, we tackle this challenge and enhance the cross-lingual transferring performance by a novel augmentation approach named Language Branch Machine Reading Comprehension (LBMRC). A language branch is a group of passages in one single language paired with questions in all target languages. We train multiple machine reading comprehension (MRC) models proficient in individual language based on LBMRC. Then, we devise a multilingual distillation approach to amalgamate knowledge from multiple language branch models to a single model for all target languages. Combining the LBMRC and multilingual distillation can be more robust to the data noises, therefore, improving the model's cross-lingual ability. Meanwhile, the produced single multilingual model is applicable to all target languages, which saves the cost of training, inference, and maintenance for multiple models. Extensive experiments on two CLMRC benchmarks clearly show the effectiveness of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 由于缺乏阿拉伯语、印地语和越南语等低源语言的大规模注释数据集，跨语言机器阅读理解（CLMRC）仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。以前的许多方法通过从丰富的源语言（例如英语）翻译到低源语言来使用翻译数据作为辅助监督。然而，如何有效利用翻译数据并减少翻译引入的噪声影响仍然是一个艰巨的任务。在本文中，我们通过一种名为语言分支机器阅读理解（LBMRC）的新型增强方法来应对这一挑战并增强跨语言传输性能。语言分支是一种单一语言的一组段落，与所有目标语言的问题配对。我们基于 LBMRC 训练多种精通个体语言的机器阅读理解（MRC）模型。然后，我们设计了一种多语言蒸馏方法，将来自多个语言分支模型的知识合并为所有目标语言的单个模型。将LBMRC和多语言蒸馏结合起来可以对数据噪声更加鲁棒，从而提高模型的跨语言能力。同时，生成的单一多语言模型适用于所有目标语言，节省了多个模型的训练、推理和维护成本。对两个 CLMRC 基准的大量实验清楚地表明了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨语言机器阅读理解方法，通过语言分支知识蒸馏解决低资源语言数据不足及翻译噪声问题。
AI.motivation: 低资源语言缺乏大规模标注数据，依赖翻译数据易受噪声影响，现有方法难以有效提升跨语言模型性能。
AI.method: 构建语言分支（单语段落配多语言问题），训练多语言模型后通过知识蒸馏融合为单一多语言模型。
AI.result: 在两个跨语言阅读理解基准测试中显著提升模型性能，验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过减少翻译噪声影响并降低多模型维护成本，有效提升跨语言迁移能力。

search_text: Cross-lingual Machine Reading Comprehension with Language Branch Knowledge Distillation 语言分支知识蒸馏的跨语言机器阅读理解 Cross-lingual Machine Reading Comprehension (CLMRC) remains a challenging problem due to the lack of large-scale annotated datasets in low-source languages, such as Arabic, Hindi, and Vietnamese. Many previous approaches use translation data by translating from a rich-source language, such as English, to low-source languages as auxiliary supervision. However, how to effectively leverage translation data and reduce the impact of noise introduced by translation remains onerous. In this paper, we tackle this challenge and enhance the cross-lingual transferring performance by a novel augmentation approach named Language Branch Machine Reading Comprehension (LBMRC). A language branch is a group of passages in one single language paired with questions in all target languages. We train multiple machine reading comprehension (MRC) models proficient in individual language based on LBMRC. Then, we devise a multilingual distillation approach to amalgamate knowledge from multiple language branch models to a single model for all target languages. Combining the LBMRC and multilingual distillation can be more robust to the data noises, therefore, improving the model's cross-lingual ability. Meanwhile, the produced single multilingual model is applicable to all target languages, which saves the cost of training, inference, and maintenance for multiple models. Extensive experiments on two CLMRC benchmarks clearly show the effectiveness of our proposed method. 由于缺乏阿拉伯语、印地语和越南语等低源语言的大规模注释数据集，跨语言机器阅读理解（CLMRC）仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。以前的许多方法通过从丰富的源语言（例如英语）翻译到低源语言来使用翻译数据作为辅助监督。然而，如何有效利用翻译数据并减少翻译引入的噪声影响仍然是一个艰巨的任务。在本文中，我们通过一种名为语言分支机器阅读理解（LBMRC）的新型增强方法来应对这一挑战并增强跨语言传输性能。语言分支是一种单一语言的一组段落，与所有目标语言的问题配对。我们基于 LBMRC 训练多种精通个体语言的机器阅读理解（MRC）模型。然后，我们设计了一种多语言蒸馏方法，将来自多个语言分支模型的知识合并为所有目标语言的单个模型。将LBMRC和多语言蒸馏结合起来可以对数据噪声更加鲁棒，从而提高模型的跨语言能力。同时，生成的单一多语言模型适用于所有目标语言，节省了多个模型的训练、推理和维护成本。对两个 CLMRC 基准的大量实验清楚地表明了我们提出的方法的有效性。 本文提出一种跨语言机器阅读理解方法，通过语言分支知识蒸馏解决低资源语言数据不足及翻译噪声问题。 Junhao Liu,Linjun Shou,Jian Pei,Ming Gong,Min Yang,Daxin Jiang cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Hao Ma,Jingbin Liu,Zhirong Hu,Hongyu Qiu,Dong Xu,Zemin Wang,Xiaodong Gong,Sheng Yang
title: A Method of Generating Measurable Panoramic Image for Indoor Mobile Measurement System
title_zh: 室内移动测量系统可测量全景图像的生成方法
abstract: This paper designs a technique route to generate high-quality panoramic image with depth information, which involves two critical research hotspots: fusion of LiDAR and image data and image stitching. For the fusion of 3D points and image data, since a sparse depth map can be firstly generated by projecting LiDAR point onto the RGB image plane based on our reliable calibrated and synchronized sensors, we adopt a parameter self-adaptive framework to produce 2D dense depth map. For image stitching, optimal seamline for the overlapping area is searched using a graph-cuts-based method to alleviate the geometric influence and image blending based on the pyramid multi-band is utilized to eliminate the photometric effects near the stitching line. Since each pixel is associated with a depth value, we design this depth value as a radius in the spherical projection which can further project the panoramic image to the world coordinate and consequently produces a high-quality measurable panoramic image. The purposed method is tested on the data from our data collection platform and presents a satisfactory application prospects.
summary: This paper designs a technique route to generate high-quality panoramic image with depth information, which involves two critical research hotspots: fusion of LiDAR and image data and image stitching. For the fusion of 3D points and image data, since a sparse depth map can be firstly generated by projecting LiDAR point onto the RGB image plane based on our reliable calibrated and synchronized sensors, we adopt a parameter self-adaptive framework to produce 2D dense depth map. For image stitching, optimal seamline for the overlapping area is searched using a graph-cuts-based method to alleviate the geometric influence and image blending based on the pyramid multi-band is utilized to eliminate the photometric effects near the stitching line. Since each pixel is associated with a depth value, we design this depth value as a radius in the spherical projection which can further project the panoramic image to the world coordinate and consequently produces a high-quality measurable panoramic image. The purposed method is tested on the data from our data collection platform and presents a satisfactory application prospects.
abstract_zh: 本文设计了一种生成具有深度信息的高质量全景图像的技术路线，其中涉及两个关键的研究热点：激光雷达与图像数据的融合以及图像拼接。对于3D点和图像数据的融合，由于首先可以通过基于可靠的校准和同步传感器将LiDAR点投影到RGB图像平面上来生成稀疏深度图，因此我们采用参数自适应框架来生成2D密集深度图。对于图像拼接，使用基于图割的方法搜索重叠区域的最佳接缝线以减轻几何影响，并利用基于金字塔多波段的图像混合来消除拼接线附近的光度影响。由于每个像素都与一个深度值相关联，因此我们将这个深度值设计为球面投影中的半径，这可以进一步将全景图像投影到世界坐标，从而产生高质量的可测量全景图像。所提出的方法在我们的数据收集平台上的数据上进行了测试，并呈现出令人满意的应用前景。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种生成高质量可测量全景图像的技术路线，结合LiDAR与图像数据融合及图像拼接方法。
AI.motivation: 现有室内移动测量系统在生成带深度信息的全景图像时，存在几何畸变和光度不连续等问题，需提升图像质量与可测量性。
AI.method: 通过校准同步传感器投影LiDAR点生成稀疏深度图，并采用自适应参数框架生成密集深度图；利用图割法优化拼接接缝线，结合金字塔多频带混合消除光度影响；最终以深度值为半径进行球面投影，映射至世界坐标系生成全景图像。
AI.result: 方法在自有数据集上测试验证，生成的全景图像质量高且具备可测量性，应用前景良好。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法有效融合LiDAR与图像数据，解决了深度信息生成与图像拼接难题，为室内移动测量系统提供了高质量全景图像生成方案。

For the fusion of 3D points and image data, since a sparse depth map can be firstly generated by projecting LiDAR point onto the RGB image plane based on our reliable calibrated and synchronized sensors, we adopt a parameter self-adaptive framework to produce 2D dense depth map. title: Leveraging speaker attribute information using multi task learning for speaker verification and diarization
title_zh: 利用多任务学习的说话人属性信息进行说话人验证和分类
comment: Submitted to Interspeech 2021
comments: Submitted to Interspeech 2021
abstract: Deep speaker embeddings have become the leading method for encoding speaker identity in speaker recognition tasks. The embedding space should ideally capture the variations between all possible speakers, encoding the multiple acoustic aspects that make up a speaker's identity, whilst being robust to non-speaker acoustic variation. Deep speaker embeddings are normally trained discriminatively, predicting speaker identity labels on the training data. We hypothesise that additionally predicting speaker-related auxiliary variables -- such as age and nationality -- may yield representations that are better able to generalise to unseen speakers. We propose a framework for making use of auxiliary label information, even when it is only available for speech corpora mismatched to the target application. On a test set of US Supreme Court recordings, we show that by leveraging two additional forms of speaker attribute information derived respectively from the matched training data, and VoxCeleb corpus, we improve the performance of our deep speaker embeddings for both verification and diarization tasks, achieving a relative improvement of 26.2% in DER and 6.7% in EER compared to baselines using speaker labels only. This improvement is obtained despite the auxiliary labels having been scraped from the web and being potentially noisy.
summary: Deep speaker embeddings have become the leading method for encoding speaker identity in speaker recognition tasks. The embedding space should ideally capture the variations between all possible speakers, encoding the multiple acoustic aspects that make up a speaker's identity, whilst being robust to non-speaker acoustic variation. Deep speaker embeddings are normally trained discriminatively, predicting speaker identity labels on the training data. We hypothesise that additionally predicting speaker-related auxiliary variables -- such as age and nationality -- may yield representations that are better able to generalise to unseen speakers. We propose a framework for making use of auxiliary label information, even when it is only available for speech corpora mismatched to the target application. On a test set of US Supreme Court recordings, we show that by leveraging two additional forms of speaker attribute information derived respectively from the matched training data, and VoxCeleb corpus, we improve the performance of our deep speaker embeddings for both verification and diarization tasks, achieving a relative improvement of 26.2% in DER and 6.7% in EER compared to baselines using speaker labels only. This improvement is obtained despite the auxiliary labels having been scraped from the web and being potentially noisy.
abstract_zh: 深度说话人嵌入已成为说话人识别任务中编码说话人身份的主要方法。理想情况下，嵌入空间应捕获所有可能说话者之间的变化，对构成说话者身份的多个声学方面进行编码，同时对非说话者声学变化具有鲁棒性。深度说话者嵌入通常是有区别地训练的，预测训练数据上的说话者身份标签。我们假设，额外预测与说话者相关的辅助变量（例如年龄和国籍）可能会产生能够更好地推广到未见过的说话者的表示。我们提出了一个利用辅助标签信息的框架，即使它仅适用于与目标应用程序不匹配的语音语料库。在美国最高法院录音的测试集上，我们表明，通过利用分别从匹配的训练数据和 VoxCeleb 语料库中派生的两种附加形式的说话人属性信息，我们提高了深度说话人嵌入在验证和分类任务中的性能，与仅使用说话人标签的基线相比，DER 相对提高了 26.2%，EER 提高了 6.7%。尽管辅助标签已从卷材上刮掉并且可能有噪音，但仍然获得了这种改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用多任务学习框架，通过引入与说话人相关的辅助属性信息（如年龄和国籍），来改进说话人验证和说话人分割任务中的深度说话人嵌入。
AI.motivation: 深度说话人嵌入通常仅基于说话人标签进行训练，而无法充分捕捉说话人身份的多样性。引入辅助属性信息可能有助于提高嵌入表示的泛化能力。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种多任务学习框架，通过在训练过程中同时预测说话人身份和辅助属性（如年龄和国籍），即使这些属性信息来自与目标应用不匹配的语料库，也能有效利用这些信息。
AI.result: 在US最高法院录音数据集上的实验表明，通过引入两种辅助属性信息，分别来自匹配训练数据和VoxCeleb语料库，说话人验证和分割任务的性能分别提升了6.7%和26.2%。
AI.conclusion: 引入辅助属性信息可以显著提升深度说话人嵌入的性能，即使这些信息可能包含噪声，也能带来有效的改进。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用多任务学习框架，通过引入与说话人相关的辅助属性信息（如年龄和国籍），来改进说话人验证和说话人分割任务中的深度说话人嵌入。

search_text: Leveraging speaker attribute information using multi task learning for speaker verification and diarization 利用多任务学习的说话人属性信息进行说话人验证和分类 Deep speaker embeddings have become the leading method for encoding speaker identity in speaker recognition tasks. The embedding space should ideally capture the variations between all possible speakers, encoding the multiple acoustic aspects that make up a speaker's identity, whilst being robust to non-speaker acoustic variation. Deep speaker embeddings are normally trained discriminatively, predicting speaker identity labels on the training data. We hypothesise that additionally predicting speaker-related auxiliary variables -- such as age and nationality -- may yield representations that are better able to generalise to unseen speakers. We propose a framework for making use of auxiliary label information, even when it is only available for speech corpora mismatched to the target application. On a test set of US Supreme Court recordings, we show that by leveraging two additional forms of speaker attribute information derived respectively from the matched training data, and VoxCeleb corpus, we improve the performance of our deep speaker embeddings for both verification and diarization tasks, achieving a relative improvement of 26.2% in DER and 6.7% in EER compared to baselines using speaker labels only. This improvement is obtained despite the auxiliary labels having been scraped from the web and being potentially noisy. 深度说话人嵌入已成为说话人识别任务中编码说话人身份的主要方法。理想情况下，嵌入空间应捕获所有可能说话者之间的变化，对构成说话者身份的多个声学方面进行编码，同时对非说话者声学变化具有鲁棒性。深度说话者嵌入通常是有区别地训练的，预测训练数据上的说话者身份标签。我们假设，额外预测与说话者相关的辅助变量（例如年龄和国籍）可能会产生能够更好地推广到未见过的说话者的表示。我们提出了一个利用辅助标签信息的框架，即使它仅适用于与目标应用程序不匹配的语音语料库。在美国最高法院录音的测试集上，我们表明，通过利用分别从匹配的训练数据和 VoxCeleb 语料库中派生的两种附加形式的说话人属性信息，我们提高了深度说话人嵌入在验证和分类任务中的性能，与仅使用说话人标签的基线相比，DER 相对提高了 26.2%，EER 提高了 6.7%。尽管辅助标签已从卷材上刮掉并且可能有噪音，但仍然获得了这种改进。 本文提出了一种利用多任务学习框架，通过引入与说话人相关的辅助属性信息（如年龄和国籍），来改进说话人验证和说话人分割任务中的深度说话人嵌入。 Chau Luu,Peter Bell,Steve Renals cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Song-Lu Chen,Shu Tian,Jia-Wei Ma,Qi Liu,Chun Yang,Feng Chen,Xu-Cheng Yin
title: End-to-end trainable network for degraded license plate detection via vehicle-plate relation mining
title_zh: 通过车牌关系挖掘进行退化车牌检测的端到端可训练网络
abstract: License plate detection is the first and essential step of the license plate recognition system and is still challenging in real applications, such as on-road scenarios. In particular, small-sized and oblique license plates, mainly caused by the distant and mobile camera, are difficult to detect. In this work, we propose a novel and applicable method for degraded license plate detection via vehicle-plate relation mining, which localizes the license plate in a coarse-to-fine scheme. First, we propose to estimate the local region around the license plate by using the relationships between the vehicle and the license plate, which can greatly reduce the search area and precisely detect very small-sized license plates. Second, we propose to predict the quadrilateral bounding box in the local region by regressing the four corners of the license plate to robustly detect oblique license plates. Moreover, the whole network can be trained in an end-to-end manner. Extensive experiments verify the effectiveness of our proposed method for small-sized and oblique license plates. Codes are available at https://github.com/chensonglu/LPD-end-to-end.
summary: License plate detection is the first and essential step of the license plate recognition system and is still challenging in real applications, such as on-road scenarios. In particular, small-sized and oblique license plates, mainly caused by the distant and mobile camera, are difficult to detect. In this work, we propose a novel and applicable method for degraded license plate detection via vehicle-plate relation mining, which localizes the license plate in a coarse-to-fine scheme. First, we propose to estimate the local region around the license plate by using the relationships between the vehicle and the license plate, which can greatly reduce the search area and precisely detect very small-sized license plates. Second, we propose to predict the quadrilateral bounding box in the local region by regressing the four corners of the license plate to robustly detect oblique license plates. Moreover, the whole network can be trained in an end-to-end manner. Extensive experiments verify the effectiveness of our proposed method for small-sized and oblique license plates. Codes are available at https://github.com/chensonglu/LPD-end-to-end.
abstract_zh: 车牌检测是车牌识别系统的第一步，也是必不可少的一步，在实际应用中（例如道路场景）仍然具有挑战性。特别是小尺寸和倾斜的车牌，主要是由于摄像头距离较远和移动造成的，很难检测到。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种通过车牌关系挖掘进行退化车牌检测的新颖且适用的方法，该方法以从粗到细的方案定位车牌。首先，我们提出利用车辆和车牌之间的关系来估计车牌周围的局部区域，这可以大大减少搜索区域并精确检测非常小的车牌。其次，我们建议通过对车牌的四个角进行回归来预测局部区域的四边形边界框，以稳健地检测倾斜车牌。此外，整个网络可以以端到端的方式进行训练。大量的实验验证了我们提出的方法对于小尺寸和倾斜车牌的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/chensonglu/LPD-end-to-end 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过车辆-车牌关系挖掘的端到端可训练网络，用于解决复杂场景下小尺寸和倾斜车牌检测难题。
AI.motivation: 现有车牌检测方法在远距离或移动摄像头场景中难以准确检测小尺寸和倾斜车牌，亟需通过车辆与车牌的空间关系提升检测精度。
AI.method: 采用粗到细的两阶段检测方案：1）利用车辆-车牌关系定位车牌粗略区域；2）通过回归车牌四角坐标生成四边形边界框，结合端到端训练框架实现精准检测。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法在小尺寸和倾斜车牌检测任务中优于现有方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过挖掘车辆与车牌的关联性并结合端到端训练，有效提升了复杂场景下车牌检测的鲁棒性与准确性。

title: A Weaker Faithfulness Assumption based on Triple Interactions
title_zh: 基于三重相互作用的较弱忠实假设
comment: Accepted for the 37th Conference on Uncertainty in Artificial Intelligence (UAI 2021)
comments: Accepted for the 37th Conference on Uncertainty in Artificial Intelligence (UAI 2021)
abstract: One of the core assumptions in causal discovery is the faithfulness assumption, i.e., assuming that independencies found in the data are due to separations in the true causal graph. This assumption can, however, be violated in many ways, including xor connections, deterministic functions or cancelling paths. In this work, we propose a weaker assumption that we call $2$-adjacency faithfulness. In contrast to adjacency faithfulness, which assumes that there is no conditional independence between each pair of variables that are connected in the causal graph, we only require no conditional independence between a node and a subset of its Markov blanket that can contain up to two nodes. Equivalently, we adapt orientation faithfulness to this setting. We further propose a sound orientation rule for causal discovery that applies under weaker assumptions. As a proof of concept, we derive a modified Grow and Shrink algorithm that recovers the Markov blanket of a target node and prove its correctness under strictly weaker assumptions than the standard faithfulness assumption.
summary: One of the core assumptions in causal discovery is the faithfulness assumption, i.e., assuming that independencies found in the data are due to separations in the true causal graph. This assumption can, however, be violated in many ways, including xor connections, deterministic functions or cancelling paths. In this work, we propose a weaker assumption that we call $2$-adjacency faithfulness. In contrast to adjacency faithfulness, which assumes that there is no conditional independence between each pair of variables that are connected in the causal graph, we only require no conditional independence between a node and a subset of its Markov blanket that can contain up to two nodes. Equivalently, we adapt orientation faithfulness to this setting. We further propose a sound orientation rule for causal discovery that applies under weaker assumptions. As a proof of concept, we derive a modified Grow and Shrink algorithm that recovers the Markov blanket of a target node and prove its correctness under strictly weaker assumptions than the standard faithfulness assumption.
abstract_zh: 因果发现的核心假设之一是忠实性假设，即假设数据中发现的独立性是由于真实因果图中的分离造成的。然而，这一假设可能在很多方面被违反，包括异或连接、确定性函数或取消路径。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个较弱的假设，称为 $2$-邻接忠诚度。与邻接忠实性相反，邻接忠实性假设因果图中连接的每对变量之间不存在条件独立性，我们只要求节点与其马尔可夫毯子集（最多可以包含两个节点）之间没有条件独立性。同样，我们使方向忠实度适应这种设置。我们进一步提出了适用于较弱假设的因果发现的合理定位规则。作为概念证明，我们推导了一种改进的增长和收缩算法，该算法可以恢复目标节点的马尔可夫覆盖层，并在比标准忠实性假设严格弱的假设下证明其正确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于三元交互的较弱忠实性假设，用于改进因果发现中的条件独立性判断方法。
AI.motivation: 传统忠实性假设在存在异或连接、确定性函数或抵消路径时易被违反，导致因果图学习失效，需放宽假设条件。
AI.method: 提出2-邻接忠实性假设，仅要求节点与其马尔可夫毯中最多两个节点无条件独立，并设计适应该假设的定向规则与改进的Grow-Shrink算法。
AI.result: 证明改进算法在严格弱于标准忠实性假设的条件下可正确恢复目标节点的马尔可夫毯。
AI.conclusion: 通过放松忠实性假设条件，提升了因果发现方法在复杂数据场景下的鲁棒性与适用性。

motivation: 传统忠实性假设在存在异或连接、确定性函数或抵消路径时易被违反，导致因果图学习失效，需放宽假设条件。
method: 提出2-邻接忠实性假设，仅要求节点与其马尔可夫毯中最多两个节点无条件独立，并设计适应该假设的定向规则与改进的Grow-Shrink算法。
result: 证明改进算法在严格弱于标准忠实性假设的条件下可正确恢复目标节点的马尔可夫毯。
conclusion: 通过放松忠实性假设条件，提升了因果发现方法在复杂数据场景下的鲁棒性与适用性。
search_text: A Weaker Faithfulness Assumption based on Triple Interactions 基于三重相互作用的较弱忠实假设 One of the core assumptions in causal discovery is the faithfulness assumption, i.e., assuming that independencies found in the data are due to separations in the true causal graph. This assumption can, however, be violated in many ways, including xor connections, deterministic functions or cancelling paths. In this work, we propose a weaker assumption that we call $2$-adjacency faithfulness. In contrast to adjacency faithfulness, which assumes that there is no conditional independence between each pair of variables that are connected in the causal graph, we only require no conditional independence between a node and a subset of its Markov blanket that can contain up to two nodes. Equivalently, we adapt orientation faithfulness to this setting. We further propose a sound orientation rule for causal discovery that applies under weaker assumptions. As a proof of concept, we derive a modified Grow and Shrink algorithm that recovers the Markov blanket of a target node and prove its correctness under strictly weaker assumptions than the standard faithfulness assumption. 因果发现的核心假设之一是忠实性假设，即假设数据中发现的独立性是由于真实因果图中的分离造成的。然而，这一假设可能在很多方面被违反，包括异或连接、确定性函数或取消路径。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个较弱的假设，称为 $2$-邻接忠诚度。与邻接忠实性相反，邻接忠实性假设因果图中连接的每对变量之间不存在条件独立性，我们只要求节点与其马尔可夫毯子集（最多可以包含两个节点）之间没有条件独立性。同样，我们使方向忠实度适应这种设置。我们进一步提出了适用于较弱假设的因果发现的合理定位规则。作为概念证明，我们推导了一种改进的增长和收缩算法，该算法可以恢复目标节点的马尔可夫覆盖层，并在比标准忠实性假设严格弱的假设下证明其正确性。 本文提出一种基于三元交互的较弱忠实性假设，用于改进因果发现中的条件独立性判断方法。 Alexander Marx,Arthur Gretton,Joris M. Mooij stat.ML,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Hao Ma,Jingbin Liu,Keke Liu,Hongyu Qiu,Dong Xu,Zemin Wang,Xiaodong Gong,Sheng Yang
title: A Simple and Efficient Registration of 3D Point Cloud and Image Data for Indoor Mobile Mapping System
title_zh: 用于室内移动测绘系统的 3D 点云和图像数据简单高效的配准
abstract: Registration of 3D LiDAR point clouds with optical images is critical in the combination of multi-source data. Geometric misalignment originally exists in the pose data between LiDAR point clouds and optical images. To improve the accuracy of the initial pose and the applicability of the integration of 3D points and image data, we develop a simple but efficient registration method. We firstly extract point features from LiDAR point clouds and images: point features is extracted from single-frame LiDAR and point features from images using classical Canny method. Cost map is subsequently built based on Canny image edge detection. The optimization direction is guided by the cost map where low cost represents the the desired direction, and loss function is also considered to improve the robustness of the the purposed method. Experiments show pleasant results.
summary: Registration of 3D LiDAR point clouds with optical images is critical in the combination of multi-source data. Geometric misalignment originally exists in the pose data between LiDAR point clouds and optical images. To improve the accuracy of the initial pose and the applicability of the integration of 3D points and image data, we develop a simple but efficient registration method. We firstly extract point features from LiDAR point clouds and images: point features is extracted from single-frame LiDAR and point features from images using classical Canny method. Cost map is subsequently built based on Canny image edge detection. The optimization direction is guided by the cost map where low cost represents the the desired direction, and loss function is also considered to improve the robustness of the the purposed method. Experiments show pleasant results.
abstract_zh: 3D LiDAR 点云与光学图像的配准对于多源数据的组合至关重要。几何错位最初存在于激光雷达点云和光学图像之间的位姿数据中。为了提高初始位姿的准确性以及 3D 点和图像数据集成的适用性，我们开发了一种简单但有效的配准方法。我们首先从LiDAR点云和图像中提取点特征：使用经典的Canny方法从单帧LiDAR中提取点特征，从图像中提取点特征。随后基于 Canny 图像边缘检测构建成本图。优化方向由成本图引导，其中低成本代表期望的方向，并且还考虑损失函数以提高目标方法的鲁棒性。实验显示出令人愉快的结果。

AI.tldr: 提出一种简单高效的3D点云与图像配准方法，用于室内移动测绘系统
AI.motivation: 多源数据融合需解决LiDAR点云与光学图像间的几何错位问题，现有方法存在初始姿态精度不足和适用性差的缺陷
AI.method: 提取LiDAR点云单帧特征与图像Canny边缘特征，构建代价图引导优化方向并结合损失函数提升鲁棒性
AI.result: 实验验证了方法在配准精度和鲁棒性方面的有效性
AI.conclusion: 该方法为室内移动测绘系统中多源数据融合提供了简单高效的解决方案

title: Concentric mixtures of Mallows models for top-$k$ rankings: sampling and identifiability
title_zh: 用于 top-$k$ 排名的 Mallows 模型的同心混合：采样和可识别性
abstract: In this paper, we consider mixtures of two Mallows models for top-$k$ rankings, both with the same location parameter but with different scale parameters, i.e., a mixture of concentric Mallows models. This situation arises when we have a heterogeneous population of voters formed by two homogeneous populations, one of which is a subpopulation of expert voters while the other includes the non-expert voters. We propose efficient sampling algorithms for Mallows top-$k$ rankings. We show the identifiability of both components, and the learnability of their respective parameters in this setting by, first, bounding the sample complexity for the Borda algorithm with top-$k$ rankings and second, proposing polynomial time algorithm for the separation of the rankings in each component. Finally, since the rank aggregation will suffer from a large amount of noise introduced by the non-expert voters, we adapt the Borda algorithm to be able to recover the ground truth consensus ranking which is especially consistent with the expert rankings.
summary: In this paper, we consider mixtures of two Mallows models for top-$k$ rankings, both with the same location parameter but with different scale parameters, i.e., a mixture of concentric Mallows models. This situation arises when we have a heterogeneous population of voters formed by two homogeneous populations, one of which is a subpopulation of expert voters while the other includes the non-expert voters. We propose efficient sampling algorithms for Mallows top-$k$ rankings. We show the identifiability of both components, and the learnability of their respective parameters in this setting by, first, bounding the sample complexity for the Borda algorithm with top-$k$ rankings and second, proposing polynomial time algorithm for the separation of the rankings in each component. Finally, since the rank aggregation will suffer from a large amount of noise introduced by the non-expert voters, we adapt the Borda algorithm to be able to recover the ground truth consensus ranking which is especially consistent with the expert rankings.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑两种 Mallows 模型的混合用于 top-$k$ 排名，两者都具有相同的位置参数但具有不同的尺度参数，即同心 Mallows 模型的混合。当我们有由两个同质群体组成的异质选民群体时，就会出现这种情况，其中一个是专家选民的子群体，而另一个包括非专家选民。我们为 Mallows top-$k$ 排名提出了有效的采样算法。我们展示了两个组件的可识别性，以及在此设置中它们各自参数的可学习性，首先，将 Borda 算法的样本复杂性限制在 top-$k$ 排名上，其次，提出多项式时间算法来分离每个组件中的排名。最后，由于排名聚合会受到非专家投票者引入的大量噪声的影响，因此我们采用 Borda 算法，使其能够恢复与专家排名特别一致的地面真实共识排名。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了用于top-k排序的同心Mallows模型混合，提出采样算法并证明其可识别性。
AI.motivation: 在存在专家和非专家异质投票者的情况下，传统排序方法易受噪声影响，需区分不同群体以恢复真实共识排序。
AI.method: 提出高效采样算法，结合Borda算法的样本复杂度分析及多项式时间分离算法，适应top-k排名的混合模型。
AI.result: 证明了混合成分的可识别性与参数可学习性，提出抗噪声的Borda算法改进方案以恢复专家共识排序。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效分离异质群体，即使非专家噪声存在，仍能准确恢复专家群体的真实排序共识。

title: Physics-Based Deep Learning for Fiber-Optic Communication Systems
title_zh: 用于光纤通信系统的基于物理的深度学习
comment: 15 pages, 11 figures, submitted to IEEE J. Sel. Areas Commun., code available at https://github.com/chaeger/LDBP, extension of arXiv:1710.06234(1), arXiv:1804.02799(1), arXiv:1901.07592(2)
comments: 15 pages, 11 figures, submitted to IEEE J. Sel. Areas Commun., code available at https://github.com/chaeger/LDBP, extension of arXiv:1710.06234(1), arXiv:1804.02799(1), arXiv:1901.07592(2)
abstract: We propose a new machine-learning approach for fiber-optic communication systems whose signal propagation is governed by the nonlinear Schrödinger equation (NLSE). Our main observation is that the popular split-step method (SSM) for numerically solving the NLSE has essentially the same functional form as a deep multi-layer neural network; in both cases, one alternates linear steps and pointwise nonlinearities. We exploit this connection by parameterizing the SSM and viewing the linear steps as general linear functions, similar to the weight matrices in a neural network. The resulting physics-based machine-learning model has several advantages over "black-box" function approximators. For example, it allows us to examine and interpret the learned solutions in order to understand why they perform well. As an application, low-complexity nonlinear equalization is considered, where the task is to efficiently invert the NLSE. This is commonly referred to as digital backpropagation (DBP). Rather than employing neural networks, the proposed algorithm, dubbed learned DBP (LDBP), uses the physics-based model with trainable filters in each step and its complexity is reduced by progressively pruning filter taps during gradient descent. Our main finding is that the filters can be pruned to remarkably short lengths-as few as 3 taps/step-without sacrificing performance. As a result, the complexity can be reduced by orders of magnitude in comparison to prior work. By inspecting the filter responses, an additional theoretical justification for the learned parameter configurations is provided. Our work illustrates that combining data-driven optimization with existing domain knowledge can generate new insights into old communications problems.
summary: We propose a new machine-learning approach for fiber-optic communication systems whose signal propagation is governed by the nonlinear Schrödinger equation (NLSE). Our main observation is that the popular split-step method (SSM) for numerically solving the NLSE has essentially the same functional form as a deep multi-layer neural network; in both cases, one alternates linear steps and pointwise nonlinearities. We exploit this connection by parameterizing the SSM and viewing the linear steps as general linear functions, similar to the weight matrices in a neural network. The resulting physics-based machine-learning model has several advantages over "black-box" function approximators. For example, it allows us to examine and interpret the learned solutions in order to understand why they perform well. As an application, low-complexity nonlinear equalization is considered, where the task is to efficiently invert the NLSE. This is commonly referred to as digital backpropagation (DBP). Rather than employing neural networks, the proposed algorithm, dubbed learned DBP (LDBP), uses the physics-based model with trainable filters in each step and its complexity is reduced by progressively pruning filter taps during gradient descent. Our main finding is that the filters can be pruned to remarkably short lengths-as few as 3 taps/step-without sacrificing performance. As a result, the complexity can be reduced by orders of magnitude in comparison to prior work. By inspecting the filter responses, an additional theoretical justification for the learned parameter configurations is provided. Our work illustrates that combining data-driven optimization with existing domain knowledge can generate new insights into old communications problems.
abstract_zh: 我们为光纤通信系统提出了一种新的机器学习方法，其信号传播由非线性薛定谔方程（NLSE）控制。我们的主要观察是，用于数值求解 NLSE 的流行分步方法（SSM）与深度多层神经网络具有本质上相同的功能形式；在这两种情况下，线性步骤和逐点非线性交替出现。我们通过参数化 SSM 并将线性步骤视为一般线性函数（类似于神经网络中的权重矩阵）来利用这种联系。由此产生的基于物理的机器学习模型比“黑盒”函数逼近器具有多个优点。例如，它允许我们检查和解释学到的解决方案，以了解它们为何表现良好。作为一种应用，考虑低复杂度非线性均衡，其任务是有效地反转 NLSE。这通常称为数字反向传播（DBP）。所提出的被称为学习 DBP (LDBP) 的算法没有采用神经网络，而是使用基于物理的模型，在每个步骤中都具有可训练的滤波器，并且通过在梯度下降期间逐步修剪滤波器抽头来降低其复杂性。我们的主要发现是，可以将滤波器修剪到非常短的长度（每步只需 3 个抽头），而不会牺牲性能。因此，与之前的工作相比，复杂性可以降低几个数量级。通过检查滤波器响应，为学习到的参数配置提供了额外的理论依据。我们的工作表明，将数据驱动的优化与现有领域知识相结合可以产生对旧通信问题的新见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于物理的深度学习方法，通过参数化分裂步法（SSM）解决光纤通信系统中的非线性薛定谔方程（NLSE），并应用于高效非线性均衡。
AI.motivation: 传统数字反向传播（DBP）方法复杂度高，而黑盒模型缺乏可解释性。本文旨在结合物理模型与数据驱动优化，提升性能并降低计算复杂度。
AI.method: 将SSM的线性步骤视为通用线性函数（类似神经网络权重），通过训练可学习的滤波器实现非线性均衡，并在梯度下降过程中逐步裁剪滤波器长度。
AI.result: 滤波器长度可缩减至每步仅3个抽头，复杂度较现有方法降低多个数量级，同时保持性能；通过滤波器响应提供了理论解释。
AI.conclusion: 融合数据驱动优化与领域知识可为传统通信问题提供新见解，推动高效物理感知机器学习模型的发展。

search_text: Physics-Based Deep Learning for Fiber-Optic Communication Systems 用于光纤通信系统的基于物理的深度学习 We propose a new machine-learning approach for fiber-optic communication systems whose signal propagation is governed by the nonlinear Schrödinger equation (NLSE). Our main observation is that the popular split-step method (SSM) for numerically solving the NLSE has essentially the same functional form as a deep multi-layer neural network; in both cases, one alternates linear steps and pointwise nonlinearities. We exploit this connection by parameterizing the SSM and viewing the linear steps as general linear functions, similar to the weight matrices in a neural network. The resulting physics-based machine-learning model has several advantages over "black-box" function approximators. For example, it allows us to examine and interpret the learned solutions in order to understand why they perform well. As an application, low-complexity nonlinear equalization is considered, where the task is to efficiently invert the NLSE. This is commonly referred to as digital backpropagation (DBP). Rather than employing neural networks, the proposed algorithm, dubbed learned DBP (LDBP), uses the physics-based model with trainable filters in each step and its complexity is reduced by progressively pruning filter taps during gradient descent. Our main finding is that the filters can be pruned to remarkably short lengths-as few as 3 taps/step-without sacrificing performance. As a result, the complexity can be reduced by orders of magnitude in comparison to prior work. By inspecting the filter responses, an additional theoretical justification for the learned parameter configurations is provided. Our work illustrates that combining data-driven optimization with existing domain knowledge can generate new insights into old communications problems. 我们为光纤通信系统提出了一种新的机器学习方法，其信号传播由非线性薛定谔方程（NLSE）控制。我们的主要观察是，用于数值求解 NLSE 的流行分步方法（SSM）与深度多层神经网络具有本质上相同的功能形式；在这两种情况下，线性步骤和逐点非线性交替出现。我们通过参数化 SSM 并将线性步骤视为一般线性函数（类似于神经网络中的权重矩阵）来利用这种联系。由此产生的基于物理的机器学习模型比“黑盒”函数逼近器具有多个优点。例如，它允许我们检查和解释学到的解决方案，以了解它们为何表现良好。作为一种应用，考虑低复杂度非线性均衡，其任务是有效地反转 NLSE。这通常称为数字反向传播（DBP）。所提出的被称为学习 DBP (LDBP) 的算法没有采用神经网络，而是使用基于物理的模型，在每个步骤中都具有可训练的滤波器，并且通过在梯度下降期间逐步修剪滤波器抽头来降低其复杂性。我们的主要发现是，可以将滤波器修剪到非常短的长度（每步只需 3 个抽头），而不会牺牲性能。因此，与之前的工作相比，复杂性可以降低几个数量级。通过检查滤波器响应，为学习到的参数配置提供了额外的理论依据。我们的工作表明，将数据驱动的优化与现有领域知识相结合可以产生对旧通信问题的新见解。 本文提出了一种基于物理的深度学习方法，通过参数化分裂步法（SSM）解决光纤通信系统中的非线性薛定谔方程（NLSE），并应用于高效非线性均衡。 Christian Häger,Henry D. Pfister eess.SP,cs.AI,cs.IT,stat.ML

title: RH-Net: Improving Neural Relation Extraction via Reinforcement Learning and Hierarchical Relational Searching
title_zh: RH-Net：通过强化学习和分层关系搜索改进神经关系提取
comment: 7 pages, 3 figures
comments: 7 pages, 3 figures
abstract: Distant supervision (DS) aims to generate large-scale heuristic labeling corpus, which is widely used for neural relation extraction currently. However, it heavily suffers from noisy labeling and long-tail distributions problem. Many advanced approaches usually separately address two problems, which ignore their mutual interactions. In this paper, we propose a novel framework named RH-Net, which utilizes Reinforcement learning and Hierarchical relational searching module to improve relation extraction. We leverage reinforcement learning to instruct the model to select high-quality instances. We then propose the hierarchical relational searching module to share the semantics from correlative instances between data-rich and data-poor classes. During the iterative process, the two modules keep interacting to alleviate the noisy and long-tail problem simultaneously. Extensive experiments on widely used NYT data set clearly show that our method significant improvements over state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: Distant supervision (DS) aims to generate large-scale heuristic labeling corpus, which is widely used for neural relation extraction currently. However, it heavily suffers from noisy labeling and long-tail distributions problem. Many advanced approaches usually separately address two problems, which ignore their mutual interactions. In this paper, we propose a novel framework named RH-Net, which utilizes Reinforcement learning and Hierarchical relational searching module to improve relation extraction. We leverage reinforcement learning to instruct the model to select high-quality instances. We then propose the hierarchical relational searching module to share the semantics from correlative instances between data-rich and data-poor classes. During the iterative process, the two modules keep interacting to alleviate the noisy and long-tail problem simultaneously. Extensive experiments on widely used NYT data set clearly show that our method significant improvements over state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 远程监督（DS）旨在生成大规模启发式标记语料库，目前广泛用于神经关系提取。然而，它严重受到噪声标签和长尾分布问题的影响。许多先进的方法通常分别解决两个问题，而忽略了它们之间的相互作用。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 RH-Net 的新颖框架，它利用强化学习和分层关系搜索模块来改进关系提取。我们利用强化学习来指示模型选择高质量的实例。然后，我们提出层次关系搜索模块来共享数据丰富类和数据贫乏类之间的相关实例的语义。在迭代过程中，两个模块不断交互，同时缓解噪声和长尾问题。对广泛使用的《纽约时报》数据集进行的大量实验清楚地表明，我们的方法比最先进的基线有了显着改进。

AI.tldr: RH-Net通过强化学习与分层关系搜索模块改进神经关系抽取，解决远监督中的噪声标注与长尾分布问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法分别处理远监督的噪声标注和长尾分布问题，忽略二者间的相互作用，导致效果受限。
AI.method: 提出RH-Net框架，结合强化学习筛选高质量实例与分层关系搜索模块共享语义，通过迭代交互缓解噪声与长尾问题。
AI.result: 在NYT数据集上显著优于现有先进方法，验证了RH-Net的有效性。
AI.conclusion: RH-Net通过强化学习与分层语义共享机制，同步缓解噪声和长尾问题，提升关系抽取性能。

title: Neural Networked Assisted Tree Search for the Personnel Rostering Problem
title_zh: 神经网络辅助树搜索解决人员排班问题
comment: 16 pages, 10 figures, 4 tables
comments: 16 pages, 10 figures, 4 tables
abstract: The personnel rostering problem is the problem of finding an optimal way to assign employees to shifts, subject to a set of hard constraints which all valid solutions must follow, and a set of soft constraints which define the relative quality of valid solutions. The problem has received significant attention in the literature and is addressed by a large number of exact and metaheuristic methods. In order to make the complex and costly design of heuristics for the personnel rostering problem automatic, we propose a new method combined Deep Neural Network and Tree Search. By treating schedules as matrices, the neural network can predict the distance between the current solution and the optimal solution. It can select solution strategies by analyzing existing (near-)optimal solutions to personnel rostering problem instances. Combined with branch and bound, the network can give every node a probability which indicates the distance between it and the optimal one, so that a well-informed choice can be made on which branch to choose next and to prune the search tree.
summary: The personnel rostering problem is the problem of finding an optimal way to assign employees to shifts, subject to a set of hard constraints which all valid solutions must follow, and a set of soft constraints which define the relative quality of valid solutions. The problem has received significant attention in the literature and is addressed by a large number of exact and metaheuristic methods. In order to make the complex and costly design of heuristics for the personnel rostering problem automatic, we propose a new method combined Deep Neural Network and Tree Search. By treating schedules as matrices, the neural network can predict the distance between the current solution and the optimal solution. It can select solution strategies by analyzing existing (near-)optimal solutions to personnel rostering problem instances. Combined with branch and bound, the network can give every node a probability which indicates the distance between it and the optimal one, so that a well-informed choice can be made on which branch to choose next and to prune the search tree.
abstract_zh: 人员排班问题是找到一种最佳方式来分配员工轮班的问题，受到一组所有有效解决方案都必须遵循的硬约束和一组定义有效解决方案的相对质量的软约束的影响。这个问题在文献中受到了极大的关注，并通过大量精确和元启发式方法得到了解决。为了使人员排班问题的复杂且昂贵的启发式设计自动化，我们提出了一种结合深度神经网络和树搜索的新方法。通过将调度视为矩阵，神经网络可以预测当前解与最优解之间的距离。它可以通过分析人员排班问题实例的现有（接近）最优解决方案来选择解决策略。结合分支定界，网络可以为每个节点提供一个概率，指示该节点与最优节点之间的距离，以便可以明智地选择下一步选择哪个分支并修剪搜索树。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合深度神经网络与树搜索的方法，用于解决人员排班问题，以自动优化排班方案并满足约束条件。
AI.motivation: 传统启发式算法设计复杂且成本高，需自动化的解决方案以提高效率和适应性。
AI.method: 结合深度神经网络与分支定界法，利用神经网络预测解与最优解的距离，指导搜索树的分支选择与剪枝。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效提升排班问题求解效率，优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过神经网络辅助树搜索，为复杂约束下的排班问题提供了自动化优化的新途径。

By treating schedules as matrices, the neural network can predict the distance between the current solution and the optimal solution. It can select solution strategies by analyzing existing (near-)optimal solutions to personnel rostering problem instances. Combined with branch and bound, the network can give every node a probability which indicates the distance between it and the optimal one, so that a well-informed choice can be made on which branch to choose next and to prune the search tree. 人员排班问题是找到一种最佳方式来分配员工轮班的问题，受到一组所有有效解决方案都必须遵循的硬约束和一组定义有效解决方案的相对质量的软约束的影响。这个问题在文献中受到了极大的关注，并通过大量精确和元启发式方法得到了解决。为了使人员排班问题的复杂且昂贵的启发式设计自动化，我们提出了一种结合深度神经网络和树搜索的新方法。通过将调度视为矩阵，神经网络可以预测当前解与最优解之间的距离。它可以通过分析人员排班问题实例的现有（接近）最优解决方案来选择解决策略。结合分支定界，网络可以为每个节点提供一个概率，指示该节点与最优节点之间的距离，以便可以明智地选择下一步选择哪个分支并修剪搜索树。 提出一种结合深度神经网络与树搜索的方法，用于解决人员排班问题，以自动优化排班方案并满足约束条件。 Ziyi Chen,Patrick De Causmaecker,Yajie Dou cs.AI

authors_text: Christine Utz,Steffen Becker,Theodor Schnitzler,Florian M. Farke,Franziska Herbert,Leonie Schaewitz,Martin Degeling,Markus Dürmuth
title: Apps Against the Spread: Privacy Implications and User Acceptance of COVID-19-Related Smartphone Apps on Three Continents
title_zh: 防止应用程序传播：三大洲与 COVID-19 相关的智能手机应用程序的隐私影响和用户接受度
comment: 22 pages, 1 figure, 8 tables
comments: 22 pages, 1 figure, 8 tables
abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic has fueled the development of smartphone applications to assist disease management. Many "corona apps" require widespread adoption to be effective, which has sparked public debates about the privacy, security, and societal implications of government-backed health applications. We conducted a representative online study in Germany (n = 1,003), the US (n = 1,003), and China (n = 1,019) to investigate user acceptance of corona apps, using a vignette design based on the contextual integrity framework. We explored apps for contact tracing, symptom checks, quarantine enforcement, health certificates, and mere information. Our results provide insights into data processing practices that foster adoption and reveal significant differences between countries, with user acceptance being highest in China and lowest in the US. Chinese participants prefer the collection of personalized data, while German and US participants favor anonymity. Across countries, contact tracing is viewed more positively than quarantine enforcement, and technical malfunctions negatively impact user acceptance.
summary: The COVID-19 pandemic has fueled the development of smartphone applications to assist disease management. Many "corona apps" require widespread adoption to be effective, which has sparked public debates about the privacy, security, and societal implications of government-backed health applications. We conducted a representative online study in Germany (n = 1,003), the US (n = 1,003), and China (n = 1,019) to investigate user acceptance of corona apps, using a vignette design based on the contextual integrity framework. We explored apps for contact tracing, symptom checks, quarantine enforcement, health certificates, and mere information. Our results provide insights into data processing practices that foster adoption and reveal significant differences between countries, with user acceptance being highest in China and lowest in the US. Chinese participants prefer the collection of personalized data, while German and US participants favor anonymity. Across countries, contact tracing is viewed more positively than quarantine enforcement, and technical malfunctions negatively impact user acceptance.
abstract_zh: COVID-19 大流行推动了智能手机应用程序的开发，以协助疾病管理。许多“新冠应用程序”需要广泛采用才能发挥作用，这引发了关于政府支持的健康应用程序的隐私、安全和社会影响的公众辩论。我们在德国（n = 1,003）、美国（n = 1,003）和中国（n = 1,019）进行了一项代表性在线研究，使用基于上下文完整性框架的小插图设计来调查用户对 Corona 应用程序的接受程度。我们探索了用于接触者追踪、症状检查、检疫执行、健康证书和单纯信息的应用程序。我们的研究结果提供了对促进采用的数据处理实践的见解，并揭示了国家之间的显着差异，其中中国的用户接受度最高，美国的用户接受度最低。中国参与者更喜欢收集个性化数据，而德国和美国参与者则倾向于匿名。在各个国家/地区，接触者追踪被认为比检疫执行更为积极，而技术故障会对用户接受度产生负面影响。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了全球三个大洲用户对 COVID-19 相关智能手机应用的接受度及其隐私影响，分析了不同国家用户的隐私偏好和应用类型接受度差异。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情推动了健康类手机应用的开发，但政府主导的应用引发公众对隐私、安全和社会影响的担忧，需明确用户接受度及隐私偏好以指导应用设计。
AI.method: 通过在线调查（德国、美国、中国各1000+样本），采用基于情境完整性框架的场景设计，分析接触追踪、症状检查等五类应用的用户接受度差异。
AI.result: 中国用户接受度最高，偏好个性化数据收集；德美用户更倾向匿名性。接触追踪应用接受度高于隔离管控应用，技术故障显著降低用户信任。
AI.conclusion: 应用设计需平衡隐私保护与功能需求，不同文化背景下的数据处理规范差异是推动应用普及的关键因素。

authors_text: Lantian Li,Yang Zhang,Jiawen Kang,Thomas Fang Zheng,Dong Wang
title: Squeezing value of cross-domain labels: a decoupled scoring approach for speaker verification
title_zh: 挤压跨域标签的价值：一种用于说话人验证的解耦评分方法
comment: Submitted to ICASSP 2021
comments: Submitted to ICASSP 2021
abstract: Domain mismatch often occurs in real applications and causes serious performance reduction on speaker verification systems. The common wisdom is to collect cross-domain data and train a multi-domain PLDA model, with the hope to learn a domain-independent speaker subspace. In this paper, we firstly present an empirical study to show that simply adding cross-domain data does not help performance in conditions with enrollment-test mismatch. Careful analysis shows that this striking result is caused by the incoherent statistics between the enrollment and test conditions. Based on this analysis, we present a decoupled scoring approach that can maximally squeeze the value of cross-domain labels and obtain optimal verification scores when the enrollment and test are mismatched. When the statistics are coherent, the new formulation falls back to the conventional PLDA. Experimental results on cross-channel test show that the proposed approach is highly effective and is a principle solution to domain mismatch.
summary: Domain mismatch often occurs in real applications and causes serious performance reduction on speaker verification systems. The common wisdom is to collect cross-domain data and train a multi-domain PLDA model, with the hope to learn a domain-independent speaker subspace. In this paper, we firstly present an empirical study to show that simply adding cross-domain data does not help performance in conditions with enrollment-test mismatch. Careful analysis shows that this striking result is caused by the incoherent statistics between the enrollment and test conditions. Based on this analysis, we present a decoupled scoring approach that can maximally squeeze the value of cross-domain labels and obtain optimal verification scores when the enrollment and test are mismatched. When the statistics are coherent, the new formulation falls back to the conventional PLDA. Experimental results on cross-channel test show that the proposed approach is highly effective and is a principle solution to domain mismatch.
abstract_zh: 域不匹配在实际应用中经常发生，并导致说话人验证系统的性能严重下降。普遍的想法是收集跨域数据并训练多域PLDA模型，希望学习与域无关的说话人子空间。在本文中，我们首先提出一项实证研究，表明简单地添加跨域数据并不能帮助在入学测试不匹配的情况下提高性能。仔细分析，这种惊人的结果是由于招生条件和考试条件统计不一致造成的。基于此分析，我们提出了一种解耦评分方法，可以最大限度地挤压跨域标签的价值，并在注册和测试不匹配时获得最佳验证分数。当统计数据一致时，新公式会回归到传统的 PLDA。跨通道测试的实验结果表明，该方法非常有效，是解决域不匹配问题的原则性方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种解耦评分方法，通过有效利用跨领域标签来解决说话人验证中的领域不匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在跨领域数据下表现不佳，因注册与测试条件的统计不一致性导致性能下降，需寻找更有效的领域不匹配解决方案。
AI.method: 设计解耦评分框架，最大化跨领域标签价值，在统计不一致时调整评分机制，统计一致时退化为传统PLDA模型。
AI.result: 跨通道测试表明，该方法显著提升领域不匹配场景下的验证性能，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 解耦评分方法通过智能利用跨领域标签，为解决说话人验证中的领域不匹配问题提供了原理性解决方案。

authors_text: Haoran Sun,Lantian Li,Yunqi Cai,Yang Zhang,Thomas Fang Zheng,Dong Wang
title: Deep generative factorization for speech signal
title_zh: 语音信号的深度生成分解
comment: Submitted to ICASSP 2021
comments: Submitted to ICASSP 2021
abstract: Various information factors are blended in speech signals, which forms the primary difficulty for most speech information processing tasks. An intuitive idea is to factorize speech signal into individual information factors (e.g., phonetic content and speaker trait), though it turns out to be highly challenging. This paper presents a speech factorization approach based on a novel factorial discriminative normalization flow model (factorial DNF). Experiments conducted on a two-factor case that involves phonetic content and speaker trait demonstrates that the proposed factorial DNF has powerful capability to factorize speech signals and outperforms several comparative models in terms of information representation and manipulation.
summary: Various information factors are blended in speech signals, which forms the primary difficulty for most speech information processing tasks. An intuitive idea is to factorize speech signal into individual information factors (e.g., phonetic content and speaker trait), though it turns out to be highly challenging. This paper presents a speech factorization approach based on a novel factorial discriminative normalization flow model (factorial DNF). Experiments conducted on a two-factor case that involves phonetic content and speaker trait demonstrates that the proposed factorial DNF has powerful capability to factorize speech signals and outperforms several comparative models in terms of information representation and manipulation.
abstract_zh: 语音信号中混合了多种信息因素，这是大多数语音信息处理任务的首要难点。一个直观的想法是将语音信号分解为单独的信息因素（例如语音内容和说话者特征），尽管事实证明这非常具有挑战性。本文提出了一种基于新型阶乘判别归一化流模型（阶乘 DNF）的语音分解方法。在涉及语音内容和说话人特征的双因素案例上进行的实验表明，所提出的阶乘 DNF 具有强大的分解语音信号的能力，并且在信息表示和操作方面优于几种比较模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于因子判别归一化流模型的语音信号深度生成分解方法，旨在将语音信号中的不同信息因素（如音素内容和说话人特征）分离。
AI.motivation: 语音信号包含多种混合信息因素，导致语音处理任务面临挑战，现有方法难以有效分解这些因素。
AI.method: 设计因子判别归一化流模型（factorial DNF），通过生成模型实现语音信号的多因素分解。
AI.result: 在包含音素内容和说话人特征的双因素实验中，该方法在信息表示和操作上优于多个对比模型。
AI.conclusion: 因子DNF模型有效实现了语音信号的生成式分解，为语音信息处理提供了新思路。

search_text: Deep generative factorization for speech signal 语音信号的深度生成分解 Various information factors are blended in speech signals, which forms the primary difficulty for most speech information processing tasks. An intuitive idea is to factorize speech signal into individual information factors (e.g., phonetic content and speaker trait), though it turns out to be highly challenging. This paper presents a speech factorization approach based on a novel factorial discriminative normalization flow model (factorial DNF). Experiments conducted on a two-factor case that involves phonetic content and speaker trait demonstrates that the proposed factorial DNF has powerful capability to factorize speech signals and outperforms several comparative models in terms of information representation and manipulation. 语音信号中混合了多种信息因素，这是大多数语音信息处理任务的首要难点。一个直观的想法是将语音信号分解为单独的信息因素（例如语音内容和说话者特征），尽管事实证明这非常具有挑战性。本文提出了一种基于新型阶乘判别归一化流模型（阶乘 DNF）的语音分解方法。在涉及语音内容和说话人特征的双因素案例上进行的实验表明，所提出的阶乘 DNF 具有强大的分解语音信号的能力，并且在信息表示和操作方面优于几种比较模型。 本文提出一种基于因子判别归一化流模型的语音信号深度生成分解方法，旨在将语音信号中的不同信息因素（如音素内容和说话人特征）分离。 Haoran Sun,Lantian Li,Yunqi Cai,Yang Zhang,Thomas Fang Zheng,Dong Wang cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

title: Scientific intuition inspired by machine learning generated hypotheses
title_zh: 受机器学习启发的科学直觉产生的假设
comment: ef:Machine Learning: Science and Technology 2, 025027 (2021)
comments: ef:Machine Learning: Science and Technology 2, 025027 (2021)
abstract: Machine learning with application to questions in the physical sciences has become a widely used tool, successfully applied to classification, regression and optimization tasks in many areas. Research focus mostly lies in improving the accuracy of the machine learning models in numerical predictions, while scientific understanding is still almost exclusively generated by human researchers analysing numerical results and drawing conclusions. In this work, we shift the focus on the insights and the knowledge obtained by the machine learning models themselves. In particular, we study how it can be extracted and used to inspire human scientists to increase their intuitions and understanding of natural systems. We apply gradient boosting in decision trees to extract human interpretable insights from big data sets from chemistry and physics. In chemistry, we not only rediscover widely know rules of thumb but also find new interesting motifs that tell us how to control solubility and energy levels of organic molecules. At the same time, in quantum physics, we gain new understanding on experiments for quantum entanglement. The ability to go beyond numerics and to enter the realm of scientific insight and hypothesis generation opens the door to use machine learning to accelerate the discovery of conceptual understanding in some of the most challenging domains of science.

Research focus mostly lies in improving the accuracy of the machine learning models in numerical predictions, while scientific understanding is still almost exclusively generated by human researchers analysing numerical results and drawing conclusions. In this work, we shift the focus on the insights and the knowledge obtained by the machine learning models themselves. In particular, we study how it can be extracted and used to inspire human scientists to increase their intuitions and understanding of natural systems. We apply gradient boosting in decision trees to extract human interpretable insights from big data sets from chemistry and physics. In chemistry, we not only rediscover widely know rules of thumb but also find new interesting motifs that tell us how to control solubility and energy levels of organic molecules. At the same time, in quantum physics, we gain new understanding on experiments for quantum entanglement. The ability to go beyond numerics and to enter the realm of scientific insight and hypothesis generation opens the door to use machine learning to accelerate the discovery of conceptual understanding in some of the most challenging domains of science.
abstract_zh: 应用于物理科学问题的机器学习已成为一种广泛使用的工具，成功应用于许多领域的分类、回归和优化任务。研究重点主要在于提高机器学习模型在数值预测中的准确性，而科学理解仍然几乎完全由人类研究人员分析数值结果并得出结论而产生。在这项工作中，我们将重点转移到机器学习模型本身获得的见解和知识上。特别是，我们研究如何提取和使用它来启发人类科学家增加他们对自然系统的直觉和理解。我们在决策树中应用梯度提升，从化学和物理的大数据集中提取人类可解释的见解。在化学中，我们不仅重新发现了广为人知的经验法则，而且还发现了新的有趣的主题，告诉我们如何控制有机分子的溶解度和能量水平。与此同时，在量子物理领域，我们对量子纠缠实验有了新的认识。超越数字并进入科学洞察和假设生成领域的能力为使用机器学习加速发现一些最具挑战性的科学领域的概念理解打开了大门。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过机器学习模型提取科学洞察力，以启发人类科学家更好地理解自然系统。
AI.motivation: 尽管机器学习在物理科学中广泛应用，但科学理解仍主要依赖人类分析结果。本文希望探索机器学习模型自身能提供的科学见解和假设生成能力。
AI.method: 本文使用梯度提升决策树方法，从化学和物理的大数据集中提取可解释的科学洞察。
AI.result: 在化学领域，重新发现了已知的经验规则，并发现了控制有机分子溶解度和能量水平的新模式；在量子物理领域，获得了关于量子纠缠实验的新理解。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习不仅能够提供数值预测，还能生成科学洞察和假设，从而加速某些科学领域的概念性理解发现。

title: Multi-XScience: A Large-scale Dataset for Extreme Multi-document Summarization of Scientific Articles
title_zh: Multi-XScience：用于科学文章的极端多文档摘要的大型数据集
comment: EMNLP 2020
comments: EMNLP 2020
abstract: Multi-document summarization is a challenging task for which there exists little large-scale datasets. We propose Multi-XScience, a large-scale multi-document summarization dataset created from scientific articles. Multi-XScience introduces a challenging multi-document summarization task: writing the related-work section of a paper based on its abstract and the articles it references. Our work is inspired by extreme summarization, a dataset construction protocol that favours abstractive modeling approaches. Descriptive statistics and empirical results---using several state-of-the-art models trained on the Multi-XScience dataset---reveal that Multi-XScience is well suited for abstractive models.
summary: Multi-document summarization is a challenging task for which there exists little large-scale datasets. We propose Multi-XScience, a large-scale multi-document summarization dataset created from scientific articles. Multi-XScience introduces a challenging multi-document summarization task: writing the related-work section of a paper based on its abstract and the articles it references. Our work is inspired by extreme summarization, a dataset construction protocol that favours abstractive modeling approaches. Descriptive statistics and empirical results---using several state-of-the-art models trained on the Multi-XScience dataset---reveal that Multi-XScience is well suited for abstractive models.
abstract_zh: 多文档摘要是一项具有挑战性的任务，几乎没有大规模数据集。我们提出了 Multi-XScience，这是一个由科学文章创建的大规模多文档摘要数据集。 Multi-XScience 引入了一项具有挑战性的多文档摘要任务：根据摘要及其引用的文章编写论文的相关工作部分。我们的工作受到极端总结的启发，这是一种有利于抽象建模方法的数据集构建协议。描述性统计数据和实证结果（使用在 Multi-XScience 数据集上训练的几种最先进的模型）表明 Multi-XScience 非常适合抽象模型。

AI.tldr: 提出Multi-XScience数据集，用于基于科学论文摘要和参考文献生成相关工作部分的多文档摘要任务。
AI.motivation: 现有大规模多文档摘要数据集稀缺，需创建新数据集以促进该领域研究。
AI.method: 构建Multi-XScience数据集，从科学论文中提取摘要和参考文献，生成相关工作部分，采用极端摘要协议。
AI.result: 实验显示，使用该数据集训练的模型在抽象式摘要任务中表现良好。
AI.conclusion: Multi-XScience为多文档摘要研究提供了有效资源，适合抽象式模型训练。

title: Align-Refine: Non-Autoregressive Speech Recognition via Iterative Realignment
title_zh: Align-Refine：通过迭代重新对齐进行非自回归语音识别
abstract: Non-autoregressive models greatly improve decoding speed over typical sequence-to-sequence models, but suffer from degraded performance. Infilling and iterative refinement models make up some of this gap by editing the outputs of a non-autoregressive model, but are constrained in the edits that they can make. We propose iterative realignment, where refinements occur over latent alignments rather than output sequence space. We demonstrate this in speech recognition with Align-Refine, an end-to-end Transformer-based model which refines connectionist temporal classification (CTC) alignments to allow length-changing insertions and deletions. Align-Refine outperforms Imputer and Mask-CTC, matching an autoregressive baseline on WSJ at 1/14th the real-time factor and attaining a LibriSpeech test-other WER of 9.0% without an LM. Our model is strong even in one iteration with a shallower decoder.
summary: Non-autoregressive models greatly improve decoding speed over typical sequence-to-sequence models, but suffer from degraded performance. Infilling and iterative refinement models make up some of this gap by editing the outputs of a non-autoregressive model, but are constrained in the edits that they can make. We propose iterative realignment, where refinements occur over latent alignments rather than output sequence space. We demonstrate this in speech recognition with Align-Refine, an end-to-end Transformer-based model which refines connectionist temporal classification (CTC) alignments to allow length-changing insertions and deletions. Align-Refine outperforms Imputer and Mask-CTC, matching an autoregressive baseline on WSJ at 1/14th the real-time factor and attaining a LibriSpeech test-other WER of 9.0% without an LM. Our model is strong even in one iteration with a shallower decoder.
abstract_zh: 与典型的序列到序列模型相比，非自回归模型极大地提高了解码速度，但性能却下降了。填充和迭代细化模型通过编辑非自回归模型的输出来弥补这一差距，但它们可以进行的编辑受到限制。我们提出迭代重新对齐，其中细化发生在潜在对齐而不是输出序列空间上。我们使用 Align-Refine 在语音识别中演示了这一点，Align-Refine 是一种基于 Transformer 的端到端模型，可细化连接主义时间分类 (CTC) 对齐，以允许长度变化的插入和删除。 Align-Refine 的性能优于 Imputer 和 Mask-CTC，与 WSJ 上的自回归基线匹配实时因子的 1/14，并且在没有 LM 的情况下实现 LibriSpeech 测试其他 WER 为 9.0%。即使在使用较浅解码器的一次迭代中，我们的模型也很强大。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Align-Refine模型，通过迭代对齐机制改进非自回归语音识别性能。
AI.motivation: 非自回归模型虽解码速度快，但存在性能下降问题，现有优化方法在编辑能力上存在局限。
AI.method: 基于Transformer架构，通过迭代优化CTC对齐实现长度变化的插入/删除操作，无需依赖语言模型。
AI.result: 在WSJ数据集上达到自回归基线水平（1/14实时因子），LibriSpeech测试集WER为9.0%（无LM），单次迭代浅层解码器即表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 迭代对齐方法有效平衡了速度与准确率，为非自回归模型提供了新的优化方向。
