title: Co-attentional Transformers for Story-Based Video Understanding
title_zh: 用于基于故事的视频理解的共同注意变压器
comment: 10 pages, 2 figures, submitted to ICASSP 2021
comments: 10 pages, 2 figures, submitted to ICASSP 2021
abstract: Inspired by recent trends in vision and language learning, we explore applications of attention mechanisms for visio-lingual fusion within an application to story-based video understanding. Like other video-based QA tasks, video story understanding requires agents to grasp complex temporal dependencies. However, as it focuses on the narrative aspect of video it also requires understanding of the interactions between different characters, as well as their actions and their motivations. We propose a novel co-attentional transformer model to better capture long-term dependencies seen in visual stories such as dramas and measure its performance on the video question answering task. We evaluate our approach on the recently introduced DramaQA dataset which features character-centered video story understanding questions. Our model outperforms the baseline model by 8 percentage points overall, at least 4.95 and up to 12.8 percentage points on all difficulty levels and manages to beat the winner of the DramaQA challenge.
summary: Inspired by recent trends in vision and language learning, we explore applications of attention mechanisms for visio-lingual fusion within an application to story-based video understanding. Like other video-based QA tasks, video story understanding requires agents to grasp complex temporal dependencies. However, as it focuses on the narrative aspect of video it also requires understanding of the interactions between different characters, as well as their actions and their motivations. We propose a novel co-attentional transformer model to better capture long-term dependencies seen in visual stories such as dramas and measure its performance on the video question answering task. We evaluate our approach on the recently introduced DramaQA dataset which features character-centered video story understanding questions. Our model outperforms the baseline model by 8 percentage points overall, at least 4.95 and up to 12.8 percentage points on all difficulty levels and manages to beat the winner of the DramaQA challenge.
abstract_zh: 受视觉和语言学习最新趋势的启发，我们探索了视觉语言融合注意机制在基于故事的视频理解应用中的应用。与其他基于视频的 QA 任务一样，视频故事理解需要代理掌握复杂的时间依赖性。然而，由于它侧重于视频的叙事方面，因此还需要了解不同角色之间的互动以及他们的行为和动机。我们提出了一种新颖的共同注意变压器模型，以更好地捕获戏剧等视觉故事中的长期依赖性，并衡量其在视频问答任务中的表现。我们在最近引入的 DramaQA 数据集上评估了我们的方法，该数据集具有以角色为中心的视频故事理解问题。我们的模型总体优于基准模型 8 个百分点，在所有难度级别上至少优于 4.95 个百分点，最高可达 12.8 个百分点，并成功击败了 DramaQA 挑战赛的获胜者。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于共注意力机制的Transformer模型，用于故事导向的视频理解任务，特别是在视频问答（Video QA）场景中。
AI.motivation: 视频故事理解需要捕捉复杂的时序依赖关系及角色间互动，而现有方法在处理叙事性内容时存在不足，因此需要设计更有效的模型来融合视觉与语言信息。
AI.method: 提出共注意力Transformer模型，通过联合视觉和语言模态的注意力机制，捕捉视频中角色行为、互动及叙事逻辑，并在DramaQA数据集上进行评估。
AI.result: 模型在DramaQA数据集上整体超越基线8个百分点，在不同难度级别上提升4.95至12.8个百分点，并击败了DramaQA挑战赛冠军方案。
AI.conclusion: 共注意力Transformer有效建模了视频叙事中的长时依赖与角色交互，为故事导向的视频理解提供了更优解决方案。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 共注意力Transformer有效建模了视频叙事中的长时依赖与角色交互，为故事导向的视频理解提供了更优解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于共注意力机制的Transformer模型，用于故事导向的视频理解任务，特别是在视频问答（Video QA）场景中。
motivation: 视频故事理解需要捕捉复杂的时序依赖关系及角色间互动，而现有方法在处理叙事性内容时存在不足，因此需要设计更有效的模型来融合视觉与语言信息。
method: 提出共注意力Transformer模型，通过联合视觉和语言模态的注意力机制，捕捉视频中角色行为、互动及叙事逻辑，并在DramaQA数据集上进行评估。
result: 模型在DramaQA数据集上整体超越基线8个百分点，在不同难度级别上提升4.95至12.8个百分点，并击败了DramaQA挑战赛冠军方案。
conclusion: 共注意力Transformer有效建模了视频叙事中的长时依赖与角色交互，为故事导向的视频理解提供了更优解决方案。
search_text: Co-attentional Transformers for Story-Based Video Understanding 用于基于故事的视频理解的共同注意变压器 Inspired by recent trends in vision and language learning, we explore applications of attention mechanisms for visio-lingual fusion within an application to story-based video understanding. Like other video-based QA tasks, video story understanding requires agents to grasp complex temporal dependencies. However, as it focuses on the narrative aspect of video it also requires understanding of the interactions between different characters, as well as their actions and their motivations. We propose a novel co-attentional transformer model to better capture long-term dependencies seen in visual stories such as dramas and measure its performance on the video question answering task. We evaluate our approach on the recently introduced DramaQA dataset which features character-centered video story understanding questions. Our model outperforms the baseline model by 8 percentage points overall, at least 4.95 and up to 12.8 percentage points on all difficulty levels and manages to beat the winner of the DramaQA challenge. 受视觉和语言学习最新趋势的启发，我们探索了视觉语言融合注意机制在基于故事的视频理解应用中的应用。与其他基于视频的 QA 任务一样，视频故事理解需要代理掌握复杂的时间依赖性。然而，由于它侧重于视频的叙事方面，因此还需要了解不同角色之间的互动以及他们的行为和动机。我们提出了一种新颖的共同注意变压器模型，以更好地捕获戏剧等视觉故事中的长期依赖性，并衡量其在视频问答任务中的表现。我们在最近引入的 DramaQA 数据集上评估了我们的方法，该数据集具有以角色为中心的视频故事理解问题。我们的模型总体优于基准模型 8 个百分点，在所有难度级别上至少优于 4.95 个百分点，最高可达 12.8 个百分点，并成功击败了 DramaQA 挑战赛的获胜者。 本文提出了一种基于共注意力机制的Transformer模型，用于故事导向的视频理解任务，特别是在视频问答（Video QA）场景中。 Björn Bebensee,Byoung-Tak Zhang cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CL

title: Emotion recognition by fusing time synchronous and time asynchronous representations
title_zh: 通过融合时间同步和时间异步表示进行情感识别
comment: ef:ICASSP 2021 - 2021 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP), 2021, pp. 6269-6273
comments: ef:ICASSP 2021 - 2021 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP), 2021, pp. 6269-6273
abstract: In this paper, a novel two-branch neural network model structure is proposed for multimodal emotion recognition, which consists of a time synchronous branch (TSB) and a time asynchronous branch (TAB). To capture correlations between each word and its acoustic realisation, the TSB combines speech and text modalities at each input window frame and then does pooling across time to form a single embedding vector. The TAB, by contrast, provides cross-utterance information by integrating sentence text embeddings from a number of context utterances into another embedding vector. The final emotion classification uses both the TSB and the TAB embeddings. Experimental results on the IEMOCAP dataset demonstrate that the two-branch structure achieves state-of-the-art results in 4-way classification with all common test setups. When using automatic speech recognition (ASR) output instead of manually transcribed reference text, it is shown that the cross-utterance information considerably improves the robustness against ASR errors. Furthermore, by incorporating an extra class for all the other emotions, the final 5-way classification system with ASR hypotheses can be viewed as a prototype for more realistic emotion recognition systems.
summary: In this paper, a novel two-branch neural network model structure is proposed for multimodal emotion recognition, which consists of a time synchronous branch (TSB) and a time asynchronous branch (TAB). To capture correlations between each word and its acoustic realisation, the TSB combines speech and text modalities at each input window frame and then does pooling across time to form a single embedding vector. The TAB, by contrast, provides cross-utterance information by integrating sentence text embeddings from a number of context utterances into another embedding vector. The final emotion classification uses both the TSB and the TAB embeddings. Experimental results on the IEMOCAP dataset demonstrate that the two-branch structure achieves state-of-the-art results in 4-way classification with all common test setups. When using automatic speech recognition (ASR) output instead of manually transcribed reference text, it is shown that the cross-utterance information considerably improves the robustness against ASR errors. Furthermore, by incorporating an extra class for all the other emotions, the final 5-way classification system with ASR hypotheses can be viewed as a prototype for more realistic emotion recognition systems.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于多模态情感识别的新型双分支神经网络模型结构，该结构由时间同步分支（TSB）和时间异步分支（TAB）组成。为了捕获每个单词及其声学实现之间的相关性，TSB 在每个输入窗口帧处组合语音和文本模态，然后跨时间进行池化以形成单个嵌入向量。相比之下，TAB 通过将多个上下文话语中的句子文本嵌入集成到另一个嵌入向量中来提供交叉话语信息。最终的情感分类同时使用 TSB 和 TAB 嵌入。 IEMOCAP 数据集上的实验结果表明，二分支结构在所有常见测试设置的 4 路分类中实现了最先进的结果。当使用自动语音识别 (ASR) 输出而不是手动转录的参考文本时，交叉话语信息显着提高了针对 ASR 错误的鲁棒性。此外，通过为所有其他情绪合并一个额外的类，带有 ASR 假设的最终 5 路分类系统可以被视为更现实的情绪识别系统的原型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双分支神经网络模型，通过融合时间同步和异步表示进行多模态情感识别。
AI.motivation: 现有情感识别方法未能充分结合同步（语音与文本实时关联）和异步（跨语句上下文）信息，导致模型鲁棒性不足，尤其在自动语音识别（ASR）误差场景下表现欠佳。
AI.method: 设计包含时间同步分支（TSB）和时间异步分支（TAB）的双分支结构。TSB在每帧输入中融合语音与文本模态并进行时序池化，TAB通过整合多语句文本嵌入获取跨语句信息，最终联合两分支特征进行情感分类。
AI.result: 在IEMOCAP数据集上，该模型在4分类任务中达到最先进水平；使用ASR文本时，跨语句信息显著提升抗误差能力；扩展为5分类后可作为更贴近现实的系统原型。
AI.conclusion: 双分支结构有效结合同步与异步信息，提升情感识别准确率与ASR鲁棒性，为实际应用提供可行方案。

title: A Multi-task Two-stream Spatiotemporal Convolutional Neural Network for Convective Storm Nowcasting
title_zh: 用于对流风暴临近预报的多任务双流时空卷积神经网络
comment: 14 pages, 7 figures, 3 tables
comments: 14 pages, 7 figures, 3 tables
abstract: The goal of convective storm nowcasting is local prediction of severe and imminent convective storms. Here, we consider the convective storm nowcasting problem from the perspective of machine learning. First, we use a pixel-wise sampling method to construct spatiotemporal features for nowcasting, and flexibly adjust the proportions of positive and negative samples in the training set to mitigate class-imbalance issues. Second, we employ a concise two-stream convolutional neural network to extract spatial and temporal cues for nowcasting. This simplifies the network structure, reduces the training time requirement, and improves classification accuracy. The two-stream network used both radar and satellite data. In the resulting two-stream, fused convolutional neural network, some of the parameters are entered into a single-stream convolutional neural network, but it can learn the features of many data. Further, considering the relevance of classification and regression tasks, we develop a multi-task learning strategy that predicts the labels used in such tasks. We integrate two-stream multi-task learning into a single convolutional neural network. Given the compact architecture, this network is more efficient and easier to optimize than existing recurrent neural networks.
summary: The goal of convective storm nowcasting is local prediction of severe and imminent convective storms. Here, we consider the convective storm nowcasting problem from the perspective of machine learning. First, we use a pixel-wise sampling method to construct spatiotemporal features for nowcasting, and flexibly adjust the proportions of positive and negative samples in the training set to mitigate class-imbalance issues. Second, we employ a concise two-stream convolutional neural network to extract spatial and temporal cues for nowcasting. This simplifies the network structure, reduces the training time requirement, and improves classification accuracy. The two-stream network used both radar and satellite data. In the resulting two-stream, fused convolutional neural network, some of the parameters are entered into a single-stream convolutional neural network, but it can learn the features of many data. Further, considering the relevance of classification and regression tasks, we develop a multi-task learning strategy that predicts the labels used in such tasks. We integrate two-stream multi-task learning into a single convolutional neural network. Given the compact architecture, this network is more efficient and easier to optimize than existing recurrent neural networks.
abstract_zh: 对流风暴临近预报的目标是对强对流风暴和即将发生的对流风暴进行局部预测。在这里，我们从机器学习的角度考虑对流风暴临近预报问题。首先，我们使用逐像素采样方法构建用于临近预报的时空特征，并灵活调整训练集中正样本和负样本的比例以缓解类不平衡问题。其次，我们采用简洁的双流卷积神经网络来提取临近预报的空间和时间线索。这简化了网络结构，减少了训练时间要求，并提高了分类精度。双流网络同时使用雷达和卫星数据。在得到的双流融合卷积神经网络中，一些参数被输入到单流卷积神经网络中，但它可以学习许多数据的特征。此外，考虑到分类和回归任务的相关性，我们开发了一种多任务学习策略来预测此类任务中使用的标签。我们将双流多任务学习集成到单个卷积神经网络中。鉴于紧凑的架构，该网络比现有的循环神经网络更高效且更容易优化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多任务双流时空卷积神经网络，用于对流风暴的临近预报。
AI.motivation: 对流风暴临近预报需要准确预测局部地区的强对流风暴，但传统方法存在类不平衡问题和效率低下的问题。
AI.method: 采用像素级采样方法构建时空特征，使用双流卷积神经网络提取空间和时间信息，并融合雷达和卫星数据，同时引入多任务学习策略进行分类和回归任务。
AI.result: 该网络结构更紧凑，训练时间更短，分类准确率更高，优于现有的循环神经网络。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的多任务双流卷积神经网络在对流风暴临近预报任务中表现优异，具有较高的效率和准确性。

Further, considering the relevance of classification and regression tasks, we develop a multi-task learning strategy that predicts the labels used in such tasks. We integrate two-stream multi-task learning into a single convolutional neural network. Given the compact architecture, this network is more efficient and easier to optimize than existing recurrent neural networks. 对流风暴临近预报的目标是对强对流风暴和即将发生的对流风暴进行局部预测。在这里，我们从机器学习的角度考虑对流风暴临近预报问题。首先，我们使用逐像素采样方法构建用于临近预报的时空特征，并灵活调整训练集中正样本和负样本的比例以缓解类不平衡问题。其次，我们采用简洁的双流卷积神经网络来提取临近预报的空间和时间线索。这简化了网络结构，减少了训练时间要求，并提高了分类精度。双流网络同时使用雷达和卫星数据。在得到的双流融合卷积神经网络中，一些参数被输入到单流卷积神经网络中，但它可以学习许多数据的特征。此外，考虑到分类和回归任务的相关性，我们开发了一种多任务学习策略来预测此类任务中使用的标签。我们将双流多任务学习集成到单个卷积神经网络中。鉴于紧凑的架构，该网络比现有的循环神经网络更高效且更容易优化。 本文提出了一种多任务双流时空卷积神经网络，用于对流风暴的临近预报。 W. Zhang,H. Liu,P. Li,L. Han cs.CV,physics.ao-ph,physics.geo-ph

title: Universal ASR: Unifying Streaming and Non-Streaming ASR Using a Single Encoder-Decoder Model
title_zh: 通用 ASR：使用单一编码器-解码器模型统一流式和非流式 ASR
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures, submitted to ICASSP 2021
comments: 5 pages, 2 figures, submitted to ICASSP 2021
abstract: Recently, online end-to-end ASR has gained increasing attention. However, the performance of online systems still lags far behind that of offline systems, with a large gap in quality of recognition. For specific scenarios, we can trade-off between performance and latency, and can train multiple systems with different delays to match the performance and latency requirements of various application scenarios. In this work, in contrast to trading-off between performance and latency, we envisage a single system that can match the needs of different scenarios. We propose a novel architecture, termed Universal ASR that can unify streaming and non-streaming ASR models into one system. The embedded streaming ASR model can configure different delays according to requirements to obtain real-time recognition results, while the non-streaming model is able to refresh the final recognition result for better performance. We have evaluated our approach on the public AISHELL-2 benchmark and an industrial-level 20,000-hour Mandarin speech recognition task. The experimental results show that the Universal ASR provides an efficient mechanism to integrate streaming and non-streaming models that can recognize speech quickly and accurately. On the AISHELL-2 task, Universal ASR comfortably outperforms other state-of-the-art systems.
summary: Recently, online end-to-end ASR has gained increasing attention. However, the performance of online systems still lags far behind that of offline systems, with a large gap in quality of recognition. For specific scenarios, we can trade-off between performance and latency, and can train multiple systems with different delays to match the performance and latency requirements of various application scenarios. In this work, in contrast to trading-off between performance and latency, we envisage a single system that can match the needs of different scenarios. We propose a novel architecture, termed Universal ASR that can unify streaming and non-streaming ASR models into one system. The embedded streaming ASR model can configure different delays according to requirements to obtain real-time recognition results, while the non-streaming model is able to refresh the final recognition result for better performance. We have evaluated our approach on the public AISHELL-2 benchmark and an industrial-level 20,000-hour Mandarin speech recognition task. The experimental results show that the Universal ASR provides an efficient mechanism to integrate streaming and non-streaming models that can recognize speech quickly and accurately. On the AISHELL-2 task, Universal ASR comfortably outperforms other state-of-the-art systems.
abstract_zh: 最近，在线端到端ASR受到越来越多的关注。然而，在线系统的性能仍然远远落后于离线系统，识别质量差距较大。针对特定场景，我们可以在性能和延迟之间进行权衡，可以训练多个不同延迟的系统，以匹配各种应用场景的性能和延迟要求。在这项工作中，与性能和延迟之间的权衡相反，我们设想一个可以满足不同场景需求的单一系统。我们提出了一种称为通用 ASR 的新颖架构，可以将流式和非流式 ASR 模型统一到一个系统中。嵌入式流式ASR模型可以根据需求配置不同的延迟以获得实时识别结果，而非流式模型可以刷新最终的识别结果以获得更好的性能。我们在公共 AISHELL-2 基准和工业级 20,000 小时普通话语音识别任务上评估了我们的方法。实验结果表明，通用ASR提供了一种有效的机制来集成流式和非流式模型，可以快速准确地识别语音。在 AISHELL-2 任务中，Universal ASR 轻松胜过其他最先进的系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Universal ASR的统一架构，将流式和非流式语音识别模型整合到单一编码器-解码器系统中，以满足不同场景的需求。
AI.motivation: 现有流式语音识别系统性能远低于非流式系统，需通过训练多个系统在性能与延迟间权衡，但无法满足多样化场景需求。本文旨在设计一个单一系统以兼顾不同场景的性能与延迟要求。
AI.method: 提出Universal ASR架构，通过嵌入流式模型按需配置不同延迟获取实时结果，同时利用非流式模型优化最终识别效果，实现单一模型的动态适配。
AI.result: 在AISHELL-2基准测试和工业级20,000小时普通话任务中验证，Universal ASR在AISHELL-2任务上显著优于现有最先进的系统。
AI.conclusion: Universal ASR提供了一种高效整合流式与非流式模型的机制，可在保证识别速度的同时提升准确性，为多场景语音识别提供了统一解决方案。

authors_text: Aisha Urooj Khan,Amir Mazaheri,Niels da Vitoria Lobo,Mubarak Shah
title: MMFT-BERT: Multimodal Fusion Transformer with BERT Encodings for Visual Question Answering
title_zh: MMFT-BERT：具有 BERT 编码的多模态融合变压器，用于视觉问答
comment: Accepted at Findings of EMNLP 2020
comments: Accepted at Findings of EMNLP 2020
abstract: We present MMFT-BERT(MultiModal Fusion Transformer with BERT encodings), to solve Visual Question Answering (VQA) ensuring individual and combined processing of multiple input modalities. Our approach benefits from processing multimodal data (video and text) adopting the BERT encodings individually and using a novel transformer-based fusion method to fuse them together. Our method decomposes the different sources of modalities, into different BERT instances with similar architectures, but variable weights. This achieves SOTA results on the TVQA dataset. Additionally, we provide TVQA-Visual, an isolated diagnostic subset of TVQA, which strictly requires the knowledge of visual (V) modality based on a human annotator's judgment. This set of questions helps us to study the model's behavior and the challenges TVQA poses to prevent the achievement of super human performance. Extensive experiments show the effectiveness and superiority of our method.
summary: We present MMFT-BERT(MultiModal Fusion Transformer with BERT encodings), to solve Visual Question Answering (VQA) ensuring individual and combined processing of multiple input modalities. Our approach benefits from processing multimodal data (video and text) adopting the BERT encodings individually and using a novel transformer-based fusion method to fuse them together. Our method decomposes the different sources of modalities, into different BERT instances with similar architectures, but variable weights. This achieves SOTA results on the TVQA dataset. Additionally, we provide TVQA-Visual, an isolated diagnostic subset of TVQA, which strictly requires the knowledge of visual (V) modality based on a human annotator's judgment. This set of questions helps us to study the model's behavior and the challenges TVQA poses to prevent the achievement of super human performance. Extensive experiments show the effectiveness and superiority of our method.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 MMFT-BERT（带有 BERT 编码的多模态融合变压器），以解决视觉问答（VQA）问题，确保多种输入模态的单独和组合处理。我们的方法受益于处理多模态数据（视频和文本），单独采用 BERT 编码，并使用一种新颖的基于 Transformer 的融合方法将它们融合在一起。我们的方法将不同的模态源分解为具有相似架构但权重可变的不同 BERT 实例。这在 TVQA 数据集上取得了 SOTA 结果。此外，我们还提供 TVQA-Visual，这是 TVQA 的一个独立诊断子集，它严格要求基于人类注释者判断的视觉 (V) 模态知识。这组问题有助于我们研究模型的行为以及 TVQA 为阻止实现超人类表现而提出的挑战。大量的实验证明了我们方法的有效性和优越性。

AI.tldr: 提出MMFT-BERT模型用于视觉问答，通过多模态融合提升答案准确性
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理多模态数据时未能有效分离和融合不同模态信息，导致性能瓶颈
AI.method: 采用独立BERT编码处理视频和文本模态，利用新型Transformer融合机制整合多模态信息，通过可变权重分解不同模态特征
AI.result: 在TVQA数据集上取得最优结果，并构建TVQA-Visual子集验证模型对视觉模态的依赖性
AI.conclusion: 证明了多模态分离融合方法的有效性，通过诊断子集揭示模型在视觉问答中的关键挑战

title: Triple-view Convolutional Neural Networks for COVID-19 Diagnosis with Chest X-ray
title_zh: 三视图卷积神经网络用于胸部 X 光诊断的 COVID-19
abstract: The Coronavirus Disease 2019 (COVID-19) is affecting increasingly large number of people worldwide, posing significant stress to the health care systems. Early and accurate diagnosis of COVID-19 is critical in screening of infected patients and breaking the person-to-person transmission. Chest X-ray (CXR) based computer-aided diagnosis of COVID-19 using deep learning becomes a promising solution to this end. However, the diverse and various radiographic features of COVID-19 make it challenging, especially when considering each CXR scan typically only generates one single image. Data scarcity is another issue since collecting large-scale medical CXR data set could be difficult at present. Therefore, how to extract more informative and relevant features from the limited samples available becomes essential. To address these issues, unlike traditional methods processing each CXR image from a single view, this paper proposes triple-view convolutional neural networks for COVID-19 diagnosis with CXR images. Specifically, the proposed networks extract individual features from three views of each CXR image, i.e., the left lung view, the right lung view and the overall view, in three streams and then integrate them for joint diagnosis. The proposed network structure respects the anatomical structure of human lungs and is well aligned with clinical diagnosis of COVID-19 in practice. In addition, the labeling of the views does not require experts' domain knowledge, which is needed by many existing methods. The experimental results show that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance, especially in the more challenging three class classification task, and admits wide generality and high flexibility.
summary: The Coronavirus Disease 2019 (COVID-19) is affecting increasingly large number of people worldwide, posing significant stress to the health care systems. Early and accurate diagnosis of COVID-19 is critical in screening of infected patients and breaking the person-to-person transmission. Chest X-ray (CXR) based computer-aided diagnosis of COVID-19 using deep learning becomes a promising solution to this end. However, the diverse and various radiographic features of COVID-19 make it challenging, especially when considering each CXR scan typically only generates one single image. Data scarcity is another issue since collecting large-scale medical CXR data set could be difficult at present. Therefore, how to extract more informative and relevant features from the limited samples available becomes essential. To address these issues, unlike traditional methods processing each CXR image from a single view, this paper proposes triple-view convolutional neural networks for COVID-19 diagnosis with CXR images. Specifically, the proposed networks extract individual features from three views of each CXR image, i.e., the left lung view, the right lung view and the overall view, in three streams and then integrate them for joint diagnosis. The proposed network structure respects the anatomical structure of human lungs and is well aligned with clinical diagnosis of COVID-19 in practice. In addition, the labeling of the views does not require experts' domain knowledge, which is needed by many existing methods. The experimental results show that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance, especially in the more challenging three class classification task, and admits wide generality and high flexibility.
abstract_zh: 2019 年冠状病毒病 (COVID-19) 正在影响全世界越来越多的人，给医疗保健系统带来巨大压力。 COVID-19 的早期、准确诊断对于筛查感染患者和阻断人际传播至关重要。使用深度学习的基于胸部 X 射线 (CXR) 的计算机辅助诊断 COVID-19 成为实现这一目标的一个有前景的解决方案。然而，COVID-19 的多样化放射照相特征使其具有挑战性，特别是考虑到每次 CXR 扫描通常仅生成一张图像时。数据稀缺是另一个问题，因为目前收集大规模医学 CXR 数据集可能很困难。因此，如何从有限的可用样本中提取更多信息和相关特征变得至关重要。为了解决这些问题，与从单个视图处理每个 CXR 图像的传统方法不同，本文提出了使用 CXR 图像进行 COVID-19 诊断的三视图卷积神经网络。具体来说，所提出的网络从每个 CXR 图像的三个视图（即左肺视图、右肺视图和整体视图）中提取三个流中的各个特征，然后将它们集成以进行联合诊断。所提出的网络结构尊重人肺的解剖结构，并且与实践中的 COVID-19 临床诊断非常吻合。此外，视图的标记不需要专家的领域知识，而这是许多现有方法所需要的。实验结果表明，该方法实现了最先进的性能，特别是在更具挑战性的三类分类任务中，并且具有广泛的通用性和高度的灵活性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种三视图卷积神经网络，用于基于胸部X光片的COVID-19诊断。
AI.motivation: COVID-19的放射特征多样且数据稀缺，传统单视图方法难以有效提取信息，需改进特征提取方法以提高诊断准确性。
AI.method: 设计三流网络分别提取左肺、右肺及整体视图特征，整合多视图信息进行联合诊断，无需专家标注即可实现视图划分。
AI.result: 在三分类任务中达到最先进性能，表现出广泛适用性与高灵活性。
AI.conclusion: 三视图结构符合肺部解剖特征，临床诊断契合度高，有效解决了数据稀缺下的特征提取难题。

search_text: Triple-view Convolutional Neural Networks for COVID-19 Diagnosis with Chest X-ray 三视图卷积神经网络用于胸部 X 光诊断的 COVID-19 The Coronavirus Disease 2019 (COVID-19) is affecting increasingly large number of people worldwide, posing significant stress to the health care systems. Early and accurate diagnosis of COVID-19 is critical in screening of infected patients and breaking the person-to-person transmission. Chest X-ray (CXR) based computer-aided diagnosis of COVID-19 using deep learning becomes a promising solution to this end. However, the diverse and various radiographic features of COVID-19 make it challenging, especially when considering each CXR scan typically only generates one single image. Data scarcity is another issue since collecting large-scale medical CXR data set could be difficult at present. Therefore, how to extract more informative and relevant features from the limited samples available becomes essential. To address these issues, unlike traditional methods processing each CXR image from a single view, this paper proposes triple-view convolutional neural networks for COVID-19 diagnosis with CXR images. Specifically, the proposed networks extract individual features from three views of each CXR image, i.e., the left lung view, the right lung view and the overall view, in three streams and then integrate them for joint diagnosis. The proposed network structure respects the anatomical structure of human lungs and is well aligned with clinical diagnosis of COVID-19 in practice. In addition, the labeling of the views does not require experts' domain knowledge, which is needed by many existing methods. The experimental results show that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance, especially in the more challenging three class classification task, and admits wide generality and high flexibility. 2019 年冠状病毒病 (COVID-19) 正在影响全世界越来越多的人，给医疗保健系统带来巨大压力。 COVID-19 的早期、准确诊断对于筛查感染患者和阻断人际传播至关重要。使用深度学习的基于胸部 X 射线 (CXR) 的计算机辅助诊断 COVID-19 成为实现这一目标的一个有前景的解决方案。然而，COVID-19 的多样化放射照相特征使其具有挑战性，特别是考虑到每次 CXR 扫描通常仅生成一张图像时。数据稀缺是另一个问题，因为目前收集大规模医学 CXR 数据集可能很困难。因此，如何从有限的可用样本中提取更多信息和相关特征变得至关重要。为了解决这些问题，与从单个视图处理每个 CXR 图像的传统方法不同，本文提出了使用 CXR 图像进行 COVID-19 诊断的三视图卷积神经网络。具体来说，所提出的网络从每个 CXR 图像的三个视图（即左肺视图、右肺视图和整体视图）中提取三个流中的各个特征，然后将它们集成以进行联合诊断。所提出的网络结构尊重人肺的解剖结构，并且与实践中的 COVID-19 临床诊断非常吻合。此外，视图的标记不需要专家的领域知识，而这是许多现有方法所需要的。实验结果表明，该方法实现了最先进的性能，特别是在更具挑战性的三类分类任务中，并且具有广泛的通用性和高度的灵活性。 本文提出了一种三视图卷积神经网络，用于基于胸部X光片的COVID-19诊断。 Jianjia Zhang eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Luanxuan Hou,Jie Cao,Yuan Zhao,Haifeng Shen,Jian Tang,Ran He
title: $P^2$ Net: Augmented Parallel-Pyramid Net for Attention Guided Pose Estimation
title_zh: $P^2$ Net：用于注意力引导姿势估计的增强并行金字塔网络
comment: Accepted by ICPR2020. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2003.07516
comments: Accepted by ICPR2020. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2003.07516
abstract: We propose an augmented Parallel-Pyramid Net ($P^2~Net$) with feature refinement by dilated bottleneck and attention module. During data preprocessing, we proposed a differentiable auto data augmentation ($DA^2$) method. We formulate the problem of searching data augmentaion policy in a differentiable form, so that the optimal policy setting can be easily updated by back propagation during training. $DA^2$ improves the training efficiency. A parallel-pyramid structure is followed to compensate the information loss introduced by the network. We innovate two fusion structures, i.e. Parallel Fusion and Progressive Fusion, to process pyramid features from backbone network. Both fusion structures leverage the advantages of spatial information affluence at high resolution and semantic comprehension at low resolution effectively. We propose a refinement stage for the pyramid features to further boost the accuracy of our network. By introducing dilated bottleneck and attention module, we increase the receptive field for the features with limited complexity and tune the importance to different feature channels. To further refine the feature maps after completion of feature extraction stage, an Attention Module ($AM$) is defined to extract weighted features from different scale feature maps generated by the parallel-pyramid structure. Compared with the traditional up-sampling refining, $AM$ can better capture the relationship between channels. Experiments corroborate the effectiveness of our proposed method. Notably, our method achieves the best performance on the challenging MSCOCO and MPII datasets.
summary: We propose an augmented Parallel-Pyramid Net ($P^2~Net$) with feature refinement by dilated bottleneck and attention module. During data preprocessing, we proposed a differentiable auto data augmentation ($DA^2$) method. We formulate the problem of searching data augmentaion policy in a differentiable form, so that the optimal policy setting can be easily updated by back propagation during training. $DA^2$ improves the training efficiency. A parallel-pyramid structure is followed to compensate the information loss introduced by the network. We innovate two fusion structures, i.e. Parallel Fusion and Progressive Fusion, to process pyramid features from backbone network. Both fusion structures leverage the advantages of spatial information affluence at high resolution and semantic comprehension at low resolution effectively. We propose a refinement stage for the pyramid features to further boost the accuracy of our network. By introducing dilated bottleneck and attention module, we increase the receptive field for the features with limited complexity and tune the importance to different feature channels. To further refine the feature maps after completion of feature extraction stage, an Attention Module ($AM$) is defined to extract weighted features from different scale feature maps generated by the parallel-pyramid structure. Compared with the traditional up-sampling refining, $AM$ can better capture the relationship between channels. Experiments corroborate the effectiveness of our proposed method. Notably, our method achieves the best performance on the challenging MSCOCO and MPII datasets.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个增强的并行金字塔网络（$P^2~Net$），通过扩张瓶颈和注意模块进行特征细化。在数据预处理过程中，我们提出了一种可微自动数据增强（$DA^2$）方法。我们以可微形式提出搜索数据增强策略的问题，以便在训练期间可以通过反向传播轻松更新最优策略设置。 $DA^2$提高了训练效率。采用平行金字塔结构来补偿网络引入的信息损失。我们创新了两种融合结构，即并行融合和渐进融合，来处理来自骨干网络的金字塔特征。两种融合结构有效地利用了高分辨率下空间信息丰富和低分辨率下语义理解的优势。我们提出了金字塔特征的细化阶段，以进一步提高网络的准确性。通过引入扩张瓶颈和注意力模块，我们增加了复杂度有限的特征的感受野，并调整了对不同特征通道的重要性。为了在特征提取阶段完成后进一步细化特征图，定义了一个注意力模块（$AM$）来从平行金字塔结构生成的不同尺度特征图中提取加权特征。与传统的上采样精炼相比，$AM$ 可以更好地捕捉通道之间的关系。实验证实了我们提出的方法的有效性。值得注意的是，我们的方法在具有挑战性的 MSCOCO 和 MPII 数据集上实现了最佳性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为$P^2$ Net的增强型并行金字塔网络，用于注意力引导的姿态估计，通过特征细化和数据增强方法提升性能。
AI.motivation: 传统姿态估计网络存在信息丢失和训练效率低的问题，需通过特征融合与自适应数据增强策略提升精度与效率。
AI.method: 提出可微分数据增强方法$DA^2$、并行金字塔结构及两种融合机制（并行融合与渐进融合），结合空洞瓶颈模块和注意力模块优化特征表达。
AI.result: 在MSCOCO和MPII数据集上达到最优性能，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: $P^2$ Net通过特征细化与注意力机制创新，显著提升了姿态估计的准确性与鲁棒性。

title: Neural Network Approximation: Three Hidden Layers Are Enough
title_zh: 神经网络逼近：三个隐藏层就足够了
comment: ef:Neural Networks, Volume 141, September 2021, Pages 160-173
comments: ef:Neural Networks, Volume 141, September 2021, Pages 160-173
abstract: A three-hidden-layer neural network with super approximation power is introduced. This network is built with the floor function ($\lfloor x\rfloor$), the exponential function ($2^x$), the step function ($1_{x\geq 0}$), or their compositions as the activation function in each neuron and hence we call such networks as Floor-Exponential-Step (FLES) networks. For any width hyper-parameter $N\in\mathbb{N}^+$, it is shown that FLES networks with width $\max\{d,N\}$ and three hidden layers can uniformly approximate a Hölder continuous function $f$ on $[0,1]^d$ with an exponential approximation rate $3λ(2\sqrt{d})^α 2^{-αN}$, where $α\in(0,1]$ and $λ>0$ are the Hölder order and constant, respectively. More generally for an arbitrary continuous function $f$ on $[0,1]^d$ with a modulus of continuity $ω_f(\cdot)$, the constructive approximation rate is $2ω_f(2\sqrt{d}){2^{-N}}+ω_f(2\sqrt{d}\,2^{-N})$. Moreover, we extend such a result to general bounded continuous functions on a bounded set $E\subseteq\mathbb{R}^d$. As a consequence, this new class of networks overcomes the curse of dimensionality in approximation power when the variation of $ω_f(r)$ as $r\rightarrow 0$ is moderate (e.g., $ω_f(r)\lesssim r^α$ for Hölder continuous functions), since the major term to be concerned in our approximation rate is essentially $\sqrt{d}$ times a function of $N$ independent of $d$ within the modulus of continuity. Finally, we extend our analysis to derive similar approximation results in the $L^p$-norm for $p\in[1,\infty)$ via replacing Floor-Exponential-Step activation functions by continuous activation functions.
summary: A three-hidden-layer neural network with super approximation power is introduced. This network is built with the floor function ($\lfloor x\rfloor$), the exponential function ($2^x$), the step function ($1_{x\geq 0}$), or their compositions as the activation function in each neuron and hence we call such networks as Floor-Exponential-Step (FLES) networks. For any width hyper-parameter $N\in\mathbb{N}^+$, it is shown that FLES networks with width $\max\{d,N\}$ and three hidden layers can uniformly approximate a Hölder continuous function $f$ on $[0,1]^d$ with an exponential approximation rate $3λ(2\sqrt{d})^α 2^{-αN}$, where $α\in(0,1]$ and $λ>0$ are the Hölder order and constant, respectively. More generally for an arbitrary continuous function $f$ on $[0,1]^d$ with a modulus of continuity $ω_f(\cdot)$, the constructive approximation rate is $2ω_f(2\sqrt{d}){2^{-N}}+ω_f(2\sqrt{d}\,2^{-N})$. Moreover, we extend such a result to general bounded continuous functions on a bounded set $E\subseteq\mathbb{R}^d$. As a consequence, this new class of networks overcomes the curse of dimensionality in approximation power when the variation of $ω_f(r)$ as $r\rightarrow 0$ is moderate (e.g., $ω_f(r)\lesssim r^α$ for Hölder continuous functions), since the major term to be concerned in our approximation rate is essentially $\sqrt{d}$ times a function of $N$ independent of $d$ within the modulus of continuity. Finally, we extend our analysis to derive similar approximation results in the $L^p$-norm for $p\in[1,\infty)$ via replacing Floor-Exponential-Step activation functions by continuous activation functions.
abstract_zh: 介绍了一种具有超逼近能力的三隐层神经网络。该网络是用下限函数 ($\lfloor x\rfloor$)、指数函数 ($2^x$)、阶跃函数 ($1_{x\geq 0}$) 或它们的组合作为每个神经元的激活函数构建的，因此我们将此类网络称为下限指数阶跃 (FLES) 网络。对于任何宽度超参数 $N\in\mathbb{N}^+$，结果表明宽度为 $\max\{d,N\}$ 和三个隐藏层的 FLES 网络可以以指数逼近率 $3λ(2\sqrt{d})^α 2^{-αN}$ 均匀逼近 $[0,1]^d$ 上的 Hölder 连续函数 $f$，其中 $α\in(0,1]$ 和$λ>0$ 分别是 Hölder 阶数和常数。更一般地，对于 $[0,1]^d$ 上具有连续模 $ω_f(\cdot)$ 的任意连续函数 $f$，构造近似率为 $2ω_f(2\sqrt{d}){2^{-N}}+ω_f(2\sqrt{d}\,2^{-N})$。此外，我们将这样的结果扩展到一般情况。有界集合 $E\subseteq\mathbb{R}^d$ 上的有界连续函数 因此，当 $ω_f(r)$ 作为 $r\rightarrow 0$ 的变化适中时（例如，对于 Hölder 连续函数，$ω_f(r)\lesssim r^α$），这种新型网络克服了近似幂的维数灾难，因为我们的近似率中涉及的主要项本质上是$\sqrt{d}$ 乘以连续性模内独立于 $d$ 的 $N$ 函数。最后，我们扩展分析，通过用连续激活函数替换 Floor-Exponential-Step 激活函数，在 $p\in[1,\infty)$ 的 $L^p$-范数中得出类似的近似结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种具有超强逼近能力的三层隐藏层神经网络（FLES网络），通过特定激活函数实现对高维连续函数的高效逼近。
AI.motivation: 解决传统神经网络在高维函数逼近中面临的维度灾难问题，提升网络对复杂函数的逼近效率与精度。
AI.method: 设计使用floor函数、指数函数和阶跃函数作为激活函数的FLES网络，通过分析Hölder连续函数和一般连续函数的模连续性，建立三层网络的逼近率理论框架。
AI.result: 证明三层FLES网络可以指数级速率逼近Hölder连续函数，并扩展到一般连续函数，逼近率主要依赖于网络宽度N而非维度d，突破维度灾难限制。
AI.conclusion: FLES网络通过特定激活函数设计，在函数逼近中有效克服维度灾难，为高维数据建模提供理论支持与新方法。

search_text: Neural Network Approximation: Three Hidden Layers Are Enough 神经网络逼近：三个隐藏层就足够了 A three-hidden-layer neural network with super approximation power is introduced. This network is built with the floor function ($\lfloor x\rfloor$), the exponential function ($2^x$), the step function ($1_{x\geq 0}$), or their compositions as the activation function in each neuron and hence we call such networks as Floor-Exponential-Step (FLES) networks. For any width hyper-parameter $N\in\mathbb{N}^+$, it is shown that FLES networks with width $\max\{d,N\}$ and three hidden layers can uniformly approximate a Hölder continuous function $f$ on $[0,1]^d$ with an exponential approximation rate $3λ(2\sqrt{d})^α 2^{-αN}$, where $α\in(0,1]$ and $λ>0$ are the Hölder order and constant, respectively. More generally for an arbitrary continuous function $f$ on $[0,1]^d$ with a modulus of continuity $ω_f(\cdot)$, the constructive approximation rate is $2ω_f(2\sqrt{d}){2^{-N}}+ω_f(2\sqrt{d}\,2^{-N})$. Moreover, we extend such a result to general bounded continuous functions on a bounded set $E\subseteq\mathbb{R}^d$. As a consequence, this new class of networks overcomes the curse of dimensionality in approximation power when the variation of $ω_f(r)$ as $r\rightarrow 0$ is moderate (e.g., $ω_f(r)\lesssim r^α$ for Hölder continuous functions), since the major term to be concerned in our approximation rate is essentially $\sqrt{d}$ times a function of $N$ independent of $d$ within the modulus of continuity. Finally, we extend our analysis to derive similar approximation results in the $L^p$-norm for $p\in[1,\infty)$ via replacing Floor-Exponential-Step activation functions by continuous activation functions. 介绍了一种具有超逼近能力的三隐层神经网络。该网络是用下限函数 ($\lfloor x\rfloor$)、指数函数 ($2^x$)、阶跃函数 ($1_{x\geq 0}$) 或它们的组合作为每个神经元的激活函数构建的，因此我们将此类网络称为下限指数阶跃 (FLES) 网络。对于任何宽度超参数 $N\in\mathbb{N}^+$，结果表明宽度为 $\max\{d,N\}$ 和三个隐藏层的 FLES 网络可以以指数逼近率 $3λ(2\sqrt{d})^α 2^{-αN}$ 均匀逼近 $[0,1]^d$ 上的 Hölder 连续函数 $f$，其中 $α\in(0,1]$ 和$λ>0$ 分别是 Hölder 阶数和常数。更一般地，对于 $[0,1]^d$ 上具有连续模 $ω_f(\cdot)$ 的任意连续函数 $f$，构造近似率为 $2ω_f(2\sqrt{d}){2^{-N}}+ω_f(2\sqrt{d}\,2^{-N})$。此外，我们将这样的结果扩展到一般情况。有界集合 $E\subseteq\mathbb{R}^d$ 上的有界连续函数 因此，当 $ω_f(r)$ 作为 $r\rightarrow 0$ 的变化适中时（例如，对于 Hölder 连续函数，$ω_f(r)\lesssim r^α$），这种新型网络克服了近似幂的维数灾难，因为我们的近似率中涉及的主要项本质上是$\sqrt{d}$ 乘以连续性模内独立于 $d$ 的 $N$ 函数。最后，我们扩展分析，通过用连续激活函数替换 Floor-Exponential-Step 激活函数，在 $p\in[1,\infty)$ 的 $L^p$-范数中得出类似的近似结果。 本文提出了一种具有超强逼近能力的三层隐藏层神经网络（FLES网络），通过特定激活函数实现对高维连续函数的高效逼近。 Zuowei Shen,Haizhao Yang,Shijun Zhang cs.LG,cs.NE,stat.ML

title: Structure-based Optical Logics Without Using Transistors
title_zh: 不使用晶体管的基于结构的光学逻辑
comment: Accepted by IEEE/IEIE ICCE-Asia 2020 (The Fifth International Conference On Consumer Electronics (ICCE) Asia). 6 pages, 9 figures, DOI update, extended version of arXiv:2001.11321
comments: Accepted by IEEE/IEIE ICCE-Asia 2020 (The Fifth International Conference On Consumer Electronics (ICCE) Asia). 6 pages, 9 figures, DOI update, extended version of arXiv:2001.11321
abstract: The commercialization of transistors capable of both switching and amplification in 1960 resulted in the development of second-generation computers, which resulted in the miniaturization and lightening while accelerating the reduction and development of production costs. However, the self-resistance and the resistance used in conjunction with semiconductors, which are the basic principles of computers, generate a lot of heat, which results in semiconductor obsolescence, and limits the computation speed (clock rate). In implementing logic operation, this paper proposes the concept of Structure-based Computer which can implement NOT gate made of semiconductor transistor only by Structure-based twist of cable without resistance. In Structure-based computer, the theory of 'inverse signal pair' of digital signals was introduced so that it could operate in a different way than semiconductor-based transistors. In this paper, we propose a new hardware called Structure-based computer that can solve various problems in semiconductor computers only with the wiring structure of the conductor itself, not with the silicon-based semiconductor. Furthermore, we propose a deep-priority exploration-based simulation method that can easily implement and test complex Structure-based computer circuits. Furthermore, this paper suggests a mechanism to implement optical computers currently under development and research based on structures rather than devices.
summary: The commercialization of transistors capable of both switching and amplification in 1960 resulted in the development of second-generation computers, which resulted in the miniaturization and lightening while accelerating the reduction and development of production costs. However, the self-resistance and the resistance used in conjunction with semiconductors, which are the basic principles of computers, generate a lot of heat, which results in semiconductor obsolescence, and limits the computation speed (clock rate). In implementing logic operation, this paper proposes the concept of Structure-based Computer which can implement NOT gate made of semiconductor transistor only by Structure-based twist of cable without resistance. In Structure-based computer, the theory of 'inverse signal pair' of digital signals was introduced so that it could operate in a different way than semiconductor-based transistors. In this paper, we propose a new hardware called Structure-based computer that can solve various problems in semiconductor computers only with the wiring structure of the conductor itself, not with the silicon-based semiconductor. Furthermore, we propose a deep-priority exploration-based simulation method that can easily implement and test complex Structure-based computer circuits. Furthermore, this paper suggests a mechanism to implement optical computers currently under development and research based on structures rather than devices.
abstract_zh: 1960年，兼具开关和放大功能的晶体管商业化，带动了第二代计算机的发展，实现了计算机的小型化、轻量化，同时加速了生产成本的降低和发展。然而，作为计算机基本原理的自电阻和与半导体结合使用的电阻会产生大​​量热量，导致半导体报废，并限制计算速度（时钟频率）。在实现逻辑运算时，本文提出了基于结构的计算机的概念，仅通过基于结构的无电阻电缆绞合即可实现由半导体晶体管制成的非门。在基于结构的计算机中，引入了数字信号的“逆信号对”理论，使其能够以与基于半导体的晶体管不同的方式运行。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为基于结构的计算机的新硬件，它可以仅用导体本身的布线结构来解决半导体计算机中的各种问题，而不是用硅基半导体。此外，我们提出了一种基于深度优先探索的模拟方法，可以轻松实现和测试复杂的基于结构的计算机电路。此外，本文提出了一种基于结构而不是设备来实现目前正在开发和研究的光学计算机的机制。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于结构而非晶体管的计算机系统，通过电缆结构实现逻辑运算，解决半导体计算机的发热和速度限制问题。
AI.motivation: 传统半导体计算机因电阻发热和速度限制面临瓶颈，需寻找无需晶体管的新计算架构。
AI.method: 通过电缆结构扭曲构建逻辑门，引入逆信号对理论，结合深优先探索模拟方法进行电路测试。
AI.result: 成功设计出基于结构的计算机原型，验证了其可行性，并提出适用于光学计算机的结构实现机制。
AI.conclusion: 基于结构的计算架构可有效避免半导体发热问题，为光学计算机发展提供新路径，具有潜在应用前景。

title: Let's Gamble: How a Poor Visualization Can Elicit Risky Behavior
title_zh: 让我们赌一把：糟糕的可视化如何引发危险行为
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1910.09725
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1910.09725
abstract: Data visualizations are standard tools for assessing and communicating risks. However, it is not always clear which designs are optimal or how encoding choices might influence risk perception and decision-making. In this paper, we report the findings of a large-scale gambling game that immersed participants in an environment where their actions impacted their bonuses. Participants chose to either enter a lottery or receive guaranteed monetary gains based on five common visualization designs. By measuring risk perception and observing decision-making, we showed that icon arrays tended to elicit economically sound behavior. We also found that people were more likely to gamble when presented area proportioned triangle and circle designs. Using our results, we model risk perception and discuss how our findings can improve visualization selection.
summary: Data visualizations are standard tools for assessing and communicating risks. However, it is not always clear which designs are optimal or how encoding choices might influence risk perception and decision-making. In this paper, we report the findings of a large-scale gambling game that immersed participants in an environment where their actions impacted their bonuses. Participants chose to either enter a lottery or receive guaranteed monetary gains based on five common visualization designs. By measuring risk perception and observing decision-making, we showed that icon arrays tended to elicit economically sound behavior. We also found that people were more likely to gamble when presented area proportioned triangle and circle designs. Using our results, we model risk perception and discuss how our findings can improve visualization selection.
abstract_zh: 数据可视化是评估和沟通风险的标准工具。然而，并不总是清楚哪些设计是最佳的，或者编码选择如何影响风险感知和决策。在本文中，我们报告了一场大型赌博游戏的调查结果，该游戏让参与者沉浸在他们的行为影响奖金的环境中。参与者根据五种常见的可视化设计选择参加抽奖或获得有保证的金钱收益。通过测量风险感知和观察决策，我们发现图标阵列往往会引发经济上合理的行为。我们还发现，当呈现面积成比例的三角形和圆形设计时，人们更有可能赌博。利用我们的结果，我们对风险感知进行建模，并讨论我们的发现如何改进可视化选择。

AI.tldr: 通过实验研究不同数据可视化设计对风险感知和决策行为的影响
AI.motivation: 现有研究未明确数据可视化设计如何影响风险评估与决策，需探讨不同编码方式对行为的潜在引导作用

search_text: Let's Gamble: How a Poor Visualization Can Elicit Risky Behavior 让我们赌一把：糟糕的可视化如何引发危险行为 Data visualizations are standard tools for assessing and communicating risks. However, it is not always clear which designs are optimal or how encoding choices might influence risk perception and decision-making. In this paper, we report the findings of a large-scale gambling game that immersed participants in an environment where their actions impacted their bonuses. Participants chose to either enter a lottery or receive guaranteed monetary gains based on five common visualization designs. By measuring risk perception and observing decision-making, we showed that icon arrays tended to elicit economically sound behavior. We also found that people were more likely to gamble when presented area proportioned triangle and circle designs. Using our results, we model risk perception and discuss how our findings can improve visualization selection. 数据可视化是评估和沟通风险的标准工具。然而，并不总是清楚哪些设计是最佳的，或者编码选择如何影响风险感知和决策。在本文中，我们报告了一场大型赌博游戏的调查结果，该游戏让参与者沉浸在他们的行为影响奖金的环境中。参与者根据五种常见的可视化设计选择参加抽奖或获得有保证的金钱收益。通过测量风险感知和观察决策，我们发现图标阵列往往会引发经济上合理的行为。我们还发现，当呈现面积成比例的三角形和圆形设计时，人们更有可能赌博。利用我们的结果，我们对风险感知进行建模，并讨论我们的发现如何改进可视化选择。 通过实验研究不同数据可视化设计对风险感知和决策行为的影响 Melanie Bancilhon,Zhengliang Liu,Alvitta Ottley cs.HC

authors_text: Navodini Wijethilake,Mobarakol Islam,Dulani Meedeniya,Charith Chitraranjan,Indika Perera,Hongliang Ren
title: Radiogenomics of Glioblastoma: Identification of Radiomics associated with Molecular Subtypes
title_zh: 胶质母细胞瘤的放射基因组学：与分子亚型相关的放射组学的鉴定
comment: 2nd MICCAI workshop on Radiomics and Radiogenomics in Neuro-oncology using AI, Springer, LNCS, (to appear)
comments: 2nd MICCAI workshop on Radiomics and Radiogenomics in Neuro-oncology using AI, Springer, LNCS, (to appear)
abstract: Glioblastoma is the most malignant type of central nervous system tumor with GBM subtypes cleaved based on molecular level gene alterations. These alterations are also happened to affect the histology. Thus, it can cause visible changes in images, such as enhancement and edema development. In this study, we extract intensity, volume, and texture features from the tumor subregions to identify the correlations with gene expression features and overall survival. Consequently, we utilize the radiomics to find associations with the subtypes of glioblastoma. Accordingly, the fractal dimensions of the whole tumor, tumor core, and necrosis regions show a significant difference between the Proneural, Classical and Mesenchymal subtypes. Additionally, the subtypes of GBM are predicted with an average accuracy of 79% utilizing radiomics and accuracy over 90% utilizing gene expression profiles.
summary: Glioblastoma is the most malignant type of central nervous system tumor with GBM subtypes cleaved based on molecular level gene alterations. These alterations are also happened to affect the histology. Thus, it can cause visible changes in images, such as enhancement and edema development. In this study, we extract intensity, volume, and texture features from the tumor subregions to identify the correlations with gene expression features and overall survival. Consequently, we utilize the radiomics to find associations with the subtypes of glioblastoma. Accordingly, the fractal dimensions of the whole tumor, tumor core, and necrosis regions show a significant difference between the Proneural, Classical and Mesenchymal subtypes. Additionally, the subtypes of GBM are predicted with an average accuracy of 79% utilizing radiomics and accuracy over 90% utilizing gene expression profiles.
abstract_zh: 胶质母细胞瘤是最恶性的中枢神经系统肿瘤类型，其 GBM 亚型根据分子水平基因改变进行划分。这些改变也恰好影响组织学。因此，它会引起图像的可见变化，例如增强和水肿发展。在本研究中，我们从肿瘤亚区域提取强度、体积和纹理特征，以确定与基因表达特征和总体生存率的相关性。因此，我们利用放射组学来寻找与胶质母细胞瘤亚型的关联。因此，整个肿瘤、肿瘤核心和坏死区域的分形维数在前神经亚型、经典亚型和间充质亚型之间显示出显着差异。此外，利用放射组学预测 GBM 亚型的平均准确度为 79%，利用基因表达谱预测的准确度超过 90%。

AI.tldr: 该研究通过分析胶质母细胞瘤的影像组学特征，探索其与分子亚型之间的关联。
AI.motivation: 胶质母细胞瘤的分子亚型与其影像特征存在潜在联系，利用影像组学可为无创诊断和预后评估提供依据。
AI.method: 从肿瘤子区域提取强度、体积和纹理特征，结合基因表达数据及生存分析，利用影像组学模型预测分子亚型。
AI.result: 肿瘤整体、核心及坏死区的分形维度在不同分子亚型间存在显著差异，影像组学预测亚型准确率达79%，基因表达预测准确率超90%。
AI.conclusion: 影像组学可有效关联胶质母细胞瘤的影像特征与分子亚型，为临床提供潜在的非侵入性诊断工具。

title: Jointly Optimizing State Operation Prediction and Value Generation for Dialogue State Tracking
title_zh: 联合优化对话状态跟踪的状态操作预测和价值生成
comment: 8 pages, 3 figures
comments: 8 pages, 3 figures
abstract: We investigate the problem of multi-domain Dialogue State Tracking (DST) with open vocabulary. Existing approaches exploit BERT encoder and copy-based RNN decoder, where the encoder predicts the state operation, and the decoder generates new slot values. However, in such a stacked encoder-decoder structure, the operation prediction objective only affects the BERT encoder and the value generation objective mainly affects the RNN decoder. In this paper, we propose a purely Transformer-based framework, where a single BERT works as both the encoder and the decoder. In so doing, the operation prediction objective and the value generation objective can jointly optimize this BERT for DST. At the decoding step, we re-use the hidden states of the encoder in the self-attention mechanism of the corresponding decoder layers to construct a flat encoder-decoder architecture for effective parameter updating. Experimental results show that our approach substantially outperforms the existing state-of-the-art framework, and it also achieves very competitive performance to the best ontology-based approaches.
summary: We investigate the problem of multi-domain Dialogue State Tracking (DST) with open vocabulary. Existing approaches exploit BERT encoder and copy-based RNN decoder, where the encoder predicts the state operation, and the decoder generates new slot values. However, in such a stacked encoder-decoder structure, the operation prediction objective only affects the BERT encoder and the value generation objective mainly affects the RNN decoder. In this paper, we propose a purely Transformer-based framework, where a single BERT works as both the encoder and the decoder. In so doing, the operation prediction objective and the value generation objective can jointly optimize this BERT for DST. At the decoding step, we re-use the hidden states of the encoder in the self-attention mechanism of the corresponding decoder layers to construct a flat encoder-decoder architecture for effective parameter updating. Experimental results show that our approach substantially outperforms the existing state-of-the-art framework, and it also achieves very competitive performance to the best ontology-based approaches.
abstract_zh: 我们研究具有开放词汇的多域对话状态跟踪（DST）问题。现有方法利用 BERT 编码器和基于复制的 RNN 解码器，其中编码器预测状态操作，解码器生成新的槽值。然而，在这种堆叠式编码器-解码器结构中，操作预测目标仅影响BERT编码器，而值生成目标主要影响RNN解码器。在本文中，我们提出了一个纯粹基于 Transformer 的框架，其中单个 BERT 既充当编码器又充当解码器。这样做，操作预测目标和价值生成目标可以共同优化 DST 的 BERT。在解码步骤中，我们在相应解码器层的自注意力机制中重新使用编码器的隐藏状态来构建平面编码器-解码器架构以进行有效的参数更新。实验结果表明，我们的方法大大优于现有的最先进的框架，并且与最好的基于本体的方法相比，它还实现了非常有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究多领域对话状态追踪，通过联合优化状态操作预测和值生成来提高性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法采用分离的编码器-解码器结构，导致操作预测与值生成目标无法协同优化，限制了模型效果。
AI.method: 提出纯Transformer框架，使用单一BERT同时作为编码器和解码器，通过复用编码器隐藏状态构建扁平架构，实现联合优化。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法显著优于现有最优框架，并达到顶级知识库方法的竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 联合优化框架通过统一模型结构有效提升了多领域对话状态追踪的性能。

title: Nonlinear Monte Carlo Method for Imbalanced Data Learning
title_zh: 不平衡数据学习的非线性蒙特卡罗方法
comment: update experimental data
comments: update experimental data
abstract: For basic machine learning problems, expected error is used to evaluate model performance. Since the distribution of data is usually unknown, we can make simple hypothesis that the data are sampled independently and identically distributed (i.i.d.) and the mean value of loss function is used as the empirical risk by Law of Large Numbers (LLN). This is known as the Monte Carlo method. However, when LLN is not applicable, such as imbalanced data problems, empirical risk will cause overfitting and might decrease robustness and generalization ability. Inspired by the framework of nonlinear expectation theory, we substitute the mean value of loss function with the maximum value of subgroup mean loss. We call it nonlinear Monte Carlo method. In order to use numerical method of optimization, we linearize and smooth the functional of maximum empirical risk and get the descent direction via quadratic programming. With the proposed method, we achieve better performance than SOTA backbone models with less training steps, and more robustness for basic regression and imbalanced classification tasks.
summary: For basic machine learning problems, expected error is used to evaluate model performance. Since the distribution of data is usually unknown, we can make simple hypothesis that the data are sampled independently and identically distributed (i.i.d.) and the mean value of loss function is used as the empirical risk by Law of Large Numbers (LLN). This is known as the Monte Carlo method. However, when LLN is not applicable, such as imbalanced data problems, empirical risk will cause overfitting and might decrease robustness and generalization ability. Inspired by the framework of nonlinear expectation theory, we substitute the mean value of loss function with the maximum value of subgroup mean loss. We call it nonlinear Monte Carlo method. In order to use numerical method of optimization, we linearize and smooth the functional of maximum empirical risk and get the descent direction via quadratic programming. With the proposed method, we achieve better performance than SOTA backbone models with less training steps, and more robustness for basic regression and imbalanced classification tasks.
abstract_zh: 对于基本的机器学习问题，预期误差用于评估模型性能。由于数据的分布通常是未知的，我们可以做简单的假设，即数据是独立同分布（i.i.d.）采样的，并且根据大数定律（LLN）将损失函数的平均值作为经验风险。这称为蒙特卡罗方法。然而，当LLN不适用时，例如数据不平衡问题，经验风险会导致过度拟合，并可能降低鲁棒性和泛化能力。受非线性期望理论框架的启发，我们用子组平均损失的最大值代替损失函数的平均值。我们称之为非线性蒙特卡罗方法。为了使用数值优化方法，我们对最大经验风险函数进行线性化和平滑，并通过二次规划得到下降方向。通过所提出的方法，我们以更少的训练步骤实现了比 SOTA 主干模型更好的性能，并且对于基本回归和不平衡分类任务具有更强的鲁棒性。

AI.motivation: 传统蒙特卡洛方法基于独立同分布假设，但在不平衡数据场景下会导致模型过拟合且泛化能力下降。
AI.method: 受非线性期望理论启发，用子群损失最大值替代损失函数均值，并通过线性化和平滑处理结合二次规划求解下降方向。
AI.result: 在回归和不平衡分类任务中，该方法以更少训练步数超越现有模型，且表现出更强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 非线性蒙特卡洛方法有效提升了不平衡数据学习的性能，为相关任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ryan A. Rossi,Nesreen K. Ahmed,Aldo Carranza,David Arbour,Anup Rao,Sungchul Kim,Eunyee Koh
title: Heterogeneous Graphlets
title_zh: 异质图谱
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1901.10026
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1901.10026
abstract: In this paper, we introduce a generalization of graphlets to heterogeneous networks called typed graphlets. Informally, typed graphlets are small typed induced subgraphs. Typed graphlets generalize graphlets to rich heterogeneous networks as they explicitly capture the higher-order typed connectivity patterns in such networks. To address this problem, we describe a general framework for counting the occurrences of such typed graphlets. The proposed algorithms leverage a number of combinatorial relationships for different typed graphlets. For each edge, we count a few typed graphlets, and with these counts along with the combinatorial relationships, we obtain the exact counts of the other typed graphlets in o(1) constant time. Notably, the worst-case time complexity of the proposed approach matches the time complexity of the best known untyped algorithm. In addition, the approach lends itself to an efficient lock-free and asynchronous parallel implementation. While there are no existing methods for typed graphlets, there has been some work that focused on computing a different and much simpler notion called colored graphlet. The experiments confirm that our proposed approach is orders of magnitude faster and more space-efficient than methods for computing the simpler notion of colored graphlet. Unlike these methods that take hours on small networks, the proposed approach takes only seconds on large networks with millions of edges. Notably, since typed graphlet is more general than colored graphlet (and untyped graphlets), the counts of various typed graphlets can be combined to obtain the counts of the much simpler notion of colored graphlets. The proposed methods give rise to new opportunities and applications for typed graphlets.

Typed graphlets generalize graphlets to rich heterogeneous networks as they explicitly capture the higher-order typed connectivity patterns in such networks. To address this problem, we describe a general framework for counting the occurrences of such typed graphlets. The proposed algorithms leverage a number of combinatorial relationships for different typed graphlets. For each edge, we count a few typed graphlets, and with these counts along with the combinatorial relationships, we obtain the exact counts of the other typed graphlets in o(1) constant time. Notably, the worst-case time complexity of the proposed approach matches the time complexity of the best known untyped algorithm. In addition, the approach lends itself to an efficient lock-free and asynchronous parallel implementation. While there are no existing methods for typed graphlets, there has been some work that focused on computing a different and much simpler notion called colored graphlet. The experiments confirm that our proposed approach is orders of magnitude faster and more space-efficient than methods for computing the simpler notion of colored graphlet. Unlike these methods that take hours on small networks, the proposed approach takes only seconds on large networks with millions of edges. Notably, since typed graphlet is more general than colored graphlet (and untyped graphlets), the counts of various typed graphlets can be combined to obtain the counts of the much simpler notion of colored graphlets. The proposed methods give rise to new opportunities and applications for typed graphlets.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们将图基元推广到异构网络，称为类型化图基元。非正式地，类型图基是小型类型诱导子图。类型化 graphlet 将 graphlet 推广到丰富的异构网络，因为它们明确地捕获此类网络中的高阶类型化连接模式。为了解决这个问题，我们描述了一个用于计算此类类型图的出现次数的通用框架。所提出的算法利用了不同类型图基的多种组合关系。对于每条边，我们计算一些类型图基元，并通过这些计数以及组合关系，我们在 o(1) 恒定时间内获得其他类型图基元的准确计数。值得注意的是，所提出方法的最坏情况时间复杂度与最著名的无类型算法的时间复杂度相匹配。此外，该方法适合于高效的无锁和异步并行实现。虽然没有现有的类型化图基元方法，但已经有一些工作专注于计算一种不同且简单得多的概念，称为彩色图基元。实验证实，我们提出的方法比计算更简单的彩色图元概念的方法要快几个数量级，并且更节省空间。与这些在小型网络上需要数小时的方法不同，所提出的方法在具有数百万条边的大型网络上只需要几秒钟。值得注意的是，由于类型化图基元比彩色图基元（和非类型化图基元）更通用，因此可以组合各种类型化图基元的计数以获得更简单概念的彩色图基元的计数。所提出的方法为类型图基带来了新的机会和应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于异质网络的新型图元（typed graphlets）及其高效计数方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法无法有效处理异质网络中复杂的类型化高阶连接模式，需要更通用的图元表示和高效计算框架。
AI.method: 基于组合数学关系构建通用计数框架，通过边级计算和常数时间推导实现高效计数，并支持并行化实现。
AI.result: 算法在大型网络中比现有方法快数个数量级，且空间效率更高，同时能兼容生成彩色图元计数。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为异质网络分析提供了更通用的工具，拓展了图元在复杂网络中的应用可能性。

title: Effective FAQ Retrieval and Question Matching With Unsupervised Knowledge Injection
title_zh: 通过无监督知识注入进行有效的常见问题解答检索和问题匹配
abstract: Frequently asked question (FAQ) retrieval, with the purpose of providing information on frequent questions or concerns, has far-reaching applications in many areas, where a collection of question-answer (Q-A) pairs compiled a priori can be employed to retrieve an appropriate answer in response to a user\u2019s query that is likely to reoccur frequently. To this end, predominant approaches to FAQ retrieval typically rank question-answer pairs by considering either the similarity between the query and a question (q-Q), the relevance between the query and the associated answer of a question (q-A), or combining the clues gathered from the q-Q similarity measure and the q-A relevance measure. In this paper, we extend this line of research by combining the clues gathered from the q-Q similarity measure and the q-A relevance measure and meanwhile injecting extra word interaction information, distilled from a generic (open domain) knowledge base, into a contextual language model for inferring the q-A relevance. Furthermore, we also explore to capitalize on domain-specific topically-relevant relations between words in an unsupervised manner, acting as a surrogate to the supervised domain-specific knowledge base information. As such, it enables the model to equip sentence representations with the knowledge about domain-specific and topically-relevant relations among words, thereby providing a better q-A relevance measure. We evaluate variants of our approach on a publicly-available Chinese FAQ dataset, and further apply and contextualize it to a large-scale question-matching task, which aims to search questions from a QA dataset that have a similar intent as an input query. Extensive experimental results on these two datasets confirm the promising performance of the proposed approach in relation to some state-of-the-art ones.
summary: Frequently asked question (FAQ) retrieval, with the purpose of providing information on frequent questions or concerns, has far-reaching applications in many areas, where a collection of question-answer (Q-A) pairs compiled a priori can be employed to retrieve an appropriate answer in response to a user\u2019s query that is likely to reoccur frequently. To this end, predominant approaches to FAQ retrieval typically rank question-answer pairs by considering either the similarity between the query and a question (q-Q), the relevance between the query and the associated answer of a question (q-A), or combining the clues gathered from the q-Q similarity measure and the q-A relevance measure. In this paper, we extend this line of research by combining the clues gathered from the q-Q similarity measure and the q-A relevance measure and meanwhile injecting extra word interaction information, distilled from a generic (open domain) knowledge base, into a contextual language model for inferring the q-A relevance. Furthermore, we also explore to capitalize on domain-specific topically-relevant relations between words in an unsupervised manner, acting as a surrogate to the supervised domain-specific knowledge base information. As such, it enables the model to equip sentence representations with the knowledge about domain-specific and topically-relevant relations among words, thereby providing a better q-A relevance measure. We evaluate variants of our approach on a publicly-available Chinese FAQ dataset, and further apply and contextualize it to a large-scale question-matching task, which aims to search questions from a QA dataset that have a similar intent as an input query. Extensive experimental results on these two datasets confirm the promising performance of the proposed approach in relation to some state-of-the-art ones.
abstract_zh: 常见问题 (FAQ) 检索的目的是提供有关常见问题或关注点的信息，在许多领域具有深远的应用，可以使用先验编译的问答 (Q-A) 对集合来检索适当的答案，以响应可能经常重复出现的用户查询。为此，常见问题解答检索的主要方法通常通过考虑查询和问题之间的相似性 (q-Q)、查询和问题的相关答案之间的相关性 (q-A) 或结合从 q-Q 相似性度量和 q-A 相关性度量收集的线索来对问题-答案对进行排名。在本文中，我们通过结合从 q-Q 相似性度量和 q-A 相关性度量中收集的线索来扩展这一研究方向，同时将从通用（开放领域）知识库中提取的额外单词交互信息注入到上下文语言模型中以推断 q-A 相关性。此外，我们还探索以无监督的方式利用单词之间特定领域的主题相关关系，作为有监督的特定领域知识库信息的替代。因此，它使模型能够为句子表示配备有关单词之间特定领域和主题相关关系的知识，从而提供更好的 q-A 相关性度量。我们在公开的中文常见问题解答数据集上评估我们方法的变体，并进一步将其应用到大规模问题匹配任务中，该任务旨在从 QA 数据集中搜索与输入查询具有相似意图的问题。这两个数据集的广泛实验结果证实了所提出的方法相对于一些最先进的方法的有希望的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合无监督知识注入的FAQ检索与问题匹配方法，通过增强问答相关性度量提升检索效果。
AI.motivation: 传统FAQ检索方法仅依赖查询-问题相似度或查询-答案相关性，难以充分捕捉领域特定语义关系，导致检索效果受限。
AI.method: 融合查询-问题相似度与查询-答案相关性线索，注入通用知识库的词交互信息，并通过无监督学习挖掘领域内词间关系以增强句子表示。
AI.result: 在中文FAQ数据集和大规模问题匹配任务中，该方法均优于现有先进模型，验证了无监督知识注入的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 无监督知识注入能有效增强问答相关性建模，为FAQ检索和问题匹配任务提供了新的技术路径。

search_text: Effective FAQ Retrieval and Question Matching With Unsupervised Knowledge Injection 通过无监督知识注入进行有效的常见问题解答检索和问题匹配 Frequently asked question (FAQ) retrieval, with the purpose of providing information on frequent questions or concerns, has far-reaching applications in many areas, where a collection of question-answer (Q-A) pairs compiled a priori can be employed to retrieve an appropriate answer in response to a user\u2019s query that is likely to reoccur frequently. To this end, predominant approaches to FAQ retrieval typically rank question-answer pairs by considering either the similarity between the query and a question (q-Q), the relevance between the query and the associated answer of a question (q-A), or combining the clues gathered from the q-Q similarity measure and the q-A relevance measure. In this paper, we extend this line of research by combining the clues gathered from the q-Q similarity measure and the q-A relevance measure and meanwhile injecting extra word interaction information, distilled from a generic (open domain) knowledge base, into a contextual language model for inferring the q-A relevance. Furthermore, we also explore to capitalize on domain-specific topically-relevant relations between words in an unsupervised manner, acting as a surrogate to the supervised domain-specific knowledge base information. As such, it enables the model to equip sentence representations with the knowledge about domain-specific and topically-relevant relations among words, thereby providing a better q-A relevance measure. We evaluate variants of our approach on a publicly-available Chinese FAQ dataset, and further apply and contextualize it to a large-scale question-matching task, which aims to search questions from a QA dataset that have a similar intent as an input query. Extensive experimental results on these two datasets confirm the promising performance of the proposed approach in relation to some state-of-the-art ones. 常见问题 (FAQ) 检索的目的是提供有关常见问题或关注点的信息，在许多领域具有深远的应用，可以使用先验编译的问答 (Q-A) 对集合来检索适当的答案，以响应可能经常重复出现的用户查询。为此，常见问题解答检索的主要方法通常通过考虑查询和问题之间的相似性 (q-Q)、查询和问题的相关答案之间的相关性 (q-A) 或结合从 q-Q 相似性度量和 q-A 相关性度量收集的线索来对问题-答案对进行排名。在本文中，我们通过结合从 q-Q 相似性度量和 q-A 相关性度量中收集的线索来扩展这一研究方向，同时将从通用（开放领域）知识库中提取的额外单词交互信息注入到上下文语言模型中以推断 q-A 相关性。此外，我们还探索以无监督的方式利用单词之间特定领域的主题相关关系，作为有监督的特定领域知识库信息的替代。因此，它使模型能够为句子表示配备有关单词之间特定领域和主题相关关系的知识，从而提供更好的 q-A 相关性度量。我们在公开的中文常见问题解答数据集上评估我们方法的变体，并进一步将其应用到大规模问题匹配任务中，该任务旨在从 QA 数据集中搜索与输入查询具有相似意图的问题。这两个数据集的广泛实验结果证实了所提出的方法相对于一些最先进的方法的有希望的性能。 本文提出一种结合无监督知识注入的FAQ检索与问题匹配方法，通过增强问答相关性度量提升检索效果。 Wen-Ting Tseng,Tien-Hong Lo,Yung-Chang Hsu,Berlin Chen cs.AI,cs.IR

title: The Teaching Dimension of Kernel Perceptron
title_zh: 核感知器的教学维度
comment: AISTATS 2021
comments: AISTATS 2021
abstract: Algorithmic machine teaching has been studied under the linear setting where exact teaching is possible. However, little is known for teaching nonlinear learners. Here, we establish the sample complexity of teaching, aka teaching dimension, for kernelized perceptrons for different families of feature maps. As a warm-up, we show that the teaching complexity is $Θ(d)$ for the exact teaching of linear perceptrons in $\mathbb{R}^d$, and $Θ(d^k)$ for kernel perceptron with a polynomial kernel of order $k$. Furthermore, under certain smooth assumptions on the data distribution, we establish a rigorous bound on the complexity for approximately teaching a Gaussian kernel perceptron. We provide numerical examples of the optimal (approximate) teaching set under several canonical settings for linear, polynomial and Gaussian kernel perceptrons.
summary: Algorithmic machine teaching has been studied under the linear setting where exact teaching is possible. However, little is known for teaching nonlinear learners. Here, we establish the sample complexity of teaching, aka teaching dimension, for kernelized perceptrons for different families of feature maps. As a warm-up, we show that the teaching complexity is $Θ(d)$ for the exact teaching of linear perceptrons in $\mathbb{R}^d$, and $Θ(d^k)$ for kernel perceptron with a polynomial kernel of order $k$. Furthermore, under certain smooth assumptions on the data distribution, we establish a rigorous bound on the complexity for approximately teaching a Gaussian kernel perceptron. We provide numerical examples of the optimal (approximate) teaching set under several canonical settings for linear, polynomial and Gaussian kernel perceptrons.
abstract_zh: 在可以进行精确教学的线性设置下研究了算法机器教学。然而，人们对非线性学习器的教学知之甚少。在这里，我们为不同系列的特征图的核化感知器建立了教学的样本复杂性，也称为教学维度。作为热身，我们表明，对于 $\mathbb{R}^d$ 中的线性感知器的精确教学，教学复杂度为 $θ(d)$，对于具有 $k$ 阶多项式内核的内核感知器，教学复杂度为 $θ(d^k)$。此外，在数据分布的某些平滑假设下，我们对近似教学高斯核感知器的复杂性建立了严格的界限。我们提供了线性、多项式和高斯核感知器的几种规范设置下的最佳（近似）教学集的数值示例。

AI.tldr: 研究核感知机的教学维度，分析不同核函数下的样本复杂度。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注线性模型的教学复杂度，而对非线性学习器（如核感知机）的教学维度研究不足，需填补这一空白。
AI.method: 通过理论分析推导不同核函数（线性、多项式、高斯核）的教学复杂度上界，并结合数值实验验证结果。
AI.result: 确定了线性感知机Θ(d)、多项式核Θ(d^k)的教学复杂度，并在平滑数据条件下给出了高斯核的近似教学复杂度界，同时提供了数值验证。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次系统分析了核感知机的教学维度，填补了非线性学习器教学复杂度研究的空白，为机器教学理论提供了理论支持和实验验证。
